C:
新的一天开始了。

他走下一艘公司的飞船，走上另一艘。他从未听说过那个目的地，但这不重要。他没有特别想去的地方，唯一的目的是远离过去，远离「故乡」。

而飞船上人来人往，公司员工并不在意他是谁，只要他会干活就好。

他已经改换了模样，未必会被人认出，但他知道那股力量还潜藏在他的身体中，走到哪儿都无法摆脱，这股力量拖累了他的脚步，让他慢下来，试图压垮他，让他无法摆脱过去。他必须小心翼翼。

但他仍旧无法摆脱那个有着野兽般眼睛的男人。

如果说「故乡」中其他人对他的感情是「恨意」，那个男人对他只有「杀意」，连他乘坐过的飞船也被男人悉数歼灭。男人曾在他眼前死去，但不久之后，那个男人又会出现。

「故乡」外，是一个更大的世界，什么都有可能发生。
E:
A new dawn begins.

He steps off one IPC spaceship, then boards another. He'd never even heard of the ship's destination, but that doesn't matter. There is nowhere he particularly wanted to go. His only goal is to get as far away as possible from his past, from his "home."

On these spaceships, people come and go all the time. None of the IPC crews care who he is, so long as he can work.

He has changed his appearance and might no longer be recognized, but he knows that same power still lurks within him, unable to be shaken off no matter where he goes. This power drags him down, slows him, tries to overwhelm him, and makes him unable to escape his past. He has to be careful.

But he still can't shake off the man with the beastly eyes.

If others in his homeworld felt hatred toward him, then that man only has a killing intent toward him — even the spaceships he had traveled on were all annihilated. That man had died before him, but would reappear soon after.

Outside his homeworld, there's a larger world where anything is possible.

C:
她一路向西，穿过大荒野，来到废品山。
她想给自己找点活干，却因独来独往而四处碰壁。
在朋克洛德，人们从来都是搭伙做事，独行的人，大多混不下去。

没有办法，她只能给自己造些虚拟的同伴。
第一个人叫「朋友」，理所当然，它就该叫这名字。
第二个人叫「魔王」，源自她在街头看见的海报，在她的想象中，它是一位失语的军人。
她忽然觉得这个团队有些和睦，缺乏一点真实，便给第三个人取名「打工仔」，给第四个人取名「奴隶」。
最后一个人叫「幼儿园同学」——没什么原因，她实在是创意枯竭了。犹豫再三后，她干脆从名单上划掉了这个人。
她把这些「同伴」存储在一把智能武器里，这样她就能在中间人面前，煞有介事地介绍自己庞大的团队。

她得到了第一份工作，如愿以偿——它的风险同报酬一样难以想象。
或许她的包装太过真实，令人信以为真；又或许他们只是想看看这位新人的表演，无论是死是活。

在朋克洛德，人们从来都是搭伙做事，独行的人，大多混不下去。
所以混出头的那些，最后都成了传奇。

二十四个系统时后，她从炉渣帮的据点里走了出来——独自一人，走的正门。
中间人沉默半晌，看了看她，又抬头看了看天空，最后转过身，把一箱金块扔在地上。
名为「废品山」的游戏，在这一天结束了。
E:
She traveled west through the barren land, arriving at Mount Scrap.
She wants to find a job, but was obstructed by her tendency to be a loner.
On Punklorde, almost everyone works in teams. Loners usually don't last long.

Acquiescing to her situation, she fabricated some virtual partners.
Her first one was called Friend. Of course it was.
Her second was Demon Lord, inspired by a poster she saw on the streets. In her imagination, it was a veteran who had lost the ability to speak.
She suddenly thought this team was too harmonious and lacked realism, so she named the third one Whitecollar and the fourth Servant.
Her final one was called Preschool Classmate — there wasn't a special meaning attached to this. She just really ran out of ideas. After much deliberation, she deleted this last person from her list.
She stored her "partners" in an intelligent weapon, so she could pompously introduce her sizable team to intermediaries.

She got her first job — its risk was as unimaginable as its reward.
Maybe she sold herself too well that people believed her, or they just wanted to see this newbie's performance, dead or alive.

On Punklorde, almost everyone works in teams. Loners usually don't last long.
Those who could last would eventually become legends.

After <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours, she walked out of the Slag Gang's base — alone and through the front gate.
The intermediary was silent. They looked at her, then at the sky, before turning around to toss a chest full of gold ingots on the ground.
The game called Mount Scrap ended that day.

C:
如今流传最广的传言中，景元出生于世代效力地衡司的家族中。

按照从狐人传入的「试儿」习俗，家长会在幼儿周围摆上种种物事玩具任其抓取，以卜前途。其父母原本指望孩子继承衣钵，成为地衡司的学者或是执事官，景元却独独抓起了玩具刀剑。

似乎「试儿」之俗应证了未来。在学宫结业后，为了摆脱一眼望穿的人生，景元不顾家族的反对加入了云骑军。

在云骑军的战事牍库中，记录了他身为云骑士卒的首次出征。运送部队的天艟迫降在了一颗海洋星球上。此地深受孽物的侵染，一支被称为「傀儡蛸」的新兴长生种劫持了云骑的心智，混入舰队中，几乎成功将这艘战舰转化为自己的巢穴。景元敏锐地觉察出了危机，并迅速梳理出傀儡蛸操控的条件，应对手法。剩余的船员最终通过了敌我难辨的考验，击败了对手，安然返乡。

这场几乎兵不血刃的战争让云骑将军们看到了景元的锋芒。重返仙舟后，景元在云骑军内部崭露头角，受到重用。

他的应变急智和实用主义手段屡屡让上级们难忘又头疼。最终，受到前任罗浮剑首的邀请，景元加入其所部为之效力，开启了「云上五骁」传奇之路。
E:
One of the hottest pieces of gossip making the rounds today contends that Jing Yuan's family has served the Realm-Keeping Commission for generations.

According to the foxian custom of having babies "picking" their future, parents will put various objects and toys around an infant cub, and get them to choose their future career path by grabbing an item. Jing Yuan's parents hoped he would inherit the mantle of a scholar or official at the Realm-Keeping Commission, but Jing Yuan grabbed the toy sword.

It seems like prediction from the birthfate tradition came true. After graduating from the academy, Jing Yuan joined the Cloud Knights to escape from a "typical" life against his family's wishes.

His first expedition was recorded in the official Cloud Knights' battle record. The Navis Astriger carrying the troops had to make a forced landing on an ocean planet infested by abominations. One new long-life species known as Puppeteer Jellyfish hijacked the Cloud Knights' minds, stowing onto the ship and almost converting their warship into an alien hive. Jing Yuan quickly became aware of the crisis and identified the requirements of Puppeteer Jellyfish possession, then devised a way against them. The rest of the crew eventually passed this ordeal amongst identical friends and foes, defeated the real enemies, and returned home to safety.

This bloodless victory showed Jing Yuan's mettle to the Cloud Knights' generals. After returning to the Xianzhou, Jing Yuan demonstrated his adept skill and was appointed to a position of importance in the Knights.

His quick-witted and practical approaches had repeatedly given his superiors unforgettable surprises — and headaches. In the end, Jing Yuan was invited by the previous Sword Champion of the Luofu to join her team, and so the legend of the High-Cloud Quintet was formed.

C: 「我把这封信留在这里。如果我没能回来，就由它来讲述她的故事，一位我在████邂逅的同伴。迈向彼岸的路艰难无比，幸亏有她同行，我才能一路平安无事…… …在我们相遇前，她已去过许多世界，各种生活技能都十分熟练。我和她一起在野外烹饪和搭帐篷，那些没有星星的夜晚，她会听我讲故事，和我讨论明天要做什么。更多时候，我们只是在默默行路。这里的雪是紫红色的，尝起来有树莓的酸甜。她████会赞赏我做的████雪团子…… …在认识她以前，我曾长年在██河流中跋涉。她向我伸出了手，我们便一起在这条河流中同行。如今，分别的时候到了，我还没走到岸边，也不知道即将面对的是什么…但我没有理由停下脚步。生命无非是一条终有尽头的道路，在此之前，我会用自己的双脚走到终点。我相信她也一样。」 ——某位探险家的笔记
E: "I am leaving this letter here. In the event that I do not return, let this letter bear witness to the tale of a companion I encountered in ██████. The journey to the other side was perilous, and it was thanks to her that I managed to navigate it through... ...She had traversed numerous worlds before our paths crossed, and she possessed a wide range of life skills. Together, we cooked and established camps amidst the wilderness. On starless nights, she lent an ear to my stories and deliberated plans for the following day. Yet, more often than not, we journeyed in silence. The snow here bears a purplish-red hue, carrying the tangy flavor of raspberries. While she ███ ██████ ████ ███ █████ ██ █████, she appreciates the ██████ snow doughnuts I prepare... ...Before meeting her, I had spent countless years wading through the river of ████████. She extended her hand to me, and together, we ventured along this river. Now, the time has come for us to part ways, and I have yet to reach the shore, uncertain of what lies ahead... Even so, I see no reason to halt my journey. Life is merely a road that eventually culminates, and until that moment arrives, I shall keep pressing forward. I am certain she would do the same." — A Note from An Adventurer

C: 「亲爱的妹妹： 你留给我的甜点我都已经吃掉啦！都怪布丁蛋挞太好吃了，上音乐课前我忍不住吃了三个！结果很不幸，大巫婆大嗓门老师说我嗓子齁着，唱起歌来像小鸭叫，让我出去罚站——你猜怎么样？嘿嘿，我在教室外面吃掉了第四个！ 好在我的钢琴练得不错，大块头老师每次都夸我有天赋。现在只要听过一段旋律，我就可以把它原原本本复弹出来，和你一样厉害吧！等你下次回来，我们可以四手联弹，我也可以为你伴奏，我们可以再办一场演唱会！ 我们的小鸟你不用担心，已经能飞得比昨天更高一点了。最近天气不错，它应该很快就能飞走了！下午我去打扫妈妈的墓时，瞧见了好几只和它一模一样的小鸟，我们的小鸟也会很快加入它们的！ 时间过得真快啊，我最近开始跟着教堂里的「铎音」学习家族的课程了。这说明——我以后一定会变成特别特别厉害的人！到那个时候，我们一起，一定会把梦境变成特别好特别好的地方！ 随信给你寄了一些新口味苏乐达饮料，有的味道是有点怪怪的，但很好玩，还是想让你尝尝。如果你还想喝，我再寄一些过来！ （如果有看到好吃的布丁蛋挞，也给我寄点！） 不要太累了哦！ 永远支持你的！ 哥哥」 ——一封古旧的家书，珍藏于旅行箱的暗格中
E: "To my dearest sister: I've eaten all the desserts you left for me! I can't help it — the pudding tarts were so delicious that I couldn't resist eating three of them before music class! Unfortunately, the loud witch teacher said my voice sounded like a snarl, and I sang like a duckling, so she sent me out for punishment. And guess what? I ended up eating a fourth tart outside the classroom! Fortunately, I've been practicing the piano diligently, and Mr. Big Guy always praises my talent. Now, I can play a melody in its original form after hearing it just once — just as awesome as you! When you come back next time, we can play together as a duet on the same piano, and we can have another concert! You don't need to worry about our little bird. It's been flying a bit higher each day. With the lovely weather we've been having lately, I'm sure it will be able to take flight soon! This afternoon, while I was tending to mom's grave, I spotted several birds looking like our bird. I know our little one will join them before long! How time flies! I've recently begun taking Family lessons from the Bronze Melodia in the church. That means — I'm gonna become a super, super awesome person in the future! Then, we will surely transform the Dreamscape into a super, super good place in the future! I've mailed some SoulGlad with innovative flavors together with this letter. Some of them are a bit unusual, but they're fun, and I really want you to give them a try. If you enjoy them, I'll be happy to send more! (And if you come across any delicious pudding tarts, send some on my way too!) Don't overwork yourself! Support you always! Your big brother" — An old family letter, hidden in the secret compartment of a suitcase

C: 浪迹银河的改造人牛仔，极度乐观、放荡不羁。\n身为「巡海游侠」的一员，为惩奸除恶，可以无所不用其极——\n高调行事的背后，渴望以此引起复仇对象「星际和平公司」的注意。
E: A cyborg cowboy drifting among the stars. Extremely optimistic and unrestrained.\nHe is a member of the Galaxy Rangers who swore to punish the wretched by any and all means...\nHis flamboyant and brash actions were all to draw the attention of the Interastral Peace Corporation — the target of his revenge.

C: 那敬爱死亡的国度，终日飘雪的哀地里亚，今日已沉入甘甜的酣眠。\n冥河的女儿遐蝶，寻索「死亡」火种的黄金裔，启程吧。呵护世间魂灵的恸哭，拥抱命运的孤独\n——生死皆为旅途，当蝴蝶停落枝头，那凋零的又将新生。
E: Aidonia, the snowy land that respects and worships death, has already sunken into sweet slumber.\nO Castorice, daughter of the River of Souls, the Chrysos Heir in search of the Coreflame of "Death," set forth! Guard the lament of the souls in this world, and embrace the solitude of destiny.\n— Life and death is a journey. When a butterfly rests on that dead branch, the withered will be reborn again.

C: 女人的协助者从暗处走到了台前，这个外貌年幼的少女似乎已经从空间站的数据库里抓住了自己想要的信息。\n目标是回廊深处的房间。\n「星核就在里面？」「它能告诉我们星核在哪里。」
E: The woman's helper emerges from the darkness and steps forward. This young-looking girl seems to have found the information she was looking for in the space station's database.\nThe target is the room in the depths of the corridor.\n"Is that where the Stellaron is?" "It can tell us where the Stellaron is."

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C:
开拓之旅的第一晚，你睡得不似列车上那样安心。
这倒不是因为你对列车单间有什么深厚感情，而是你总能在半梦半醒中听到军靴踢踏的声音。
现在，你知道了噪声从何而来——这无疑是面前高贵的少女和她率领的部队干的好事。
来者似乎不善，问问他们究竟想要做什么。
E:
On the first night of the trailblazing expedition, you don't sleep as soundly and at ease as you did on the Express.
It's not because you have some kind of close bond with the Express but because you keep hearing the sound of troops moving around as you sleep.
And now, you know exactly where the noise is coming from — it's undoubtedly the doing of the noble-looking girl and her troops in front of you.
They don't seem to be friendly. Go and ask them what they want.

C: 在沉闷的机械结构鸣响中，旋转栈桥来到了它应至的位置。对抗裂界的最前线与你们仅一桥之隔。\n在桥的那边只有渺无边际的异界——无数赴死的战士在这条残酷的战线上浴血搏杀，直到彻底失去对身体的控制为止。\n现在，他们中最勇猛的战士已将枪头调转，恭候你们前来应战。
E: In the midst of the deep shifting sounds of the mechanical structure, the rotating Gear Bridge is now positioned in its designated position. The frontlines of fighting against the Fragmentum are but a bridge away.\nOn the other side of the bridge lies nothing but a boundless Fragmentum — countless warriors have fought in this brutal place until they've lost complete control over their bodies.\nAnd now, the bravest warriors of them all have turned and changed sides. They are welcoming your challenge.

C: 布洛妮娅捎来信息，上下层区长达十余年的封锁即将终结。\n从杰帕德处得知，布洛妮娅的守护者继任仪式即将举办。\n作为与她一路生死与共的战友，你们自然也受到了盛情邀请。去永冬铭碑附近等待仪式开始吧。
E: Bronya sent news that the blockade between the Overworld and Underworld is about to lift after more than a decade.\nYou learn from Gepard that Bronya's succession ceremony as the Supreme Guardian is about to start.\nYou are warmly invited as someone who had gone through great difficulties with her. Go to the Everwinter Monument and wait for the ceremony to start.

C: 在救下天舶司的接渡使停云后，你们与她一路同行，试图在魔阴身横行的「流云渡」中找到离开的船只。然而形如虬枝古木的怪异敌人却阻住去路。\n击败了不知来历的怪物后，停云亲自操舵，将你们渡往安全地带，「星槎海」的中枢。
E: After rescuing Tingyun, the Amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission, you go with her and attempt to find an escape vessel in Cloudford, which is currently overrun with the mara-struck. However, strange enemies taking the form of twisted old branches block the way.\nAfter defeating the monsters of unknown origins, Tingyun personally takes the helm and steers you to a safe zone — Central Starskiff Haven.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 解决了钟表小子的大危机，你与众人道别。接下来该接着前往流萤的「秘密据点」了——如果你还记得。
E: After resolving Clockie's crisis, you say farewell to everyone. Next, it's onward to Firefly's "secret stronghold"... If you still remember that.

C: 列车组的各位也平安抵达了「黄金的时刻」，并和你交换了各种信息。经过一番激烈的讨论，你们决定答应砂金的合作请求。在拟定下一步计划前，先和伙伴们分别讨论一下各自在意的事情吧。
E: The Crew safely arrives at the Golden Hour and exchanges info with you. After an intense discussion, you decide to work with Aventurine. Before planning the next step, take some time to discuss what everyone is concerned about.

C: 在场的所有相关人员都对处置星核一事达成了一致，心地正直的天环族兄妹也表示愿借助各自的特殊身份，从家族内部寻求解决办法。\n截至目前，事情的发展似乎还算令人满意，可瓦尔特仍心有疑虑——听听他对此有何看法吧。
E: All related parties present have reached a consensus to eliminate the Stellaron. The righteous and upstanding Halovian siblings have even expressed willingness to utilize their identities to seek out a resolution from inside The Family itself.\nThough things seem to be developing satisfactorily, Welt still has some doubts... Go and see his views on the matter.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 你费了好大工夫，才让被家族管控的迷因把你送到了这个鸟不拉屎的地方。这里没看到什么目标的线索，天气差得要命，但麦芽果汁还凑合。\n外面的人吵个不停，可能是欠爱了。
E: You spent a great amount of effort to get the meme controlled by The Family to send you to this dump. Not much here looks helpful, and the weather's been a nightmare, but hey, the malt juice ain't half bad.\nThose sons of a nice lady causing a ruckus outside need some serious chill pills.

C: 可憎！龙•邪祟又在以师长之名残害忍徒，宣扬邪祟之说。身为与缭乱•忍侠搭档的开拓上忍，你怎能忍受此等恶行发生在眼前，难道你已合眸安眠了吗？正义的球棒如金刚杵般坚硬了！\n好了，现在可以动手了。
E: Atrocious! The dino fiendling is once again terrorizing ninjas, spreading malevolence under the guise of mentorship. As the Trailblaze advanced ninja, partnered with the Dazzling Ninja Hero, how can you stand by and watch such wickedness? Have you closed your eyes and entered the eternal sleep already? Your baseball bat of justice is now as firm as a vajra scepter!\nAlright, it's time to take action.

C: 他宝贝的，你还上上课了。行吧，好好感受一下这场梦到底有什么花样，能让人自愿变成猴子。\n放弃，放弃，放弃。
E: That clock-stucker really thinks he's a mentor or something? Fine, let's see what's so fancy in this dream that's got folks willingly turning into monkeys.\nGive up. Give up. Give up.

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: {NICKNAME}成功打开悬锋城的往世之门，来到过去的悬锋城。彼时正值悬锋祭典，尼卡多利的失神刚刚开始，悬锋城仍然喧嚣繁荣。
E: {NICKNAME} unlocked the door to the past in Castrum Kremnos, stepping into the city's former days. It was the time of the Kremnos Festival, and Nikador had just begun to lose their mind. Castrum Kremnos was still prosperous and vibrant with life.

C: 为了医救城外的无名伤者，风堇暂时驻留奥赫玛，缇安、遐蝶与{NICKNAME}三人先行前往树庭——信仰{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的学术圣地。
E: With Hyacine remaining in Okhema to treat the unnamed wounded person, Trianne, Castorice, and {NICKNAME} head to the Grove — the academic sanctuary dedicated to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 白厄找到了禁闭中的那刻夏，似乎不单是为了叙旧。
E: Phainon finds the confined Anaxa, apparently not just for catching up.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n瑟希斯也会好奇自己被绘制成什么模样吗？
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nWill Cerces be curious about how they've been portrayed?

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n你的十五个门扉时终将结束，最后一场表演即将开幕。
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYour fifteen Entry Hours are done. The last performance is about to begin.

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n多么愚蠢，竟然在末日将近时想用投票的方式决定世界的命运…你的职业道德要求你，去给这些笨货们好好上一课。
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nHow foolish, trying to decide the fate of the world through votes when the apocalypse looms... Your professional ethics demand that you give these fools an education.

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n掌握翁法罗斯命运的最后一枚陶片就在你的手中，你会将它掷于何处？
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYou hold the last ceramic shard that will decide Amphoreus's fate. Where will your vote fall?

C: 公民大会的事情暂告一段落，逐火之旅将会继续，元老院深受打击——这一切的缔造者阿那克萨戈拉斯也即将迎来最后的审判。\n直到最后的时刻，阿格莱雅才能和那刻夏打破彼此的芥蒂。
E: The events in the citizens' assembly come to a temporary halt, and the Flame-Chase Journey will continue. The Council of Elders has suffered a heavy blow — and the one behind it all, Anaxagoras, is about to face the final judgment.\nOnly at the very last moment can Aglaea and Anaxa finally break down the barriers between them.

C: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
E: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

C: 赛飞儿发短信邀请{NICKNAME}前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许能够成为一道不错的调剂。
E: Cipher sent a message inviting {NICKNAME} to go treasure hunting in Styxia — could be a welcome change of pace.

C: 此时，{NICKNAME}与白厄正在树庭继续着他们的意象训练。把力气用光后，友爱之馆的丰富馆藏将他们的视线吸引了过去…
E: Right now, {NICKNAME} and Phainon are deep in their imagery training at the Grove. After spending all their strength, their gaze drifts to the vast collection in the Library of Philia...

C: 我以灵水辟出前往创世涡心的通路，风堇将接过艾格勒的神权，与众人告别。而我们则全速赶回奥赫玛支援。
E: I created a passage to the Vortex of Genesis with spirit water. Hyacine will claim Aquila's divine authority and bid farewell to everyone. Meanwhile, we'll rush back to Okhema to provide support.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 无论如何，请不要忘记自己在这一刻想要前进的心情。
E: Whatever happens, don't forget the fire in your heart at this very moment.

C: 同样的能力，但凡给我换一个有用点的御主，我是不是都已经赢了？
E: With these abilities, if I had a slightly more decent Master, I'd have already won.

C: 神话已偏移了原定的轨迹，若命数是天上的巨星，那它的游离或会牵动太阳，也会牵动今夜的潮汐。\n你摸不到星，但可以站在潮汐里，感受波澜拍打你的脚踝。\n那是海在向你诉说它的忧虑。
E: The myth has drifted from its destined course. If fate is written in the stars, then their gravity pulls not just the sun, but the very tides at your feet.\nThe stars may be untouchable, but the tide isn't. Stand in its flow and feel how cosmic forces lap at your ankles.\nThat's the ocean whispering its worries, wave by wave, shore to soul.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 接过逐火之旅同伴的成果，承担起「负世」的职责，在海瑟音的见证下，完成「再创世」……\n不出意外的话，这便是此世旅途的终点。
E: Taking up the mantle from your Flame-Chase Journey companions, embracing the burden of Worldbearing, and completing the Era Nova under Hysilens' witness...\nIf all goes as planned, this should be the end of this life's journey.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n访问控制节点，上传封装密钥。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nAccess the control node and upload the encapsulated encryption key.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…果然是假的！\n这里是用你的「记忆」构筑的假象，你必须和昔涟一起赶紧逃进其他的记忆里。\n星期日正在用他的能力入侵你的「梦境」来拯救你…没想到还会有这样的一天。
E: The Era Nova Ceremony has been completed. The journey in Amphoreus is over... As if!\nThis is all an illusion constructed from your "memory." You must now escape with Cyrene into other memories!\nSunday is using his powers to invade your "dreamscape" to save you... Never thought this day would come.

C:
歌唱吧，星神！歌唱翁法罗斯之子卡厄斯兰那的愤怒——
一滴燃烧的净世金血，熔进你那如同烈日般燃烧的身躯。

在那滴金血流下前，你已经被仇恨淹没许久。那漫长的旅程，让我们曾经的同行短如瞬息。
在那滴金血留下后，你已经沉默了太久，你的心智是否依然坚韧？你的抗争是否仍在继续？
回应我吧，我需要一位友人为我拨云见日——

如果你的「指引」注定让愤怒毁天灭地，那也无妨，我需要前进的方向。
回应我吧，只有黎明的盛怒能照破长夜。
E:
Sing, O Aeon! Sing of the rage of Khaslana, son of Amphoreus—
A drop of burning, cleansing golden blood, melting into your sun-like blazing form.

Before that drop of golden blood fell, hatred had long since consumed you. That lengthy journey made our time together feel but a fleeting moment.
After that drop of golden blood fell, you've remained silent for far too long. Does your mind still hold its tenacity? Does your defiance still persist?
Answer me, for I need a friend to clear the fog and unveil the sun—

If your "guidance" is destined to bring rage that destroys heaven and earth, so be it, as I need a direction forward.
Answer me, for only the Dawn's furor can pierce through the evernight.

C: 在黄金裔们的陪伴下，我们终于来到归墟的最深处，白厄的英魂就在此处镇守「毁灭」的劫火。当空白的愿望烧灼为负世的意志，我们终将为卡厄斯兰那带来解脱，并接过他的责任与最后的心愿——击败铁墓，拯救翁法罗斯，乃至全银河。
E: Accompanied by the Chrysos Heirs, we finally reached the deepest part of the ruins, where Phainon's heroic soul guards the cataclysmic fire of the Destruction. As the blank wish is transformed through fire into the will to bear the world, we shall finally bring release to Khaslana and inherit his responsibility and final wish: to defeat Irontomb, help Amphoreus, and save even the entire cosmos.

C: 在黄金裔们的陪伴下，我们终于来到归墟的最深处，白厄的英魂就在此处镇守「毁灭」的劫火。当空白的愿望烧灼为负世的意志，我们终将为卡厄斯兰那带来解脱，并接过他的责任与最后的心愿——击败铁墓，拯救翁法罗斯，乃至全银河。
E: Accompanied by the Chrysos Heirs, we finally reached the deepest part of the ruins, where Phainon's heroic soul guards the cataclysmic fire of the Destruction. As the blank wish is transformed through fire into the will to bear the world, we shall finally bring release to Khaslana and inherit his responsibility and final wish: to defeat Irontomb, help Amphoreus, and save even the entire cosmos.

C: 艾丝妲自称收到了一封「宓堂空境解语人」递交的密信，信中不仅揭露了销声匿迹许久的「异星水魈」的行踪，甚至暗指空间站内有包庇逃遁奇物的共犯。为防打草惊蛇，谨慎的站长拜托你展开调查。
E: Asta claims to have received a secret letter written by a Cryptologist From Locus Silentii, which not only revealed the whereabouts of the Xenohydro that had been missing for a long time but also tacitly implicates that someone in the space station has been covering up for the escaped Curio. The cautious lead researcher asks you to investigate.

C: 密信指出「异星水魈」正于收容舱段频繁活动。前去调查，或许能发现意外线索。
E: The secret letter indicates that the Xenohydro is active in the storage zone. Investigate this zone to see if you can find any clues.

C: 前往其他房间深入调查
E: Go to other rooms to investigate more deeply

C: 列车…竟被巨真蛰虫吞进了腹中？！
E: Has the Express somehow... been swallowed up by a Giant Sting!?

C: 记忆盲点已经收集完毕，接下来是面对质询以及做出申辩的时间
E: You have finished collecting the Cognition Chasms. Now, it's time to face the interrogation and defend yourself.

C: 记忆盲点已经收集完毕，接下来是面对质询以及做出申辩的时间
E: You have finished collecting the Cognition Chasms. Now, it's time to face the interrogation and defend yourself.

C: 得到辛克尔的建议之后你似乎又和艾丝妲聊了些什么，尝试着回忆一下
E: You seemed to have talked with Asta about something else after receiving Hinkel's recommendations. Try to remember it.

C: 艾丝妲提到的那起事件让阿兰放下了提防，他手中掌握着重要的调查结果
E: The incident Asta mentioned got Arlan to let down his guard. He has important findings on him.

C: 没想到一些看似不起眼的行为，竟给其他人带来诸多变化。对于这趟旅程，你感悟颇多，或许是时候和姬子聊聊了。
E: Who would have thought that such seemingly inconsequential actions could have brought such change to the lives of others? This journey has brought you new enlightenment. Perhaps it's time to have a chat with Himeko.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n差点和托帕大打出手。好在布洛妮娅来阻止了。她说要带我们去个地方。好奇。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nAlmost fought with Topaz. Thankfully, Bronya came to stop us. She said she'll take us to a place. Curious.

C: 你与克拉拉仍然决定前往犯罪现场进行侦察。\n在这凌乱的现场里，你们发现了更多疑似零件大盗留下的痕迹。循着痕迹继续向前搜索吧。
E: You and Clara still decide to head to the crime scene to investigate.\nYou find more signs probably left behind by the parts thief at the chaotic crime scene. Follow these clues and keep searching onward.

C: 你与佩拉一同来到「残响回廊」深处，并决定从此处开始向入口搜索。\n「残响回廊」今天的气氛似乎有些不同寻常——留意四周，小心前进吧。
E: You and Pela have come to the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes, and decide to start to look for the entrance from here.\nThe Corridor of Fading Echoes feels different today... Be careful and proceed cautiously.

C: 机械屋总给人以家的温暖感。而当你准备收拾行李、头也不回地离开这里时，这种温暖的感觉更是尤甚。\n不过这只是你的个人揣测…希露瓦是怎么想的？恐怕只有她自己清楚。\n但这毕竟与你无关，眼下还是先陪她一起收拾行李吧。
E: The workshop always felt as comforting as a home. As you prepare to pack up and leave here forever, this homely feeling is intensified.\nBut this is only your personal guess... What does Serval think? She is probably the only one who knows that.\nBut this has nothing to do with you. Just help her pack for now.

C: 你与希露瓦火速抵达了大矿区，发现杰帕德似乎已经完成战斗部署了。听听他接下来将做如何安排吧。
E: Serval and you arrive at the Great Mine as fast as you could. Gepard seems to have already finished preparing for battle. Listen to his plans.

C: 根据铁卫的指示，击败盘踞在矿区大桥下的裂界生物
E: Under the Silvermane Guard's command, defeat the Fragmentum creatures roaming under the bridge in the mining area

C: 在经历一连串的事件后，众人期待的极光终于来临——好好享用你们的「战利品」吧。
E: The aurora that everyone has been looking forward to finally arrives after this string of incidents. Time to enjoy your "spoils."

C: 无论如何，次元扑满离开了两人的露营地——但它似乎为两位女孩留下了某些物什。\n两位女孩决定上前检查，看看那神秘生物究竟准备了怎样的惊喜。
E: Either way, the Warp Trotter leaves the camping ground, but it seems to have left something for the two girls.\nThe two girls decide to move up to investigate what the mysterious creature had prepared for them.

C: 你不得不按照那位「绿芙蓉」的要求，抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》。但五百遍确实太多了…也许有其他办法？
E: You have to copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation according to Green Hibiscus's demands, but 500 times is just too much... Maybe there's another way?

C: 在绿芙蓉的胁迫下，你不得不与这位倒霉的云骑展开一场「决斗」。好在你们足够聪明，可以将危机化为机遇。
E: Under Green Hibiscus's threat, you had no choice but to "battle" the unfortunate Cloud Knight. Luckily, with your wits, you can turn the crisis into an opportunity.

C: 陶德向你讲述了自己的心愿，他现在只想体验一些孩童应有的快乐。你答应了他买小吃的幼稚要求。
E: Todd tells you about his wish. He just wants to experience the happiness that children deserve. You agree to his childish request to buy a snack.

C: 根据名侦探三月七的推理…交易失败！没时间推理了！快跑！
E: According to Genius Detective March 7th's deduction, the transaction failed, there's no time for further deductions! Run!

C: 在解决了种种阻碍之后，三月七终于接近了自己记忆的起点。可越是靠近，她就越是不安——这「阻碍」究竟是从何而来呢？\n此时符玄的警告在她的心中不断回响，使她几乎想要停下脚步，回头折返……\n「但开拓者绝不能回头，即使是在回头的时候。」三月七对这个冷笑话颇为得意，决定之后讲给丹恒听。
E: After overcoming various obstacles, March 7th finally approaches the starting point of her memories. However, the closer she gets, the more anxious she feels — Where is this "obstacle" coming from?\nFu Xuan's warning echoes in her mind, making her almost wanting to stop and turn back the way she came...\n"But Trailblazers must never turn back, even when they turn their back." March 7th is pretty satisfied with this dry joke and decides to tell it to Dan Heng when she gets back.

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 挨个听听大善人们的诉求吧。放个生还能让他们放生出食物链来，可真是一群人才。
E: Listen to the requests of the Benevolent Ones one by one. Who knew they could manage to create a food chain just from releasing living creatures? What a group of geniuses.

C: 按照浮烟定计，它与恚炎的赌局一旦展开，你们应当抓住这个稍纵即逝的机会，击败被恚炎所侵占寄生的宿主，将分裂四散的岁阳分灵全都收入葫芦里。
E: According to Cirrus, once this gambit between it and Furynox comes into play, you can seize this fleeting opportunity to defeat the parasitic host Furynox is occupying, then collect all the scattered heliobus spirits into the gourd.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 自从三月七拜师彦卿和云璃之后，你发现她就像是「参加夏令营的小孩」一样兴奋，列车里不怎么能见到她。但是兴奋感是有保质期的，过了一段时间她就会明白「剑术修行并非儿戏」了。\n按理来说，此时的她正在后花园学剑，你可以适当监督一下她，看看她的热情是否有所消退。
E: Ever since March 7th became a disciple of Yanqing and Yunli, you notice she's practically bubbling with excitement like a kid at summer camp. You've also been missing her on the Express. But all enthusiasm will eventually dampen, and by then, she'll realize that swordplay training isn't child's play.\nMarch 7th should be practicing in the backyard now. Check in on her as you deem fit to see if her passion has faded at all.

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n跟随孤云继续前进。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nFollow Guyun and continue onward.

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。\n巨大的震动仿佛一个警告，危机悄然降临。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.\nA tremendous quake seems to herald the silent arrival of danger.

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定再擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the anxiety and lingering danger have made Yunli restless. She decided that she would patrol the Skysplitter once more before the defending match begins to ensure that everything is safe.

C: 你进入了莱斯利•迪恩的心绪空间。\n找到构建出这个联觉梦境的人们，然后解放他们吧。
E: You have entered Lesley Dean's Emoscape.\nFind the creators of this Synesthesia Dreamscape and free them from their obsessions.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 你在筑梦边境遇到了一位目光深邃的老人，你们的对话被猎犬家系粗暴地打断。\n钟表小子似乎从老人身上发现了什么，和它聊聊吧。
E: You encounter an old man with a profound gaze at the Dream's Edge, but your discussion is harshly interrupted by the Bloodhound Family.\nClockie seems to have sensed something from the old man. Talk with him.

C: 「湛蓝爵士」和匹诺康尼的筑梦师似乎有些关联，去筑梦边境找可能知道的人问问吧。
E: Dr. Blues seems to be related to Penacony's Dreamweavers. Go to Dream's Edge and ask around people who might know about this.

C: 听巴罗说，猎犬家系正在追捕筑梦师，帮助巴罗将那些人引开。
E: According to Barlow, the Bloodhound Family is arresting Dreamweavers. Help Barlow to distract them.

C: 现在，你已经是白日梦酒店的临时大堂经理了。\n万事俱备，开工吧！
E: You are now the interim lobby manager of the Reverie.\nNow that everything is ready, it is time to work!

C: 解救成功！回去告诉那只着急的呜呜伯一声，让它别再担心啦。
E: Rescue complete! Go back and tell the anxious Wubbaboo that it can rest easy.

C: 听说阿德勒又打听到了新的「怪谈」。前往特殊地点与阿德勒碰头，询问这次的「怪谈」是什么。
E: Sounds like Adler has gotten hold of a new "ghost story." Meet up with Adler at the special spot and ask about the story this time.

C: 阿丽娜希望你能带给她更多纸团，你决定在磐岩镇多逛逛……
E: Alina hopes that you can bring her more balls of paper. You decide to walk some more around Boulder Town...

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 你遇到几位自称是「四大天王」的迷钟，在修好它们之后，你收到了一条奇怪的短信。生活又不是青春深夜剧，你实在摸不着头脑，但还是去有「藏着礼物」的「秘密房间」看一下吧？万一你就是主角呢？
E: You met several Tickers who self-proclaimed to be the Formidable Four. After fixing them, you receive a strange text message. Life isn't a late-night or even teen drama, so you're utterly baffled. However, why not check out the "secret room" with the "hidden gift"? Who knows, maybe you really are the main character?

C: 你成功打开了火种匣。问问伊来内其中贮藏的是什么吧。
E: You successfully opened the Coreflame Casket. Ask Alain about its content.

C: 配方表找到了，但内容却…总之先将配方交给帕姆吧。
E: You found the recipe, but the content... Just hand it over to Pom-Pom for now.

C: 佩佩找到了奇物的线索，你决定跟随佩佩，继续追查下去。
E: Peppy has found clues about the lost Curio. You decide to follow it and continue your search.

C: 丢失的奇物竟然在一名叫「管家」的造物手里，它是谁？它在哪儿？你和佩佩两眼一抹黑，在走丢的造物处，它们似乎知道「管家」的信息……
E: The lost Curio is currently held by a creation known as "butler." Who is this butler? And where can they be found? Despite lacking any information, you might uncover new leads by locating the lost Curio...

C: 邓恩邀请你参与铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n和「副官」聊聊，了解这次演习的作战目标吧。
E: Dunn invites you to a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nTalk to the aide and get a sense of the objective of this training.

C: 浮烟喜欢以「棋子」喻人、以「棋局」喻势…而你需要做的便是在棋坪之上击败它。
E: Cirrus likes to use analogies such as "pawns" and "chess" to describe people and situations... And what you need to do is to defeat it on the chessboard.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 之前驭空急匆匆地赶来救援晴霓，结果似乎将什么东西遗落在了迴星港。陪晴霓把她找回来吧，现在她俩之间关系紧张，也许这能成为母女二人破冰的关键。
E: When Yukong was rushing to rescue Qingni before, she seemed to have dropped something in Stargazer Navalia. Accompany Qingni to find it back. Since the relationship between the two of them is currently very tense, this can be the key to salvage the situation for the mother and daughter.

C: 与「色彩」有关的「变化图案」…雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: "Changing shapes" that have a connection with "colors"... Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说杜氏茶庄和商会建立合作关系。但杜老板此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Du's Teahouse to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boss Du has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 你与捉鬼小队的成员们翻开「罗浮杂俎」开始讨论其哪些奇闻怪事是妖物作祟。分辨的要诀是百分之九十九的常识和百分之一的直觉——有人称为直觉，有人叫它灵力。
E: You and your fellow ghost-hunters browse Ghostly Grove, discussing which rumors and anomalies might be caused by heliobi. Accurately distinguishing them requires <unbreak>99</unbreak> percent common sense and one percent intuition — some call it intuition, some call it psychic powers.

C: 果不其然，此事又和岁阳有关，为了脱困它什么都愿意——那么出发吧，为了封印岁阳也好，为了完成那可怜女子的未竟心愿也好，你们决定前往金人巷一趟。
E: As you suspected, this anomaly is indeed connected to a heliobus who is willing to do anything to break free from its confinement. To seal the heliobus and fulfill the unfortunate woman's sorrowful desires, you decide to proceed to Aurum Alley.

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 再次调查那盘录像带，为电影画上一个句号。
E: Investigate the videotape again and bring the film to a close.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 无名客在梦里落入了人间，人间在梦里接住了无名客。
E: Nameless falls from the dream into the mortal realm, while the mortal realm catches Nameless in dreams.

C: 没想到冤家路窄，你们再次撞上斯科特胡作非为，三月七与斯科特立下了十五日后剑斗之约。 三月七任命你为「剑术助教」，为她合理安排训练生活，你要和她二位师父一起，在短短十五日里将三月七培养成独当一面的剑术高手。 三月她相信你能做到，这是责任，也是义务。 「十五日后，罗浮之巅，双剑西来，天外飞仙。」
E: Alas, adversaries are wont to cross paths! The both of you encounter Skott, who is up to no good yet again. March 7th and Skott end up making a pact to cross swords in fifteen days. March 7th makes you her "assistant swordplay instructor," leaving you in charge of her training schedule. Alongside her two masters, you have fifteen days to train March 7th into a swordswoman capable of holding her own in a duel. March 7th believes that you can do it, for this is both your responsibility and obligation. "The ultimate Luofu duel begins in fifteen days. Watch a pair of swords whiz through the skies in a peerless swordplay."

C: 卡美丽很害怕波提欧，因为他是公司的通缉犯。\n你肯定不怕波提欧——你们甚至一起经历过不少事。\n卢卡不知道你们谁对波提欧的描述更准确，只在潜意识中留下了一个朴素的认知——和公司对着干的人，应该不会是坏人。
E: Carmella is very scared of Boothill as he is a criminal wanted by the IPC.\nYou're definitely not scared of Boothill — You've even gone through a lot together.\nLuka doesn't know which version of your descriptions of Boothill is more accurate. He only walks away with a simple understanding in his subconsciousness — Those who go against the IPC probably aren't bad guys.

C: 罗浮请纯美骑士当嘉宾，实在是一步妙棋。\n首先，他们长得好看，门票卖得非常好。其次，他们的战斗技巧和道德水准都很高，绝对不会误伤选手。第三，他们基本算是出家人，不太在乎出场费，很实惠。\n说起来，银枝真的特别欣赏卢卡。可能因为他们长得有点像。
E: The Luofu made a great call to invite the Knights of Beauty as guests.\nFirstly, they all look good, so the tickets sell like hotcakes. Secondly, they have both outstanding martial prowess and peerless morals, so they would never accidentally hurt their opponent. Thirdly, they're basically monastic monks and do not care much for the invitation fee, making them very cost-effective.\nNow that you think about it, Argenti really does take a liking to Luka. Maybe it's because they look similar.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n你和财富学院代表达成了赌约——若是乐队未能在他到达舞台前开始演出，所有成员都会遭到开除。等待乱破归来的这段时间里，和现场观众聊聊吧。或许…事情还会有转机。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nYou and the Fortune Academy representative made a wager: If the band cannot start their performance before he reaches the stage, then all members will be expelled. As you wait for Rappa to turn, chat with the audience. Perhaps... things might take a turn for the better.

C: 尘埃落定，似乎每个人都失败了，又似乎每个人都成功了。
E: As the dust settles, it seems that everyone has failed, yet everyone also seemingly succeeded.

C: 玄关虽小，但却关乎别人对你房间的第一印象。
E: An entryway area might be tiny, but it presents the first impression people have of your room.

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 在「情商」配方的助力下，真理医生为素裳上了一堂精彩、成功、妙趣横生的课程。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为真理医生再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: With the help of the "EQ" Recipe, Dr. Ratio delivered a brilliant, successful, and entertaining lesson to Sushang.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Dr. Ratio.

E: Search for traces of civilization in the Snow Plains

E: Confront the Silvermane Guards outside the hotel

E: Find the Moles who are hiding

E: (Optional) Speak with Firefly and check the photo

E: Head to "Peppy Pepeshi's Salon"

E: Continue following Firefly to reach the depths of the Dream's Edge

E: Enter the Dreampool

E: Continue to follow Black Swan to leave the hotel in the Dreamscape

E: Speak with Acheron

E: Take███ █ ph█to of █ █ ██ Kakavasha

E: Learn more about the dream before the Dreammaster's arrival

E: Defeat the Malevolent Mischief Makers

E: Take victory in the "Superstar Showdown"

E: Get rid of the annoying ash-vole Assistananas causing all the commotion

E: Get rid of the annoying ash-vole Assistananas causing all the commotion

E: Try to use Oronyx's Miracle

E: Collect the memory fragments related to Castrum Kremnos

E: Continue climbing the mountain and investigate the phantoms that appeared when the soul left the body

E: Speak with "Elder" Amunet

E: Use the West Wind Compass to set up a path

E: Defeat the Black Tide Creatures

E: Escape quickly and return to Marmoreal Palace

E: Follow the two to enter the end of destiny

E: Chat with the Masters

E: Take a picture of Himeko and send it to Pamela

E: Return upstairs and continue your investigation

E: Head to Goethe Hotel for a good night's sleep

E: Confront the merchant and find the thief

E: Talk to Pela and go to the Corridor of Fading Echoes

E: Hand the Key to Molly

E: Follow Pela

E: Head to the Administrative District Plaza to start the investigation

E: Talk to Qingque

E: Witness Tizocic II become a ruthless ruler
