E: Open for business for the day

C: 前2次行动：<color=#f29e38ff>灵敏与感知训练</color>的心情消耗降低#1%，且效率提高#2%
E: For the first 2 actions: Reduces <color=#f29e38ff>Dexterity and Acuity Training's</color> Mood consumption by #1% and increases efficiency by #2%

C: 安排灵敏或感知训练合计至少3次：本日所有属性的增长率提高#1%
E: Plan Dexterity or Acuity Training for a total of at least 3 sessions: All stats' improvement rate increases by #1% for today

C: 仅安排训练：本日所有属性的增长率提高#1%
E: Only plan for training: All stats' improvement rate increases by #1% for today

C: 安排力量或坚韧训练合计至少3次：本日所有属性的增长率提高#1%
E: Plan Strength or Tenacity Training for a total of at least 3 sessions: All stats' improvement rate increases by #1% for today

C: 灵活性小憩
E: Agile Respite

C: 目押技术
E: Rhythm Combo Technique

C: 新学小生
E: Green Novice

C: 请选择本日想要椒丘提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Jiaoqiu to provide you today

C: 通过第二次试剑
E: Pass the Second Sword Trial

C: 炎风
E: Scorch Gust

C: 精深剑法
E: Refined Swordplay

C: 万应灵丹
E: Panacea Divinus

C: 委托派遣已完成
E: Assignments completed

C: 关于雅利洛-Ⅵ的生态和勘测数据，他大概已经开始整理了吧？开启旅程之前，多掌握些情报总是不会错的。
E: He's probably already started collating the ecological data and survey results for Jarilo-VI. It's always good to know more about the destination before you start a journey.

C: 自从「毁灭」把星核播种在宇宙间，许多世界都变样了。
E: Ever since the Destruction sowed Stellarons across the universe, many worlds have changed.

C: 彦卿。
E: Yanqing.

C: 我们可能要去仙舟「罗浮」了。
E: We might be going to the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 下个目的地会是哪里？咱都等不及了，好期待呀！
E: Where's our next stop? I can't wait!

C: 列车长，什么时候发车？
E: When are we leaving, conductor?

C: 我没兴趣啦，快去办正事。
E: I'm not interested. Hurry up with our real business.

C: 唉…看来我才是「命运的奴隶」。
E: Urgh... Seems like I'm the real Destiny's Slave here.

C: 人不可貌相啊，你还挺习惯战斗的耶……
E: You're stronger than you look... Seem to be quite the fighter.

C: 反物质军团为啥会盯上你们啊？我看它们攻击的目标就是空间站，对星球地表毫无兴趣的样子。
E: Why is the Antimatter Legion targeting you guys? It seems they just ignored the surface of the planet and came straight to the space station.
Waaaah!

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着真理医生：「<unbreak>30</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Dr. Ratio: "<unbreak>30</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 眼睛无序地转动，最终眯成了弯月形状。它是如此满意这个结果。
E: The eye spins without order, before eventually squinting into the shape of a crescent moon. The gun shows great satisfaction at this result.

C: 支援舱段部分的防护罩也撑不了多久，你们尽快……
E: The supply zone's defense shield won't hold much longer. You all need to hurry...

C: 你的本体长什么样？
E: What do you actually look like?

C: 我挺中意你的，但…你身体里有一颗「星核」。
E: I like you, but... you have a Stellaron in your body.

C: 在空间站也能看到吧。
E: You can see it from the space station, you know?

C: 时刻注意观察，进而谨慎地选择有效事项进行思考而已，你也能做得到。
E: It's about being observant at all times and carefully making the best choice for the situation. You can do it too.

C: 跟我来吧。
E: Then come with me.

C: 你的事都打理完了么？
E: Have you taken care of everything you need?

C: 我还得再想想……
E: I need some more time to think...

C: 我本以为还要在空间站多盘桓些时日，看来你的体质的确有特殊之处。
E: I thought I'd have to stay in the space station a few more days, but there does seem something special about you.

C: 关于银河…
E: About the galaxy...

C: 这面墙上的照片交替闪烁，满满都是你们冒险的回忆。
E: The photos on this wall flash and blink, filled with memories of your adventures.

C: 「毁灭」的星神播散了星核。
E: The Stellarons were cast by the Aeon of Destruction.

C: 即使真的有这么一颗「星核」…它引来了灾厄，我也看不出这与各位的关联。我不相信有人会大费周折帮助一个与自己不相干的世界，还毫无所图。
E: Even if this Stellaron you speak of did bring about disaster, I fail to see its connection to you. I don't believe that anyone would go to such lengths to help a world unrelated to them... unless they had something to gain.

C: 好，我相信你们。如果现状真的和这所谓星核有关，各位的到来将是贝洛伯格等待了七百年的希望。我愿意提供一切可能的援助，帮各位找到星核。
E: Very well, I believe you. If our present situation is truly the result of this so-called Stellaron, then your arrival is the hope that Belobog has waited seven hundred years for. I am willing to assist you in any way possible to help you locate the Stellaron.

C: 只是…觉得她的眼神有种穿透力——就是，虽然她在和我们说话，但眼睛却好像在盯着远处的某样东西……
E: Although... it felt like she was looking through me. As in, I know she was speaking to us, but it seemed like her gaze was fixed on something far away...

C: 感觉啦，感觉。
E: ...I just have a feeling.

C: 没有，下个话题。
E: Nope. Next question.

C: 丹恒，你怎么看？
E: Dan Heng, what do you think?

C: 是我运气不好呀…那么多选题，我偏偏选了「星核」。看来，任何想要触碰「星核」真相的人，都会被驱逐和处理掉吧。
E: Just my luck... Out of all the research topics I could've chosen, I insisted on the Stellaron. It's clear now that anyone who wanted to get closer to the truth would have been expelled or "abandoned."

C: 或许我还要感谢可可利亚，她只是赶走了我，没有采取更一劳永逸的手段……
E: Maybe I should be thanking Cocolia. All she did was push me out... She could've decided to take a more permanent measure.

C: 初步的研究报告和申请提交后不多久，我的处分就下来了。很明显，有人不希望研究继续。
E: Not long after I submitted my preliminary report and application, I received my punishment. It was obvious that somebody didn't want my research to continue.

C: 出来吧，现在应该安全了。
E: The coast is clear. You can come out now.

C: 刚才他都说啦，要先在城里待上一阵。只要我们动作够快，应该就能跟他错开。
E: Didn't you hear him? He said he needs to take care of a few matters in the city first. If we're fast enough, we can stay out of his way.

C: 不得不说，就算以现在的眼光来看，这小盒子的工艺也十分高级啊——对于这种有趣的东西，我可不能视而不见呢。
E: I have to say, even by today's standards, the craftsmanship of this little box is highly advanced. I can't just ignore an item this interesting.

C: 啊，那个…！其实是我和希露瓦小姐在我的传家宝铁盒上发现了一串密码，请问佩拉小姐可以帮忙看看吗？
E: Um... Actually, Miss Serval and I found a line of code on my heirloom tin box. Miss Pela, can you please take a look?

C: 其实我对佩拉的场刊很感兴趣…
E: I'm actually very interested in Pela's magazine.

C: 因此，她在临终前留下嘱托…在「星核」的影响消散之际，她希望贝洛伯格能够重归完整。她希望上下层区的人民能共同迎接黎明。
E: In her final moments, she wanted us to mark the Stellaron's end by reuniting Belobog. Overworlders and Underworlders must embrace the dawn of a new age... together.

C: …可别否定我。我坚信，咱们一定会再见面的。
E: ...And before you say anything, there will be a next time. I know we'll meet again.

C: 你们在聊什么？
E: What are you guys chatting about?

C: 以姐姐的性格，跟着你们一起旅行或许才更合适。和她的求知欲、好奇心相比，贝洛伯格实在太狭小了。
E: Belobog is too small a place for a mind as inquisitive as Serval's... Maybe it would be better for her to join you on your journey.

C: 通过精密的计算，你找到了唯一的解法：左信封斜角<unbreak>45</unbreak>°向下施加<unbreak>30</unbreak>利尔他，从而使右信封的重心落在邮筒外。就这样，你得到了两只信封。
E: Through precise calculations, you arrive at the only solution: Applying <unbreak>30</unbreak> Aiden at a <unbreak>45</unbreak>° angle to the left envelope will make the center of gravity of the right envelope fall outside the mailbox. This way, you get both envelopes.

C: 这是一座电话亭，人们用它和远方的朋友联系。
E: This is a phone booth. People use it to contact friends from afar.

C: 干垃圾！
E: Dry garbage!

C: 下层区的生活状况如何？
E: How is life in the Underworld?

C: 这些人是…
E: These people...

C: 避难…哎哟，我想起来了！有群混混不知道从哪儿冒了出来，跟矿队大打出手……
E: Take shelter... *gasp* I remember now! These guys came out of nowhere and got into a fight with the mining team...

C: 那个红衣服的小姑娘…
E: That girl in red...

C: ——不用到处找我啦，希儿。
E: No need to look far.

C: 你哪怕说个大守护者，都比桑博靠谱……
E: Really? Sampo? You might as well try the supreme guardian.

C: 唔…虽然没太弄明白，但还是先记下这个线索吧。
E: Hmm... I don't really know what it means, but we should take note of it anyway...

C: 搏击俱乐部？
E: The Fight Club?

C: 机器人？
E: Robots?

C: 你老惦记着这破玩意干嘛，还想下去当机器人的活靶子啊？
E: Why are you worried about this piece of junk? Do you really wanna go down there and be a live target for the robots?

C: 啊，你是说一起捉迷藏的那个孩子王吗？
E: Ah, you mean that naughty kid we played hide-and-seek with?

C: 你到底是什么人？
E: Who the heck are you?

C: 但「地火」熟悉地下大大小小的势力，如果我们想在地下找到星核的线索，他们会很有帮助。
E: But Wildfire will be familiar with all manner of forces below ground. If we want to find Stellaron clues in the underground, I'm certain they can help.

C: 哟，你们就是奥列格介绍的贵客吧？欢迎入住歌德大饭店。
E: Oh, you must be Oleg's guests? Welcome to the Goethe Grand Hotel.

C: 奥列格要我好好款待你们。钥匙拿好嘞，是咱们这儿最宽敞的客房。
E: Oleg wants me to take good care of y'all. Here's the key, you'll be stayin' in our most spacious guest room.

C: 你们懂什么，没有灵魂的东西？你们永远不会明白…永远！
E: You soulless thing — how could you begin to fathom!? You will never understand... Never!

C: 站起来…守护者……
E: Rise... guardian...

C: 哈哈，多谢你们啦。
E: Haha, I'm grateful.

C: …「星核」到底在哪。
E: ...Where's the Stellaron?

C: 可可利亚态度的突然转变也非常奇怪。
E: Cocolia's sudden change in attitude is also very curious.

C: …三次梦境都是相同的场景，都包括可可利亚和另一个「声音」……
E: ...All three dreams were the same, with Cocolia and that other voice...

C: …嗯。我原本以为自己已经做好心理准备了，但还是……
E: ...Yes. I thought I was prepared for anything, but...

C: 布洛妮娅……
E: Bronya...

C: 「菌菌」…原来她还给这玩具熊起了名字吗？呵……
E: Junjun... so she gave her bear a name, huh?

C: …嗯，还真是一团糟呢。别着急，我会帮虎克修好「菌菌」的。也许我需要重新找些填充物……
E: ...Well, this teddy bear has sure been through the wars. Don't worry, I'll help Hook repair Junjun, but I'll need to find some stuffing...

C: 等娜塔莎姐姐把「菌菌」修好，我还会来找你帮忙的！你要随时响应漆黑的虎克大人的召唤哦！
E: I'll need your help again after Natasha fixes Junjun! Always be prepared to answer the call of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 特摄？那是什么东西？
E: Tokusatsu? What's that?

C: …就那样呗，还行。
E: Same old, nothing much.

C: （必须带他去诊所检查……）
E: (I have to take him to the clinic for a checkup...)

C: 观众们，请不要吝惜你们的掌声与喝彩！让胜利者沐浴在胜利的荣耀之中吧！
E: Please, everyone, shower your cheers and applause for the winner for {M#his}{F#her} victorious glory!

C: 我…其实我也觉得很不可思议。但我见过那位布洛妮娅小姐…虽然交集不多，我还是觉得她值得信任……
E: I... I think it's hard to believe, but I've met that young lady Bronya. We didn't talk much, but she felt trustworthy to me.

C: 又见面了，奥列格先生。
E: We meet again, Mr. Oleg.

C: 这下可热闹了，不错不错！
E: Likewise, miss! The more the merrier!

C: 摇滚就是活出自己。
E: Rock 'n' roll means choosing your own way of living.

C: 贝洛伯格有原始丛林？
E: Is there a jungle in Belobog?

C: 哼，你什么都不懂。
E: Humph, you big grownup dum-dum don't know anything.

C: 关于《冒险鼹鼠队》的事…
E: About The Adventurous Moles...

C: 那好吧。要是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}收集齐《冒险鼹鼠队》记得来告诉我呀。
E: Alright. {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, remember to come find me once you've found every page.

C: 它蹲下，在垂死的垃圾桶耳边低声说出一个名字。「你是——」垃圾桶睁大眼睛，「可是——不…不可能……」最后一个字凝结在它嘴边，就像垃圾桶眼角噙住的泪滴。
E: It crouched down and whispered a name in the ear of the dying trashcan. "You—" The trashcan's eyes were wide open. "But— No, you can't be..." Its final words curdled inside its mouth, just like the teardrop hanging from the corner of its eye.

C: 在贝洛伯格你绝无可能看到这样一面墙：七零八落的纸张仿佛苔藓般爬满其表面。上层人的墙古板优雅，而地下的墙则充斥着独特的烟火气。
E: You will never be able to see a wall like this in Belobog: Sheets of paper occupy every inch of its surface like moss. The walls of the Overworld are classical and stately, while those in the Underworld exude a unique, quaint poignancy.

C: 星际和平播报将全程转播演武仪典的精彩赛事，欢迎各位观众届时收看。
E: Stay with Interastral Peace Broadcast for full live coverage of the Wardance's thrilling competitions. We encourage viewers to tune in and enjoy the action.

C: 话都让杨叔说。
E: Mr. Yang should do the talking.

C: 坦诚回答，如实相告。
E: Let's just be honest with her.

C: 噢，那可是非各位莫属。数日前，我们抓住了一位擅闯仙舟重地的星核猎手，叫做「刃」。
E: Ah, a matter that requires capable people such as yourselves. We captured a member of the Stellaron Hunters a few days ago, who goes by the name of "Blade."

C: 我也觉得。这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
E: I feel the same. He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...

C: 你是游客？别在外面乱晃了，快点回住处去吧。虽然我们仙舟云骑有自信保护你，但现在外面还是比较危险的。
E: Are you a traveler? You should avoid the outdoors and return to your lodging. We Xianzhou Cloud Knights may be able to protect you, but we cannot stress enough the dangers of being outdoors right now.

C: 无论如何，别担心，也别害怕！只要有我们在，仙舟就一定能够逢凶化吉。
E: In any case, worry not, and don't be afraid! As long as we're around, Xianzhou will surely tide over this crisis.

C: 是是是！咱们地衡司的人手已经倾巢而出，半个都不剩啦。倒是你们丹鼎司的人呢？怎么才来这么几个？
E: Yeah, yeah, yeah, the Realm-Keeping Commission is out in full strength — what about the Alchemy Commission? Why are there so few of you here?

C: 唔，每个月就领这么几个钱，出了事儿却得顶上前线……谁干谁傻啊。
E: Ugh, they pay us next to nothing then order us straight to the front line when things go south... I must be crazy.

C: 解了围？
E: Our help?

C: 如果没事就别到处乱跑是吧？真遗憾，罗浮的将军给了咱们一桩差事，少不得要跑东跑西。
E: Go running around, right? Well, your general gave us an errand, so I'm afraid we have to.

C: 你们丹鼎司的人呢？
E: Where are the people from the Alchemy Commission?

C: 我不认得。
E: I do not.

C: 不动身吗？在这里耽搁太久也不安全吧。
E: Are we heading off? It's not safe to linger here.

C: 不认识啊，遇见他和遇见你，这不是同时嘛。
E: Nope. I met him and you at the same time.

C: 还有什么好吃的？
E: What else is on the menu?

C: 要打就打，别拖时间！
E: If you want a fight, quit stalling!

C: 我觉得也是。倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
E: I think so too! I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!

C: 一旦烟雾止息，我会立刻前来，绝不让各位孤军奋战。
E: I will come at once when the smoke dissipates — you won't be left to fend for yourselves.

C: 一片狼藉的战场中，某个痛苦的呻吟吸引了你们的注意。
E: A painful moan amidst the ravaged battlefield draws your attention.

C: 有个受伤的战士没能归队…
E: There's a wounded warrior that didn't make it back to his unit...

C: 「建木」自从在大战中被斫断后，其根系盘虬，从未真正死灭。
E: After the Ambrosial Arbor was broken in two during the war, its roots were left gnarled and broken... yet it never died.

C: 慈怀药王，听我呼召！
E: Merciful Medicus, hear my call!

C: 开凿形骸，控驭血肉！
E: Chisel out the form, control the flesh and bone!

C: 现在不是说这个的时候。
E: Now is not the time.

C: 见过，那是将军请来的客人啊。他们是你的朋友？
E: You must be talking about the general's guests. Are they your friends?

C: {NICKNAME}，三月和杨叔…你把他们带到这儿来了？！
E: {NICKNAME}, March, Mr. Yang... You brought them here!?

C: 丹恒的兄弟！
E: ...Dan Heng's brother!?

C: 闭嘴，你也休想离开！
E: Silence! You're not getting away either!

C: 宇宙的一切都将以「毁灭」作结，「丰饶」与「巡猎」也不例外…
E: The universe will end in destruction, and with it the Abundance and The Hunt will disappear...

C: 霄龙现影，破！
E: Celestial dragon... Break!

C: 我想用这场仪式，将我的下属，和那个夺取她身份，以她面貌出现的绝灭大君分开。
E: I'd like to hold this ceremony as a way of distancing the memory of Tingyun from the Lord Ravager who tarnished her identity.

C: 这件事就按驭空大人的意思，交给我们来办就好。
E: Leave this to us, we'll take care of it as per your wishes, Madam Yukong.

C: 停云啊停云…该回赠你什么好呢？如果你……
E: Tingyun, Tingyun... What am I going to get for you? If only you... *sigh*

C: 好耶！
E: Nice!

C: {NICKNAME}，准备好了的话，请选几样纪念物放在星槎上吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, if you're ready, please select a few items to place aboard the starskiff.

C: 不是很想学呢…
E: Uhh... I'll pass.

C: 我们说好啦，你随时回来，我随时教你打牌。
E: We're in agreement then. You can come back any time and I'll teach you how to play.

C: 也就是说…丹枢大人再也不会来看我们了？
E: So... Dan Shu will never come to see us again?

C: 罗浮送出的结盟玉兆的另一半，玉兆被雕凿成猛虎之形，不知这究竟代表什么意思。
E: The second half of Luofu's jade abacus of allying oath. It takes on the shape of a tiger — not sure if this detail carries any significance.

C: 所以是什么事？
E: So... what came up?

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么样？做好出发的准备了吗？
E: How's it going, {NICKNAME}? All packed and ready?

C: （这，我的天啊……）
E: (This is, no way...)

C: 可惜还是到得晚了些，给各位带来了不好的入住体验，实在抱歉。
E: Alas, I arrived a little later than usual. I sincerely apologize for any unpleasantness during your stay.

C: 什么时候发现的？
E: When did you discover this?

C: 但你也说了，这事或许与「开拓」有关。
E: But you said so yourself: This could concern the Trailblaze.

C: 看来必须要参与了。
E: Time to get involved.

C: 不然呢，还能是家族白给的？
E: Of course. What, you thought The Family acted simply out of their own good will?

C: 遇到了点麻烦。酒店的预订信息里似乎没有你的名字……
E: We've run into some trouble. Your name isn't on the hotel's reservation list...

C: 那应该只是个花名…吧？
E: This is just a stage name... I guess?

C: 怎么了，还不打算入睡？是找不到房间，还是有心事想找我聊聊？
E: What's wrong? Not turning in? Can't find your room, or do you have something on your mind?

C: 开始我还以为这次真是来度假的，但现在…我觉得这场「盛会」一定非同一般！各方势力解读谜语，争夺遗产，简直和侦探小说一模一样！
E: Here I was, thinking of some good ol' relaxation, but nope! This "event" is a wild ride! The various factions deciphering the riddle, a power struggle of past legacies — feels like we're in a live-action detective saga!

C: 你的视野变得黯淡，感到身体开始溶解，与流质合而为一。你们共鸣，震颤，以令人沉静的频率浑合。你的心脏正在鼓动，引领一场协奏。
E: Your vision dims as your body dissolves, becoming one with the fluidity of the time-space. You resonate with and become attuned to the serene fusion of frequencies. Your heart drums, leading this symphony.

C: 请您迈入梦池，忘记生命中的悲伤与烦忧……
E: Please step into the Dreampool and let go of the sorrows and worries of life...

C: 爱德华医生不会对梦泡内容的真实性作任何担保——梦就是梦，享受它吧！
E: Dr. Edward does not make any guarantees regarding the authenticity of dream bubble content. Dreams are just dreams, so enjoy them!

C: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
E: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

C: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
E: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

C: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
E: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

C: 他在其中打入大量气泡，更名为「苏乐达」，还创造了「糖浆主义」——声称饮用苏乐达是一种全新的生活方式，并借此缔造了如今的商业奇迹。
E: Aideen then carbonated the beverage and renamed it "SoulGlad." He also pioneered the school of thought known as "Syrupism," in which he promoted the consumption of SoulGlad as a new kind of lifestyle. And just like that, he created a commercial miracle.

C: 这样就只差一件东西了，咱们得找台附近的街机…哦，巧了不是，沙龙门口就有一台。走走走，给你们看点好玩的。
E: Now, we're only short of one item, which we might be able to find in an arcade machine... Coincidentally, there's one at the salon entrance. Let's get moving. I want to show you something fun.

C: 你深呼吸，闭眼，鼓起勇气，怀抱着视死如归的决心，将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
E: You take a deep breath, close your eyes, muster your courage, and with a resolve akin to facing death, you reach out to the suspicious screen before you...

C: 没错。我们要去的地方就在前面——「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」！
E: Bingo. Our destination is right there — Peppy Pepeshi's Salon!

C: 对！看来你已经上道了，你也做过那种醒来后意犹未尽的梦，对吧？
E: Exactly! Looks like you've got the picture. You've probably woken up from a dream one time, and wished you could just go back to dreaming it, right?

C: …呜…呜呜呜……
你听过这首歌吗，《使一颗心免于哀伤》，那位知更鸟的作品。谐乐大典在即，梦境中偶尔也会奏响她的音乐。
E: Have you heard of the song? It's called If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking, by Robin. Her songs are played in the dreamland from time to time as the Charmony Festival is drawing close.

C: 我的「秘密据点」就在这里面。
E: My secret stronghold is in this area.

C: 你变得好怪——这下糟了。
E: You're acting weird... This is bad.

C: 当然，你们还是不能通过这里——这是我的职责！
E: Still, I won't let you guys in, because it's my duty to stop you!

C: 走吧，我们还剩一半路。
E: Let's go. Half the journey is still ahead of us.

C: 自拍，自拍…你说得对，我来这里好多次了，怎么没想到拍张照呢？
E: Selfie, selfie... You're right. I've been here so many times. Why didn't I think of taking a photo?

C: 这个地方，构造真的很复杂，每次经过都会头疼…记得不仅要启动，还得关闭筑梦遥眼几次才能通过。
E: This place is really complicated. It gives me a headache every time I pass through... Not only do we have to activate the Dream's Eye, but we also have to close it a couple of times to get through.

C: 我不明白…
E: I don't understand...

C: 唔，就没有办法摆脱它吗…？！
E: Ugh, is there no way to lose it...!?

C: 那到底谁才是最具资格的桶…不，那已经不重要了。
E: Then who is the most qualified can... No, that no longer mattered.

C: 倘若这一消息被外界得知，无论住客们的实际安全如何，盛会之星的名誉必然会受到影响。谐乐大典将至，他们不得不隐瞒此事。
E: Leaving aside the question of guest safety, were this to become public, it would tarnish the name of the Planet of Festivities. With the Charmony Festival around the corner, it's no wonder they'd want to keep it under wraps.

C: 真的很抱歉，我得离开一小段时间…「死亡」还在游荡，我必须亲自去确认姬子小姐和三月七小姐的安危，并给予提醒……
E: I'm really sorry, but I have to leave for a short while... Death still hovers about, and I must personally ensure Miss Himeko and Miss March 7th's safety, and warn them...

C: {NICKNAME}，姬子小姐有话想对你说…有坏消息，也有好消息。
E: {NICKNAME}, Miss Himeko has something to tell you... There's good news, and bad news.

C: 所以你也可以试着和别人合作哦…只要你看得见他们，呵呵。
E: So you can try working together with others as well... As long as you can see them, hehe.

C: （回到熟悉的房间了……）
E: (Back in this familiar room...)

C: 「钟表匠的遗产」……
E: Watchmaker's Legacy...

C: 听听你的直觉，毕竟你说过…「记忆」不会说谎。
E: Just listen to your gut — you were the one who said that... the Remembrance doesn't lie.

C: 我的看法或许会出乎你的意料。
E: My take on this might surprise you.

C: 这个方向…你还是要走吗？这可是千载难逢的机会，离开这里…也就意味着离开真相。
E: Are you still... continuing down this path? This is a rare opportunity. Leaving here... will also mean leaving the truth.

C: 看，此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻…不是么？
E: Tell me, doesn't this feel eerily familiar?

C: 这只是你的一面之词。
E: That's just one side of the story.

C: 这个噩耗对家族极其不利，所以他们一定会不遗余力地阻挠外人介入，尤其是公司。
E: This tragic news would be extremely bad for The Family, so they'll be doing everything they can to stop it leaking — especially to the IPC.

C: 那是当然。谁能想到死亡会真正降临在家族构建的美梦中呢，遇害者还是「谐乐大典」的女主角……
E: Of course. Who could imagine that death would actually descend upon the idyllic dream created by The Family, let alone that the victim would be the female lead of the Charmony Festival...

C: 流萤小姐的事，我们从黑天鹅口中听说了…可没想到，连知更鸟小姐也……
E: We heard about Miss Firefly from Black Swan... But we never expected Miss Robin to...

C: 砂金的目标是为公司收复匹诺康尼。为此，他必须扳倒家族，制造出足够大的破绽。
E: Aventurine's goal is to try and recapture Penacony for IPC. To do this, he'll have to bring down The Family in its entirety to create a big enough chance.

C: 她坐在人群的角落，默不作声，只是喝着*如梦初醒*，一杯、两杯…我说这种饮料辛辣、苦涩，不是美梦的滋味，只适合那些厌倦了苏乐达的人。可她却说……
E: She just sat in one corner keeping silent, chugging down a couple cups of Wake the Heck Up... I told her it's a pungent, bitter beverage, not the taste of sweet dreams — only for people allergic to SoulGlad. And she said...

C: 那我们是犯了多少错误…才要为了死亡而出生在这世上…？
E: Then how bad were our sins? ...So much so that we were born in this world of death...?

C: …你做了什么？
E: ...What have you done?

C: 这十七个系统时里，你无法离开梦境，也无法与任何同伴往来。你只有两条路可走，这取决于约定的时限内，你能否完成我的考验。
E: Throughout these seventeen system hours, you will be unable to escape the Dreamscape or contact any of your companions. You only have two paths before you, and it all depends on whether you can complete my test within the time limit.

C: 再加上她同为遗产争夺战的参与者…要如何在神不知鬼不觉的情况下潜入梦境？
E: She's also in the running for the Legacy... How is she going to sneak into the Dreamscape unnoticed?

C: 前提是利益一致。
E: It works only when all parties' interests are aligned.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: 这些宝石送给你。
E: Here, I got these gems for you.

C: 呃…哈哈，姬子姐姐说得对。
E: Um... Haha, you're right, Himeko.

C: 没关系。我会一直坐着，直到她改变心意为止。
E: Ah, forget it. I'll just stay here and wait until she changes her mind.

C: 收获不少啊！不知道这些够不够……
E: That's quite a stash! Not sure if it's enough...

C: 它身上好像掉了什么东西。
E: Look, it dropped something.

C: 这是星期日手里的另一块基石。相当漂亮的绿色，就像你一样，圆滑、狡诈……
E: This is the other cornerstone in Sunday's hands. A rather beautiful green, just like you, smooth and cunning...

C: 留在这里是多久？
E: How long will you stay?

C: 谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: 没关系，我会的。
E: It's alright. I know how to do it.

C: 「愿母神三度为你阖眼……」
E: "May the goddess Gaiathra close her eyes three times..."

C: {RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}从不瞥视任何人，祂无貌无形，更无意志可言…「虚无」平等地笼罩着每个人。
E: {RUBY_B#Nihility IX}The sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#} never glance at anyone. THEY have no face, no form, and even less of a will to speak... The Nihility envelops everyone equally.

C: 「提示」…不是「证据」么？
E: "Hint" ...is that not "proof"?

C: 但在此之前，在走向结局的路上，人能做的事同样很多。
E: But before the end, there are many things that humans can do while on their journey.

C: 不难，只是说出来怕你不信。那家伙自称「黄泉」，根据我们的眼线，她很可能是一个…「虚无」的令使。
E: It isn't, just that you might not believe me. That person calls herself Acheron, and according to our informant, she could be... an Emanator of Nihility.

C: 要真有人来找事，我们不怕上战场。请放心，梦境的和平稳定就由猎犬们来守护！
E: If trouble comes knocking on our door, we're not afraid to go to war. Rest assured. The Dreamscape's peace will be protected by the Bloodhound Family!

C: 而后便是良久的沉默。两人不再提起任何话题，似乎对这种沉默习以为常。
E: A long silence ensued. Neither of them brought up any topic, seemingly accustomed to this silence.
Two...

C: 我还是不能接受。
E: This is still hard for me to accept.

C: …{NICKNAME}，还记得「拉扎莉娜」这个名字吗？
E: ...{NICKNAME}, does the name Madam Razalina sound familiar to you?

C: 这先生受了不小的冲击，三月七小姐，能帮我去找一位天环族少女么？她的歌声可以治愈精神创伤。
E: This man has had quite the shock. Could you help me find a Halovian lady, March? Her songs can heal mental wounds.

C: 大家唱得真棒，我很少尝试这种曲风，也学到了很多！
E: Everyone sang so wonderfully! It's not often that I try this music style, but I've gained some valuable insights from it!

C: 如果把人比作鸟儿，这些孩子都是生来羽翼残缺的雏鸟。但在这片梦里，他们能获得完整的翅膀。尽管飞得跌跌撞撞，但也是在凭借自己的力量翱翔。
E: If we compare people to birds, these kids are like fledglings with impaired wings. But in this dream, they can fly freely. Even if they stumble along the way, they're still relying on their own strength.

C: 迷茫、怠惰、懦弱…这些人性中随处可见的弱点，被家族放大、滋养，将匹诺康尼变成了另一种监狱，并且远比过去那座更坚不可摧。
E: Confusion, laziness, and cowardice... weaknesses that plague humanity were magnified and nourished by The Family. Penacony became a new kind of prison, even more impenetrable than the previous one.

C: 看来你先找我对质是个相当正确的决定。
E: Confronting me first turned out to be a smart move on your part.

C: 那就有劳瓦尔特先生了。
E: Thank you, Mr. Yang.

C: 谨遵您的意志。
E: As you wish.

C: …请下一位上前。
E: ...Next. Please step forward.

C: 你…是否愿意补赎善工，以偿清你本应受到的罪罚？
E: Do you... seek to atone for your sins through good deeds?

C: 别带着那么功利的目的入梦啊！
E: Don't enter the dream with such a utilitarian agenda!

C: 现在怎么办？
E: Then what should we do now?

C: 是她给你的留言，错不了。她知道我们在一起行动，也知道酒店并不安全，要找个掩人耳目的地方。
E: No mistake, that's her message to you. She knew the hotel wasn't safe, so she suggested we find another place.

C: 作为最后一批参赛者，你们有多大把握能够通过所有挑战？
E: As the last group of contestants, how confident are you in overcoming all of the challenges?

C: 哎～没了我，这个列车组怕是要散啦。
E: The Express crew would've been disbanded long ago if it weren't for me!

C: 啊…这……
E: Ah... Wha... *laughs*

C: 这不公平！你现在就得帮我。
E: That's not fair! You have to help me now.

C: 太…太感动了，你们的表演甚至超越了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
E: It's so... so touching, your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

C: 所以我想，作为酒店门童，星穹列车的朋友中最了解匹诺康尼的人，小米沙，你应该能帮我们解开这个疑惑？
E: So I thought you might be able to help us in unraveling this mystery, Misha? As a hotel {RUBY_B#bellboy}doorman{RUBY_E#}, you know Penacony best among us.

C: 就是这儿…！
E: This is it...!

C: 嗯，它和钟表小子、镜子小姐一样，都是「罗盘号」的船员。折纸小鸟不止一只！它们是个大家庭，有许多长得一模一样的兄弟姐妹。
E: Yeah, it's a member of the Compass crew, just like Clockie and Miss Mirror. And there's more than just one Origami Bird! They are a big family with lots of brothers and sisters who look the same.

C: 听起来确实和「钟表匠」没什么关系啊，真的只是同名同姓？
E: It appears that the seafarer has nothing to do with the Watchmaker. So, perhaps it's just a coincidence?

C: 别叹气，要有白头发了…
E: Don't sigh, or you'll start getting gray hair...

C: 拉格沃克，你要去哪里？我们该出发去下一站了。
E: Where are you going, Legwork? It's time to head to our next stop.

C: 流萤小姐，你…已经做好觉悟了吗？
E: Have you... made up your mind, Firefly?

C: 这么做意味着向全银河近半数的派系宣战，家族没有理由这么做。
E: If The Family messes with Penacony, that would be like declaring war on almost half of the factions in the Cosmos. They have no reason to do that.

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕1系统时
E: 1 system hour until Charmony Festival

C: 「属于我的必将衰落，而你会超越它的孱弱。」
E: "What is mine shall wane, while you shall transcend its delicate nature."

C: 波提欧，怎么还有你？
E: Boothill, why are you here?

C: 嗐，搭个便车嘛，别紧张！
E: Hah, I'm just catching a lift. Don't sweat it!

C: 跌宕起伏，非常满意，多来点！
E: What a rollercoaster ride! It's just... so peak... Keep it coming!

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 博识学会的拉帝奥教授，阵仗真不小啊。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild's Dr. Ratio. This assembly is quite something.

C: 但我就没这么幸运了，即便身为忆者，也还是会受到「秩序」的影响，陷入幻觉。
E: Well, I'm not as fortunate as she is. Even if I'm a Memokeeper, I was still influenced by the power of the Order and fell into hallucinations.

C: 它可能不属于我，但一定会属于某个人。
E: It may not belong to me, but it definitely belongs to someone.

C: 那就是我的名字……
E: That's my name...

C: 认可太一之梦，沉溺在幸福幻觉中的人们……
E: They're the ones who accept Ena's Dream and indulge in their happy illusions...

C: 各位，跟我来吧。
E: Alright, please come with me.

C: 愿你的诡计…永不败露。
E: May your schemes... be forever concealed.

C: 就算未来会充满痛苦…我们也绝不逃避！
E: Even if the future is full of pain... we won't escape from it!

C: 然而，你的眼前依旧一片漆黑。没有红日坠入雪山、没有轻笑、没有繁星、没有枪声刀影，更没有「开拓」……
E: Yet, before you, there remains an abyss of darkness. No crimson sun descending upon snow-capped mountains, no gentle laughter, no twinkling stars, no echoes of swords clashing, and most of all, no traces of "trailblaze"...

C: 出发去找大家吧。
E: Let's go meet up with others.

C: 没想到这群小狗崽还挺能干的，居然真的全都给回收了……
E: Didn't expect those pooches to actually recycle them all...

C: 好突兀啊，完全不像这船上该有的东西。
E: Definitely not the kind of thing you'd expect to find on a ship like this.

C: 想必是那位老奥帝自作主张，想在公司和匹诺康尼正式会谈前探探虚实。
E: I believe Old Oti has taken it upon himself to test our limits before the official negotiations between the IPC and Penacony.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！不愧是战略投资部的「石心十人」，两位果然深谙谈话之道。
E: Ohohoho! I expected no less from the Ten Stonehearts from the Strategic Investment Department! You're definitely skilled in the art of conversation.

C: 纵横商界十个琥珀纪沉淀下来的经验智慧，果真名不虚传。
E: The wisdom and experience you've accumulated over ten Amber Eras are truly impressive.

C: 奥帝先生，我提议会谈的上半场就到此为止。请允许我和托帕单独商议片刻，稍后再代表公司做出回应。
E: I suggest we conclude the first half of our conference, Mr. Alfalfa. Please allow Topaz and me to confer privately for a few moments and to respond on behalf of the IPC later.

C: 来调饮吧。
E: Let's mix the drinks.

C: …这是家族的说辞，至于他们是否真的从头到尾一无所知，便是另一个微妙的问题了。
E: ...That's the claim The Family makes. Whether they were truly unaware of all this is a delicate matter.

C: 他的抵押物是自己的存储系统。很快，他作为「警探」的记忆就会被抹除，他会彻底忘记自己是谁，也不会记得自己曾经做出了什么样的牺牲。
E: He offered his own memory system as collateral. In due time, his memories as a detective will be erased, and he will completely forget his own identity and all the sacrifices he has made.

C: 原来如此。难怪你会说我拿不出等价的抵押物，因为「我自己的一切」没有意义……
E: I see. It's no wonder you said I can't provide anything of equal value, because nothing I own holds any meaning...

C: 什么都没当。
E: Nothing, actually.

C: 哼…你最好是。
E: Hmph... You better.

C: 嗯…一开始我以为答案就藏在「钟表匠」的谜题里，可惜找错了方向，但我也算是有些别的收获啦。
E: Yes... Initially, I thought that the answer might lie with the riddle of the Watchmaker. I was looking in the wrong place, but I did reap some rewards.

C: 嘿嘿…这话听着真舒服。不愧是咱们！
E: Aww... That's so nice of her. She's talking about us!

C: <size=36>一——！</size>
E: <size=36>One...!</size>

C: 哦，我的老天，你的演技已经几乎能够与花火•花花火小姐比肩了！但你依旧骗不了我！
E: Oh my, your acting prowess is almost on par with Miss Sparkle! But you still can't fool me!

C: 呵，又见面了，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我是匹诺康尼的「名侦探」。
E: Ha, we meet again, {NICKNAME}. I am Penacony's famed detective.

C: 就是你，去过两个现场的人！
E: It's you! You were at both crime scenes!

C: 不会又是那个经典谜题吧…
E: It's not gonna be that same old riddle again, is it...

C: 就是你让星期日做大反派？
E: You're the one who made Sunday a villain?

C: 不知道她们有什么过节…但这条路也被堵死了。
E: I don't know what grudges they have... but this path is a dead end, too.

C: 分享给你一句话吧，其实是黄泉小姐告诉我的，她说「所谓的不可能之事，只是尚未到来之事」……
E: I have some words to share with you, though they were spoken to me by Miss Acheron. She said that "The so-called impossible is merely something that has yet to happen..."

C: 说实话，最初听见列车长的请求时，我还挺吃惊的。
E: Honestly, when I heard the conductor's request, I was pretty surprised.

C: 星穹列车的各位准备离开匹诺康尼了么？
E: Is the Astral Express ready to depart Penacony?

C: 但，也不是所有的事都能用「神秘」来解释……
E: Either way, he's an "enigmatic" character for sure.

C: 算了，待会儿上课时可别再迷糊啦，不然一觉就把你送去流梦礁了。
E: Never mind. Just don't look so lost when we're in class later, or you might just sleep yourself to Dreamflux Reef.

C: 丹恒，你是不是知道什么？前台说帕姆也入住了酒店是怎么回事？
E: Dan Heng, do you know something that we don't? Why did the front desk mention that Pom-Pom is staying at the hotel too?

C: 同学们，大家好——或者说，大*蕉*好！
E: Hello, students. Or should I say, bananjour?

C: 活该啦！
E: Serves you right!

C: 好熟悉的描述…
E: A familiar description...

C: 你，去穿校服，不然扣分。
E: You, put on your school uniform or it's a demerit.

C: 形势还不明朗，先别轻举妄动，毕竟我们现在的身份只是「旁听生」。
E: The situation isn't clear. We shouldn't act rashly. After all, we're currently here as guest students.

C: 蕉？我蕉你宝贝？这香蕉什么？
E: Bananas? Son of a banana? What the banana fudgin' sundae?

C: 潮流不过是种名目，没有不会落幕的风潮。但如果你别有所求…我也不会多过问。
E: A fad is just a fad. It always comes to an end. But if you're here for something else, then I won't pry further.

C: 又一个跟风的…回去吧，这里只欢迎真正热爱睡蕉小猴的朋友。
E: Ugh, another bandwagoner. Exit's over there, sir. We don't welcome anyone but true fans of Slumbernana Monkey here.

C: 哼，到底是家族的话事人，懂的远比看上去多啊。
E: Hmph, as expected of one in a seat of power in The Family. You're a lot sharper than you let on.

C: 该回来见见大明星了！他宝贝的，这地方确实没有逊到要家族帮忙！
E: Time to go back to that singing queen! Forkin' hell, this place totally ain't shabby enough to ask The Family for help!

C: 哈——简单！
E: Hah! Yea, and it's simple.

C: 嗯…您听到那隐约传来的前奏了吗？
E: Mmm... It's the prelude. Can you hear it?

C: 保持平和的心态，想好你要创造的事物，让情绪与…情绪与什么来着？
E: Calm your mind, visualize what you want to create, channel your emotions to... what again?

C: 你的坚持为你带来了惨痛的代价，蕉师的责骂与台下同学的奚落声萦绕在你的耳边。你只是画出了自己想要画的东西，难道做错什么了吗？
E: Your persistence has come at a heavy price. The BananAdvisor's scolding and the mocking laughter of your peers echo in your ears. You were just drawing what you wanted — did you really do something wrong?

C: 你为什么说自己是忍者啊！你的星球真的有忍者吗？
E: Why do you call yourself a ninja? Are there really ninjas on your planet?

C: 飞龙•忍者已经有所察觉了吗？
E: Did you pick up on something, Ninja Hiryū?

C: 哦，终于找到你们了，亲爱的演员们！
E: There you are. I've finally found you, my beloved talents!

C: 蕉！
E: Bana!

C: 又错了！小猴还没有获得打败魔王的力量，怎么会这么勇敢呢？
E: You're messing it up again! Brave Monkey hasn't gained the power to defeat the Devil of Stress at this point. How can it possibly have so much grit?

C: 真的好疼！
E: Ow, that hurts!

C: 然而在下到访过那些星系。
E: However, I have visited those planets.

C: 别装了，大名鼎鼎的无名客，你们那边进展如何，什么时候盯上原始博士的？
E: Alright, great Nameless one, drop the act already. What's the deal on your side? When did you guys start layin' eyes on Dr. Primitive?

C: 脑子不好的人接招，脑子清醒的人还击。
E: The dimmer of us two plays the bait, the other get ready to fight.

C: 游侠先生，你会因此更加不幸吗？
E: Will this make you worse off, Mr. Ranger?

C: 有意思，有意思。模因会相互覆盖，病毒也不例外。若能将忍者演员记忆中的病毒「剪辑」出来，便有办法破坏猴子们的联觉梦境。
E: Well, well, well. If the memetic entities can overwrite one another, so can memetic viruses. If we can just "edit" this virus out of our ninja actor's memory, there may be a way to destroy those nasty monkeys' Synesthesia Dreamscape.

C: 纵使感官被邪术蒙蔽，在下也能看见此地正在上演的罪恶…可恨、可叹。
E: Even while my senses are dulled by sorcery, I can still see the grotesque sins that are unfolding here... How detestable and deplorable indeed.

C: 此乃御猿•邪忍的忍•斥候，它正在监视着樊笼中的受难者…大岚神啊，恶徒的眼目觊觎人间，你怎能继续合眸安眠？
E: This is Evil Ninja Osaru's ninja scout. It is currently monitoring the victims imprisoned in their cages... O mighty Aeon of The Hunt, evildoers have cast their covetous eyes upon the world. How can you continue to slumber with your eyes closed?

C: 苦茶大师，我现在…算得上「忍徒」了吗？
E: Master Kucha, do I... count as a "ninja initiate" now?

C: 莫要退却…忍侠不可退却！
E: Turn back around... Ninja Heroes never retreat!

C: 下•迷乱忍彩破邪魔阵之卷
E: Part Two: Vanquisher in Dazzle

C: 空手道…空手道为何？
E: The palm... Why... used on me...?

C: 三号也是失败品。她擅闯收容室，大肆制造混乱，还对研究猿出言不逊。仅凭这一点，她就已经不及格了。
E: No. 3 is also a failed experimental subject. She barged into the storage room without permission, created a huge mess, and was rude to the Research Apes. Just that alone is enough to make her a failure.

C: 妹子，听我说！你现在很危险，再不接受治疗，脑子早晚得炸掉！
E: Please, listen to me! You're in serious danger right now. If you don't get treated soon, your brain will eventually burst!

C: 不、不了！我要去看看彩梦校庆的新开幕式！
E: N—No thanks! I'm heading to the opening ceremony of the Dreamlight Anniversary!

C: 真怂啊！
E: Coward!!!

C: <size=36>银河忍法帖</size> \n 终
E: <size=36>Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions</size>\nThe End

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 尽管不属于白厄…但这片战场另有主宰。
E: Someone is manipulating this battlefield, someone who might not be Phainon.

C: 真厉害。这下，你也具备成为大祭司的资质啦。
E: Impressive. You too have the makings of a High Priest now.

C: 有人到来、有人离开，就像这段旅程的每一日，在磕磕绊绊中向前。
E: Some people arrived, and some left forever, just like every other day of this journey where we, stumbling, move forward.

C: 当然，眼下我不会苛求更多。
E: Of course. I know this is not the time to demand any more from you.

C: 哼，不错。那么，为做好万全准备，希望两位异乡的勇士也能助我一臂之力。
E: Hmph, discerning. Alright then, to be as prepared as I can, I hope that the two outlander warriors can also join me.

C: 这倒是个未曾设想的假说…不过依我见，古兽已在寰宇间销声匿迹近百余纪元，他们是罪魁祸首的概率微乎其微。
E: ...A hypothesis like that has never occurred to me, I must admit. But considering how the Leviathan hasn't been sighted in the universe for hundreds of Amber Eras, I think the possibility of it being the culprit is minuscule.

C: 这是…你做的？
E: You... did this?

C: *身体扭曲的崩裂声*
E: *sound of a body contorting and snapping*

C: 你想到什么了？
E: What are you thinking?

C: 「他面对内心至深的恐惧，战斗得十分勇敢，在凶猛的杀戮中战败身陨。所以，我将他接入身后这片沙场中，赐他与勇气、坚韧和牺牲相配的荣耀。」
E: "He faced the greatest fear in the depths of his heart and fought with exceptional valor, though he eventually succumbed to the brutal onslaughts. I have since brought him to the rear battleground, and granted him glory worthy of his courage, tenacity, and sacrifice."

C: 「不错！你那高尚的母亲也曾用手中长枪，让我领教过同样的气魄。」
E: "Commendable! Your noble mother displayed the same spirit with a spear in her hands."

C: …别提她的名字。
E: ...Don't you dare speak of her.

C: 这位女孩…还真是自来熟。
E: This girl... She's a natural at making friends.

C: 缇安也，相信他一定会好转的！
E: Trianne believes he'll get better!

C: 对不起…为了让金丝与地脉中的泰坦显迹共鸣，必须得念这个。
E: Ah, I'm sorry... I had to recite that chant so that the golden thread would resonate with the Titan's presence within the leylines.

C: *正常*？天啊，太可惜了。
E: Normal? Gosh, what a pity.

C: …卡吕普索阁下，还请别玩这种文字游戏。
E: ...Let's not get into a game of semantics, Lady Calypso.

C: 是不是还得用什么妙妙咒语？
E: Do we also have to use some kind of special spell?

C: 嗯…是有段时间没见面了哪。方才那场战斗十足酣畅，吾心中实在欢喜……
E: Yes... It's been some time. The battle just now was a true delight, and I feel quite elated...

C: 两条装模作样的鬣狗，只知道捡食腐肉，压根没有咬人的本事。
E: Those two hyenas are nothing but scavengers of rotten meat. They couldn't bite even if they tried.

C: 只要你接过{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，就必须踏上还乡的旅程。
E: If you take over {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, then you must begin the journey back to your homeland.

C: 也罢，我不为难你。面见那女人，我不反对。
E: Fine. There's no need to make your life difficult. I'm not against meeting that woman.

C: 您打算先斩后奏？
E: You intend to do it without her knowledge?

C: *我们*…有一个提议。这场城邦之间的矛盾，总得有人站出来解决。
E: ...We have a proposal. Someone has to resolve this conflict between the cities.

C: 不久后 缇宝的房间
E: Moments later, in Tribbie's room...

C: 朋友？他们都像妈妈和我一样，有好看的红头发吗？
E: Friends? Are they also like me and Momma, with pretty red hair?

C: 那…明早见，阿雅！
E: Then... See you tomorrow, Agy!

C: …好吧。
E: ...Okay.

C: 咦？欧洛尼斯……
E: Huh? Oronyx...

C: 不会吧…悬锋人？
E: No way... A Kremnoan?

C: 但事态紧急，实在没有与你细细磋商的余地…此事核心在你，我尊重你的选择。
E: The situation brooks no delay, and we have precious little time to confer and discuss the plan with you... That being said, you are the key to our success, and I shall respect any decision you make.

C: 我试试，不一定拦得住他…
E: I'll try, but I don't know if I can stop him...

C: 因为人要走的道路，只能由人来引领。不是觊觎神明之力，堕入疯狂的「人」……
E: Because only humans can guide the path to be trodden by humans. It's not the lot of "humans" who crave the power of gods and spiral into madness for it...

C: 你…要去往何处？
E: ...Where will you be headed now?

C: 即便没有对我的承诺，你也准备好献出自己的一切了，不是么？
E: You are ready to dedicate all that you have, regardless of the promise you made to me, aren't you?

C: 你已经成了这世上最强大的半神，迈德漠斯。你打算如何使用这份力量？
E: And now, Mydeimos, you have risen as the most powerful demigod in the world. How do you intend to wield this newfound power?

C: 悬锋之王，虽无印戒…却更有王相，如今。
E: The King of Kremnos, without the signet ring... But looking more like a king now.

C: 哈…哈……
E: Hah... Hah...

C: 怎么回事？
E: What's going on?

C: 与此同时 云石天宫某处
E: Meanwhile, somewhere in Marmoreal Palace

C: 眼下需要阿格莱雅定夺的事已经扎堆了，再让你们俩见面——说得直接些，难免会分散她的精力。
E: Matters that require Aglaea's attention are piling up. You two meeting again will — forgive my honesty — only distract her.

C: 还真是头疼啊……
E: Truly a dilemma...

C: 她…最怕孤单了。
E: She... hated being alone.

C: *我们*出生时，「圣女」这一身份已经名存实亡。能聆听泰坦指引的人，势必要担当他人的喉舌。
E: By the time we were born, the role of the Holy Maiden had already diminished to a mere title. Those in tune with the Titan's guidance are bound to become messengers for others.

C: 终于……
E: At long last...

C: 它由过去的*缇里西庇俄丝*写下，寄给未来的自己。在这道记忆中，是将来的缇里西庇俄丝为她排除万难，送她踏上遥远的旅途…前往*我们*所在的明天。
E: It's a letter written by Tribios of the past and sent to her future self. In this memory, it is Tribios of the future who overcomes all difficulties for her and sends her on a long journey... toward the tomorrow where we are.

C: 别担心。虽然*我们*早已习惯失去，但唯独决心与誓言，缇里西庇俄丝绝不会忘记。
E: Worry not. Though loss is something we've grown used to, our resolve and our pledge are what Tribios will never forget.

C: 我回来了。终于有时间休整一下…来聊聊吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: I'm back. Finally have a moment to catch my breath. Want to chat, {NICKNAME}?

C: 不过更有匹诺康尼特色的还得是这个——「能实现一切愿望的万能许愿机」。听听，像不像某个拙劣的商业骗局？还是在雅利洛-VI这样的穷乡僻壤才能骗到人的诡计。
E: But what's even more Penaconian is this "omnipotent wish-granting chalice." Listen to that. Doesn't it sound like a cheap business scam? Only someone from a backwater place like Jarilo-VI could be fooled by a trick like that.

C: 这样面目全非的世界，我还是第一次见到。
E: But I've never seen a world so completely alien before.

C: 那就出发吧！
E: Then let's head out!

C: 可是，他最终还是没能见到我成为王者的样子……
E: But... in the end, he never got to see me become a king...

C: 我…我不知道。
E: I... don't know...

C: 恰恰相反…再次回到这个世界时，我发现自己已经没有可以报复的对象了。
E: No. The exact opposite, in fact. When I returned to this world, I realized there was no one left to take revenge on.

C: 我觉得现在的生活是假的。
E: I feel like my current life is a lie.

C: 所以，我为你们编织了一个个温柔平和的梦境。这不正是你们内心渴求的东西吗？
E: Which is why I've crafted such gentle dreams for you all. Isn't that what you've been looking for all this time?

C: 很遗憾，我们确实不受人类法律的保护。
E: Unfortunately, we are indeed not protected by human law.

C: 再见了，匹诺康尼最成功的商人。我有句真心话一直想对你说——
E: Goodbye, Penacony's most successful merchant. There's something I've always wanted to say to you —

C: 且不谈公司的人，{F#她}{M#他}至少该相信我这个一同出生入死的老伙计吧！喂，{NICKNAME}，我可以担保现在一切安全，该出来谈谈合作的事了！
E: Even with the IPC, {F#s}he should at least trust me after we went through so much together. Hey, {NICKNAME}! Come on out! Let's chat about joining forces as a team! You ain't gonna get hurt!

C: 哦豁，抱歉，我忘了，在Assassin的宝具中，没人能听到自己的尖叫。
E: Oh. Wait. Oops, I forgot. No one can hear their own screams in Assassin's Noble Phantasm.

C: 若是智械的话…倒也不是不可能。但广告牌和电视机……？
E: If it were an Intellitron... that's at least plausible. But a billboard? A TV...?

C: 我只是听说过这个名字，这家伙是个活跃在匹诺康尼早期时代的烂片导演，拍摄过数量惊人、低成本的恐怖默片，特别擅于玩弄一些有趣的商业噱头。
E: I've only heard the name before. The guy was some terrible director back in Penacony's early days. He cranked out a ton of cheap horror silent films and was a master of interesting commercial gimmicks.

C: 「哦！我的显像管！啊！别用话筒砸我屏幕！嗷！」哐哐哐，砰砰砰。
E: "Oh no! My cathode ray tubes! Ahh! Don't hit my screen with your microphone! Ow!" Clunk clunk clunk, bang bang bang.

C: 让我们并肩作战。
E: Let's fight side by side.

C: 就能变回原样。
E: You'll go back to normal.

C: 变回原样！
E: Back to normal!

C: 你是说…前橡木家主？
E: You mean... the former Oak Family head?

C: 就像那位猎犬说的，会被纠正。
E: It's as the Bloodhound said: Corrective measures will be enforced.

C: 不应该是这样。
E: That's odd.

C: 瓦尔特先生，我有一事感到不解。
E: Mr. Yang. If you don't mind, there's something that puzzles me.

C: 我还在做梦吗…
E: Am I still dreaming...?

C: 稍安勿躁，这次换我来说明吧。
E: Everyone stay calm... I'll explain.

C: 老日，你怎么看？
E: So, what do you think, Sunny?

C: 不知找错了没有？
E: Not sure if I have the right person or not?

C: 有点精明。
E: A bit calculating.

C: 但看来毫无必要。
E: But now it seems it was unnecessary.

C: 没想到来的是驭空大人，真叫人又惊又喜……
E: Madam Yukong, I wasn't expecting it to be you. What a wonderful surprise!

C: 如果可以选择，我真不愿你做什么棋子。我只愿你仍是那快活的小狐狸，不必掺和进这场战争中……
E: If I could choose, I would never want you to become a pawn. I just wish you could still be that carefree little fox, not caught up in this war...

C: 「不是所有旅途都要通向星辰大海」，就算离开了列车，有些「开拓」也不会结束。
E: "Not all journeys lead to the stars." Even if we leave the Express, some Trailblazing paths will still continue.

C: 我在观众席上等你。
E: I'll be waiting for you in the audience.

C: 谢谢你的坦诚。列车组尽力促成如今的局面，也是出于相同的顾虑。
E: Thank you for being honest with me. The efforts of the Crew on Penacony were driven by the same concern.

C: 即使动因不同，各位也同样走在济世安民的路上，且比我走得更远。
E: You and I both strive for a peaceful society, even if our reasons are different, and you've gone even further than I have.

C: 有梦想是件好事，但飞得太高，脱离了实际，就不会有好结果。我无法接受你为了一个缥缈的愿望，就把所有人拉进自己的世界里。
E: Ideals are good to have, but nothing good comes from getting carried away in fantasies. I can never agree with how you dragged everyone into that world of yours just to fulfill an illusory dream.

C: 然后是<color=#dbc291ff>「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因</color>。
E: Next, we have <color=#dbc291ff>Melustanin, the Agate World</color>.

C: 感觉人手不太够啊…
E: Pretty sure we're going to need more help...

C: 虽然这些冰层并不冻手，但平时活泼雀跃的少女陷入静默，却格外叫人心生悲凉。
E: Although the ice is not cold to the touch, there is something particularly saddening about seeing a young girl who is normally so full of life fall into complete silence.

C: 说得太对了，黑塔女士！对于您这样的天才，公司就该无条件地提供一切资源，放任您在自己感兴趣的课题上肆意挥霍！
E: You're absolutely right, Madam Herta! The IPC should really be providing a genius like you with all that you require, so you can freely dive into any research that tickles your fancy!

C: 「通信区」，顾名思义，就是负责建立空间站与机器头之间沟通桥梁的扇区。
E: Unsurprisingly, the Communications Zone is where a bridge for communication will be formed between Droidhead and the space station.

C: 这声音是…二进制运算？难道是机器头？
E: Is this... binary arithmetic? Could it be Droidhead?

C: 不行不行，不可以给病号喝咖啡帕！
E: Nuh-uh! No coffee when she's already feeling unwell!

C: 如果你们继续挥剑，不但自己会沦为猎物……
E: If you continue brandishing your weapons, you won't only be putting yourselves in the crossfire...

C: 他们都看见了，没必要隐瞒。如果真是袭击我们的人，不会说这么多话。
E: There is no point concealing anything. They saw everything. If they wanted us dead, they wouldn't be standing around talking to us.

C: 前些天，我又目睹同伴死在那些怪物手下，实在崩溃了…就向奥赫玛做出祈祷。本以为回应没这么快，时间足够我说服诺杜斯先生，没想到各位来得如此迅速……
E: A few days ago, I watched another companion fall to those monsters, and I was shattered... I offered a prayer to Okhema, thinking the answer would take time, at least enough for me to convince Mr. Noldus. I didn't expect your arrival to be so swift...

C: 两位客人，也请一起来，跟在我身后……
E: Dear guests, if you would, I'd like you to please follow me...

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的分身……
E: A manifestation of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...

C: 在死亡面前，纷争也会产生犹疑。我…是「死亡」的影子。
E: In the face of death, Strife will also cause hesitation to arise. I... am the shadow of death.

C: 接下来，我会告诉你此世的真相。相应的，我需要你回以一个小小的承诺。
E: You will learn the truth about this world from me, and in return, I ask for you to promise me something.

C: …期盼我们击落众神，夺取火种，将神的权柄从王座上拉下，收敛于人类手中。
E: ...They are counting on us to vanquish the Titans, reclaim their Coreflames, topple them from their thrones, and take their authority for ourselves.

C: 现在该怎么办？
E: What should we do now?

C: 哈哈，一切顺利就好。
E: Alrighty, as long as things are going well!

C: 就是它！果然，天外…两位的城邦也有雅努萨波利斯的祭司嘛！
E: Yeah! We knew it, there are also Janusopolis priests beyond the sk — um, beyond Okhema... like the city you're from!

C: 呀，看来这孩子有些饿了。
E: Oh, this child looks hungry.

C: 看来发生了些意外呢。没关系，饲料还有很多…再去拿一块吧。
E: That was a little unexpected. Don't worry. There's a lot more feed over there. Just go get another piece.

C: 这样就好啦。希望二位喜欢。
E: And we're done. I hope that you like it.

C: 总有种微妙的预感，不会是我想的那样吧…过去看一眼。
E: I have a strange feeling about this. I hope that it's not what I think it is... Let's go take a look.

C: 不能见死不救，我们上。
E: We can't stand by and watch him die. Let's go.

C: 我们想请你帮个忙。眼下，名为「粉霞天女」的流言正在圣城广为流传……
E: We would like to request your help. Currently, rumors regarding the Rosy Celestial Maiden have spread throughout the holy city...

C: 自求多福吧，异邦人。祈祷这出闹剧还没传到阿格莱雅耳中。
E: Pray for the best, outsider. Pray that this farce has not reached the ears of Aglaea.

C: 见证…该怎么理解？
E: What do you mean by... witness?

C: 缇宝开启「百界门」，将你们送至命运重渊。
E: Tribbie opened the Century Gate and sent all of you to the Abyss of Fate.

C: 我们对翁法罗斯没有恶意…
E: We mean no harm toward Amphoreus...

C: 就别拿我打趣了。
E: Oh, please stop.

C: 听不清，它说的话像是谜语。
E: I couldn't really make it out. It was like it was speaking in riddles.

C: 使命艰巨，我必须聆听所有人的声音，决定出征的人选。
E: This is an arduous mission, and I must heed the voices of all to determine the best candidates for this campaign.

C: …我也愿意陪同前往。引渡将死的灵魂，为各位纾解重压……
E: ...I'm willing to join as well, to help guide departing souls and ease everyone's burdens...

C: {NICKNAME}，不知道你意下如何？
E: {NICKNAME}, would you be willing to fight alongside us?

C: 保护好自己，量力而行。
E: Keep yourself safe, and work within your capabilities.

C: 丹恒用沉默拒绝了你的提议。
E: Dan Heng refuses your proposal with silence.

C: 别的不说，施展「神迹」可是很看天赋的。没有祭司的共鸣力，普通人念上两句祷言就得昏迷不醒。
E: I have to say that the ability to perform miracles is innate. Without a priest's resonance, an ordinary person would fall into a coma after chanting the first few words of the prayer.

C: 我怎么数都是四个…
E: But I counted four...

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}。虽说不是非要比个高下，但我还是很讨厌输的。
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}. The competition might not be the real goal, but I still really hate losing.

C: 这场竞赛，你确实占了不少优势啊。{NICKNAME}，我们走？
E: You've definitely had the upper hand in this competition. {NICKNAME}, shall we go?

C: 难怪悬锋城能连战连捷，借这种方式，士兵简直源源不绝啊。
E: No wonder Castrum Kremnos keeps winning battle after battle. With this method, they can create as many soldiers as they want...

C: 「扎格列斯之手」？
E: The Hand of Zagreus?

C: 万敌展示出他收集的三十枚悬锋城徽记。
E: Mydei displays the thirty Castrum Kremnos crests in his collection.

C: 赶紧滚！非得让我这么说？
E: Get lost! Do you have to make me say this?

C: 又断了…看来泰坦的力量也维持不了这桥的稳定。
E: And it's broken again... I guess even a Titan's power isn't enough to stabilize this bridge.

C: 成败在此一举，{NICKNAME}。
E: Victory or defeat, it all comes down to this, {NICKNAME}.

C: 也许我们能得到些蛛丝马迹。
E: We might be able to get some clues from it.

C: 或许…<color=#dbc291ff>这扇大门只能在「正确」的时空下被打开？</color>
E: Perhaps... <color=#dbc291ff>this gate only opens in the right time dimension?</color>

C: 呵…不发表几句感言吗？带着两个沉默寡言的人一起旅行，感觉有点孤单哦。
E: Heh... Not going to share what's on your mind? Traveling with two quiet people really makes the trip feel a little lonely.

C: 我们。迷惑，解开。
E: We. Confusion, uncover.

C: 「君命无二……」
E: "Two pair..."

C: 别玩了，快告诉我真相！
E: Stop playing and tell me the truth!

C: 「迷迷」是你的名字？
E: Is your name "Mem"?

C: 记忆中的影子……
E: Shadow in the memory...

C: 快去吧，{NICKNAME}。哪怕全都忘记了也没关系…我会代替你把第二次邂逅的约定铭刻于心。
E: Go, {NICKNAME}. It doesn't matter if you forget everything... I shall engrave the promise of our second reunion in my heart on your behalf.

C: 泰坦，过往…迷雾。
E: Titan, past... Foggy.

C: 而寻找{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}弱点的任务…{NICKNAME}，可以拜托你吗？这是我发自肺腑的请求。
E: As for the mission of finding out {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s weakness... Can I leave it to you, {NICKNAME}? I ask this sincerely from the bottom of my heart.

C: 那就在此别过吧——我和丹恒即刻前往悬锋城，{NICKNAME}想办法破解蛮神不灭之躯的秘密。遐蝶小姐……
E: Then this is where we part ways — Dan Heng and I will head to Castrum Kremnos immediately, while {NICKNAME} works on uncovering the secret behind the barbaric god's indestructible body. As for miss Castorice...

C: 迷迷，相信。跟上，伙伴！
E: Mem, believe. Follow, friends!

C: 那么，就由我来为各位吟诵——
E: Allow me to sing it for you—

C: 悬锋…前往！帮助，伙伴！
E: Kremnos... go! Help, friend!

C: 呵呵…承蒙夸赞，黄金裔。
E: Hehe, that's quite flattering, Chrysos Heir.

C: 听不见吗？
E: Is he hard of hearing?

C: 我本以为你是会冲动消费的类型，{NICKNAME}阁下…有些刮目相看了。
E: I thought you'd be the kind to make impulsive purchases, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss.} {NICKNAME}, but you've certainly proven me wrong.

C: …格奈乌斯。
E: ...Gnaeus.

C: 不明所以……
E: Meaningless...

C: 不！！住手——
E: No! Stop!

C: 没错…没错。你身上的光环啊…我许久未见如此滚烫的灵魂啊。
E: That's right... I am. You have an unusual aura about you... I have not seen such a blazing soul in a very long time.

C: 「理智。」
E: "Reason."

C: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
E: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

C: 你愿意为一个…自己无法见证的未来做出牺牲？
E: You are willing to... sacrifice yourself for a future you won't get to witness?

C: （若虫已经定位到扰动的源头了…去找衣匠收集情报吧。）
E: (The nymphs have located the source of the disruption... I should check with the "Garmentmaker" for intel.)

C: （若虫标记出的威胁还剩一处。）
E: (There's one more threat marked by the nymphs.)

C: 这巨手真的曾被用来偷盗吗？
E: Was this giant hand really used for thievery in the past?

C: 时间紧迫，先看看能不能直接前进吧。
E: Time is running out. Check if you can directly move straight ahead.

C: 毕竟有两位半神的保护。
E: We're protected by two demigods, after all.

C: …都要归功于阿格莱雅和缇宝老师。在她们的保护下，公民们得以尽享安宁。
E: ...They have Aglaea and Tribbie to thank for that. It is because of their protection that the citizens are able to enjoy peace.

C: …呃，是什么呢？算啦，反正肯定是很重要的角色！
E: ...Uh, what am I? A—Anyhow, I'm an important character for sure!

C: 翁法罗斯内部，{NICKNAME}的私人浴宫……
E: Within Amphoreus, at {NICKNAME}'s private bath chamber...

C: 我告诉他，养好伤才是头等大事——好战友一生只会经历一次的晋升仪式什么的，不用太放在心上。
E: I told him that he should be nursing his wounds, and that he shouldn't be worrying about all this comrade's once-in-a-lifetime ascension ritual stuff.

C: 它说：「倾覆诸神吧」。
E: Overthrow the gods, it declared.

C: （泰坦的呓语）
E: (Titan's murmurs)

C: 此前我借给她一本诗集，是缇安大人转赠给我的。再往前回溯，是一位吟游诗人留给她的遗物。
E: Previously, I lent her an anthology of poems that Lady Trianne had gifted to me. Tracing back, this anthology was something left for Lady Trianne by a bard before their passing.

C: 明白了，感谢你的坦诚。
E: We understand. Thank you for being honest with us.

C: 你终于醒了。
E: You're finally awake.

C: 我…知道自己说话欠缺自信。但这个承诺，希望阁下能记在心上。在我将其兑现前…请一定要坚持住。
E: I... know that I'm lacking in confidence, but I hope that you can keep this promise of mine in mind. Before I manage to deliver on this promise... please do your best to hang on.

C: 我们刚才就在聊这事。该死，万敌在奥赫玛待了那么久，怎么就没人研究过他的不死之身？但凡能留下一点成果，现在也不至于毫无头绪……
E: That's what we have been talking about. Ugh, Mydei has been in Okhema for such a long time but — has no one ever thought to study his indestructible body? If there were even any minor breakthroughs, we wouldn't be as clueless as we are right now...

C: 不仅如此，他还认为所有生命和物体的组成、运动和变化全都源自「灵魂」本身。于是，我想……
E: Not only that, he also believed that life, as well as the composition, movement, and transformation of matter, all stem from souls themselves. This is why I thought that...

C: 这是什么意思…？
E: What do you mean...?

C: 比起结果未知的「周全之法」，直接剖开我的胸膛取出火种，岂不省得她夜长梦多？万事早已俱备，她只需要一个合适的时机。
E: As compared to a comprehensive plan with uncertain results, if you decide to cut open my chest and remove the Coreflame, wouldn't that settle her nerves even more? Everything is in place — she just needs the right timing.

C: 至少，你我都同意这位穷奢极欲的暴君正是奥赫玛和平最大的敌人。元老院愿意捍卫您生存的权利，正如我们捍卫每一位遭到压迫的公民。
E: At the very least, the both of us agree that this tyrant who wallows in extravagance and greed is the greatest threat to achieving peace in Okhema. The Council of Elders is willing to defend your right to live, just as we defend every oppressed citizen.

C: （啧…得不出什么有用的信息。）
E: (Tsk... I'm not getting anything of value from them.)

C: 您要我做的事，根本和处刑人无异，我要如何尊敬自己？
E: What you're asking me to do is no better than the task of an executioner, and yet you want me to respect myself?

C: 孩子，是我从冰原中带回了你，令你荒唐的命运开始转动。身为哀地里亚的行刑官之首，也是我将「处刑」这道重任不由分说，强压在你肩头。
E: Child, it was I who brought you here from the frosty plains and set your farcical fate in motion. It was also I, chief executioner of Aidonia, who forced the heavy duty of executing others onto you.

C: 世上的拥抱本该为相逢而生，可我的双手只能诉说告别。那时的我也有理由相信，这道宿命终将贯穿我的一生……
E: Embraces in this world are born of reunions, yet my touch speaks only of farewells. In that moment, I had no doubt that this destiny would weave itself through the entirety of my life...

C: 为了取回礼物，也为给猫咪怪盗一点教训，你们动身前往市集，并找到了她留下的短矛。
E: To retrieve the gift and teach Kitty Phantom Thief a lesson, you head to the market and find the short spear she left behind.

C: 这才是对的。
E: This is the right one.

C: 谈拢前，我先收个押金，没意见吧？嘿，走你——
E: Everyone cool with me collecting a deposit before we reach an agreement, right? Hehe. Now, come this way...

C: 这一屋子叮呤咣啷的，得值多少钱啊…全是你靠「再创世」的噱头挣的？
E: And this room is full of it... How much are these worth, hmm? Did you get all of this through that Era Nova gimmick?

C: 说吧，好容易割下这么大一块肉给我，什么意思？
E: Well, spill. Why are you giving me so much money?

C: 啊，这个…人家小小一只，身高不够，可以免票吧？
E: Um... I don't think I even meet the height requirement for the ticket, so I won't need one, right?

C: 也有另一些人认为，它们本就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的信使，引渡亡魂去往冥界。
E: Others think of them as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' messengers that guide the departed to the nether realm.

C: 请安心吧，我一向…不愿让这一刻太久。
E: Don't worry. I'm typically... unwilling to prolong such a moment.

C: 这不像你…即便是我向你下令，你应当也会拒绝才是。
E: That isn't like you... You would have refused even if I commanded you to do so.

C: 或许是与「死亡」的和解来得太过突然，你才会感到无助。
E: You are perhaps feeling lost from making your peace with "Death" in so abrupt a manner.

C: 不过…「纷争」……
E: Mere... Morsels...

C: 步入冥界之门…非我所求。
E: I seek not to enter the door of the nether realm.

C: 遐蝶…你会为逐火…完成使命么？
E: Castorice... Will you fulfill your duty for the Flame-Chase?

C: 这就是亡魂所说的炼金法阵——看来，需要分别置入「艾格勒的天空」、「吉奥里亚的大地」、「刻法勒的火焰」、「法吉娜的海洋」……
E: This must be the alchemical matrix the spirit mentioned. Let's see... We need to insert "Aquila's Sky," "Georios's Earth," "Kephale's Fire," "Phagousa's Ocean"...

C: 在行使神权，复活死者时，它也一定意识到了那代价究竟有多沉重。因此，它用尽最后一丝余力，将我送到了无人敌视「死亡」的城邦——呼唤「死亡」的斯缇科西亚。
E: They must have realized how heavy a price they'd need to pay when they used their divine authority to resurrect a dead woman. That's why they exerted every ounce of their strength to send me to Styxia, a city that called for "Death" — A land where none is hostile to "Death."

C: 可这些…都只是猜想吧？万一我们完成了仪式，结果却又完全不是这么一回事呢？
E: But all of this is just a hypothesis, right? What if we go through with the ritual, and it turns out totally different?

C: 不要随我冒险驶向茫茫的大海，说不定\n见不到我，你们会在大海中迷途\n我横渡的大洋从来没有人曾航行过
E: Venture not with me into the vast sea, for perhaps\nWithout seeing me, you will lose your way in the ocean\nThe ocean I cross has never been sailed by anyone

C: 那，还是叫我{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧。这样更轻松些。
E: Call me {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} then. It'll be easier.

C: 所以，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}并不能随心所欲地塑造万物，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}也无法裁夺万物生灵的命运——
E: That's why {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} cannot create living beings at will, nor can the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}"Hand of Shadow"{RUBY_E#} determine a person's remaining days...

C: *远方传来的轰鸣*
E: *A rumble from the distance*

C: 所以，答案是？
E: So... do you have an answer to that question?

C: 那刻夏阁下，别忘了……
E: Lord Anaxa, please do not forget that I—

C: 凯妮斯阁下，在公民目光的注视下，我们应坚持民主的精神，尊重议会结果。
E: Lady Caenis, with all the citizens here as witnesses, we should honor the spirit of democracy and respect the decision of this assembly.

C: 神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，其陈词诸位皆已明了。现在，根据奥赫玛法典，我要求诸位公民与我共同行使审判的权力。
E: Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany has made his statement clear. As per Okhema's Codex, I request all present citizens to stand with me in exercising the right of judgment.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>您将打碎一位「绝灭大君」的枷锁，而它的愤怒将吞没银河。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will break the shackles of a Lord Ravager, and when that happens, their fury will engulf the cosmos.</color>

C: 只是在感叹，这株参天巨树就是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的神躯？真是壮观。
E: Just amazed at how this towering tree is {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s divine body. It's a majestic sight.

C: 离开翁法罗斯的方法…
E: How to leave Amphoreus...

C: 真是一片曲折的树海啊。
E: These trees... They're like a maze.

C: 抱歉。所以，发生了什么？
E: My bad. So, did something happen?

C: 我们回去看看，克拉特鲁斯阁下，多谢你的情报。
E: We should get back. Thank you for the intel, Lord Krateros.

C: 毕竟…你、我，还有大家，我们终将要面对那个命中注定的「时刻」。
E: After all... You, me, and the rest, will all have to face that fateful moment eventually.

C: 还有，这位战士…我曾在哪里见过……
E: And this warrior... I seem to have met him somewhere before...

C: 来聊聊吧，小姑娘。或许我的旅途，不该结束得这么草率。
E: Let's chat, young lady. Perhaps I shouldn't end my journey so hastily.

C: 二位都做好准备了？
E: Are the both of you ready?

C: 况且，我的人生已经圆满，哪怕预言注定了牺牲，我经历的一切也不会消散，而将在你的回忆中永存，不是么？
E: Besides, I have lived a fulfilling life. Even though I was fated for sacrifice, none of the things that I've experienced will dissipate. Instead, they'll forever live on as memories inside your head, will they not?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>斯缇科西亚</color>——在我们的世界里，也有一座城邦完美符合这描述。
E: In our world, there exists a city which perfectly matches that description: <color=#dbc291ff>Styxia</color>.

C: 请为我们主持正义吧，那流着金血的魔女偷袭了骄傲的晨昏之眼，践踏了它尊贵的神格。而神明陨落的代价，竟要由我等虔信的天空子民来偿付！
E: Deliver justice for us. The witch with golden blood struck down the proud Eye of Twilight, desecrating their divine grace. Yet, it is we, the devout denizens of the sky, who are forced to pay the price!

C: 我只感到惋惜…但无法谴责她的选择。

C: 让她走吧，索拉比斯，露奈比斯。
E: Release her, Solabis, Lunabis.

C: 从现在起，她和她的后裔将同时背负天空的赐福与身世的诅咒。无论要花上多久，我都会等待那命运之人的到来……
E: From now on, she and her descendants will carry both the sky's blessing and the curse of their history. No matter how long it takes, I will wait for the one who is destined to arrive...

C: 他们留下的一道道光束，会促使人们心底的种子萌发嫩芽、长出新叶，并一路滋养着他们，茁壮生长——
E: The light they leave behind will inspire the seeds within people to sprout, grow, and thrive, nurturing them every step of the way.

C: 你…还在守护着我们么？
E: Are you... still protecting us?

C: 「哪怕到头来也只是个小偷…我……」
E: "Even if I'm nothing more than a thief... I..."

C: 什么…？
E: What...?

C: 当然会哦。钻心般的悲伤与不舍…我能原原本本地感受到它们带来的痛楚。
E: Of course, I do. A sharp, aching sadness... I feel every bit of it.

C: 等轮到我归还火种的时候…我可不想在大家面前出丑呀。

C: …{NICKNAME}，我们一起过去看看吧。但千万要小心……
E: ... {NICKNAME}, let's go check it out together. Be very careful...

C: …迷、迷迷！！
E: Mem! Memi!!!

C: 藏有大鱼…少刺多汁。
E: Is full of fish... Big and delicious.
What.

C: 这、这早就是共识了吧？可现在是性命攸关的紧急情况——
E: W—We already knew about the mad part! But are we still in danger...?

C: 怕我话里有诈？哈，大可不必！
E: You think I might be lying? Pfft. No need.

C: …嗯？你的传信石版响了？
E: ...Oh? Was that your teleslate?

C: 我们头顶的天空与每一位公民息息相关，将讨伐艾格勒留到逐火之旅的最后，想必是阿格莱雅女士经过深思熟虑制定的战略。

E: Sure, that's what I've been looking forward to! We deserve to enjoy ourselves after all the hard work.

C: 你喜欢钓鱼吗？
E: Are you into fishing?

C: 所以人们才需要占卜，只是想给自己一些小小的理由，鼓起跨越那片未知的勇气……

Ah...

C: 谢谢你，缇宝老师！如此一来，昏光庭院就能在奥赫玛获得新生啦。
E: Thank you, Lady Tribbie! With this, the Twilight Courtyard can be reborn in Okhema.

C: 建立它的目的，原本是为了纪念那第一次逐火之旅，为了追忆于千年前为翁法罗斯做出重大牺牲的英雄们。

C: 你这千年不死的妖女，披着神明的皮在人间惑众…一直以来，我们都对你太仁慈了。
E: You ageless witch, hiding behind a divine facade to deceive mortals... We've been far too kind with you.

C: 桀桀桀，有趣，真有趣……
E: Hehe, interesting, very interesting...

C: 再见，阿格莱雅。
E: Goodbye, Aglaea.

C: 这是……
E: What's this...?

C: 风堇通过彩虹匣召唤出了先祖的英魂……

C: 用白厄阁下的话说，他一定是成为了「更好的人」。

C: 前提是能修好车厢。

C: 「行百里者半九十」——这句是丹恒教我的。道理差不多，就是…更文绉绉一些。

C: 愿「晨昏之眼」永不睁开，霖雨永不止坠……

C: 索拉比斯，放下你的孤傲，接受他们的善意吧。

C: 露奈比斯…阁下？

C: 嘟！嘟嘟！

E: It meant you would leave our side and embark on a dangerous journey. If it meant losing a dear friend... we would be heartbroken.

C: 分身，幻术…净是些藏身阴影的把戏。

C: 巴特鲁斯？！这究竟是……

C: 的确，我们不需要在这里道别……
E: Indeed, we don't need to say goodbye here...

C: 究…究竟发生了什么？！
E: Wh... What in the world happened!?

C: 我二人定将不遗余力，为您开道！
E: We will do everything in our power to clear the path for you!

C: 要不还是叫上丹恒一起…

C: 那是名为「权杖」的，凡人难以想象的宏观演算阵列。它为模拟星神的思考而诞生，又在诞生的一瞬成了星神思考的组成。它们遍布寰宇，宛如<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊的天体神经元</color>。
E: The "Scepters," a macrocosmic computational array beyond mortal comprehension... Made to emulate the Aeon's thoughts, it became part of the Aeon's cognition at birth. Scattered throughout the cosmos, these arrays <color=#dbc291ff>act as Celestial-Body Neurons for Nous</color>.

C: 白厄，昔涟？你们往哪里去呢？
E: Phainon, Cyrene? Where are you two headed?

C: 如果是梦游仙境之类的幻想，和我的英雄故事也差不了多少啊。

C: 站在高处确实心情愉快。
E: It does lift your spirits, being up high.

C: 神谕牌找到了，在这里——
E: Here they are! The oracle cards—

C: 「救世主」…又是这张牌。
E: The Deliverer... this card again.

C: 只有我…？
E: Only... me?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>去保护应被保护的人吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Protect those who must be protected.</color>

C: 白厄……

E: But you? You will never escape this cage. You can claim victory of the spirit if you wish. But we both know — the moment that score shifts from 0 to 1...

C: 我便足以奏响「再创世」的凯歌。

C: 于是，时间向我身后退去。

C: 第 1 次永劫回归
E: The 1st Eternal Recurrence

C: 第 <unbreak>108642</unbreak> 次永劫回归

C: 那我偏偏，绝不顺从……
E: I will still never yield to it...

C: 我愿意。
E: I will.

C: 这声音是……
E: Who's that...?

C: 堵堵堵！这是一场「豪堵」，朋友！
E: Jam it, jam it, jam it all up! This is some glorious jamming, friends!

C: 他们一直心系你、我，还有三月七的安危。即便身处世界外，也从未停下过救援。
E: They never once stopped worrying about us, about you, me, or March 7th. They never gave up on trying to save us, even from outside this world.

C: 亲身踏入那座「岁月」的迷宫时，我才猛然想起…自己和她早有过一面之缘。
E: It was only when I personally stepped into the maze of "Time" that it suddenly struck me... She and I had crossed paths once before.

C: 离开翁法罗斯时，我无意中和她产生过接触。或许是不想暴露行踪，她从我的脑海中剥离了那段记忆。
E: I had an unexpected encounter with her when I left Amphoreus. Perhaps to avoid exposing her whereabouts, she stripped that memory from my mind.

C: 她想要清洗「负世」的记忆。
E: She wants to erase "Worldbearing's" memories.

C: 从未在世界内部见过…
E: I've never seen it anywhere in this world before...

C: 显然，她的出现打乱了你的部署，甚至让你不得不寻求「合作」。
E: More like her appearance completely interrupted your plans, even forcing you to seek out "collaboration."

C: 好久不见，伙伴。
E: Long time no see, partner.

C: 我们曾并肩同行，将后背交给彼此。唯独这份记忆，绝对不会磨灭。
E: We once walked side by side and trusted each other to watch our backs. That memory will never fade away, even if all else does.

C: 白厄已经为我指明了方向。开启通道吧。
E: Phainon already pointed me in the right direction. Open the way.

C: 丹恒阁下已经离开，你可以畅所欲言了——阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
E: Lord Dan Heng is gone. You can now speak your mind, Lord Anaxagoras.

C: 在刻意将什么东西藏进大脑深处。
E: You were deliberately trying to hide something into the depths of your brain.

C: 眼前这片荒芜，是你一手造就。
E: You created this wasteland before us with your own hands.

C: 你不过是创造了一尊伪神，而翁法罗斯——早已将弑神写入了命运。
E: You merely created a false god... but Amphoreus has long since written deicide into its fate.

C: 以歌耳戈之子的名义：勇士将为「纷争」而战，不以荣耀为终点，而在光荣中前行。
E: In the name of the son of Gorgo: Warriors shall fight for "Strife," not with glory as their end, but to march forward in its light.

C: 兹事体大，就别打趣了。星核之乱、演武仪典…乱象虽平，坊间流言蜚语可是有增无减。
E: This is no laughing matter. Between the Stellaron crisis and the Wardance ceremony... Though the chaos has settled, rumors and speculation are only growing by the day.

C: 只怕稍有不慎，罗浮又会落入幻胧的陷阱，离「毁灭」越来越近。
E: One wrong move and the Luofu will fall into Phantylia's trap again, inching ever closer to Destruction.

C: 姬子小姐，好消息。七天将重新对现状做了讨论，并由我代为传达：名义上，联盟仍将会战战力限制在罗浮一舰，但曜青也已部署在周围战区，以备不时之需。
E: Good news, Miss Himeko. The Seven Arbiter-Generals have reconsidered the current situation, and I'm here to relay their message. Officially, the Alliance's combat forces will still be limited to the Luofu, but the Yaoqing has also been deployed in the surrounding war zone as a contingency.

C: 联盟大义。银河能有各位英雄豪杰，实在是一件幸事。
E: The Alliance truly embodies the principle of righteousness. It's fortunate that the cosmos has great heroes like you.

C: 如有不测…还请托帕小姐能够帮忙，救援受灾民众。
E: If anything goes wrong... Miss Topaz, I hope you can help out and rescue the affected citizens.

C: 「看『负世』的神谕，是如何改变这个世界！」
E: "Watch how the Worldbearing prophecy changes this world!"

C: 是啊，{NICKNAME}，{F#她}{M#他}为翁法罗斯带来的奇迹……
E: Yes, it's the miracle {NICKNAME} brought to Amphoreus...

C: 直到揪出<color=#dbc291ff>第十三位泰坦</color>的秘密。
E: Until we uncover the truth behind the <color=#dbc291ff><unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan</color>.

C: 黑塔，如果我们失败了呢？
E: Herta, what if we fail?

C: 结论成立。「赞达尔」引爆了一颗星核，只为彻底「清洗」权杖系统。
E: Exactly. Zandar blew one up just to "clean" the entire Scepter system.

C: 你刚才说，德谬歌留下了痕迹。
E: You said the Demiurge left a trace, right?

C: 喔？
E: Huh?

C: 这意味着，她的牺牲和努力，没有被世界遗忘，对吗？
E: That means... her sacrifice and everything she did wasn't forgotten by the world, right?

C: 什么话……
E: Come now...

C: 别急，让我猜猜。这位粉头发的，想必就是「最初的智种」，德喵…德谬歌小姐！
E: Hold on, let me guess. This pink-haired one... you've gotta be the "first Nouspore," Miss Demeow... Demiurge, right?

C: 果然，大家都能听见呀。
E: I knew you could all hear it too.

C: 听不懂。你是说，你的想法改变了？
E: I don't get it. Are you saying you've changed your mind?

C: 现在，你已经被天外的智者囚禁。
E: Now, you are imprisoned by the sages from beyond the sky.

C: 但在「开拓」和「创世」笔下：明日，星星会如此传唱……
E: But under the pens of Trailblazing and Genesis, the stars shall thus sing of tomorrow...

C: 「干嘛搞这么伤感？」
E: "Why so sentimental?"

C: 可偏偏这一切，他都没能守住。
E: But in the end, he couldn't hold on to any of it.

C: 「无尽的杀戮，无尽的徒劳。」
E: "Endless slaughter... all for nothing."

C: 我们会让银河的命运驶向正轨。
E: We will guide the fate of the cosmos onto the right track.

C: 最后的课题，无需再以理性求解。尽情实践批判吧。
E: The final problem no longer requires a rational solution. Feel free to critique it to your heart's content.

C: 还记得吗？上一次启程时，也是在这里，我问过{NICKNAME}……
E: Do you still remember what I asked {NICKNAME} at this exact spot the last time we set off?

C: 什么意思…
E: What do you mean...

C: 还有，无数个自己。
E: As well as countless versions of me.

C: 然后，将它们转化为「毁灭」。
E: Then... converting them to "Destruction."

C: 「是呀。我想，祂也在等待这一刻，权杖『身心合一』的瞬间……」
E: "Yes. I imagine THEY have also been waiting for this moment, when the Scepter's 'body and heart become one'..."

C: 列车长？时间不是静止了吗…
E: The conductor? But I thought time itself had stopped...

C: 在不断失去的尽头，再度拾回一切！
E: And at the end of our constant losses, reclaim everything we have ever lost!

C: 别藏了。
E: Quit hiding.

C: 你说呢？要知道，多洛斯有句古话，「无论身处何地，都不可停止捕钱」……
E: What do you think? You know what they say in Dolos: "No matter where you are, never stop chasing money..."

C: 闭嘴呢？
E: Shush!

C: 你说的事，的的确确已经发生过了。我们战胜了铁墓，并以身引火，净化了它的余烬。
E: What you speak of has indeed already come to pass. We triumphed over Irontomb, drew its fire unto ourselves, and purified its embers.

C: 我能想象，你、丹恒、还有三月小姐，你们被困在翁法罗斯时，一定十分想念这里的一切：漂亮的窗户，惬意的音乐，列车上的旅伴……
E: I can imagine how much you, Dan Heng, and Miss March must have missed everything here when you were trapped in Amphoreus. The beautiful windows, the soothing music, your fellow travelers on the Express...

C: …你脑子里打的算盘，我可全听见了！
E: ...I can hear all those sneaky little plans brewing in your head!

C: 「远行的风儿，回家吧。」
E: "Homeward you come, distant wind."

C: 我们可是它共同的主笔呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: We're its co-authors after all, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是…书签吗？
E: Is that... a bookmark?

C: 还记得吗？灰白的黎明，刺破长夜的瞬间……
E: Remember? That pale dawn breaking through the endless night...

C: 「嘘——还是算啦♪」
E: "Shh— Never mind ♪"

C: 我许下心愿，在十一月的第十二天，十三位英雄，会将三千万次生命中点燃的每一颗火种，泼洒在群星间……
E: I make this wish: On the twelfth day of the eleventh month, thirteen heroes will take every Coreflame ignited across thirty million lifetimes and scatter them among the stars...

C: 黑潮，会毁掉雅努萨波利斯吗……
E: Will the black tide destroy Janusopolis...?

C: 「孩子，大声地哭吧。将你的声音，带给欧洛尼斯。」
E: "Cry loud, child. Let your voice reach Oronyx."

C: 桃子。走了。
E: Peach. Left.

C: 「如果我把所有关于『明天』的故事讲给你听……」
E: "If I tell you all the stories of 'tomorrow'..."

C: 简单。我会。我学。
E: Easy. I can. I learn.

C: 因为它不再纯粹。跌落也不是意外，是它向命运发起抗争，以破碎书写故事的结局。
E: It happened because the flower was no longer pure. The fall was not an accident. It was the flower declaring rebellion against fate, and writing the ending of the story with the flower's own shattering.

C: 「但这不妨碍因子学习、识别情感反应，并通过模仿，与生命进行沟通。这是一种客观的、没有『你我』之分的模式识别。」
E: "However, that does not hinder the factors from learning and recognizing emotional responses, then communicating with lifeforms via imitation. That is an objective form of pattern recognition that does not distinguish between 'the self' and 'the other'."

C: 我的「哀怜」…是一种弱小的，无力的，对自己的伤害。
E: My "lament"... is a type of compassionate pain that is weak, powerless, and only targeting myself.

C: 因为「憎恨」的尽头是一场烈火，但「哀怜」却可以悄无声息地，淹没一切。
E: For while the end of "hatred" is a blazing inferno, "lament" can drown out everything in muted silence.

C: 权杖的「心智」不光活着，还前所未有地强大。你的失败已经板上钉钉了。
E: Not only is the Scepter's "consciousness" still alive, it's also more powerful than it has ever been. Your defeat is already set in stone.

C: 你们在第一线鏖战的英姿，公司和仙舟的军队都有目共睹。请允许我为游侠拔刀相助的勇义报以真挚的感谢。
E: The soldiers of both the IPC and the Xianzhou saw the way you all fought on the front lines. Please accept my sincere thanks for the bravery the Rangers showed.

C: 但现在██不可思议█
E: But now ██ Unbelievable █

C: 哀丽秘榭的女儿
E: Daughter of Aedes Elysiae

C: 黑塔的玩具，空间站收藏的「奇物」目录。里边有很多有趣的东西。
E: Herta's toys, a catalog featuring the space station's collection of rare items. They've got a lot of interesting gadgets.

C: …我先走了。
E: Ugh. I should probably leave.

C: 快追！
E: Hurry up and chase it!

C: 你刚刚答应我的天价报酬呢？
E: What about the big reward you promised me?

C: 妙啊，年轻人！你是不知道刚刚我有多烦躁，手上拿着好东西，却只能望梅止渴，差点我就上牙咬了。
E: Good one, kid! You have no idea how frustrated I was just now. I had this tasty treat in my hand, but I couldn't drink it! I almost tried to pry it open with my teeth!

C: 可惜屁用没有，整个机修间就我一个人。
E: Unfortunately, it doesn't mean jack, because I'm the only one in the maintenance room.

C: 找到宝藏就好。
E: As long as we can find the treasure.

C: 你活得挺通透。
E: You are very enlightened.

C: 虽说想法不错，但这张手稿已经被显影试剂浸透，脆弱不堪，一碰即损，怕是撑不到你与买家接头的那一天。
E: As good as the idea may sound, this manuscript is soaked in Autoradiopraph reagent, which makes it very fragile. You'll break it with the slightest touch. I'm afraid it won't last until you find a buyer.

C: 呵，你不就是想知道黑粉群里的「瓜田里猹」到底是谁么？
E: Heh, you want to know who Richard_Knowitall from that Heritor group is, don't you?

C: 暂时不需要了。
E: Not now.

C: 啊…今天也是又大又卷又膨的愉快一天。
E: Oh... Today is another big, curly, and puffy day.

C: 在我表白前的那次通讯中，她还向我描述了一场壮丽非常的<color=#dbc291ff>星震</color>。
E: During the communication where I confessed my love, she told me about a spectacular <color=#dbc291ff>starquake</color>.

C: 拒绝了？
E: Did she say no?

C: 宇宙里会有什么呢？
E: What resides in the deep space?

C: 那里也许危机四伏。
E: It may be full of dangers.

C: 咦，是你回来啦。这么快？这条鼓劲口诀，我才念了<unbreak>167</unbreak>次而已……
E: Hey, you're back already! So soon! I've only recited this morale chant <unbreak>167</unbreak> times.

C: 这位失踪的亚伯拉罕很容易辨认，他戴着眼镜，身形瘦弱，还总是念叨着「人总是要死的」。
E: Abraham is easy to identify. He is thin, wearing glasses, and always mumbling about "Life is but a path to death."

C: 去他个大扳手，我信了艾丝妲那丫头说空间站会扩招的鬼话！
E: Darn it! I can't believe I actually bought that Asta girl's nonsense about how the station is on a hiring spree!

C: 没什么，就当我自言自语吧。
E: Nothing. I'm just talking to myself.

C: 你手上怎么拿着鄙人的手稿？在我印象中，它们已经尘封很久了。
E: Why do you have my manuscript? I distinctly remember putting it away a long time ago.

C: 请销毁危险的希拉。
E: Please destroy Sheila.

C: 真可笑啊……
E: How ridiculous...

C: 放心好啦，你想要什么呢？听说最近很流行歼星舰，不过那玩意吨位挺大，感觉你未必会喜欢……
E: Don't worry. Do you have anything in mind already? I heard the starnought fleet has been very popular recently. But that thing is huge. I don't think you'll like it...

C: 但现在调查不出来…
E: But my investigation couldn't corroborate this...

C: 模因病毒是通过虚拟数据传播的，而空间站里所有虚拟数据都会在终端机上留下完整的监控记录。
E: The memetic virus is transmitted through virtual data. And all the virtual data in the space station leave traces in the terminal.

C: 行，帮我开下终端机。
E: Sure. Please turn on the terminal for me.

C: （明明字单独看我还认识，摆一起就看不懂了，而且看完感觉发晕，好想吐……）
E: (I understand every single word but I don't understand when they are put together. I feel dizzy reading them. I want to throw up...)

C: 哎，你看最后的工作目标：从心、从镜、从我。这怎么看都很怪吧？
E: Look, at his last work objectives entry: "Of the heart. Of the mirror. Of the self." It's so strange...

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 之前阿兰队长过来拜托我的时候，神色与你颇为相仿。他那个时候也非常焦虑，迫切地希望我给他一个答案。
E: Captain Arlan had a similar expression to yours when he found me. He was anxious and desired an answer.

C: 这张照片怎么看都是从角落里偷偷拍摄的…不过卡波特教授应该知情才对，毕竟上面都有他自己的亲笔签名。
E: Looks like a candid shot... but surely he knew it was being taken — it's autographed.

C: …那你多加小心，此地还有些「军团」残党。
E: ...Then be careful. There are still Legion remnants in the area.

C: 是！代理大哥！
E: Yes, brother Dan Heng!

C: 我这里发现了一块破碎的天花板，这个战斗痕迹，肯定是大哥打下来的！
E: I found a broken ceiling tile. This mark... it must be from where Brother Arlan smashed it down!

C: 毕竟他主动要求一个人去调查，我也不好拒绝嘛～
E: He wanted to go investigating on his own, so I let him~

C: 不过他听我说完这句话后，说了句什么「丹恒先生所言极是」？
E: But when he heard that, he said "Mr. Dan Heng was right."

C: 这…这确实是我替卡波特教授代笔完成的。
E: ...I—I did write this for Professor Capote.
Mmm!?

C: 事关科员或有古怪…
E: There's something fishy about this researcher thing...

C: 我犹豫了很久要送什么，思来想去，还是觉得自己擅长的才最合适。小姐很爱吃这个，希望你也能喜欢。
E: I spent a long time wondering what to give you... In the end, I realized I should stick to what I'm good at. Miss Asta loves my fried rice, so I hope you like it too.

C: 哦！你好，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。久闻大名，你可是黑塔最近常挂在嘴边的人。
E: Ah! Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've heard so much about you. Herta talks about you often.

C: 抱歉…本来还想带你四处逛逛的，这下怕是抽不开身了……
E: Sorry... I wanted to show you around, but now I don't think I'll be able to get away...

C: 一滴水。
E: A drop of water.

C: 奇怪，应该就在这附近啊，该不会是藏在黑塔女士的画像里吧……
E: Strange... it should be around here somewhere. Maybe it's hidden inside Madam Herta's portrait...

C: 嗯，我也没想到。空间站的事务通常都是艾丝妲站长在打理，我还是第一次见黑塔女士亲自下指令。
E: Yeah, it was pretty unexpected. Space station affairs are usually handled by Lead Researcher Asta — this is the first time I've seen Madam Herta give the orders in person.

C: 还是有些担心…
E: I'm still a little worried...

C: 「搞什么，这条路明明是对的嘛。黑塔这家伙，还玩心理战术啊。」
E: "What the... This was the right way all along. Ugh, Herta's got some psychological tactics going on."

C: 她固然是为星核而来，却也对奇物表现出了浓厚的兴趣，而在我们意识到以太卡带的存在后，她又恰到好处地出现在了模拟宇宙中。
E: She came for the Stellaron but showed a strong interest in the curios... And just as we found out about the existence of the Aether Cartridge, she just so happened to show up in the Simulated Universe.

C: 就让我们陪她玩到最后吧。
E: ...in which case — let us accompany her till the end.

C: 模拟测试用的场地已经布置好了，事不宜迟，咱们赶紧开始吧。
E: The simulation testing grounds is ready. Let's get to it.

C: …情况不妙。{NICKNAME}，我要你和丹恒去支援三月。
E: ...Not good. {NICKNAME}, I need you and Dan Heng to check on March.

C: 要不让我遥控试试呗？感觉这个产品很适合推销给各种飞船备着…给银枝的代言产品也找到了，啧，记一笔。好，继续来咯———
E: Mind if I take it for a spin? This little gadget could be the next big thing in spaceship cleanliness. Even Argenti could put his name to it. I'll jot that down. Let's carry on...

C: 我愿一次又一次，守护这些「美」的种子，令其绽放纯洁晶莹的花，以向祂证明我的虔诚…这是在名为「银枝」的旅途中，所必然发生的…
E: I am willing, time and time again, to protect these seeds of beauty — to allow THEM to bloom into pure and radiant flowers, to demonstrate my devotion to THEM... It is an inherent part of the journey of Argenti...

C: 别装傻，好好想想。
E: Don't play the fool. Think.

C: 你问过界种科的室长吗？
E: Have you asked the Department of Ecology head?

C: 咦，等等，这么一说…我有了一个大胆的猜想，但需要验证下。
E: Huh, now that you mention it... I have a wild hypothesis, but it needs verifying.

C: 真的假的？！
E: Seriously!?

C: 唯一的线索是阿德勒的发现：在失踪事件发生前后，空间站的自动灭火系统有短暂启动的记录。
E: There's only one clue. Adler observed that the automatic fire-suppression system was momentarily activated around the time the disappearances occurred.

C: 你的办事能力，我信得过。要不考虑下？此间事了，跟我一同离开？
E: I have faith in your abilities. So, how about my offer? Why not come with me after this is done?

C: 但在调查了网络浏览记录后，{NICKNAME}发现他们都是空间站黑网的意见领袖。
E: However, after browsing through their online records, {NICKNAME} discovered they all wield influence on the space station's Dark Web.

C: 火势在减弱，它要逃了——你，看好艾丝妲小姐的下落。
E: The fire is weakening, it's preparing to flee. You — keep your eye out for Lady Asta's whereabouts.

C: 而那是我应当去处理的事了。
E: Haha, and that is something I must deal with myself.

C: 它还在试图挣扎。折叠空间的状态变化了，一看便知它逃去了哪里。
E: It's still resisting. The fold in the space has shifted. I can deduce its escape route with a mere glance.

C: 你这问题，就像在问「黑塔很伟大吗」——答案显而易见。
E: That's like asking "Is Herta a great person?" The answer is obvious!

C: 而且，我的放养教育似乎起了反效果。前些天，在一次泄露中，几只崭新培育的「小生命」逃了出来，流窜在空间站中。
E: Moreover, my "free-range" approach seems to have backfired. In a lab leak incident a few days ago, some of these "little lifeforms" ran away and scattered all over the space station.

C: 我说不清楚！我连宇宙的尽头在哪里都不知道，怎么会知道「爱」是什么？
