E: I don't know! Expecting me to understand "love" is like asking me to map the farthest reaches of the universe!

C: 说！你喜欢芝士流心口味？
E: Confess! Do you like molten cheese tarts?

C: 有什么不能让我听的？
E: Is there something I shouldn't hear?

C: 反正，我们之间的记忆很快也会如烟雾一样消散。
E: After all, your memory of me will soon dissipate like smoke.

C: …我难以回答。感谢你，我的助手{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
E: ...I find that difficult to answer. I thank you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Assistant.

C: {NICKNAME}…你能想象一个没有生命的世界吗？
E: {NICKNAME}... Can you imagine a completely lifeless world?

C: 你为什么在这里？
E: Why are you here?

C: 因为我讨厌不知礼数，恶语相向的人——当然，也包括我自己。
E: I can't stand discourtesy — even when it comes from myself.

C: （翻译：走在自己的道路上吧，阮•梅！我们永远支持你！）
E: (Translation: "Walk your own path, Ruan Mei! We'll always support you!")

C: 来得正好，我们刚打开「空间站特产」。
E: Perfect timing, we just opened the "space station souvenirs."

C: 就拿这张照片做下一期《民间科学》的封面吧。
E: We'll use this picture as the cover of the next issue of Citizen Science.

C: 大家一起来到剧院门口。
E: All of you gather in front of the theater entrance.

C: 进入跟随模式。
E: Follow mode initiated.

C: 每个月初我都会上架五款新茶，客人们可以半价品尝，但事先不知道杯子里装的什么茶，全凭自己的喜好投票，得票最多的茶能正式出道…哦不，上架了。
E: Every month, I put five new teas on sale that customers can try for half price. They have no idea what is in the brew and get to vote according to their own preferences. The brews that get the most votes get to make a formal debut... I mean, formally go on sale.

C: 你这说法有点意思，这活动以后就叫喝盲茶了。
E: I like that expression. I'm going to call this event "mystery tea" from now on.

C: 不，也不能这么草率地下判断。你看他们身上佩戴的那些古代遗物…我们从没发掘出类似的东西，博物馆里也没有相似的物件。
E: As you were. We must not be tempted into careless judgment. Look at their relics. We've never excavated anything like them before, and I haven't seen anything similar in our museums.

C: 很糟，那帮家伙的武器，还有他们操纵的机兵，威力比我们的大太多了。
E: It's bad — really bad. Their weapons and automatons are much stronger than anything we have.

C: 交给我们。
E: We'll handle this.

C: 话说回来，托帕不在附近吗？该不会是她的手下自说自话，在这儿搞破坏吧？
E: Do you think Topaz is around here somewhere? Maybe her cronies are acting without her authorization...

C: …哼唧？
E: ...Oink?

C: 但阿丽萨•兰德的目光比任何人所想的都要长远。在很长的一段时间里，这台机器的代号曾是「地质改造工程单元」。
E: But Alisa Rand had a long-term vision, one that nobody anticipated. For a long time, this feat of engineering was codenamed the "Geological Reconstruction Unit."

C: 的确，姬子说得对。不管结果如何，我们只要做到问心无愧就够了！
E: Himeko's right. As long as we can look at ourselves in the mirror and know we did the right thing, that's all that matters.

C: …同时我们也该庆幸，雅利洛-Ⅵ这个项目是由托帕小姐接手的。如果换做「战略投资部」的其他人，事情的进展恐怕会更…难以预料。
E: We should also be glad that Miss Topaz is the one in charge of the Jarilo-VI project. If it were someone else from the Strategic Investment Department, things might have gotten... complicated.

C: 我表弟还在里面…
E: My cousin's still inside...

C: 不劳烦你啦，我这就准备回去汇报工作了。
E: I appreciate the offer, but I need to head back and deliver my reports.

C: …我们出发。
E: ...Let's go.

C: 所以…我们现在该去哪呀，布洛妮娅？
E: So... where are we headed to now, Bronya?

C: 好耶！这下道路都畅通啦。
E: Woohoo! The coast is clear!

C: 哎…我之前去瓦赫医生那里看病都是不用花钱的。虽然娜塔莎人也挺好，但果然在我心里，瓦赫医生才是第一位的……
E: *sigh* ...Dr. Vache never charged me anything either. Natasha's great, but Vache was always my number one...

C: 没钱？没钱还买什么药啊，自己乖乖回家等死不行吗？
E: No money? Then you don't get any. You go home and wait for death.

C: 患者说愿意承受风险。
E: The patient said he was willing to take the risk.

C: …你是谁……
E: ...Who are you...?

C: 他的这些试剂确实能在某种程度上缓解病患的痛苦…但也仅此而已。试剂的效果会让病人暂时忘记痛苦，进而疏漏了常规的治疗……
E: On some level, his reagents were able to alleviate the patients' suffering... but nothing more. They would forget their pain for a while, and neglect their regular treatment plans...

C: 嘁，她最好真能快点找到「特效药」的替代品！否则的话，我就把她陷害瓦赫医生的事告诉所有人。
E: Tsk, if it's respect she wants, she better find a replacement for the wonder medicine, fast! If not, I'll tell everyone about how she set up Dr. Vache.

C: 过了很久，你什么都没发现？
E: Did nothing seem strange to you all that time?

C: …希望如此。得知真相的那天…我第一次觉得兄长的面貌如此陌生。
E: ...I hope so. The day I learned the truth was the day I no longer recognized my brother.

C: 庆贺吧，欢呼吧！因为，各位观众将在今晚见证王者归来！它正是俱乐部历史上最具传奇色彩的机器人格斗家——
E: Let me hear your roars! Because tonight you will witness the return of the king! The most legendary automaton fighter to ever grace the Fight Club's arena...

C: 我常听科员称赞你的多谋和善断，怎么样，对这段文字有什么头绪吗？
E: I often hear the researchers praise you for your resourcefulness and good judgment. What do you think? Any clue what this message is about?

C: 很像应物科的风格。
E: It seems like something from the Department of Implement Arts.

C: 更别说，当我在跟艾丝妲小姐汇报工作的时候，你还突然大叫，卡波特先生，来不及了，「呜呜伯」还在等着您和它们一起玩呢！让小姐以为我私通奇物，不务正业！
E: And when I was reporting to Miss Asta, you suddenly shouted, "Mr. Capote, it's too late. The Wubbaboos are still waiting for you to play with them!" You made her think I was colluding with Curios and not doing my job.

C: 怎么被运气「宠坏」？
E: How can you be spoiled by fate?

C: 我、我么…就是一个再普通不过的小科员，甚至这么说都是高看了我自己……
E: Me? I... I'm just an ordinary researcher. Even that sounds like an exaggeration.

C: 你和拉明娜在这里蹲到辰宿列张，露结为霜，肚皮空荡荡。
E: You and Lamina wait there until very late. The dew has turned to frost, and your belly is empty.

C: 我早就猜到有人会来调查我的行踪，所以我和拉明娜，决定把多管闲事的人骗到这里，把他干掉，冒充水魈交上去，从此一劳永逸。
E: I had long guessed that someone would come to investigate my whereabouts, so Lamina and I decided to lure the investigator here, kill them and then hand them in as the Xenohydro, then we'll finally be free.

C: 对不起，没抓到…
E: Sorry, I couldn't catch them...

C: 你这个逢场作戏的骗子，你践踏了我们的真心。
E: You fraud. You trampled on our sincerity.

C: 何苦绕这么大圈子。
E: Why go around this massive circle?

C: 你真是死缠烂打啊…搞不懂我们到底犯了什么罪，让你一直追到这儿都不罢手！
E: Ugh, you're such a nuisance! Just what crime are we supposed to have committed again? It better be worth you following us all the way out here!

C: 事情变得诡异起来了…
E: Things are starting to get weird...

C: 戍卫官自不必说，亲自测绘战场对情报官来说也是相当重要的。可惜前线压力越来越大，我们不得已退守铁卫禁区…这些情报最后都没怎么派上用场。
E: Needless to say, it was very important for an intelligence officer to personally map the battlefield. Unfortunately, the pressure on the front line increased so quickly that we had to retreat to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And those pieces of intelligence were not very useful in the end.

C: 但最好别让这种事发生，毕竟我能提供的支援也是有限度的…拜托你了。
E: But it's best to avoid that. After all, there is only so much help I can give you... So stay sharp, {NICKNAME}.

C: （狠狠跺一脚）
E: (Stomp hard)

C: 想办法——解锁——！
E: Find a way... to unlock it!

C: 我会在旁边援护你的，放手干吧。加油！
E: I'll cover for you. Let's go. Good luck!

C: 至于新的线索，大概是和这个<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>有关。我们就把它当做下一个目标吧。
E: As for the new clue, it is probably related to the <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color>. Let's make this our next objective.

C: 走吧，我带你去认识下博物馆的大堂助理艾丽斯小姐——她可能干了，绝对能把打理博物馆事宜的办法跟你讲解得一清二楚。
E: Now that that's settled, let's go pay a visit to the museum lobby secretary, Eris. She's a talented worker and can tell you everything there is to know about museum matters.

C: 您看起来很有干劲呢！那我们就开始吧？
E: That's the spirit! Let's get started then.

C: 嘿…这下应该就完成啦。大机器人一时半会儿估计还缓不过来，就让它在这里自己恢复一下吧。
E: Whew... all finished. This robot will reboot on its own after a while. Let's leave him be.

C: 检索资料中…佩拉格娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜，银鬃铁卫情报官。幸会。
E: Querying database... Silvermane Guard Intelligence Officer Pelageya Sergeyevna. It is a pleasure to meet you.

C: …是谁？
E: ...You know us?

C: 凯尔，这件事能拜托你吗？我想麻烦你去造访一下诺伊尔大臣的府邸，四处询问一下这位诺尔伯特公子的下落。
E: Kyle, can I ask you a favor? I would like you to visit the residence of Minister Noel and ask around regarding the whereabouts of Mr. Norbert.

C: 我好像听到有人在铁门后面说话，我们先去听听他们在盘算什么吧。
E: I think I heard someone talking behind the metal gate. Let's see if we can hear what they're saying.

C: 不烤面包烤红肠。
E: Roast the sausage, not the bread.

C: 快看，又是诺尔伯特！
E: Look, it's Norbert again!

C: …这种鬼话，诺尔伯特自己估计都不信。他只是想靠自己的「能力」赚一笔横财罢了。
E: Norbert probably didn't believe any of that nonsense — I think he just wanted to prove himself and add more to his fortune.

C: （可恶，居然就这么让他跑了……）
E: (Ugh, I let him get away...)

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您好！感谢您一直以来的协助，历史文化博物馆现在又重现生机了…我只在小的时候见过这么热闹的景象！
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, hello! Thank you for all your help — business at the museum is booming again! I haven't seen this many people here since I was a little girl!

C: 对，对对对！就是那个博物馆！
E: Yeah, that's the one! The museum!

C: 总之…我们先到休息处那边去吧——面试会在那里进行。
E: Anyway... let's head to the lounge first. The interview will be held there.

C: …咦？总感觉这话由克拉拉来说不大对。
E: ...Eh? It doesn't feel right for me to say this.

C: 那不是更好了吗？在我们鼹鼠党的帮助下，这个博物馆一定会热闹起来的！
E: Isn't that even better? With the help of the Moles, this museum will soon be teeming with life!

C: （佩拉她肯定是故意的…我该怎么回答啊{NICKNAME}？！）
E: (I'm sure Pela asks this on purpose... How should I reply, {NICKNAME}?)

C: 第一问——您的姓名是？
E: The first question: What is your name?

C: 下一问——您的个人经历？
E: The next question: What is your personal experience?

C: 我的申请多半是没通过审核吧？我是不是可以走了？
E: My application didn't pass the review, right? Can I just go now?

C: 我至于那么让你不放心吗……
E: Do you really have so little trust in me...

C: 姐姐，这都什么时候了你还在开这种玩笑，别添乱了。
E: You again? Quit joking around! No need to add to the confusion.

C: 哔嘟…检测到声纹，正在检索声纹对应身份信息——天啊，居然还是个外星人。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Voiceprint detected. Looking up corresponding identity information... Oh my, it's an alien.

C: 吃里扒外的东西！
E: Such a rat!

C: 老爹，我们赶紧去老巫婆的诊所吧，你好像伤得很重！
E: Daddy, let's go to the old witch's clinic. You're seriously hurt!

C: 不是。
E: Nope.

C: …虎克感觉，这个姐姐不是小偷。
E: ...I don't feel like she is the thief.

C: 去镇上进货了，有什么奇怪的吗？我的进货时间一直都很规律，随便谁都能替我作证。当时我还在好奇，避难所的人都跑哪去了？
E: I went into town to restock. Nothing out of the ordinary, right? I restock on a regular basis, everyone knows that. I was wondering why there was nobody at the shelter.

C: 案发当时你在干嘛？
E: What were you doing when the crime occurred?

C: 你要是选错了也没有关系，万能的虎克大人还会有一百种方法找到真正的犯人。
E: Don't worry. Even if you choose the wrong one, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great has other ways to uncover the true culprit.

C: 哈？！你这么不愿意承认自己搞错了吗？你懂不懂什么叫推理啊！
E: Huh!? Is it that hard for you to admit you were wrong? Have you ever heard of something called "logic"?

C: 这是费斯曼在避难所里临时借用的帐篷，看得出有翻动过的痕迹，地上似乎掉落了一个<color=#dbc291ff>货箱标签</color>。
E: This is the tent that Fersman temporarily borrowed in the shelter. It looks like it has been rummaged and a <color=#dbc291ff>packaging label</color> has fallen on the ground.

C: 避难所中的物资品箱子，空空如也。从标签上来看，应该是用来存储应急帐篷的货箱。
E: An empty supply crate from the shelter. Judging by its label, it was used to store emergency tents.

C: 桑博，你在这儿干嘛？
E: Sampo, what are you doing here?

C: 怎么了，这孩子？
E: What's wrong with this kid?

C: 藏宝图上看上去像模像样，但细节之处却令人生疑。
E: This treasure map looks decent... But the details are questionable.

C: 怕什么，干就完事了！
E: Enough talking, let's get it!

C: 当然，如果你还是觉得暂时无法直面自己的种种过去——
E: Of course, if you're not yet able to confront the past...

C: 啊——果然有东西！
E: Ah! I found something!

C: 哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
E: It's no problem! Leave it to me.

C: 就这么告诉我了，没问题吗？
E: You sure it's okay to tell me this?

C: 那边堆了好多货箱，可能有我们想找的东西。
E: There's a bunch of crates piled over there. Maybe we can find what we're looking for.

C: 我每天都目睹铁卫战士在裂界里牺牲，却始终下不定决心改变母亲大人的想法。
E: Every day I see Silvermane Guards sacrifice their lives in the Fragmentum, but I've never had the resolve to change mother's mind.

C: 嗯…蓝色的吧。
E: Hm... blue.

C: 算了算了，反正尤利安也帮过虎克不少忙！这次就当还他的人情吧。
E: Well, Julian has been a huge help to me! Consider this returning the favor.

C: 可不是嘛，这下你懂了吧，为什么他要拜托我们来找这件宝物。
E: Yep. So now you know why he wanted us to find this treasure.

C: 虎克以前把它放在矿队的杂物堆那边。那个墙角后面，堆了好多地髓，还有好多好多的箱子。应该不会被挪走吧？
E: I used to keep it in the mining team's junk pile. Behind the corner, there were heaps of Geomarrow and boxes. Hopefully, it hasn't been taken.

C: 等一下！其实虎克还有另外一件宝贝——就在孤儿院那里！虽然虎克也不想卖掉它，但是为了老爹的礼物，这也是没办法的办法……
E: Wait a second! I hid another treasure at the orphanage! I don't want to sell it, but if I want to buy daddy a gift, I don't have any other choice...

C: 这故事有这么恐怖吗…
E: Is our story that scary?

C: 阿、阿丽娜，你要是跑不动的话，我可以背你回去……
E: Uh, Alina, I can... uh... give you a piggyback if you can't make it...

C: 克拉拉，欢迎，铆钉镇，回到，{NICKNAME}！
E: {NICKNAME}, Clara, welcome, back, Rivet Town!

C: 他生自地下也成长于地下，命令却让他回不了家
E: Child born and bred of the Underworld dark, orders that keep him and home far apart
Beep... Boop...
A gate...

C: 指出「现状」。
E: Remind her of the "present situation."

C: 那就对啦！我们并不是这个世界的人，在史瓦罗的运算里并没有我们的存在。如果他的计算基于「只靠下层区的人们」，那么得出来的结果已经不适用于现在了。
E: Right! That's because we're not from here. We've never been a factor in Svarog's calculations. And if those calculations are based solely on "the strength of the Underworlders," then the results don't apply to the present situation.

C: 真的吗，太好了！
E: Really? Awesome!

C: 不，我会让我最信赖的人做你们的帮手，和你们同去，静待时机成熟。
E: No, but we need to wait for the opportune moment. In the meantime, I'm sending someone I trust to go with you.

C: 我早说过这地下就只有史瓦罗大佬能罩着我们，跟着他混准没错。
E: I've said it before — only Boss Svarog can protect us down here. Everyone should follow his lead.

C: 真是个怪大叔…算啦，起码结果还不错，能多一个人竞价也是好事！
E: What a weirdo... Anyway, at least we've tricked him into bidding for it!

C: …哦，他啊，应该已经回镇上去了吧？
E: ...Him? I think he went back into town.

C: …居然已经跑了吗？
E: So... he already ran away?

C: 七百五十！各位听到了吗？这就是稀世珍宝的魅力啊！七百五十冬城盾一次！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak>! Did you hear that, everyone? That's what a one-of-a-kind treasure costs! <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going once!

C: 没得商量哦。
E: Ah-uh, no bargaining.

C: 看你这么兴奋，是遇上什么好事了吗，虎克？
E: Hook, you look very happy. Did something good happen?

C: 什么？卖…卖掉了？
E: Huh? Y—You sold him?

C: 贴在我脸上的那种冰凉的感觉…还有我闻到的那股铁锈味…那家伙拿的绝对是什么金属利器！只有这一点，我绝对不会记错！
E: I could feel the blade's chill on my cheeks, and smell its rusty scent... The weapon that fella had was definitely a metal one! That's the only thing I'm certain of!

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，痕迹到这里就中断了…我们只能在这附近找找其他线索了。
E: The tracks stop here... I guess we'll have to look around for other clues.

C: …为什么？
E: Why?

C: 糟了，它还醒着——{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，小心！
E: Oh no, it's still active. Watch out!

C: 解析期间未见任何异常行为，但个体核心模组中信息噪音的比重仍在快速上升——预计在三小时后，其异常概率将会上升至<unbreak>76.1%</unbreak>。
E: Although no abnormal behavior was detected during the analysis, the muddled information in the robot's core module is still rapidly increasing. The risk of abnormal behavior is expected to rise to <unbreak>76.1%</unbreak> in three hours.

C: 人的利益应置于失控机器之上。
E: Human interests should take priority over machines.

C: 明白。正在准备植入保护程序——
E: Understood. The protective programs are ready for installation...

C: 它说话还是老样子啊。
E: He's still talking a little funny.

C: 可可利亚害怕我们掌握这些知识，她畏惧真相大白于天下——为了拯救世界，我们只好孤注一掷。
E: Cocolia's afraid that we'll seize on this knowledge — that the truth will spread far and wide: To save the world, we must risk it all.

C: 谢谢你的理解。
E: Thanks for understanding.

C: 怎么？真刀真枪地下狠手，亲姐弟之间难道不该这么相处吗？
E: What's wrong with a bit of violent coexistence between siblings? Seems pretty normal to me.

C: 其实我还有另一个私心——我想向可可利亚证明我是对的。等我们解决了「星核」这个麻烦…也许她就能变回原来的样子？
E: Actually, I have another selfish motive... I want to prove to Cocolia that I was right. Once we've taken care of the Stellaron... maybe she'll go back to how she was.

C: 你说啥！？
E: WHAT!?

C: 情急之下只好当场进行无害化处理了…以前从没发生过这样的事，吓我一跳。
E: The only thing I could do at the time was to dismantle it... I've never had a robot charge me like that before. It was quite the fright.

C: 其实是佩拉格娅•谢尔盖…
E: Her name is Pelageya Sergey...

C: 看，布洛妮娅和可可利亚的残影——她们肯定也经过了这里。
E: Look, Bronya and Cocolia's echoes... they must have come through here.

C: …什么？大人，您在说什么？
E: ...What? Madam, what are you saying?

C: 不，有我们在，那种结局绝对不会发生！
E: No! That end won't come to pass while we're around!

C: 我见到了「存护」克里珀…
E: I saw Qlipoth the Preservation...

C: 我从希莉儿那里拿到了这个。
E: I brought something back from Cyrille.

C: 「查宝」…对吧？你现在所在的位置是「黑塔」空间站哦，我之后会为你安排好住处的……
E: The name is "Findie"... right? Your current location is the Herta space station, and I'll later arrange accommodation for you...

C: 没事儿，等你准备好，我们再开始。
E: No worries. We can start once you're ready.

C: 不好，我们快追上去！
E: Shoot, let's get there immediately!

C: 俺…俺真的…没事——嘶，坏了，我这腰好像是有些问题。
E: I... I'm really... fine — Ssss, dang it. I must have strained my back or something.

C: 笔记上似乎只有一半的联系方式。
E: It seems that only half of a contact number is written in the notes.

C: 啊！十字航道！没错、没错、没错！你提醒了我。
E: Yes! The crossroad! Uh-huh, uh-huh, you reminded me.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}再见。
E: Goodbye, {F#young lass}{M#young fella}.

C: 东口的机巧鸟。
E: Cycrane at the east entrance.

C: 嗯，对呀，原来她是在担心我。
E: Yes, she is worried about me.

C: 化外民？有什么事吗？如果寻医问药，去行医市集挂号求诊吧。
E: An outworlder? How can I help you? If you are after treatment, please go to the Healer's Market and make a booking.

C: 你买下「矿脉探测器」了？
E: Did you buy the vein detector?

C: 我做好了！
E: I'm done!

C: 请你对我温柔一些，不要太粗暴。
E: Please be gentle with me. Don't be too rough.

C: 说起来，我造的诗仙机巧不止一台，目前还有<color=#dbc291ff>三个家伙</color>采风未归，不知道他们运行得如何了。
E: Speaking of which, I've built more than just one of these poet ingenia. And there're still <color=#dbc291ff>three of them</color> out there who haven't returned. I wonder if they're still running.

C: 要是能把它们的灵感玉兆带回来，应该能写出足以打动静斋的情诗了。
E: If you could bring back their Inspo Jade Abaci, then I should be able to craft a poem that'll move my dear Jingzhai.

C: 呱，这么说来，你能发现咯。
E: When you put it like that... can you, croak?

C: 走了走了，你记得帮我美颜后发给我啊！
E: I've got to go. Remember to edit my photo before sending it to me!

C: 我和{NICKNAME}会帮你去打听静斋的喜好，你最好能准备好她喜欢的礼物，和足以打动她的说辞。等到时机成熟，再去表白一次。
E: {NICKNAME} and I will help you find out Jingzhai's preferences. You should prepare a gift that she likes and a moving speech. When an opportunity arises, you'll do another love confession.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}，去静斋的同事好友们这儿打听打听，也许能找到些对主人有帮助的答案。
E: {NICKNAME}, let's get in touch with Jingzhai's colleagues and friends. Perhaps, we can gain some useful info for my master.

C: 所以我坚持独身！
E: That's why I insist on staying single!

C: 静斋对同心锁的态度？
E: What's Jingzhai's attitude toward the Unity Lock?

C: 长生种吗？
E: Is it because you're a long-life species?

C: 鱼到罗浮，刚下星槎。
E: I just arrived at the Luofu and got off the starskiff.

C: 我来教教你，你得记好了！
E: Let me teach you a thing or two. Listen to me carefully!

C: 我不是快递员！
E: I'm not a delivery person!

C: 嘿嘿，我的黛青小姐姐～
E: Heh heh, my Ms. Daiqing~

C: 啊，不会吧，可是…啊——
E: What? But the... ah—

C: 走吧，我们赶紧追上去。
E: Let's get moving and keep up with it.

C: 别做梦了，怎么能让你们打扰到她呢？
E: Are you guys out of your minds? How could I allow anyone to disturb Ms. Daiqing?

C: …不需要推销。
E: ...I don't need to hear any of your sales pitches.

C: 照片有什么问题吗？
E: Is there a problem with the pictures?

C: 你也发现了吗？除去「魔阴身」这一张所描绘的可怕景象一直被仙舟人着力淡化和隐藏……
E: Have you noticed it, too? Besides the scary drawing about the mara-struck, a condition the Xianzhou people have been downplaying and hiding desperately...

C: 我对长生没有兴趣…
E: I'm not interested in immortality...

C: 地衡司不能照顾她吗？
E: Can't the Realm-Keeping Commission take care of her?

C: 再说了，魔阴身固然可怕，只要控制得当，并不会造成什么危害。长乐天这里有地衡司与云骑军，足以应对意外。
E: Mara is scary, but it won't cause any harm if you have it under control. We have the Realm-Keeping Commission and Cloud Knights here in Exalting Sanctum — more than enough to handle any eventuality.

C: 什么小妹妹？你误会了，我确实在找人没错，你先听我把话说完。
E: Little girl? You've got the wrong person. I am looking for someone, though...

C: 景元？我明白啦，那就是将军的狗了。
E: Jing Yuan? I understand. That makes you a general's lackey.

C: 【奇怪的药方】
E: Strange Prescription

C: …清理叛徒用得着这么多人吗？
E: ...Does one traitor require so many people?

C: 你们就说自己是押送我回丹鼎司的士兵，肯定不会露馅的。
E: Just tell them you're soldiers guiding me back to the Alchemy Commission — they won't know any better!

C: 我没有怀疑她的身份，你们是要将她押送回丹鼎司对吧？
E: I knew that! You're escorting her back to the Alchemy Commission, right?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 梁沐——
E: Liangmu...!

C: 等等，先让我狠狠地揍他一顿！
E: Wait, can I beat him up first?

C: 即便不是，持明族也容不得他这样的怪物！
E: ...and even his reincarnation should answer for the monstrous crimes of the past. The Vidyadhara will never accept him!

C: 哦？那你来见我也没用呀。我打从蜕生起只在丹鼎司里学了些医术。修复封印、分开海水，我可一样不会喔？
E: Oh, really? Then why did you come to see me? All I've learned since my hatching rebirth are some medical skills at the Alchemy Commission — I can't repair seals or part the sea like you can.

C: 白露小姐，主仆情分缘尽于此，再见了。
E: Miss Bailu, our relationship as mistress and maid ends here. Farewell.

C: 从我记事起，只有龙师们要我做这做那儿，只有丹鼎司的医士要我治病救人。我根本不知道那算不算是导师。
E: As far back as I can remember, I've had the Preceptors and Alchemy Commission healers telling me what to do. "Cure diseases, save lives..." I don't know if that counts as "teaching..."

C: 那就好，那我就放心了，我应该会被派去其他的工作吧，希望有一天能和您再见。
E: Good, good, then I needn't worry. They'll be assigning me to a different job soon — I hope we have another chance to see each other one day.

C: 这里四面是高墙，扑满肯定跑不了的。
E: This place is surrounded by high walls. I'm sure the Trotter has nowhere to escape.

C: 嗯，那玩意儿也正如他所说，就是殡葬用具。我估计他在做这类生意。罗浮上的异邦人很多，各个星系都有自己的丧葬风俗，干这行的人也不少。怎么，他有问题吗？
E: Yeah, yeah. Either way, it definitely had something to do with funerals. There are lots of travelers on the Luofu, each with their own star system and death rites — I guess that must be Luocha's line of work... Is there something up with him?

C: 看看影像一。
E: Watch footage one.

C: 嘿，你这人，我们和和气气来问路，你这是什么态度啊？
E: Because we're asking nicely? What's with the attitude?

C: 芸慎…那家伙果然不见了…我急着去用掉优惠券，才找来他看店。他平时在附近游手好闲，但是为人还不错…但果然还是不值得信任。
E: Where did Yunshen get to, I asked him to watch the shop while I used my voucher... He's often hanging around here — always seemed nice enough. *sigh* Not trustworthy after all.

C: 站住。你是来做什么的？
E: Stop right there. State your business.

C: 这种事比扫垃圾还简单。
E: As easy as taking out the trash.

C: 真不好意思，我们出现得不是时候。
E: Apologies, Madam Yukong, we should have given you some time.

C: 家庭教育这题，只有杨叔会做…
E: When it comes to family stuff, I leave it to Mr. Yang...

C: 这是报酬？是报仇吧？
E: Are you sure you're not angry at us for rescuing you?

C: 虽然这些故事都不是她讲给我听的。打从第三次丰饶民战争结束后到现在，她再也没有登上过星槎，甚至绝口不提自己的战绩。
E: *sigh* She never told me any of those stories herself, and she hasn't piloted a starskiff since the Third Denizens of Abundance War. She doesn't even bring up her military achievements.

C: 三十年前，曜青与方壶两座仙舟受到敌人的围攻。即使在联盟与丰饶之民漫长的战争史中，那场空战也称得上是最为惨烈的战役之一。
E: Thirty years ago, the Xianzhou Yaoqing and Fanghu were besieged by our enemies. Even in the long history of warfare between the Xianzhou Alliance and the Denizens of Abundance, that air battle was one of the most tragic.

C: 没想到岩明先生还挺八卦的…
E: I didn't think you'd know this many details, Mr. Yanming...

C: 嗯？你们还有什么事吗？驭空大人可快要回来了啊。
E: Mm? Do you have any other questions? Madam Yukong will be back soon.

C: 这就是妈妈拒绝让我成为斗舰飞行士的理由吗？
E: Is this why Mom refuses to let me become a fighter pilot?

C: 无论如何，我都想成为斗舰飞行士。
E: I want to become a fighter pilot, no matter what.

C: 可你知道，那场夺走了采翼…夺走了几十万战友的战役…我们最终是如何取得胜利的吗？
E: But do you know how we won that war? The war that took away Caiyi and the lives of hundreds of thousands of fighters?

C: 让那个混账家伙就这样灰溜溜地滚回他的老家去吧！好后悔啊，后悔治好了这样的渣渣。
E: That jerk better run as far as his legs will carry him! Ugh, I regret healing him so much now.

C: …虽然一肚子火，但是现在想想，半夏姐姐和那个人相处那么久，也许她早就知道了。
E: ...And it makes me even angrier to think that Miss Banxia might've known what he was like to begin with, but stayed with him all the same.

C: 卡芙卡和刃不见了。在窗边的花盆里，你发现了一张匆匆写就的纸条。
E: Kafka and Blade are gone. In a flower pot by the window, you find a hastily written note.

C: 真心话游戏？
E: Truth and lies?

C: 没用的，{NICKNAME}，不论你怎么做……
E: That won't work, {NICKNAME}, no matter how hard you try...

C: 不过在那之前，继续我们的「真心话游戏」吧。又该我了。
E: Until then, let's continue our game. It's my turn again.

C: （会不会再见？…这是什么问题，她自己心里很清楚答案吧。）
E: (What kind of question is that? ...Will we see each other again? She'd know the answer to that one...)

C: 是重力发生了变化，这和跃迁的一瞬间身体感到沉重是一回事。
E: There was a gravitational shift. The same thing happens when we warp jump, only we feel heavier.

C: 杨叔，看这里！
E: Mr. Yang, look!

C: …别管…我，前面……
E: ...Up ahead... Please, leave me...

C: 喔…呵呵。秘密{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Oh... hehe. {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Secret.

C: （小声）万一这次又被通缉…
E: I'm just trying to avoid ending up on another wanted list.

C: 我没有说谎，仙舟一查玉界门的开启记录就知真伪。
E: We're telling the truth. You could verify it yourself by checking the access history of the Jade Gate.

C: 都跟你说别插手了，刀剑无眼，伤着你怎么办？
E: I did tell you to let me handle it. I don't have eyes in the back of my head — what if I accidentally hit you?

C: 事关生命耶！你这人长得也算一表人才，怎么性格这么懒啊！
E: This is life and death, okay!? You look like you can handle yourself, how come you're so lazy?

C: 怎么突然停下了？
E: Why have we stopped?

C: 我就知道，这样的小困难根本难不住你。
E: I knew it. This will be a breeze for you.

C: 「让高贵的龙尊行云布雨，把敌阵淹没就好了。咱们这些陪衬只要在天上看着就行了对吧？」
E: Let the noble high elder drown the enemies in rain — we just need to watch from the sky, I presume?

C: 也罢…都是些过往云烟。之所以来「迴星港」，只是想在此祭拜她。
E: Well... that's all in the past now. The reason we came to Stargazer Navalia is because I wanted to pay tribute to her here.

C: 嗯，将代表逝者的星槎送入星空。我当时走得匆忙，没能与她告别，至今仍有遗憾。在离开罗浮前，想了却这桩心事。
E: Yes... the sending off of a starskiff. It represents the voyage of the deceased into the stars. Due to circumstances beyond my control, I never had the chance to bid farewell to her... It is something I have regretted to this day.

C: 你爱读书？看不出来啊。
E: You like to read? I couldn't tell.

C: 我带来了你的酒壶…白珩。这原本是那人为你雕琢的赠物，可他没能亲手送出。
E: Baiheng, I've brought your flagon... This was a gift handmade by him, though he never got the chance to give it to you in person.

C: 我不记得自己是从什么时候开始挥舞它的。
E: I don't remember when I started wielding it.

C: 啊呸呸呸！请不要代替医士做出专业诊断。
E: Ah-ba-ba-ba... Let the healer make the professional diagnosis!

C: 「我不记得了」…每个想要逃避过去的人，说辞都如出一辙。
E: "I can't remember..." The words of every person who hopes to escape their past.

C: 「海若不隐珠，骊龙吐明月」，鳞渊境的风景确如诗中所说，绝美壮丽。
E: "The sea's depths conceal no stone, and dragon's breaths reveal the moon." The scenery of Scalegorge Waterscape is truly as magnificent as the poems describe...

C: …就像那些举杯痛饮的日子一样。
E: ...like when we drank to drown our sorrows...

C: 希望能在一切问题安然解决后，再与诸位欢饮畅谈。
E: I hope to be able to drink and talk freely with you once again when everything is settled.

C: 如此严密的包围网，却没能找到犯人的踪迹，恐怕他暂时也不想离开罗浮。
E: The perimeter is well guarded, but there are no traces of the fugitive passing through. It seems he has no intention of leaving the Luofu for the time being.

C: 狼首人掀开遮护胸前的华美罩袍，一袭形如水母般半透明的胞衣铠甲，紧紧包覆着贲突虬结的肌肉。
E: The wolf-head man lifted off the gorgeous mantle that covered his chest, and revealed a jellyfish-like translucent armor coating his bulging muscles.

C: 不接！
E: I refuse!

C: 这可是咱们药王秘传的根本大经，你要怀着虔敬的心情认真抄写…最好还能背下来。
E: This scripture is central to the Disciples — you must maintain a pious heart during the transcription... It would be best if you could memorize the text.

C: 你要去哪儿？试炼还没结束，你可不能走啊。
E: Where are you going? The trial isn't over, you can't just leave!

C: 这样一来，咱们双方的目标都能完成。
E: That way we both accomplish our objectives.

C: 我喜欢收集这些。
E: It's a side hustle.

C: 并没有。虽然药王秘传的密信中写得好像我们无孔不入一样…现在成功潜入药王秘传的卧底也就寥寥数人。
E: Not at all. The Disciples' secret letter makes it sound as if we infiltrated their ranks in great numbers... The reality is that only a handful of agents have successfully slipped into the organization...

C: 而且他们中大部分，并没有像你这样暴露身份后还能全身而退的实力，也没有迅速获得信任的智慧和好运……
E: ...and the majority of them lacked the strength you had to make it back unscathed after their identity was exposed. They didn't have the wisdom and good fortune to gain the organization's trust quickly...

C: 对不起…这个方子我看不明白，用的材料实在是太…太诡异了……
E: Sorry... I can't make heads or tails of it. The ingredients listed are just too... strange.

C: 恐怕素裳姑娘吼再凶也没办法打发它。眼下这工造司里除了阿财之外，怕是没有一个机巧能听人命令的。
E: ...I doubt that. I think Acai is the only one here still taking orders from people.

C: 本座从不看人脸色行事。按规矩，我每天起床办公前都会一口气就日常问题卜个十几卦，结果往往灵验无差。
E: A face is not a reliable instrument of divination. On the contrary, I run a dozen hexagrams before I even get around to breakfast. The results are never far wrong.

C: 真的吗？我不信。我记得当时广场上到处都是云骑……
E: Really? That can't be right. I remember there were lots of Cloud Knights in the Plaza...

C: …心跳和脉搏很微弱，三月，准备做人工呼吸。
E: Weak heartbeat and pulse... March, you better do CPR.

C: 三月小姐的情况属于哪一种，用穷观阵试试便知。
E: Why don't we try using the Matrix of Prescience to determine which situation pertains to Miss March?

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 贝洛伯格…我似乎在星图档案中翻到过这个名字。
E: Belobog... I've seen that name somewhere in the astral charts.

C: 苦的，不好喝。
E: ...So bitter... yuck.

C: 我不管你是谁，现在立刻消失，让出路来，不要再冒充我的朋友了。
E: I don't care who you are — disappear right now and let me pass. And don't you ever pretend to be one of my friends again.

C: 好啊，也不是稀罕东西。
E: Alright, alright, it's not anything special.

C: （云璃，注意场合！）
E: (Calm down, Yunli!)

C: 含光贪心铸剑匠人的浮名，不停试探着禁忌的边缘，锻造出数百柄不应存世的魔剑，那些欲望扭曲的求剑人更是如蚁附膻，往来不绝。
E: But then, he became obsessed with becoming a famed swordsmith and started crossing all sorts of lines. He forged cursed swords that should never exist, and all those people who desired those twisted swords started flooding into the palace.

C: …我确实识得剑匣，也识得这柄魔剑。
E: ...Well, I do know about the box and the cursed sword.

C: 使团也不只一个人的。
E: Not everyone in the delegation has the same agenda.

C: 公输师傅检查了当班记录，把轮值的匠人与学徒都唤来我这儿问了一遍，并没有什么可疑的人物。
E: Master Gongshu checked the work records, and I questioned all the craftsmen and apprentices who were on shift at the time, but I didn't find any suspicious individuals.

C: 这不正在想吗？
E: That's what I'm trying to figure out right now.

C: 刚才的记忆是？
E: What was the memory I just saw?

C: 我倾听到了你真正的愿望，孤云。我感受到你已经厌倦了继续成为一柄剑，落入不知何人之手，进行你所不愿的战斗，难道不是吗？
E: I've heard your true desires, Guyun. I can sense that you're tired of being a sword, constantly serving new masters and fighting battles you no longer want to be a part of, right?

C: 「若有过客见怜，请携碣前黄土一抔，归葬罗浮。」
E: "Should you feel compassion for me, kind traveler, please take a handful of soil hence and bring it back to the Luofu."

C: 我们已经反抗过一次又一次……
E: We've resisted time and time again...

C: 自始至终，闯进工造司的不速之客只有一名嫌疑人，那就是云璃小姐。
E: Throughout the entire incident, there was only one suspect who broke into the Artisanship Commission, and that was Miss Yunli.

C: 你还给公输师傅还发了信息？我完全不知道！咳，这倒是个证据。
E: Wait, you messaged Master Gongshu? I had no idea! Well, that's some solid proof right there.

C: （该用哪个证物来进一步说服大毫呢？）
E: (Which piece of evidence should I use to further convince Dahao?)

C: 咦，我这是…这里不是贝洛伯格？
E: Eh, this is... This is Belobog, right?

C: 既然是经典的谜题…答案是「人类」，对吗？
E: Since it's a classic puzzle, the answer is... "people," right?

C: 答案很简单——因为「侦探助手」就是凶手。
E: The answer is simple: It's because the assistant detective is the murderer.

C: 请你再为我们说明下案发经过吧。
E: Please can you explain to us again the details of the case?

C: 你要真心疼花火大人，就好好表现，让她玩得开心点！
E: If you really love Miss Sparkle from the bottom of your heart, then behave nicely and let her have a little fun!

C: 领带标签上写着「佐罗大人御用」…似乎是花火小姐的个人物品呢。
E: The tag on the tie reads "Only For Imperial Master Lefton"... Seems like it's one of Miss Sparkle's personal belongings.

C: 嗯？这证据好像没法证明他是凶手吧……
E: Hmm? This evidence doesn't really prove that he is the murderer...

C: 不要太过分哦，花火大人也是会累的。
E: Don't go too far. Miss Sparkle will get tired.

C: 凶手是「钟珊」。
E: The murderer is Zhongshan.

C: {NICKNAME}，我给自己算了一卦，发现咱们仨都是劳碌命啊。
E: Psst, {NICKNAME}... I hath divined our future — we're destined to be errand runners forever...

C: 你们和公司是竞争对手吗？
E: So, are you guys and the IPC in direct competition?

C: 启动「穷观阵」会发生什么？
E: What happens when you activate the Matrix of Prescience?

C: 为了…我们？？
E: For... us?

C: 第二、星神与星神之间的神战。更强大的一方将消灭弱小的那方——这就是「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯的陨落。也是仙舟联盟在「巡猎」的引领下行遍星海，诛除「丰饶」育化的孽物……
E: Two: In a war between Aeons, the stronger side will annihilate the weaker one — that's how Tayzzyronth the Propagation fell. Under the guidance of The Hunt, the Xianzhou Alliance travels the universe exterminating "abominations" cultivated by the Abundance...

C: 哈哈，斩草要除根。再等上一等，「药王秘传」选在这个时机动手，就说明云骑已经控制了整体局势，叛徒沉不住气了，现在师出有名，正适合一网打尽。
E: Haha, pulling up the grass requires removing the roots. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have chosen to make their move now, which means the Cloud Knights have the situation under control and the traitors have run out of patience. Now is the time to capture them all in one fell swoop.

C: 将军也说了，仙舟之上出了叛徒。
E: The general said there are traitors aboard the ship.

C: 太卜就没交代你什么工作？
E: Didn't the master diviner give you any work to do?

C: 本来还打算等太卜司下了班，拉着你们到处转转，再教杨先生打个牌。
E: I was gonna wait for the master diviner to get off work so I could show you around and teach Mr. Yang how to play celestial jade.

C: 工造司里闹了树灾。不知谁种的盆栽突然猛长起来，枝条有两人合围这么粗！在司里到处窜高走低，几乎要把这地方捣烂了。
E: There's been some kind of botanical disaster — it was like an ornamental tree somewhere suddenly started to grow. There were branches so thick you couldn't put your arms around them! It spread everywhere — the whole Commission is being destroyed.

C: 这就回禀将军，此路不通！
E: Then I shall inform the general that this path is a no-go.

C: 很久以前，仙舟联盟迷航天外时，曾遭遇过许多无可想象的生命。
E: They say that a long time ago, when the Xianzhou Alliance was adrift in deep space, it encountered many unimaginable life forms.

C: 你再骂？
E: Say that again, I dare you.

C: 你给我住口！走吧老大，咱们不跟这种不讲武德的人一般见识！
E: Ugh, shut up! Boss, let's get outta here — we shouldn't fight anyone that doesn't respect martial arts!

C: 我猜其中必有隐情。在你来到神策府之前，到底发生了什么事？
E: There has to be something awry. Tell me what happened to you before arriving at the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 我说了，{F#她}{M#他}是我的朋友。退下。
E: I said, {F#she}{M#he} is my friend. Leave us.
Woof?

C: 你免开尊口罢！放生矿泉水的小丑！
E: Keep your mouth shut, you mineral water-releasing clown!

C: 你是说，让他们去不同的地方放生？这些商旅在罗浮上各有事业，他们怎么肯呢？
E: You mean we should ask them to release the living creatures in different places? These traveling merchants have to look after their businesses on the Luofu. They wouldn't be willing to do that.

C: 钟珊打开机兵的后盖，露出了那块你亲手安装上去的超控模块。
E: Zhongshan opens the cover at the back of an automaton, revealing the override module you installed.

C: {NICKNAME}提醒了我。这小家伙绝对不会产生任何不体面的代谢产物，纯天然无公害。
E: Thanks for the reminder, {NICKNAME}. This little one will never produce any unpleasant waste. It is purely natural and harmless.

C: 嘿，这下可有意思了。这「三大善人」现在都在长乐天？咱们赶紧去问问吧，看看他们倒了什么大霉。
E: Hee-hee, things are getting interesting. Are the Three Benevolent Ones in the Exalting Sanctum now? Let's find out what kind of trouble they're having.

C: 你怎么知道的！
E: How did you know about that?

C: 以后有什么事随时来找我们，您永远是咱们地衡司公廨的座上宾。
E: Please feel free to drop by if you encounter any issues. You're always welcome at the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery.

C: 但问了他们几个身边的人，每个人都说没见过他们……
E: However, none of those who are close to them have seen them either.

C: 请跟紧我，我们走这个方向离开绥园。
E: Please stay close to me. This is the best way out of the garden.

C: 你好啊，家人！你就是对灵异事件感到好奇才来这儿找我的，对吧？
E: Yo, it's you! You're interested in the supernatural, right?

C: 唉，事情发生后我和小姐妹就被赶出绥园了，但是家人你注意到重点了吗？
E: Me and my bestie got kicked out of the garden straight after... but did you see the key moment?

C: 十王司的判官出动，不得了！
E: Judges from the Ten-Lords Commission? That's crazy!

C: 欸，无业？是{RUBY_B#杂耍}街头行为艺术家{RUBY_E#}和寻找时事热点的主播啦！主播！好歹是个正经的营生！
E: Huh? Unemployed? I'm a {RUBY_B#juggler}street performer{RUBY_E#} and a streamer who reports on current events! A streamer! It's a legit operation!

C: 到了这一步，被寄生者脑袋里装的已经不再是过去的自己了，而是一个与自己相似却截然不同的岁阳。宿主的身躯很快会被岁阳耗干殆尽，就像被焚烧燃尽的柴薪。
E: By that point, the host is no longer who they once were, but a heliobus both similar to and completely different from their past self. The host's body will soon be exhausted by the heliobus — like burnt firewood.

C: 绝对！
E: Of course!

C: 看来这面镜子对面…应该是真的雪衣大人。
E: Over here, that sounds like the real Madam Xueyi.

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 呵呵，你这赝品…等大爷我出去之后再跟你算账！
E: Hehe, you fraud... I'll deal with you once I get out!

C: 放心交给我吧，姐姐。
E: As I said, sister, I will handle this.

C: 虽然有些冒犯，但现在也只能去她的内心看看了！必要的时候，我们得拉她一把！
E: It may be a bit intrusive, but the only thing we can do is to take a look inside her heart! We have to give her a hand if necessary!

C: 我只是在真诚地对待客人。
E: I'm only being sincere to the guests.

C: 柯柯娜站在屋顶的边缘，一阵无声的风吹过她的秀发。
E: Cocona is standing at the edge of the rooftop, a silent wind breezing against her silken hair.

C: 请允许我离开…事到如今，所有的道理我都听过了。再怎么努力都只是白费力气。
E: Please let me leave... I've heard it all by now. It's all pointless no matter how much effort I put in.

C: （柯柯娜…不见了？）
E: (Cocona... disappeared?)

C: 感谢您捎来消息，善后的工作会由我来处理。希望这件事不会影响到您游玩的心情。
E: Thank you for the news. I will handle the subsequent affairs. I hope this matter won't affect your mood during your stay here.

C: 莱斯利•迪恩是完美的。
E: Lesley Dean is perfect!

C: 我还不认识你。
E: I don't know who you are.

C: 呃…看来你真的对时事一无所知。我正好留着当时的头条剪报，你自己看吧。
E: Uhh... I see you really don't know anything about this. I happen to have a newspaper cutting from the incident. Read for yourself.

C: 当然可以，您叫什么名字？
E: Of course. What is your name?

C: ——但不管呈现出来的画面多么惟妙惟肖，我依然觉得自己像是个局外人，一个擅自闯入这间画廊的旁观者。
E: ...But no matter how vivid the scenery was in the picture, I still felt like a complete outsider... Like an onlooker trespassing in this gallery.

C: 被记录下来的画面或许都确确实实的发生过，但无论如何我都无法把当下的自我和那些记忆联系起来。
E: Perhaps all of those images that were recorded did actually happen, but I just cannot seem to connect these memories to the person that I am now.

C: 有几个粗野的家伙突然从街边冲了出来，二话不说就要把他带走…他们往那个方向跑了！
E: These thugs came out of nowhere and came rushing down the street. They just took him away without saying a word... They ran that way!

C: 真的吗？我不敢肯定…如果真相如此，他们为何要表现得如此粗暴？家族平日里可不是这么对待宾客的。
E: Really? I wouldn't be so certain... If that were the case, why would they have been so violent? The Family would not normally treat guests in such a way.

C: 我们终有一日要回归现实。
E: We all have to face reality eventually.

C: 您、您是哪位？！住在这里的那位先生应该已经被…已经退房了才对啊？
E: Who... who are you!? The gentleman living in this room should have been... Ahem, he should have already checked out of this room?

C: 实话说，像他这样的客人我也不是第一次见，何况我在这里工作的时间还不算长。
E: Honestly, this is not my first time seeing a client like this, and I have not been here overly long.

C: 好消息，罗伯特！绿耳朵乔西搞到了《远星旧梦》的资源！
E: Great news, Robert! Green-Ear Josey got a hold of a source for Ancient Dreams of Distant Stars!

C: 莱斯利的脸上挂着一位当红明星应有的招牌表情：光鲜，自信，夹带一丝不至于令人感到不悦的傲慢。
E: Lesley's face is adorned with the expression you would expect from a huge star: Bright, confident, and just the right amount of pride.

C: 我感受到了，打她心底喷涌出来的那股欲念…是强烈的、令人畏惧的占有欲。
E: I can sense it, a powerful desire that came pouring from the base of her heart... It's powerful, a terrifying desire for possession...

C: 莱斯利先生，您…饿了吗？需要吃点东西吗？
E: Mr. Lesley, are... Are you hungry? Would you like something to eat?

C: 什么问题？
E: Yes?

C: 他是永不消逝的明星。
E: He is the star who will never die.

C: 再多了解一下「佩德罗」。
E: I'd like to learn more about Pedro.

C: 船长大人，不知道我是否有幸在您麾下露几手～
E: My captain, I wonder if I'll be lucky enough to flaunt my skills under your command!

C: 冷芯捧着你的画像，将它稳稳当当地挂在墙壁上。
E: Caldwick holds your portrait and hangs it on the wall securely.

C: 太好了，我感觉这是房间里的一大亮点。听我老佩德罗的准没错！
E: Awesome. I think this is the cherry on top for the room! Listen to Old Pedro and nothing will go wrong!

C: 但再伟大的诗人也是有极限的，或许你应该稍微照顾下五脏六腑发出的抗议，和那些闪闪发亮的苏乐达瓶子保持安全距离……
E: However, even the greatest poet have their limits. So, it would be wise to heed the protests from your stomach and a safe distance from those enticing bottles of SoulGlad...

C: 你没听错，那就是他的名字——
E: You heard things right. That's his real name...

C: （那是…波提欧和银枝？）
E: (Is that... Boothill and Argenti?)

C: ——连一颗小小的冰球都没能搞定，托帕总监重视的「工作习惯」怕不只是给项目失败找的借口吧？
E: ...You couldn't even handle a little frozen ice planet, Director Topaz. Those "work habits" you care so much about are probably just an excuse for failure, right?

C: 呃…高个子已经享有很多便利了，你就别纠结这个了吧？
E: Uh... Tall people already have lots of benefits. Why don't you just let this one go?

C: 满嘴胡话！哪个大堂经理会穿成你这样？退后！
E: That's ridiculous! The lobby manager wouldn't dress like this. Back off!

C: 我可不想跟你们这帮小可爱废话！我给你们一分钟的时间，把人质交出来，否则后果自负！
E: I don't want to waste my breath arguing with you little forkers! Hand over the hostage in one minute, or you'll suffer for it!

C: 刚才你们痛扁那个恶棍教主的过程，我全都看见了——那边的两位不愧是你找来的帮手！看他们这身行头就知道，肯定是专业人士。
E: I saw the whole thing when you guys were teaching that evil cult leader a lesson. The two helpers of yours are really something! I can tell they are pros just by looking at their attire.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，要不要一起拍个照片？咱们这神奇的四人组合，可以算得上是稀世罕见了吧？
E: How about we take a photo together, {NICKNAME}? The universe might never see another group more peculiar than us!

C: 有没有点公德心！
E: Have you no sense of decency!?

C: 知更鸟？噢，是那个吧——
E: Robin? Oh, it's that celebrity...

C: 哎、哎哟，我就说句玩笑话，您别当真啊！大堂不可一日无主，现在前台的投诉热线说不定已经被打爆了……
E: H—hey! I was just messing around! Don't take it so seriously! We can't leave the lobby unattended. I bet the complaint line at the reception desk is blowing up...

C: 何况，爷爷带着奖品来，我赢下擂台又把奖品带了回去，实在缺了礼数。这一回我就不抢彦卿小弟的风头了，免得他下不了台。
E: Plus, my grandfather has brought the prize all the way here. So does it not seem a little unceremonious for me to just win it and take it straight back? I will not steal Yanqing's thunder this time, as I don't want to embarrass him.

C: 经此一役，彦卿心头也有了远游增广见闻的打算。既然云璃姑娘邀请，那么我们一言为定。
E: Recent events have inspired me to travel afar and expand my knowledge of this life. As you so kindly invited me, Yunli, it's a promise.

C: 我们在罗浮仙舟相识数日，已然是过命的交情。我明白各位临行送别时不舍的心意，不过有句话是这样说的——
E: Though we have known each other for only a number of days, we are already friends for life. I am just as reluctant to part as you all are, but there is a phrase I once heard...

C: 全靠灵砂姐姐，远道而来的游客、参与行动的云骑，还有三月都在丹鼎司得到了及时的照顾和治疗，能处理好如此突发事件，除了咱们灵砂姐姐还有谁？
E: It's all thanks to Miss Lingsha. The guests from afar, the Cloud Knights who participated in the operation, and March receiving timely care and treatment at the Alchemy Commission — who else but Miss Lingsha could've handled all these harrowing incidents?

C: 莱恩老师身故以后，他留下的设计图都被工造司入库封存了，应该就放在格物院那儿。
E: After Master Ryan passed, his manuscripts were packed away by the Artisanship Commission. It should be placed in the Sapientia Academe.

C: 我们还是做个好人吧…总之，先赶紧开工吧。
E: Let's just put the things back when we are done... Anyway, let's get cracking with our work.

C: 就在刚才，铖杰想要的星槎设计稿变成了「损坏的星槎设计稿」…我们该怎么办？
E: The starskiff design manuscript that Chengjie wanted is damaged... What should we do?

C: 坏了，这下我成了「仙舟历史的千古罪人」了…走吧，我们去谢罪去……
E: Oh no, this is bad... I'm gonna get blamed for this and go down in Xianzhou's history as an eternal sinner... Let's just go apologize now...

C: 请长话短说。
E: Please cut to the chase.

C: 要完成师傅的遗作，我得切切实实，像个真正的匠人去体会作品的生产。
E: To complete his legacy, I have to be down-to-earth and experience production just like a real craftsman does.

C: …铖杰？
E: ...Chengjie?

C: 所谓实践出真知嘛，在解读手稿的过程中，正是我这个不肖徒儿和师傅对话的过程，也是一步步接近师傅理想的过程。
E: Sometimes, you just need to jump in to get your feet wet. While studying the manuscript, I'm interacting with my master in an attempt to get closer to his way of thinking.

C: 有种指导孩子写作业的疲劳感…
E: I feel like I'm helping kids with their homework...

C: 你试试那个「停航」的操作。
E: Try pressing "Stop."

C: 我现在也许更应该担心经费缺口的问题了。
E: I should probably be more worried about the funding gap now.

C: 要是莱恩老师还在就好了，这样他就能告诉我他是怎么想的了。
E: How I wish Master Ryan were still around. He would have been able to explain his design to me.

C: 要是莱恩老师还在就好了，这样他就能告诉我他是怎么想的了。
E: How I wish Master Ryan were still around. He would have been able to explain his design to me.

C: …温馨？真不知道你后来都经历了些什么。
E: ...Homey? Sheesh, you must've gone through a lot since leaving here...

C: 哈哈哈，行！那我就此打住。反正那小子就是这性子，气氛一到就容易忘乎所以。
E: Hahaha, okay, I'll stop. Anyway, that's what Luka's like. He forgets about himself once he's in the mood.

C: …行吧，那我带你过去。
E: ...Fine. I'll take you there.

C: 我现在…还有点事得去办。嘿……
E: I have... some things to do... Ah...

C: …{NICKNAME}，既然他们两个都走了，我有一事相求。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, now that they've left, I have a favor to ask you.

C: 他说了什么？
E: ...Go on.

C: 这两位是…哎哟，这不是希儿小姐吗？！我这点鸡毛蒜皮的小事居然惊动了「地火」的两位干部……
E: And these two are... Oh, Miss Seele!? To think that two senior Wildfire members are concerned with my trivial problems...

C: 「大奔」，准备跟我上！
E: Big Ben, let's get him!

C: 喂，你怎么还煽上风了！
E: Hey, why are you fanning the flames!?

C: 玛吉知道，必须给大家做出榜样，我要挺身而出，一个人去找史瓦罗较量。
E: But I know I have to be an example for everyone. I need to stick my neck out and go challenge Svarog on my own.

C: 希儿？{NICKNAME}？你们怎么在这儿？
E: Seele? {NICKNAME}? What are you guys doing here?

C: 星穹列车即将发车前往罗浮仙舟，请各位乘客坐稳扶好！
E: Buckle up, everyone! The Astral Express is about to depart for the Xianzhou Luofu!

C: 那是！我们仨可是仙舟通！
E: Exactly! We're Xianzhou experts!

C: 去鳞渊境吧。
E: Why not visit Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 哎，丹恒先生也来了啊。
E: Oh, you've come along, too, Mr. Dan Heng.

C: 说起来，联盟对本次仪典还挺重视的，「朱明」和「曜青」两座仙舟都派遣使者来贺了！
E: By the way, the Xianzhou Alliance places great importance on this ceremony, too. The Xianzhou ships the Zhuming and the Yaoqing have both sent messengers to offer their blessings!

C: 朱明仙舟？
E: The Xianzhou Zhuming?

C: 你也住嘴吧，赶快向彦卿弟弟赔罪！
E: You too. Be quiet and apologize to Yanqing!

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 你放心好了！对付公司的人，我们列车组可相当有经验！「石心十人」你听过吧？我们和其中好几个都打过交道！对吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: No worries! We're pretty experienced in dealing with the IPC! You've heard of the Ten Stonehearts, right? We've dealt with quite a few of them, right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 照章办事罢了。
E: We're just following the rules.

C: 话…话是这么说，可谁知道你们会不会遵守！
E: Well, th—that makes sense, but... how can we trust you to honor the terms?

C: 没事，也少不了弟兄们的份！
E: Don't worry! They'll get their cut too!

C: 和这个女人一比，也没那么讨人厌了。
E: Well, honestly, at least you're not as annoying as that woman.

C: 这话是什么意思？
E: What does that mean?

C: 三月，这件事归根结底要由你自己来决定。
E: It's up to you to make the final decision, March.

C: 不一样！！！三月七，你听我的准没错！
E: But it does matter!!! Just listen to me, March 7th!

C: 如今，在两位师父的悉心教导下，我的剑术已小有所成。等回到列车以后，我一定要给诸位露一小手，让你们对我刮目相看！
E: Thanks to their guidance, I've actually made some progress. When I get back to the Express, I'll definitely show off my skills and impress you all!

C: 这位是曜青将军帐下的医士，椒丘先生。
E: This is Mr. Jiaoqiu, the healer working for the General of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 我明白了，你是曜青派来参加演武仪典的选手，所以来这儿偷师？
E: Ah, got it. So, you're the participant attending the Wardance on behalf of the Yaoqing, and you were trying to sneak a peek at our training?

C: 我就觉得古怪，空气里总有贱畜的味道…
E: I knew something was off. There's always this stench of lowly beasts in the air...

C: 哦…这倒是有趣。
E: Oh...? Now that's interesting.

C: 开个小玩笑。判官执勤轮流周转，{NICKNAME}只是刚巧碰上了我，可见我俩冥冥中有些缘分。
E: Just kidding. We judges work in shifts, and it just happens to be my shift, {NICKNAME}. Maybe we're destined to cross paths.

C: 对不起，是我走神了。
E: Sorry, I got a bit distracted there.

C: 您…您居然要披上贱畜的皮？这有辱您伟大的身份……
E: My Lord... you seriously want to don the skin of a lowly beast? That would be a disgrace to your greatness, my Lord...

C: 赛博幽灵！
E: A cyber specter!

C: 幽囚狱已成杀场。狱卒们奋力抵抗，但椒丘只能眼看着他们倒下……
E: The Shackling Prison has become a killing field. The prison guards try to resist, but Jiaoqiu can only watch them fall...

C: 将军们不是行动起来了吗？
E: I thought all the generals were on the move already?

C: 如此善用人心的盲点，这与步离人一贯的作风大相径庭。公司和博识学会怕也是在不明不白的状况下，被人当了枪使。
E: This skill in exploiting the blind spots of others' mindsets is so atypical of them. I'm afraid the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild unknowingly became their accomplices.

C: 我不清楚，我和你一样，是被蒙着脑袋带到了这儿的。
E: I don't know. I was brought here blindfolded, just like you.

C: 不错。
E: That's right.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>能帮我向地衡司报个警吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Could you deliver a message to the Realm-Keeping Commission for me?</color>

C: 但将军…活下来了，不但如此，还成为了曜青的将军！如果有机会，我很想听听将军过去的故事。
E: But you... survived. And not only that, you became the general of the Yaoqing! If I get the chance, I'd love to hear stories of your past, General.

C: 俗话说得好，「有事弟子服其劳」。记住喽，你是以罗浮剑士的身份，代替你那个不肖的彦卿师父前来守擂的。
E: As the saying goes, "The disciple takes the toil of their master." Remember, you are here under the identity of a Luofu swordmaster, taking the place of your no-good Master Yanqing as the ringmaster.

C: 您好，请问有什么我可以帮到您吗？
E: Hello, is there anything I can help you with?

C: 三月七，一位来自星穹列车的美少女。
E: March 7th, a young beauty from the Astral Express!

C: 云璃师傅的剑看起来又粗又重，审美水平有待提高啊。
E: Master Yunli's weapon looks so thick and heavy. I don't think you have very good taste.

C: 他唯一能看到的船…
E: And the only ship he is able to see is...

C: 可如果我们猜错了…他去了别处，又或者就像他所说的——他的爪牙会带上狼血在各处感染狐人掀起混乱…我们又该怎么办？
E: But, if we're wrong about this... If he goes somewhere else, or if he does as he said he would, and his minions infect the foxians everywhere with wolf blood... What do we do then?

C: 没想到周围的人全是…
E: I didn't think that everyone around here would be...

C: 来啊，这点小伤！我绝不退却！
E: Fight me! You think a scrape like this will send me running!?

C: 三月，是我，云璃。你还好吗？
E: March, it's me, Yunli. Are you okay?

C: 原本我也没有这么紧张的，但一个人待在休息室里就会越想越多。毕竟这一次参加演武仪典，咱们的身上还背负着这么重的任务……
E: I wasn't this nervous before... It's just being alone in this lounge, I can't stop thinking about everything. I mean, not only are we taking part in the Wardance, but we have such an important mission to carry out as well...

C: 一！
E: One!

C: 是我。
E: It's me.

C: 我该走了，狐人。在离去之前，你知道我要做什么，对吧？
E: I must leave, foxian. But before I go, you know what I must do, don't you?

C: 他们是为了让更多的人活着回到故乡，就像你做的那样。
E: They fought so that others could make it home alive. Your actions are no different.

C: （暂时等候）
E: (Wait for a moment)

C: 熟悉的死亡气息，就像兀鹰……
E: The familiar smell of death, like a vulture...

C: 很遗憾，涛然先生，今日的竞锋舰上只有云骑，没有观众。
E: Regrettably, Mr. Taoran, the Skysplitter only hosted Cloud Knights today, no audience.

C: 哼哼，罗浮的小娃娃呀，体质就是没咱们朱明的孩子这么棒！
E: Haha, the little babies from the Luofu just don't have the resilience that us kids from the Zhuming have!

C: …「以牙还牙，以眼还眼」。
E: ...An eye for an eye.

C: 以炎老的洞见，元帅会如何应对？
E: With Elder Huaiyan's insight, one wonders how the marshal will react.

C: 皇帝陛下？有什么事需要我帮忙吗？
E: Your Majesty? Is there anything I can do to help?

C: 多罗曼查先生，朕希望你稍微尊重一点你的皇帝。
E: Mr. Dorromancha, I do hope you observe a little more respect for your Emperor.

C: 下次吧，朕还有公务要处理。
E: Next time. I still have business to attend to.

C: 来帮忙的好心人。
E: A kind soul who's helping out.

C: 但要是没有那「挨千刀的」，你就和她没有区别了。
E: But if it weren't for that accursed justice system, you would be no different from her.

C: 朕确实有一些记忆…不，有很多记忆…都仿佛不曾存在过一样……
E: I do have some memories... No, plenty of them... that feel like they didn't exist before...

C: 你先去忙吧。如果二位不介意，可以随朕一起在这里等{F#她}{M#他}回来。
E: You go get busy. If you two don't mind, you can wait here with me for {F#her}{M#his} return.

C: 公主殿下，皇帝请您回皇宫一趟，她要和您叙叙旧。
E: Your Highness is hereby requested to return to the palace. The Emperor wishes to reminisce on days past.

C: 所以，我们应该先逃到钦查里格斯邦，那是太后的直属封地。
E: Which is why we should first escape to Kincharitges State — that's the Empress Dowager's fiefdom.

C: 后来，太后挥师讨贼，推翻了二姐短暂的皇权。
E: Later, the Empress Dowager rallied her army and overthrew my second sister's short-lived imperial rule.

C: 蒂索克二世若无其事地将一瓶药水倒在了其中一杯酒中。你目睹了这一切。
E: Tizocic II nonchalantly tips a vial into one of the glasses. You witness everything.

C: 保密。
E: It's confidential.

C: 谢谢你，孩子。这片梦很美好，也很虚幻。若是待在这里，我将永远无法拯救自己。是你给了我一丝希望。
E: Thank you. This dream is beautiful yet unreal. If I keep staying here, I won't ever be able to rescue myself. You've brought me a glimmer of hope.

C: 祝你好梦，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: May you have a nice dream, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: 咳咳，但无论如何你都不能否认：自从「万界之癌」开始散布，诸如军团和泯灭帮之流的活动变得愈发活跃了。我们在这里的工作就是为对抗那些威胁做准备。
E: Ahem, there's something you can't deny: Since the Cancer of All Worlds started spreading, the Legion and the Annihilation Gang have become more and more active. Our mission here is to prepare and ward off those threats.

C: 但如果我们无法成功造出「虚数坍缩脉冲」…所有努力都会付之东流。公司不会允许我们把任何成果带出这里，连一页纸都不可能。
E: But if we fail to build the Imaginary Implosion Pulse... our efforts will all be in vain. The IPC won't allow us to take the scientific results with us, not even a single page.

C: 但我清楚公司不会善罢甘休。我们的研究成果太过宝贵…哪怕他们明面上发表声明谴责，也不可能真的放弃和虚数脉冲有关的技术。
E: But I knew that IPC wouldn't let the matter rest. The result of our research was way too valuable... Although they released a statement condemning the detonation, they would never really give up the technology related to it.

C: …这样代价最小，我确定。只要我能将那些知识暂时遗忘…公司就什么也别想从我的脑子里榨出来。
E: ...All I'm certain is that it has the smallest price to pay. As long as I can forget the knowledge temporarily... The IPC will have no means to extract it from my brain.

C: 黑塔…女士……
E: Madam... Herta...

C: 那当然，这里所有人都知道「钟表匠」…但只有很少一部分人知道他真正想要什么。
E: Of course, everyone knows the Watchmaker around here... But only a handful know what he really wants.

C: 关于逐梦年代…
E: About the Dreamchaser era...

C: 《筑梦师档案记录》……
E: The Dreamweaver Archives...

C: 呵，你们猎犬可真是威风，拿着橡木刚刚颁布的法令，就能有办法给我安上罪名。
E: Heh, you Hounds sure are cocky — you found a way to pin these crimes on me with the warrant that the Oaks just issued.

C: 你们…来接我了？
E: You guys... are here to pick me up?

C: ——喂，别蹬鼻子上脸！
E: ...Hey, don't push your luck!

C: （按下快门）
E: (Press the shutter)

C: 我想帮你找回记忆。
E: I'd like to help you recover your memory.

C: （而乔伊与冯恩…这两位折纸筑梦师的言行也与档案记录中的样子有所出入。）
E: (And Joey and Vaughn... The personalities of these two Origami Dreamweavers are also quite different from what was described in the files.)

C: 开拓者立大功。
E: The Trailblazers garner much merit.

C: 在你们高声交谈时，一位青年悄悄来到了浴池旁边。
E: During your loud discourse, a youngster has surreptitiously sidled to the edge of the bath.

C: 商贩从角落里拽来一个落满灰尘的木箱，掀开了盖子一角……
E: The shopkeeper drags out a dusty wooden crate from a corner, and opens a corner...

C: 又不是不给你钱。
E: It's not like I'm not paying you.

C: 多谢你为我们提供这些，英雄。我很快就会把它发给同伴们。
E: Thank you for supplying us with food, hero. I will distribute them to our companions quickly.

C: 来，宝贝，你也跟这位{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}道声谢吧。
E: Darling, say thank you to this kind {F#lady}{M#man}.

C: 当你们沉浸在欢笑中时，一个人影急匆匆跑了过来。母女二人识相地选择了回避。
E: While everyone revels in their joy, a figure hurriedly rushes over. The mother and child tactfully excuse themselves.

C: 但要说是否值得，我唯一的遗憾就是没能把更多药品运送出城、交给那些需要的人……
E: As to whether it was worth it, my only regret is that I didn't manage to transport more medicine out of the city into the hands of those who need it...

C: 我支持学者帕拉滕的观点。为救人性命而犯下的错误，不应完全按照罪行看待。
E: I support Scholar Palaten's point. Mistakes incurred from saving lives should not be solely judged as a crime.

C: 你冷笑着看向拉莱德，仿佛凶兽在打量一只羔羊。这股威压让他不自觉打了个哆嗦。
E: You smile chillingly at Liluder, like a vicious beast sizing up a lamb. He reflexively shudders before your oppressive intent.

C: 我哪有那个意思？我说的是应然，不是实然——你不要混淆这两者的区别！
E: How could I mean that? I'm talking about what should be, not what is — do not confuse the distinction between the two!

C: 所以，想要在这两条金丝之间找到一个平衡点，最好的选择是……
E: Therefore, to strike a fair balance between the two, the best choice is...

C: 好啦，赫拉克勒斯…唉，虽然保住了小命，但宝物被她抢走了……
E: It's okay, Heracles... Ah, though I've been spared my life, she did get away with my little treasure...

C: 把金丝交出来！
E: Hand over the golden thread!

C: 至于哪个是真的，我也不知道——毕竟都是故事嘛。
E: As for which is true, I have no idea... They're all stories, after all.

C: 墨涅塔在上，这石铸的身躯兼具妇人的健美与雕塑的精妙，那不屈与坚韧的美映照在你的脸庞。要我说，你便是这城邦中最美的姑娘。
E: Great Mnestia, this statue combines the fine physique of a woman with the finesse of sculpture. Your unyielding and tenacious beauty is reflected in your face. If you ask me, you are the most beautiful girl in this city.

C: 哦哟，居然舍得在别人面前掏出你的宝贝了？
E: Oh, I never expected you to reveal your treasure to others?

C: 那是若虫，和你一样，是泰坦的眷属。
E: They are nymphs. They are Titankin, like yourself.

C: 是你让那邪物踏足了奥赫玛…令城中的戍卫对眷属放松了警惕…而她如今就在城外攻打奥赫玛的队伍中——这就是你救下的邪物，恩将仇报的叛徒！
E: You allowed that wicked creature to step foot inside Okhema... You caused the city guards to lose their vigilance around Titankin... Now, she has joined the team outside the gates to attack Okhema... This is the creature that you saved. See how your kindness is repaid with vengeance and betrayal!

C: 你…你要叛逃？和那个正在攻打我们的泰坦眷属一起逃走？
E: You... You are going to desert us? You are going to flee with that Titankin that is attacking our city as we speak?

C: 这尊纷争眷属的雕像死死压住牢房的门，
E: A statue of the Strife Titankin presses against the cell door...

C: 我来找帕西提亚。
E: I'm looking for Pasithea.

C: 荣耀的战士，就像你的父亲，手持长矛和黑潮里的怪物厮杀。甚至像那些黄金裔，剑指失去理智的泰坦。
E: A glorious warrior, just like your father, wielding lance in hand, locked in fierce battle against the black tide's spawn. Perhaps not unlike the Chrysos Heirs, brandishing blades against frantic Titans.

C: 你甚至开始憎恨那位先代圣女，若不是她，你怎会沦落到这般境地？但你知道，这不过是迁怒。
E: You have even started to abhor that previous Holy Maiden — if not for her, would you even be in such a beleaguered predicament? But you know you are just venting your frustrations.

C: 虽说有公司帮忙，但依你的性格，肯定想亲自跑一趟，对吧？
E: Even though the IPC is helping out, knowing you, you'd definitely want to go check it out yourself, right?

C: 你将《如我所书》的故事逐句复述给虎克听，尤其是那些激动人心的冒险故事——当然，是用浴场精灵的口吻。
E: You retell the story of As I've Written to Hook sentence by sentence, especially those thrilling adventure parts. Naturally, done in the voice of a bath sprite.

C: 妙手回春啊大夫。
E: Nice work, doc! You're a real miracle worker!

C: 谢谢。再帮我签个名吧，顺带写一句寄语。记得有个词专门形容这种行为…签售，对，就当为签售做练习。
E: Thank you. Now, could you sign this for me? And add a little message too. There's a word for this... ah yes, book signing. Consider this practice for future book signings.

C: 嘿嘿，《如我所书》这么炙手可热，有得看就不错了，哪还管得上是哪一卷呢。
E: Hehe, As I've Written is a hot potato right now. We're lucky to get our hands on any volume at all, who cares which one it is!

C: 放心好了，戏曲、说书、相声…对于脍炙人口的故事，罗浮从不缺乏传播的手段。
E: Rest assured, whether through opera, storytelling, or crosstalk... The Luofu never lacks ways to spread stories that capture people's hearts.

C: 对于我们，历史像昨天发生的事。也正是因为战争的回忆仍旧清晰，联盟才会枕戈待旦。
E: For us, history feels like it happened yesterday. It is precisely because the memories of war remain vivid that the Alliance stays vigilant and ready.

C: 今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，亦不说那负阳逐火白厄真君。单说那十二金仙讨大君，打得那叫一个天摇地动，那叫一个难解难分!
E: Today we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, nor of Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light. We speak only of the Twelve Golden Immortals who struck against the Archlord, and what a battle it was! Heaven and earth quaked, the struggle was fierce and unyielding!

C: …离开前，她是笑着的。所以，别难过——她也会这样劝你。
E: ...She was smiling when she left you. So, don't be sad. She'd tell you the same if she were here.

C: 我没有问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 但你知道，无论「明天」还是「明天的明天」，都在「开拓」前行的路上。并非两条平行线，而是必然交汇的那一点。
E: But you know, whether it's "tomorrow" or "the day after tomorrow," they're all on the path of the Trailblaze. Not as parallel lines, but as points destined to converge.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}♪
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME} ♪

C: 让许多人获得了成长。
E: Helped many people grow.

C: 哎唷，这不是陪我和老斑鸠瞎折腾的那{F#丫头}{M#小子}吗！果然还是你有良心，知道来看看老爹的近况。
E: Well if it isn't the kid from last time! At least you have enough conscience to come hang out with this old fart.

C: 舌头、牙齿、嘴皮子都疼，没法儿再和你这{F#丫头}{M#小子}瞎扯了。
E: My tongue, teeth, and my mouth hurt. I can't keep talking nonsense with you, kid.

C: 古恩让我当你的老师。
E: Gunn made me your teacher.

C: 我学会了！噢我的天呐，亲爱的{NICKNAME}我真想用鲜花狠狠擦拭您的脸！
E: I got it! Oh my goodness, my dear {NICKNAME}! I want to rub your face into your skull with flowers!

C: 感觉语气有点敷衍，我觉得还是不够友善。
E: The tone's a bit flippant, and I don't think it's friendly enough.

C: 我能拒绝吗？
E: Can I say no?

C: 这就完了？
E: That's it?

C: 我也是载体。
E: I'm a receptacle, too.

C: 我可以肯定地告诉你：年轻人，「幸运签」带你的好运，绝不是你们期待的那样！还是踏踏实实做人吧！
E: I will tell you, youngster, that the good fortunes brought by the fortune leaf are nothing like what you are expecting! Just stick to taking one step at a time!

C: 我正好想请教请教你…你看我这头发，是不是该换个颜色了？
E: Can I ask for your advice? ...Do you think I should dye my hair a different color?

C: 棕色好，我喜欢棕色！
E: Brown! I like brown!

C: 就蓝色吧，确实不错，有一种宽广无垠的感觉。
E: Okay, blue it is. It's not bad. It gives a feeling of vastness and open space.

C: 呃，我、我没用过诶，我也不太清楚。
E: Um, I—I'm not sure. I've never used those.

C: 现在流行「琥珀星光」。
E: Amber Starlight is in fashion right now.

C: …你可能误会了，这不是我的本意。
E: It seems you misunderstood. That's not what I meant.

C: 你对「真诚」的定义很特别…
E: Your understanding of "sincerity" is pretty unusual...

C: 照片？怎么又要看照片了？你这人做事不讲逻辑，我们学法的最忌讳这个……
E: Photo? Why should I look at this photo? You are a bit illogical. And acting without logic is the deadliest thing for us who study law.

C: 你远远地打量着菲多拉。有那么一瞬间，脑海中闪过了「信鸽」是机械造物的可能。但你很快否定了这个想法。
E: Looking at Fidora in the distance, an idea crosses your mind, the "pigeon" could be a robot. But you quickly rule out this idea.

C: 没有找到「信鸽」，但发现了奇怪的纸团？让我看看哦…咦，这是？
E: You didn't find the pigeon, but you found a strange paper ball? Let me see... is this...

C: 我们出发吧，目的地——「地火」的秘密集会所！
E: Let's go! To the secret gathering place of Wildfire!

C: 看，箱子上面写了配送地址！{NICKNAME}，我们快去给有需要的人送药吧。
E: Look, the shipping address is written on the box! {NICKNAME}, let's send it to those in need now.

C: 只要我们坚持这么做，鼹鼠党很快就能在下层区积攒名声啦…说不定有一天还能取代「地火」，成为最受欢迎的超级组织！
E: If we keep doing this, The Moles will soon build up a reputation in the Underworld... Maybe one day it will replace Wildfire and become the most popular super organization!

C: 被算计了啊，尤利安！
E: So Julian was just being used!

C: 多谢你的帮助，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！「鼹鼠党振兴计划」今天又向前迈出了一大步，这都多亏了你的努力…还有我的周密计划！
E: Thanks for your help, honorary member {NICKNAME}. The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has taken another big step forward. This is the fruit of your contribution... as well as my careful planning!

C: 这么个小忙你都不肯帮我，是想看我被老婆和女儿嘲笑的样子吗……
E: Can't you do me this tiny little favor? Do you want to see me getting laughed at by my wife and daughter...?

C: 可他偏要在这时候跟我提无理的要求！这老头想借一枚战功勋章，就为了能在家里人面前涨涨面子。你说说，这合理吗？
E: But he wants to ask an unreasonable favor from me at a time like this! The geezer wants to borrow a medal of merit, just to look good in front of his family. You tell me, is that reasonable?

C: 哈！胜、胜利了！这大家伙，看着吓人，实际上外强中干嘛！
E: Haha! V—Victory! This fella might look scary, but he's actually not so tough!

C: 这么一想，好像寓意也不错呢。
E: That would be a great message actually.

C: 凡是贝洛伯格的上流人士，一定都拒绝不了「侯爵夫人」的艳丽。只是…这种花的价格不菲，不知道您意下如何？
E: No one in high society would turn down a bouquet of Marquises. It's just that... Marquises are quite expensive. Are you sure you want to buy some?

C: 你自己怎么不去？
E: Why don't you go yourself?

C: 至少对我个人而言，这不算亏本买卖。
E: So for me at least, this encounter doesn't count as a loss.

C: 哦…是这事儿啊，怎么样？论文成功递交上去了吗？
E: Oh yes... that's right. And what of it? Has the paper been submitted yet?

C: 我想再看一次题面…
E: Let me see the question again...

C: 疯传？
E: Gossip?

C: （这样就算刺探成功了吧…该回去找雷金了。）
E: (Mission accomplished... let's report back to Regin.)

C: 希露瓦会回答这种问题吗…
E: Will Serval even answer this kind of question?

C: 小女子只是觉得，自己以前对塔米拉小姐的理解太浅薄了。小女子所欠缺的那种，对她「灵魂」的临摹，就藏在她舞台下的日常生活中。
E: I just think that this whole time, I've just been really shallow about what I've learned from Tamila. What I really need to mimic from her soul is hidden in her everyday life offstage.

C: 最近还顺利吗…
E: Everything going well?

C: 你小子又想上哪儿去？
E: Where are you trying to go, boy?

C: 罗希啊罗希，你小子就给我嘴硬，这下让我抓到现行了吧！
E: Rossy! You keep denying this, but I caught you in the act!

C: 你将艾格尼斯的请求转告了娜塔莎……
E: Telling Natasha about Agnes' request...

C: 那位编辑…名叫尼古莱。而我的需求就是请人把她支走——什么说法、什么方式都可以，最好能让她以为亚诺这人已经永远消失了……
E: That editor is named Nika, and my commission to you is to get her away from me — I don't care how you do it or what you say to her. It'd be best if she thinks Amo is gone and never coming back.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 啥？你可别唬我。这灯不还亮着吗？
E: Hah? Are you pulling my leg? Aren't the lights still on?

C: 难道是我舌头不灵了？咋回事，我不明白啊……
E: Did something happen to my tongue? What's going on? I don't get it...

C: 是我拍照技术不行，对不起…
E: It's because of my bad photography skills. Sorry...

C: 要是有了这个，兄弟们就能在战场上快速处理伤口，而且也比我们以往的方式更加安全……
E: With this, our wounds can be quickly taken care of on the battlefield, and it's also safer than our previous methods...

C: 看完之后，别说「星期六」，就连你也不想回到文明社会了，这封信还需要你来添笔？
E: After you finish reading it, even you don't wish to return to civilized society, let alone Saturday. Is there anything you can add to this?

C: 但是你做完了你该做的事，这便是意义所在。
E: However, you have done what you must. That is what matters.

C: *有什么掉进海里的声音*
E: *Something splashes into the ocean*

C: 轻轻擦拭一下瓶身，表示尊敬。
E: Rub it gently to show respect.

C: 这茶叫什么名字来着？
E: What's the name of this tea again?

C: 哎哟，也怪我，为了追求口感加了这么多…得再调整下配方了。哦对了，这报酬答应你的，你收好，回头等我捣鼓出新品了再喊你。
E: Oh, my bad. I shouldn't have added so much carbonated gas just for the taste... Guess I'll have to adjust the recipe again. Oh, here's the promised compensation. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

C: 「请理性点餐，避免浪费。」
E: "Please order prudently to avoid food waste."

C: 只有战死沙场的勇士才配被这种神龛供奉。据说他们会立于尼卡多利身侧，享受无尽的荣耀。
E: Only warriors who fall in valiant battle earn the right to be enshrined in this kind of structure. It is said they will stand alongside Nikador, basking in untold, unending glory.

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: …希望他能实现夙愿吧。
E: ...I hope that he will achieve his wish.

C: 这意味着，过去存在于这个世界中的{RUBY_B#电信号}生命{RUBY_E#}，或将在未来某一时刻重新诞生。
E: This suggests that {RUBY_B#electrical signals}life{RUBY_E#} which once existed in this world may one day be reborn in the future.

C: 经评估后，公司批准了该矿藏的开发计划，认为其蕴含的高浓度虚数能量将为当地产业复苏注入强大动力。
E: Following a thorough assessment, the IPC approved a development plan for the mine, believing that its high concentration of Imaginary Energy will provide a significant boost to the region's industrial recovery.

C: 友爱之馆
E: Library of Philia

C: 蝶，你的意思…那不是尼卡多利的手笔么？
E: Cas, are you saying... That it was not the work of Nikador?

C: 白厄阁下，那引你而来的手艺，是从何时起，变得如此珍稀呢？
E: Lord Phainon, these talents that have brought you here... when did they become so rare?

C: 不闭炯炯双眸，以守理智之本性；
E: Unblinking of eyes burning bright, upholding the cornerstone of reason.

C: 现在，硬币已经投下，轮到你来揭晓答案了——
E: Now, the coin has been tossed — it's your turn to reveal the answer.

C: …也罢。我家那兔崽子小时候也老爱看这种东西，都被我训怕了。
E: ...Whatever. The little brat at home used to love this kind of stuff. I scared that out of him, though.

C: 技术上没有任何问题。我们已经组织过试爆，确实能对泰坦神体造成伤害。只是.……
E: There will be no issues on the technology side. We have already held detonation tests and ensured that they are able to damage the bodies of Titans. It's just...

C: 唉.…就算泰坦不同意，也发不出声音了。
E: Ah... Even if the Titan disagrees, it's not like they'll say anything.

C: 来，试试把手挂到我的肩膀……
E: Here, try grabbing onto my shoulder...

C: 库娜涅似乎从姐姐的身边拾起了什么…你猜那或许是一把武器。
E: It looks as if Cynane is taking something from her sister's body... You imagine it must be some kind of weapon.

C: 你有头发吗？
E: Do you have hair?

C: 那些纹路似乎只与你眼中流转的光晕有关，就像是惺忪睡眼中瞥见的重影，在失焦的视界中，你看见了那具象化的文字、亦或是符号……
E: The patterns appear solely connected to the flowing halo of light in your eyes. Like doubles glimpsed through a drowsy gaze, in this blurry vision, you see the words, or perhaps symbols, manifesting...

C: 回去以后，丹恒的智库恐怕要迎来大更新了。
E: Upon our return, Dan Heng's Data Bank will likely undergo a major update.

C: 这些石板究竟是什么？
E: What are these stone slates?

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>友爱之馆拱门的根茎间</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>among the roots at Library of Philia's archway</color>...

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「欧欧，是羁绊的力量！本豹也燃起来了！」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "Oooh, the power of friendship! That's gotten me fired up too!" )∋

C: o((='ω´= )っ「这症状是非常典型的…秘酿灌多了欧」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "This is the typical symptom of... having too much ambrosia." )∋

C: 这不是无名客该做的事！
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing!

C: 叔叔？谁啊？不清楚。
E: A man here? Who? I don't know anyone like that.

C: 你和我打了这么久交道，就是天塌了我都不能诓你呀。今天，我是来给你送礼的。
E: You and I have worked together for so long, you know I'd never fool you. I've come to bring you a gift today.

C: 又重新在海面升起。
E: ...and rise again from the sea.

C: 有意思吧？还没完呢，这东西和神驹有点像，把独特的记忆喂给它，它能「回忆」起更多音色。至于那些记忆去哪找…我进的货里就有，你可以抽空挑挑。
E: Intriguing, huh? But it's not over yet. This thing is a bit like a divine foal — feed it unique memories, and it will recall more tones. As for where to find those memories... I've got some in stock. Take your time browsing.

C: 为了你的大部分身体完整，为了不要「一不小心」就彻底掉进去——你的尝试先从「泡脚」开始。
E: For the sake of keeping most of your body intact and avoiding "a whoops," full submersion situation — you decide to start with just your feet.

C: 试一下水，就撤回！
E: Dip, then immediate retreat!

C: 狠狠地将它泡进去！
E: Shove your limb in! No hesitation!

C: 你的目光下意识落在那个金紫相间的瓶子上——无论强烈的撞色还是浮夸的形制，它绝对符合某人的审美。
E: Your eyes are instinctively drawn to a bottle of clashing gold and purple. Loud colors, an over-the-top shape... yeah, definitely someone's taste to a tee.

C: 谁也不站，天外有天。
E: Neither. There's always something greater beyond.

C: …呼。摇摇欲坠的世界啊，{RUBY_B#万敌之母}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子即刻便来——
E: ...Hah. A world on the verge of collapse. {RUBY_B#Mydei's Mother}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}'s son will be here at once—

C: 我从没想过这件事…
E: I never thought about that...

C: 在真理的殿堂，你无需沐浴焚香，磕头祷告，只需为遮蔽的真相扫却黄沙，就能找到自己的答案——
E: Here, in the hall of truth, you need no showers, incense, prayers or worship. Simply brush away the sands shrouding reality, and your answers will be laid bare.

C: 哇喔，这就是「星穹列车」吗？
E: Wow, so this is the Astral Express?

C: 其实我们可以悄悄地跟随你，没有人会发现。不过，忆庭认为你是特别的：你拥有的是极其稀有的宝贵记忆，并且未来还会得到更多……
E: We can actually just follow you without being noticed. However, the Garden of Recollection believes that you're special: The memories that you possess are extremely rare and precious, and it's very likely there'll be even more in the future...

C: 嗯，拜托了帕！
E: Alright, thanks!

C: 它问…最近有什么高兴的事？
E: It asked... if anything joyous happened recently.

C: 是的，瓦尔特，你知道怎么做吗？
E: Indeed. Welt, do you know what to do?

C: 那些家伙真是没完没了，怎么烧也烧不完。前线缺少了您的战斗力，只靠铁卫兄弟们也很难再进一步了。
E: Those guys just never give up, and we can't seem to deliver the final blow. Without your prowess on the front lines, it's hard to make any progress just by relying on the Silvermane Guards.

C: （这个高度…好像可以钻过去汪？）
E: (This height... I think we can get through, woof?)

C: 把奇物还回来！
E: Return the Curio!

C: 佩佩朝你笑了笑，摇着尾巴示意你跟它一起离开这里。
E: Peppy smiles at you, wagging its tail, and signaling you to leave this place together.

C: 什么本？也是书吗？{NICKNAME}又开始说人家听不懂的话了！
E: What book? Is this another book? {NICKNAME}, you've lost me again with your words!

C: 小看我，我可是熬夜冠军。
E: Don't underestimate me. I am the master of staying up late.

C: 这样我生命中的每一个瞬间，都会被{NICKNAME}记录下来。如果以后要为我著书，能写厚厚一大本呢！
E: This way, every moment of my life will be recorded by you, {NICKNAME}. If you ever write a book about me, it'll be a thick one.

C: 死亡没能阻止她去爱。
E: Death couldn't stop her from loving.

C: 不过，没事就好呢。如果讨厌周一…那人家可以陪{NICKNAME}一起度过这讨厌的日子，你的抱怨和故事人家都会耐心听哦。
E: But it's good if you're alright. If Mondays really get you down... then I'll stick with you through this dreadful day, patiently listening to all your complaints and stories.

C: 这样哪能骗得到人家呀！至少先闭上眼睛嘛！
E: No way you're fooling me! At least close your eyes first!

C: 「欢迎加入鹤运物流，{NICKNAME}。请开始您本日的工作。」
E: "Welcome to Heron Express, {NICKNAME}. Please start your work for the day."

C: 嘎咕，起飞！
E: Cuckoo, I'm taking off!

C: 我没钱…
E: I can't afford it...

C: 因为我有「工～匠～精～神～」…不说这个了，还是说助手的事儿吧。
E: Because I have the ar-ti-san spi-rit~... Alright, that's enough. Let's get back to the assistant thing.

C: 坏了，灵感跑了…哎，我们还是继续「匣里流光」的武器测试吧。
E: Oh no, it's gone... *sigh* Let's continue the weapon test for the Luminflux Pyxis.

C: 大衍穷观阵就算个这玩意儿？
E: The Matrix of Prescience Ultima can make predictions about that, too?

C: 你若不收下，做了白工，我可于心不安。
E: If you don't, it'd be a waste of time for you, and I won't feel good.

C: 不愧是我看上的对手，我承认你有些水平。
E: I expected no less from someone I've deemed as my opponent. You have some skill, I'll give you that.

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 我们看市面上流行的作品都是这样的。
E: All the popular game titles on the market adopt the same strategy.

C: 刚刚的就好。
E: Just the previous one will do.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「明明是瑟希斯的造物，却将浪漫的线相连。若你触碰它的根须，便能打下缘分的结。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Created by Cerces, yet bound by the string of romance. If you touch its roots, you can create a knot of destiny."</color>

C: 嗯…有位织者享受被碾压的感觉。金丝带来消息，它正在亲手设计的<color=#dbc291ff>滚石机关旁边</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver with an unusual fondness for the sensation of being crushed. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>beside a rolling stone mechanism</color> of their own design. Go there to seek them.

C: 嗯…我以前倒也见过这样的预言。它就像一块分裂成两半的陶片，必须拼凑完整才能解读。
E: Yes... I have encountered a prophecy like this before. It resembles a shard of pottery that has split in half, requiring it to be pieced together to reveal its true meaning.

C: 这份预言应该还有另一份残本…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
E: There should be another remnant of this prophecy... If you're interested, you might want to try to interpret it yourself as well.
Five flames.

C: <unbreak>11</unbreak>盆。
E: Eleven flames.

C: 错了！——答案就摆在荣耀的平台之上喀。
E: Wrong! The answer lies above the stage of glory, crrk.

C: 哎呦，我说是谁呢，竟然闯进如此人迹罕至的地方。是您的话，也就不奇怪了。
E: Oh, I was wondering who could have broken into such an uninhabited place. I guess seeing you here, it all makes sense.

C: 可惜…我着实力不从心，推开窗子时竟发出了吱呀一响。
E: Unfortunately... Things didn't go quite as planned... When I opened the window, it let out a squeaking noise.

C: 宝箱送你还不成吗！
E: Just take the chest!

C: 您想听什么方面的？
E: What do you wish to hear?

C: 喜欢吗？是我的了！
E: You like it? It's mine now!

C: 说起来，泰坦们总是这样…从来不想着好好说话，只会设计各种谜题来刁难我们。按理说，根据「再创世」的观点，它们的前身应该也是人类吧？怎么就这么没有人性呢……
E: Titans are always like this, you know? Never straightforward, always making riddles to torment us. According to "Era Nova" theory, they were human once too, right? So why are they so utterly inhumane...

C: 行了行了，这里也没我什么事了。拜拜了您！祝你冒险愉快。
E: Well, that's all from me, then. Farewell! Enjoy your adventure.

C: 总觉得你想偷袭我……
E: I suspect you're setting up an ambush...

C: 桀桀，想我了吗？很可惜，我不是巴特鲁斯本人，只是它投下的一道幻影。
E: Hehe, did you miss me? Unfortunately, I'm not Bartholos in person, merely a shadow it projected.

C: 妈妈，这里有变态！
E: Mom, there's a pervert here!

C: 这咱倒是想…但可惜做不到。
E: I certainly wish I could... but unfortunately, I can't.

C: 也许他们的救世计划，会在无形之中对世界造成某种讳莫如深、但又无可奈何的损害？他们是否会因此深深心痛，却又无法对我们这些世俗大众作任何辩解？
E: Maybe their plan to save the world will somehow cause irreversible damage to the world, but we must bear it no matter what? Are they hurting because of it, but are unable to explain anything to us mortals?

C: 那真是太好了。不如先借我<unbreak>14</unbreak>个如何？每天两两一换，既可以轮流展示，也有足够的数量在手头研究。
E: That's fantastic! How about lending me <unbreak>14</unbreak> trophies? We can swap out two each day — it'll keep the exhibits fresh while ensuring I have enough for research.

C: 难讲，毕竟没有任何证据。
E: Hard to say. Without evidence, it's just speculation.

C: 错认了？的确，我从未在殿内见过你…圣殿把守严密，你是如何进到这里的？
E: Someone else? Indeed, I've never seen you in the sanctum before... The temple is well-guarded. How did you manage to get in?

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我们——
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —

C: 你好，有什么事吗？
E: Hello, can I help you?

C: 见鬼，怎么多了个塑像？
E: Darn it, why is there another statue?

C: 哗啦！都离开这么久了，几句话就让我想起那些日子…说我顽皮的部分是他捏造的，让你产生误会了，不好意思哦，哗啦。
E: *whoosh* Even after all this time, a few words bring back those days... Sorry for the misunderstanding about me being mischievous. He made that up. My apologies. *whoosh*

C: 于破败的古城中，你难得感受到了恬静。
E: In the dilapidated ancient city, you feel a rare sense of tranquility.

C: 您已经为我们做得太多，{NICKNAME}阁下…而且，时间的确也不容许我们打开它们。
E: You've already done so much for us, {NICKNAME}... Besides, we don't have time to open them all.

C: 我吗？…不必了。
E: Me? No, I'll stay...

C: 在这道屏障罩住我们之前，就有怪物盯上我们了，多亏一位女士将它引开，我们才没有遭遇危险。
E: Before this barrier trapped us, a monster was closing in. Thankfully, a woman led it away, keeping us safe.

C: 但那位女士有些面生，而且一转眼就不见了，搞得我们有些慌张……
E: But the woman was a stranger, and she disappeared in the blink of an eye. We got a little freaked out...

C: 总之，把能做的事做了吧。
E: Anyway, I should finish what can be done.

C: 呃，你不知道啦，她是{RUBY_B#机械改造人}偃偶{RUBY_E#}。咱们还是把她送去地衡司吧？
E: Well, it's just... she's a {RUBY_B#cyborg}puppet{RUBY_E#}. I think we should just take her to the Realm-Keeping Commission?

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」项目…
E: About the Simulated Universe project...

C: 好处是，模拟宇宙里不仅有你熟悉的场景，也有你熟悉的人物，所以不会觉得孤独。
E: Good thing is, there're familiar scenes and people inside the Simulated Universe, so you'll never feel lonely.

C: 利用「存护」的祝福提升生存能力，再寻找提升战斗力的机会，然后再见一次琥珀王！
E: Use Preservation Blessings to increase your survivability, look for opportunities to improve your combat strength, and have an audience with the Amber Lord again!

C: 你四处张望，看不到祂的实体。但你知道，祂就在附近…也许，就在你耳边…很快，你的精神开始溃散…
E: You look around and know that THEY are nearby, but cannot see THEIR presence. Maybe, THEY are right next to your ear... Soon, your spirit starts to break...

C: 「祂可能和阿基维利不太熟。」过了一会儿，她补充道，「也许祂眼里只有仇敌『丰饶』。」
E: "THEY're probably not very familiar with Akivili." A moment passed. She added, "Perhaps THEY only have THEIR enemy, the Abundance, on THEIR mind."

C: 走近那个相框，去吧。试试新玩意。
E: Go get closer to that picture frame. Time to try something new.

C: 黑塔的声音适时响起：<color=#dbc291ff>「别灰心，这已经很好了，在你之前的测试者甚至得不到命途的回应。继续吧{NICKNAME}。」</color>听上去她已经从短暂的激动状态中醒觉，因为声音又恢复成那平淡冷漠的，仿佛机械般毫无热情的语调了。
E: You hear Herta's voice at just the right time. <color=#dbc291ff>"Don't be discouraged. You're already doing great. Previous testers never even got a response from the Paths. Keep going, {NICKNAME}."</color> Sounds like she has settled down from her excitement, and her voice has returned to the usual emotionless and mechanical register.

C: 「欢愉」的祝福喜欢出其不意，适合能进行追击的角色。
E: Blessings of Elation likes to surprise people, and is useful for characters with Follow-Up ATKs.

C: 你可以走了，准备完成后我会发信息给你的。
E: You can go. I'll message you when I'm ready.

C: 好啊，保持新奇。
E: Alright, stay curious.
(Huh... That's...)

C: …好吧，但我还是想见岚。
E: ...Fine then, but I still want to see Lan.

C: 你正犹豫该摸哪一只*嘴*…却恍惚间听见几个饱嗝，一些气息吐露到你脸上……
E: When you are thinking about which mouth to touch, you seem to hear a few burps and sense someone's breath on your face...

C: 一切咻地一下猛然暂停！寒气突然逼迫到你的额前，宇宙某处的闪点中，祂棱镜般的面容从浓缩的原点里突然诞育——
E: Everything comes to an abrupt halt! Frosty air presses against your forehead. From a sparkling spot in the universe, THEIR prism-like face is suddenly born in a condensed origin...

C: 你默不作声地接受了她的训斥，只为把窗户封起来，然后从大门离开。
E: You accept the woman's reprimand in silence and take this chance to seal the broken windows in her room before leaving.

C: 这种欲望太强烈了！你轻轻伸出一根手指…然后把他数十年的心血一举摧毁！
E: This desire is too overwhelming! You gently reach out a finger... and destroy his decades-old creation in one fell swoop!

C: 「均衡」的仲裁官抢先于你！一声洪亮的巨响过后，「虚无之影」褪去了；于此同时，奇异的声音也停止鸣奏；宇宙中，寰寰虫潮逐渐宁息。
E: The Arbitrators of Equilibrium take action before you do! With a resounding boom, the Shadow of Nihility fades, and the eerie sound dissipates. At last, the restless Swarm throughout the universe begins to calm down.

C: 各方势力对如何帮助众神各执一词，你们在路途中拉扯不断、纠葛连绵，不停拉拢彼此又互相背叛！你们总在夜晚篡改下一天的行进方向，并乐此不疲！直到有一次，你们无意撞进忆域的长廊，一位看不清面容的少女希望将一枚「忆泡」送给你，她称里面装着<color=#dbc291ff>「影子」</color>。
E: The various factions are divided in their support of the Gods. Throughout this entire fiasco, you all have been twisting and turning, hemming and hawing, ingratiating yourselves with one another while trying to backstab each other the next moment! You make navigational changes on a whim in the dead of night, and revel in your shenanigans! Until one day, you unwittingly barge into the hallway of the Memory Zone, and a girl whose face you can't see wishes to gift you with a Memory Bubble — she claims a <color=#dbc291ff>"shadow"</color> is contained within.

C: 振翅声拱破筑城者的城墙，为二者的对局划下句点…一位「大脚怪」的妻子选择离开「筑城者」群体，并随着贡多拉一同远去。
E: The sound of beating wings smash through the Architects' walls, and the clash between them come to a close... A Bigfoot's wife chooses to leave the Architects' group, leaving for distant lands with the gondola.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...
