C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了求药使的祷告。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into a prayer from an Elixir Seeker.

C: 更新了什么？
E: What's new?

C: 「有些数据的运转走到了尽头。」她说，「万物不过微粒，在聚拢后消散。只有宇宙永远古老。」
E: "Some data has stopped running," she says. "Everything is nothing but particles that congregate and then dissipate. Only the universe can remain ancient forever."

C: 你再次遇见她时，她面无表情地看着你。她刚拢好发髻，耳环在炮火下摇荡。她一言不发，向你招手。你跟随着她糖果色的裙摆在战火中前进，最后你们来到一座钟塔下。
E: When you encounter her once more, she looks at you with an expressionless face. She has just gathered her hair into a bun, and her earrings sway in the midst of the gunfire. Without a word, she waves at you. You follow her candy-colored skirt through the battlefield, and eventually, you arrive at the base of a clock tower.

C: 德•维恩曾一度抵达「认知拓宽」的巅峰，在被无限放大的「认知」中，他看见大量的稀土金属、资源，堆成无穷无尽的钢山，而山的最尖端，是一尊铸铁的「王座」。
E: De Wayne once reached the peak of Broadened Cognition. He saw a massive amount of rare earth metals and resources piling up into a mountain in his infinitely expanded cognition. On the peak of the mountain was a cast iron throne.

C: 阅读「不好念头」。
E: Read the bad thoughts.

C: 那些「神秘」的烛火缠绕在他们的骨头里、血管里，他们感到自己的血液里充斥着毒液，一直向四肢、心脏、和大脑运输。
E: Those mysterious candlelights weaved around within their bones and blood vessels. They could feel their blood filling with venom that was being transferred to their limbs, hearts, and brains.

C: 现在，它即将进入最后的跃迁，回到自己诞生的普尔普冰晶海，产卵，死去。
E: Now, it is about to enter its final warp, returning to the pupa crystal ocean where it was born to lay eggs and die.

C: 在德蒙托星域的小行星带中，义人号观光船正缓缓驶过。你将筹码压在最右侧的石头上，赌它一定会最早撞向这里，被防护系统轰成下一朵烟花。
E: There is a sightseeing vessel known as The Righteous, slowly navigating through a small asteroid belt in the Demonto quadrant. You make a wager on the farthest asteroid to the right, wagering that it will undoubtedly be the first to smash into the ship and be blown into a wonderful fireworks display by the defense system.

C: 吃了那个果子，肠胃都很通畅。
E: My digestive system has run smoothly since I ate it.

C: 「可是我们怎么能理解其他文明的记录？我们都学过克里珀筑造亚空障壁的历史，但如果没有联觉信标，谁能看懂上古史书中的文字？」
E: "But how are we supposed to understand the records of other civilizations? We have all studied the story of Qlipoth constructing the subspace barrier, but if there was no Synesthesia Beacon, how could anyone understand the ancient writings?"

C: 「归根结底，我们在帕隆莱刻学院接受的所有教育，都经过了联觉信标的二次加工，至于知识的本来面貌，我们没有人见过！」
E: "At the end of the day, all of the education we receive at Palonglek Academy receives secondary refinement from the Synesthesia Beacon. We've never personally seen the original face of the knowledge we are exposed to!"

C: 校长室外的走廊又黑又冷，你和几个教授挤在长凳上，等待「学术委员会」的最后通知。
E: Outside the dean's office in the cold darkness, you and a number of other professors sit on a bench, awaiting the final notice from the Academic Committee.

C: 但无论再问多少遍，你的答案都是一样的。
E: But, no matter how many times they ask, your answer never changes.

C: 最后的结果是，所有关于星球形状的定论，都必须从教材中移除。理由是每个人都可以对星球的形状有自我认知。
E: The final conclusion is that any definitions of the shape of the planet are to be removed from educational materials, the reason being that everyone has their own personal cognition regarding the shape of their planet.

C: 一个完美学者。
E: A perfect scholar.

C: 实验室的帷幕落下，将你们尽数封锁在万分之一面积的世界，直到迁移结束，无妄的监狱都不会打开。
E: The curtain falls on the lab, encasing you all in a one ten-thousandth of a world — until the migration ends, this ice-cold prison will not unlock.

C: 「准确来说，是概率。在高概率事件中遇上离群值，人类把这种情况描述为『运气』——当然，我的运气向来不太好。」黑塔讥讽似的叹了口气，不知是在向谁言说。
E: "More precisely, we believe in probability. Humans will interpret encountering outliers in high probability events as 'luck' — of course, my luck has never been great." Herta sighs in apparent sarcasm as if talking to someone unseen.

C: 难怪湛蓝星多灾多难…
E: No wonder The Blue is fraught with disasters...

C: 你感受到「悲伤」。
E: You feel "sadness."

C: 「接下来，你逃向黑暗。然后，扑进血的怀抱。」
E: "Next, you flee toward the darkness. And then, lunge into the embrace of blood."

C: 「当我从废墟里醒来，灵光一闪时看到的景象，已消失得无影无踪。」你少有从黑塔的目光中看到愤怒，「我找到一根离开知识圆圈的绳子，然后，它被切断了。」
E: "When I woke from the debris, the scenario that I saw when inspiration struck me had vanished completely from my sight." You rarely detect such anger in Herta's eyes. "I found a rope that could lead me beyond the Circle of Knowledge, and then it got cut off."

C: 可就在发问前的瞬间，一缕自我怀疑却陡然摄住她的心神。她抬头看向花海深处，一缕香甜的气息和一抹糖果色的衣影飘过。
E: However, just as she is about to ask her question, a sliver of self-doubt seizes her mind. She lifts her head to look out into the field of flowers, as a sweet scent and a glimpse of pastel-colored robes drift by.

C: 但仍未结束的星际能源战争，以及各学派间的嫌隙与野心，却让原本的学术交流逐渐演变成一场以「权杖」系统为中心的<color=#dbc291ff>学派战争。</color>
E: However, the active Interstellar Energy War, as well as the animosity and disagreements between the various schools, turned what was originally an academic exchange into a <color=#dbc291ff>Scholars' Strife</color> with the Scepter system at the center.

C: 一只蝴蝶扇动翅膀，鳞羽上的粒子恰到好处地发生反应。它飘落的轨迹完美地与引力契合，越来越多的灰尘包裹住它，直到一颗滚石将旅店压扁。
E: When a butterfly flaps its wings, the particles on its scaled wings conjure a reaction in just the right amounts. Its drifting, downward descent acts in perfect tandem with gravity, more and more dust wrapping around it, till it becomes a rolling rock that crushes the hotel.

C: 「结束？嗝，老子还没冲出宇宙呢！」一艘支离破碎的贡多拉撞进花海，从中跌出的却是一名头戴假面的小丑。远方的骑士高声赞颂：「何等纯美的壮举！被模拟的生命打算向真实进军！」
E: "Over? Hic, I haven't even charged out of the universe!" A shattered gondola crashes into the sea of flowers and a masked clown stumbles out of it. The knight from afar extols resoundingly: "A stance of utter beauty! Life that is being simulated intends to assault the truth!"

C: 「在我面前，扑克的牌张顺序没有随机性可言，硬币的正反面是预设好的结果。风暴也好，波涛也罢，一切混沌要按我要求的方向转动。」
E: "In my presence, the sequence of poker cards is not random, and the outcome of a coin flip has been predetermined. Whether it's storm or waves, all chaos shall move according to my instructions."

C: 一会儿别大惊小怪，你马上要见证宇宙机器头的历史了。
E: Prepare yourself, for you're about to witness the history of the cosmic Droidhead.

C: 阿哈玩偶毫无反应，计数器上的数字没有跳转。你太逊了！
E: Aha's doll does not react, and the number on the counter remains unchanged. You suck!

C: 「有一天你会回来找我。」疤眼夫人缓慢地说，仿佛在对你下达命令。「如果客户们什么也不想要，贸易就无法继续。贸易的兴盛会为克里珀筑起更高的墙，这就是意义。赠给你些纪念品，期待与你下次见面。」她站起身，背对着你离开。
E: "One day, you'll come back to me," Madam Scarred Eye slowly asserts in an authoritative tone. "Trade stops when clients desire nothing. When trade is booming, it will allow Qlipoth to build higher walls. That is the purpose. Here are some complimentary gifts for you. I look forward to meeting you again." She stands up and turns her back to you as she leaves.

C: 「啊…没错。在上一个超级好宝贝游戏里，随机库中其实并没有大奖。」他愧疚地说。
E: "Ah... You're right. There was no prize in the random pool of the previous Super Goodies game." He concedes guiltily.

C: 骑士向你发出赞美。
E: The knight offers you a praise.

C: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
E: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

C: 你与它耷拉的双眸对视。它的胡须上下浮动，你注意到它的身后仍护着几只幼崽……
E: You stare straight into its droopy eyes. Its whiskers are moving up and down. You notice it is protecting some cubs behind it...

C: 你似乎迷路了…你发觉这里的景色十分熟悉。你认出于腐殖化王座之上的「永眠领主」。
E: You seem to be lost... and you find the scenery around you familiar. You can recognize the Lord of Eternal Slumber on the putrefied throne.

C: 你的电流似乎被一种不明精神体拦截…你不安地思考着是否该区域「脑体」的警戒值提高了。
E: Your electrical currents seem to be intercepted by an unknown spiritual entity... Feeling on edge, you wonder whether it is because the alert level of *the brain* of the domain has been raised.

C: 你的内心开始蠢蠢欲动……
E: Deep down inside, you are tempted...

C: 你意识到自己这次上当了！你肝肠寸断。
E: You realize you have been duped! You are inconsolable.

C: 有骨气！听了你的话，三位对手纷纷严阵以待，决定以自己最高的水准来表达对你的尊重。
E: You've got guts! After hearing what you have to say, three fighters get ready to fight and decide to express their respect for you at the highest level.

C: 一位耷拉着半截手臂的老翁来到你的面前，对于眼前诡谲的场景，古老的智械早已司空见惯。他用仅剩的一块视觉晶体盯着你这不速之客，很是满意地点了点头。
E: An old man approaches you with one-half of his arm drooping. The ancient Intellitron is unfazed by the peculiar scene before him. Using his last piece of visual crystal he has, he fixates his gaze upon you, an unexpected visitor, and nods approvingly.

C: 问题二，您的种族为？
E: Question two, what is your species?

C: 你和学士约定分头行动，由你在灯的位置吸引虫群的注意，他则收集信息素的轨迹，构建母体的坐标。
E: You and the scholar agree to split up and, as you attract the attention of the Swarm next to the light, he collects the pheromone trail to locate the coordinates of the Swarm mother.

C: 事后检查发现，驾驶员把时间稳定仪设置成了相对模式——外部的世界相对飞船内是亚光速。
E: After inspection, it is discovered that the pilot set the temporal stabilizer to Relative Mode, with the cosmos outside the ship considered as sub-light velocity.

C: 你的四肢被空间延长，路过的青虫就要啃掉它们。但它们又被一只飞鸟叼走，留下一瓶透明的墨水。你打开瓶盖，绿洲区企业的非法历史将它染上黑色。
E: Your limbs are extended by the space, and they are almost nibbled by the passing insects. Yet, a bird swoops in to carry them away, leaving behind a vial of transparent ink. When you open it, the illicit history of corporations in the Oasis Zone stains it in black.

C: 你紧闭双眼，脚下纵深的地方，传来轰然倒塌的巨响。你默念着雅努斯的名号，继续向前行进。
E: You tightly shut your eyes, as a thunderous crash echoes from the depths beneath your feet. You mutter Janus' name and press on.

C: 你深吸一口气，卯足全力划动船桨，无视掉溅入船里的鱼腥味，让船笔直地撞进暗礁。
E: You take a deep breath, mustering all your strength in your rowing, ignoring the fishy stench that has splattered onto the boat, steering it straight for the submerged reef.

C: 哀怨的累累白骨被巨浪挤压，化作坚不可摧的巨像，它呐喊着自冥河中起身，攀爬上地面，誓要向所有不义者降下天谴。
E: The mournful pile of bones, crushed beneath the relentless waves, was forged into an indestructible colossus. Rising from the River of Souls, it climbed in a roar onto the land, vowing to unleash divine retribution upon all who were unjust.

C: 它的眷属，满嘴鬼话的贼灵巴特鲁斯，不是还在游荡吗？有谁知道，在陨落前，诡计之泰坦曾托付给它怎样的秘密？
E: Their kin, the silver-tongued Spirithief Bartholos, still wanders. What secrets did the Trickery Titan confide to it before their fall?

C: 梦境是塞纳托斯的轻语。
E: Dreams carry the whispers of Thanatos.

C: 还是回到埃杜利亚吧，一位学者宣称能用数字和几何诠释真正的美丽，在瑟希斯的神殿，用螺旋与垂直线勾勒出两轮月亮与贼星的变化轨迹。
E: Let's return to Idilia, where a scholar claims to decode true beauty through numbers and geometry, within the temple of Cerces. Using spirals and vertical lines, he charts the shifting paths of the moon and the Thief Star.

C: 墨涅塔在上，在美已衰颓的此世，要怎样才能换回，那双你曾赋予众生的，窥见美的眼睛，与那颗求爱的心灵？
E: Great Mnestia, how might we reclaim the eyes you bestowed upon all beings to perceive beauty, and the hearts that yearn for love?

C: 它为艾格勒的视线引导方向，在天空中勾勒出车辙，容晨昏之眼的造物滚动。太阳自吉奥里亚的脊背之巅升起，又落向法吉娜那醉意尚浓的海洋。
E: They guide the sight of Aquila, drawing trails and roads in the sky, enabling the creations of the Eye of Twilight to traverse. The sun rises from the pinnacle of Georios and sets towards the deep, intoxicating seas of Phagousa.

C: 你邪魅一笑，殊不知刚才你也通过脑机绳向它反向输送了一份病毒，你的智商在它之上！
E: You flash a knowing smirk — what your slimy opponent doesn't realize is that, just moments ago, you hijacked the neural link and slipped a virus into its system. Outwitted and outclassed.

C: 看来如今世道确实不佳，连塔兰顿的信徒都玩起了江湖把戏，但话又说回来，试一试好像也不亏。
E: If even Talanton's followers are resorting to mystical sales pitches, times must be rough. Then again... no harm in trying, right?

C: 冷静沉着的塔兰顿，化身横贯混沌的天平，它呼唤姐妹分别怀抱时空立于天平两端，并宣告了世间第一道法律——空间与时间永远分离。
E: Talanton, the calm and steady one, manifested as a scale that traversed the chaos. They called their sisters to embrace both sides of the scale holding up time and space, and thus was the first law of the world proclaimed: that space and time be forever separate.

C: 愿人子铭记神罚，克制内心的欲望和反叛，自觉行于道德和律法的坦途上。
E: May humanity remember divine retribution, restrain their inner desires and defiance, and willingly walk the straight path of morality and law.

C: 吉奥里亚真的…我哭死。
E: Georios, seriously... I'm literally in tears.

C: 危急之时，仍是艾格勒现身解围——
E: In this moment of crisis, Aquila appeared once more to intervene —

C: 智慧的萌发。
E: The emergence of wisdom.

C: 此即为巨人死敌——天谴之矛尼卡多利的诞生。
E: Thus was born Nikador, the Lance of Fury — the eternal enemy of the giant.

C: 没关系，我们特事特办，事后再补也行。
E: It doesn't matter. We could just make up later.

C: 你是不是最近常常感觉浑身乏力，做什么都没精神？可能还伴有间接性头晕、耳鸣等症状？
E: Have you been feeling drained and lacking motivation to do anything lately? Maybe with some intermittent symptoms like dizziness or tinnitus?

C: 对了，最近空间站里有怪物出没，你平时也要多加小心。我这里有些常备药品，你带在身上，要是不小心受伤了注意及时清创。
E: By the way, recently there have been monsters lurking about the space station, so be careful out there. Here're some first aid supplies in case you ever need it. Remember to always clean wounds promptly and thoroughly!

C: 你隐约记得佩佩是阿兰养的小狗，你不禁为空间站科员的精神状况感到担忧……
E: You dimly recall Peppy being Arlan's puppy, and can't help but worry about the mental state of the researchers aboard the space station...

C: 会议室里忽然安静了起来，在场的众人被<color=#dbc291ff>「第1版」</color>拯救，而你也体验到了助人为乐的快乐。
E: The conference room draws quiet, and everyone present is roundly saved by <color=#dbc291ff>Version 1</color>. You also get to experience the pleasure of helping others.

C: 音乐的洪流倾泻而出，你闭上眼睛欣赏，心神好似遨游到宇宙尽头。
E: A torrent of music flows out. You close your eyes off to the world and as you enjoy it, your mind seems to swim off to the edge of the universe.

C: 学习「怪声」的语言。
E: Learn the language the strange voice is speaking in

C: 倒也不必这么谨慎，在博识学会重现了以利亚萨拉斯的联觉信标技术之后，宇宙中已经不再有语言的障碍了。有机会的时候就好好使用它吧。
E: There's no need to be so cautious. Language barriers are a thing of the past ever since the Intelligentsia Guild recreated Elias Salas' Synesthesia Beacon technology. Use it when you have the chance.

C: 不是吧，你在书里找到的纸条，就不看看那本书讲什么吗？
E: Come on. Didn't you even read the book you found the note in?

C: 唉，我看你确实也不像高维存在。我还要忙，回头再聊吧！
E: Ack, I don't think you really look like a high-dimensional being. I've gotta get back to work. Chat with you later then!

C: 好吧…你自己小心点，感觉不舒服就去医生那儿看看。
E: Alright... take care of yourself, and go see the doctor if you feel sick.

C: 等等，这身装扮…绝对没错，你就是那位大名鼎鼎的「开拓者」！
E: Wait, your outfit... There's no mistake, you must be the famous "Trailblazer"!

C: 听说你是<unbreak>27</unbreak>届搏击冠军？
E: So I hear you're the <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time champion?

C: 你已经被那帮未开化的野蛮人训诫了无数次：「根据希斯拉达恩部落合邦的古老刑罚，任何忤逆『最高贵者』的不法之徒都将被勒令前往赎罪——
E: Those uncivilized barbarians have admonished you countless times. "According to the ancient laws of the united tribes of Hithradahn, any who disobeys the Noblest will be ordered to redeem their sins..."

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你只是闭眼，将又一块鲜美的高里亚驼牛肉送进麻痹的口腔。你深陷回忆。你想起提乌德里克前不久便与王国的星舰一同殉难……
E: You can only close your eyes as you put a chunk of delectable Gorya beef into your numb mouth, drowning in memories. You remember Theuderic had passed away not long ago with one of the kingdom's starships...

C: 塔伊兹育罗斯…塔伊兹█育罗斯…塔█伊兹█育罗斯…塔█伊兹█ ██育█罗█ █斯…塔█ ██ 伊█ █兹育███ █罗█斯███……
E: Tayzzyronth... Tayzzy█ronth... Ta█yzzy█ronth... Ta█yzz██y█ronth█... Ta█... █yzzy███ron█th███...

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 不对，怎么感觉晕晕的，难道是要长脑子了嗡？
E: No, why am I feeling so dizzy right now? Don't tell me it's my brain growing.

C: 但我不会放弃泡澡的尝试——这就是我，逆风飞翔的蝴蝶！
E: But I'm still not giving up on my chance to take a bath — here I am, a tiny butterfly powering into the wind!

C: 完美的平衡喀。
E: Perfect balance.

C: 看到了吧，再巍峨的高山，我轻轻一碰也就应声迸裂了喀！
E: See that? No matter how great the mountain, I can crack it open with a single flicker!

C: 跋涉过千山万水，我终于来到了掌管铸造的祭坛喀！牢不可破的躯壳，请赐予我！攻无不克的勇力，请赐予我！
E: Finally — after traversing scores of mountains and rivers, at last I arrive at the foundry altar! Please, grant me an indestructible form! Grant me the courage to conquer all before me!

C: 本虫愿舍弃灵智，为这副钢甲铸造灵魂，驱使它护卫在吾主和太太驾前！
E: I am hereby willing to sacrifice my wits to forge a soul for this armor, and drive it in defense of my master and my lady!

C: 燃起来了！
E: I'm all fired up!

C: 你站在这里，那一大片地髓矿脉也站在这里。你们四——唔，也可能是五，三十七或一千六百五十八——目相对，沉默不语。
E: You stand here together with the vast Geomarrow vein. The two of you, or maybe five... or thirty-seven... or one thousand six hundred and fifty-eight of you look at each other without a word.

C: 悄悄告诉你吧，我觉得这肯定是什么营销手段！你想啊，史考特那老家伙怎么可能放弃这种摇钱树？
E: Let me tell you something. Just between us, I think this must be some kind of marketing tactic! Think about it. How is Scott just going to let this money tree get away from him?

C: 强者才不需要运气。
E: The strong have no need for luck.

C: 「亲爱的住客，请您评价本宾馆房间提供的茶水服务。」
E: "Dear guest, please rate the tea provided in your hotel room."

C: 采光和窗景——不满意。
E: Lighting and view: Unsatisfactory.

C: 现在或许是个机会——以捉迷藏的名义。尽管你不太清楚这算不算犯规……
E: Perhaps now would be an opportunity to check it out for the purpose of hide-and-seek. You aren't sure if this is against the rules or not...

C: 如此想着，你挺身翻越生锈的栅栏，向黢黑的巷道深处走去。
E: With this thought in mind, you hop over the rusted fence, and make your way into the pitch-black alley.

C: 喜欢希露瓦大人的粉丝，视力都不会太差！
E: Fans who enjoy Lady Serval all have pretty good discernment!

C: 第七万三千二百块…
E: Number <unbreak>73,200</unbreak>...

C: 快给我变！
E: Transform for me!

C: 听说那时有无数金色蝴蝶从这空壳中飞出，洒下漫天的鳞粉，就好像金色的流星降落人间一样喀！
E: It's said innumerable golden butterflies burst forth from this husk, their scale dust raining down like golden stars descending to earth!

C: 这池哲人莲的品相可真不错，藕节和莲子应该也都会很肥美喀。
E: These sage lotuses seem to be growing well. Bet their roots and seeds are nice and fat, crrk.

C: <size=36>……</size>
E: <size=36>...</size>

C: …荣誉队员。
E: ...Honorary member.

C: 你们怎么都不说话？
E: Why aren't any of you saying anything?

C: …虎克已经无语了！
E: ...I'm too shocked to talk!

C: 救虫啊——
E: Someone help—

C: 世上无难事，只要肯攀登。总有一天我要登上崖顶，和负日者肩并肩嗡！
E: Nothing is impossible if you keep trying. One day, I'll climb to the top of the cliff and stand shoulder-to-shoulder with the Sunbearer, buzz!

C: 这里究竟是什么地方？
E: What exactly is this place?

C: 这只若虫趴在散发着神圣气息的圆台上，似乎在祭拜——又或是在打碟。
E: The nymph rests upon a sacred, glowing pedestal, as if in worship — or perhaps it's spinning some tracks.

C: 原本我有个更叛逆的名字，但之前我比较怂，一直没敢说出来…事已至此，也没什么好害羞的了——
E: I used to have a much more rebellious name, but I was too much of a coward to say it out loud... Now at this point, there's nothing to be shy about—

C: 且慢！
E: Wait a minute!

C: 现在它们牵引着我们，来到了最后的结局。
E: And now, they pull us toward the final conclusion.

C: 你接下来打算做什么呢？
E: What do you plan to do now?

C: 你是指友商想拆机，看看这物流机巧鸟的内部结构。
E: You were suggesting that a competitor wanted to dismantle the courier cycranes and see their internal structure.

C: 我是为了领奖励才来找你的。
E: I came to find you because I wanted a reward.

C: 哎呀呀，有机物还是太狭隘了。不过，我也不怪你，谁让我是一只善解人意的机巧鸟呢。
E: Geez, organics are so narrow-minded. But, hey, I don't blame you. Who has made me into such an understanding cycrane?

C: 嘻嘻，我就知道她心里有我。
E: Hehe. I knew she still longed for me.

C: 这画册真的太刺激啦！噢，这纸页…这配色…还有这页数！实在太多了！我也太幸福了吧！我可以一整天都看这个！一整天！
E: This photo book is really too exciting! Oh! This paper... The color... And the number of pages! It's too much! I'm way too lucky! I could read this all day! All day long!

C: 这就是小机巧鸟不能看的？
E: This is what a cycrane can't look at?

C: 客人，且慢。
E: Please wait, esteemed guest.

C: 不如我们来赌谁组枪快吧？
E: Let's bet on who can assemble a pistol faster?

C: 提问结束。
E: No more questions.

C: 机巧鸟就这样潇洒地离开了，它明明那么小，背影看上去却很高大。它的出逃似乎并非是为了一个消极的理由，它只是想验证「机巧鸟的快乐到底是什么」。
E: The cycrane strides off, dignified. Even though it is tiny in form, it seems like a giant from behind. It doesn't seem to be scurrying away for any passive reason, but rather just to experience "what happiness means to a cycrane."

C: 我虽然没有未来，但是我可以会保护好你的未来，这就是我的信念。
E: I may not have any future, but I can still protect your future. This is my conviction.

C: 你根本就不在你说的范围内。
E: You went off the map, buddy!

C: 嘿嘿嘿，看看是谁来了！大哥，又有一个不知趣的家伙来到我们的地盘上了。
E: Hee-hee, look who's here! Boss, another blockhead has come to our territory.

C: 哎呀，你们不要相信{F#她}{M#他}说的鬼话…你们见过吗，反正我没有见过。像我这样智慧凌驾于人类的机巧鸟，全银河也只有一只。
E: Don't believe any of {F#her}{M#his} jibber-jabber... Have you seen any cycrane like them? I, for one, haven't. I'm the only cycrane in the whole cosmos whose intelligence exceeds that of humans.

C: 我是大资本家，手上只有<unbreak>10</unbreak>巡镝给他们，请问小美应该得到多少？
E: I'm a capitalist, but I only have ten strales for them. How many strales should Little Susie get?

C: 比赛大概是正式开始了。眼看着其他两人如暴风般吸入眼前的食物，你也顾不得那么多，只能抓起眼前分配给自己的包子，将它们胡乱塞进自己可怜的小嘴。
E: The contest has officially begun. Seeing the other two inhaling everything before them like a tornado, you're unable to keep up. All you can do is grab onto your assigned buns in front of you, and start stuffing them like crazy into your poor little mouth.

C: 曾被晖之民顶礼膜拜的天象画壁，决定了多少生死，牵引了多少仇怨。恐怕谁也想不到，它有朝一日竟然也会坍塌吧。
E: Once revered by the Sunfolk, the celestial mural had dictated countless destinies — deciding who lived, who died, and stirring endless feuds. But who would have thought that one day, it too would collapse?

C: 我学会了！
E: I've mastered it!

C: 成了吗？让我瞧瞧……
E: Did it work? Let's see...

C: 别放弃…别放弃…我还能陪你继续做测试……
E: Don't give up... don't give up... I can continue to test with you...

C: …好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金——去做你想做的事吧。
E: ... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.

C: 这里危险你快下来！
E: It's dangerous here. Get down from there!

C: 集齐所有标记能召唤钟表小子吗？难说。
E: Can you summon Clockie by collecting all of the marks? Who knows.

C: 是的，它要来了。
E: Yes, it's arriving.

C: 这里头绝对有诈。
E: There must be some trick to this.

C: 但现在…你简直不敢相信你的眼睛，这是怎么做到的？登上台阶的一小步，却是足以载入匹诺康尼史册的一大步！
E: But now... you can hardly believe your eyes. How was this achieved? A small step onto the stage, yet a giant leap worthy of the Penaconian history books!

C: 你看，妈妈都睡着了。
E: Look, Mom's dozed off.

C: 连孩子都…真的好吗？
E: Even children are... Is this really okay?

C: 塔兰顿能衡量它自己吗？
E: Does Talanton weigh their own weight?

C: 要在诗歌中永垂不朽…
E: To be immortalized in song...

C: 啊啊啊！这条子跑得也太快了！
E: Ahh nooo! This cop is super fast!

C: 列车长今天心情似乎很好？
E: The conductor seems to be in a pretty good mood today?

C: …丹恒乘客、三月七乘客他们没跟你说过吗？
E: ...Didn't Dan Heng and March 7th tell you about it yet?

C: 呼呼——
E: *snore* *snore*...

C: 那必须是！
E: That's right!

C: 你现在收集到的材料有限，合成机里能制造的东西也有限。但等你以后收集到更多不同的材料了，就能制造出更多东西了。
E: Because you only have a few materials right now, you can only synthesize a few things. But as you gather different materials in the future, you'll be able to craft more than that.

C: 真是不让帕姆省心，稍微不留意一会儿就能做出这么危险的行为。
E: Pom-Pom just can't let their guard down, can they? Whenever Pom-Pom isn't paying attention, a calamity is about to happen.

C: 车窗外的风景虽美，但看久了似乎也没什么特别之处。
E: Despite the view being spectacular outside, it doesn't seem so special once you've been looking for as long as you have.

C: 让乘客们提前申请啊。
E: Make passengers submit applications in advance.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客！我再强调一遍——不许欺负列车长！
E: {NICKNAME}, let me repeat this again — do not bully Pom-Pom!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，请注意抬脚！帕姆正在打扫卫生！
E: Passenger {NICKNAME}, please keep your legs up! I'm cleaning the floor!

C: 总之我劝你还是打消这个念头算了。
E: It's best not to use them.

C: 手下败将！
E: I'll beat you!

C: 呼…精彩…真是精彩。你的作战技巧比之前更纯熟了……
E: Hoo... Wonderful... Truly wonderful. Your combat skills are more proficient than before...

C: （齿轮栈桥的桥臂上也设置了照雪灯炉……）
E: (There's also a Snowshine Lamp on the trestle of the gear bridge...)

C: 我们已经进入到事发地点，这附近的怪物都受到「云吟术」异象的影响隐去了身形。
E: We've made it to the site where the anomaly hit. All the monsters in this area are under the influence of the Cloudhymn Magic and are invisible.

C: 可是，现在各部门都难以分出人手，事情又相当紧急…所以如果您能去一趟的话……
E: But every department is finding it difficult to spare staff members, but it's an urgent matter... So, if you are able to go in...

C: 嘿…你是来参加「黑暗拳斗大赛」的吗？
E: Hey, are you here for the Dark Fist Tournament?

C: 你大概已经看这个狂妄的小孩不爽很久了。现在，你的心里恐怕正想着自己非得要挫挫他的锐气才叫痛快，而且一定要不择手段才行。
E: This kid is already getting on your nerves, and now you're itching to beat him... thoroughly.

C: 摊牌了！我就是公物破坏狂！
E: Fine. I admit I'm a repeat offender.

C: 求求你别再夸了…我要受不了了……
E: Please stop it... I can't take any more teasing...

C: 你止住了向星球仪啐上一口的冲动。不文明是其次——主要原因是布洛妮娅就站在你的身后。
E: You resist the urge to spit on the armillary sphere not just because that'd be rude. Mostly it's because Bronya is standing right behind you.

C: 呃，别想太多。或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Um. Don't make too much of it. Perhaps you should just change direction and explore again.

C: ——开玩笑的，没有人不痛恨应试教育。就让和古代雅利洛-Ⅵ有关的地理知识停留在兴趣的范畴吧。
E: Just kidding. Everyone despises those good-for-nothing exams. Let's just keep the study of Jarilo-VI's ancient geography confined within the realm of extracurricular pursuits.

C: 谢天谢地，这什么逻辑语言中枢可算是卖出去了……
E: Thanks the heavens, this language module thing is finally sold...

C: 我还以为这是没人要的垃圾哩。总之，多谢老板！
E: I just thought this is trash that nobody wanted. Anyway, thanks very much, boss!

C: 得慎重选择了…
E: I'll have to choose carefully...

C: 一看你就是刚来仙舟的化外民，也不怪你。这长生种的东西，往少了说都得有个八百年的历史！
E: I can see you must be new around here, Outworlder, so a little history lesson. A long-life species possession like this has a history of at least eight hundred years!

C: 我被碰瓷了
E: I've been scammed.

C: 改过自新…原来是这个意思吗？但是才给几百块够干啥的？怎么都得给个万把块启动资金吧？
E: Turn over a new leaf... Is that what that means? All I've got is a couple of hundred measly credits. What's that good for? You should've at least given me some ten-grand start-up fund, no?

C: 执事狠狠看了身边的骗子一眼。
E: The officer ruthlessly scrutinizes the surrounding scammers.

C: 这里的审美与爱好真是太过吓人，超出了你所能接受的底线。
E: The aesthetics and pastimes here are simply terrifying, and stretch far beyond your bottom line.

C: 进不去吗…哈哈，那是因为你尚有凡骨在身。参得虚妄蜕俗尘，千万变千化脱骨。
E: Can't fit? Haha... That's because you still have mortal worries inside of you. Embrace the formless and shrug off thy mortal shell, then change into a thousand forms as thy mind desires.

C: 如何？你改变主意了吗？要将那东西给我吗？
E: How about it, then? Have you changed your mind? Do you want to give it to me?

C: 拙见…
E: Humble opinion...

C: 中止遥控
E: Stop remote control

C: 关于这个小零件的事儿…
E: About this component...

C: 关于这个铁盒的事儿…
E: About this iron box...

C: 前世给我留下笔记和一把钥匙。可惜，书店里没有铁盒，那位使者想必也只是一位骗子…哎。
E: My past self left behind a key and a notebook for me. But unfortunately, there're no iron boxes here at the bookstore, so that messenger must have been a scammer... Sigh.

C: 最近对仙舟的志怪故事感兴趣得不行，我可以说是「朝思暮想」了。
E: I've grown infatuated recently with the mysteries of Xianzhou culture. I've been obsessed with thinking about them...

C: 既然你和我一样，那你有没有我想要的「鲛人泪」呢？
E: Seeing as we're so similar then, have you got any Draconic Tears for me?

C: 刚才我正在开开心心在路上飞，突然冒出一个小屁孩，跟我说：「我这里有小阴晴伞不能看的好东西！」
E: Just now I was flying along the road, happy as can be when this kid appeared out of nowhere and told me: "I've got something cool here that little Baroumbrella can't see!"

C: 不等你做出回答，小梁和小祝就乘着「化蝶号」一起离开了码头。
E: Without even waiting for an answer, Rom and Com jump aboard the SS Butterfly, and depart the jetty.

C: 你问的这些东西我都不知道。
E: I don't have any answers to these questions of yours.

C: 救救孩子们，救救宇宙的未来吧！
E: Save the children, and save the future of the universe!

C: 你的假期怎么了？
E: How's your vacation going?

C: 她说你有病。
E: She said you're sick.

C: 你是影评家？
E: Are you a film critic?

C: …我曾听说某些星球上，人们会在秋冬之际烧毁荒芜的杂草，只为来年能在这片土地上培养出优质的粮食。
E: ...I once heard of some planets where the people would burn up their dried weeds during the winter months, just to nourish high-quality crops on the land in the year ahead.

C: 你知道吗，我这个姐姐啊，从小就视我为眼中钉、肉中刺。
E: You know what? Since we were young, my older sister always saw me as this thorn in her side.

C: 「哎呀我太忙了没时间，有空你替我陪陪她吧」——令人作呕！
E: "Shucks. I'm so busy and don't have any time. Could you please keep her company" ...Gross!

C: 但我告诉你，我告诉你——我说我们*永远*也没法<color=#f29e38ff>面对面</color>聊，而她就是那个原因！
E: But I'm telling you — we will *never* be able to chat <color=#f29e38ff>face-to-face</color>, and it's all her fault!

C: 为什么早已死去的人不能安息，还活着的又非得扮作一个虚假的影子，佯装对方还在梦中苟延残喘呢？
E: Why can't the dead rest in peace? And why do the living have to pretend to be this fake shadow, pretending that we're struggling on in this dreamscape here?

C: 我从没在智库里见过类似的生物，这意味着它的种族要么尚未被发现，要么…已经灭亡。
E: I've never seen anything like it in the data bank, which means it's either an undiscovered species, or... extinct.

C: 不要以为斩首很容易。战舰的雷达就是韦兰的双眼，战舰的火炮则是他手臂的延伸。想要登上这样一艘怪物，没有过硬的驾驶技术可办不到。
E: Don't think a beheading operation is easy. The battleship's radar was Wyland's eyes. Its cannons were extensions of his arms. Boarding such a monster as this requires perfect mastery of piloting.

C: 是星核——「万界之癌」就是自那时开始侵害诸界的。
E: It was a stellaron — the Cancer of All Worlds that set out on its invasion of all worlds thereafter.

C: 唉，有机体总是喜欢把自己改造成机械，韦兰也不例外……
E: *sigh* Organic creatures love modding themselves into robots. Wyland was no exception...

C: 除了无名客，世上还有什么人能想出如此浪漫的点子？哪怕遗产只是个谎言，那也是留名青史的弥天大谎！
E: Who else in the world could ever come up with such a romantic idea, but one of the Nameless? Even if it's all a lie, it's still the kind of monstrous lie that can consign your name to the annals of history!

C: 似乎是在梦里待久了的缘故，我逐渐变得枯燥、慵懒，对什么都提不起劲……
E: I think because I've been in a dream for so long, I've gradually grown bored and lazy. I can't seem to get excited about anything...

C: 可筑梦边境人多眼杂，我亲自去实在太过显眼——我留着这个筑梦师的身份还有用呢。

C: 好哇，敢这样跟星际和平公司的人说话，难道你没有领教过和平的铁拳？
E: Wow. If you dare take this tone with a member of the Interastral Peace Corporation, you must not have tasted the iron fist of peacekeeping.

C: 垃圾桶里只发现了这个。
E: That's all there was inside the trashcan.

C: 听起来…和雅利洛-Ⅵ很像。
E: Sounds... very similar to Jarilo-VI.

C: 很难说。不公固然是个问题，但不是奥特兰最大的问题。
E: That's hard to say. Injustice was certainly a problem, but it wasn't Outerland's biggest issue.

C: 不行。
E: No.

C: 项目交付时间迫在眉睫。但看看你的周围，这有哪怕一点快竣工的样子吗？
E: The project deadline is drawing close, but look around — does this place look like it is near completion?

C: …嗯？为什么这么说？
E: ...Eh? What makes you say so?

E: You'll get what I mean when you visit the place. Doors are everywhere in the city! You have to pass through a door to enter a building, cross a pedestrian bridge, and access the rooftop garden.

C: 这么干对我有什么好处？
E: Why would I want to do that?

E: I'm at my wit's end, buddy... There's no turning back for us now. The next project will decide Miracle Benjamin's fate...

C: …噢，有了！多亏了你突然出现，我这就想到一个绝妙的点子！
E: ...Oh, yes! Thanks to your sudden appearance, I just came up with a brilliant idea!

E: It's simple! Because they are my ideas, my creations, and my designs!

C: 咻咻…结论：该分析对象所涉及之原材料、供应链及相关技术无侵权风险，可以正常投入应用情境。
E: Beep... Conclusion: The analyses regarding the raw materials, supply chain, and related technologies show no risk of infringement. This object can be used without risk.

E: With a jingle, a few Aideen Tokens fall out of Emmrich's pocket.

C: 是的，是的！我想做的是鞭策他们实现自己的梦想，而不是成为阻碍他们梦想的壁垒！

C: …对不起，先生，要不还是让我听{M#他}{F#她}讲两句吧。
E: ...I'm sorry, sir. Please let me hear {M#him}{F#her} out first.

C: 于是我开始模仿流行的风格，创作虚假的「纯美之歌」。结果这居然真的骗过了听众，我的演出在乐迷圈好评如潮，我登上了《梦境艺术》的封面，虚构的歌曲也屡屡获奖……
E: So, I started imitating popular styles and composed the fabricated Song of Beauty. Surprisingly, that ruse managed to deceive the audience. My performances were well-received within the music fan community, I got on the cover of Art of Dreamscape, and that song even won numerous awards.

C: 抱歉，我必须得回奥帝购物中心继续发宣传册了…亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，能麻烦您帮我问问听众的感想吗？拜托了！
E: I'm sorry, but I must go back to Oti Mall to distribute brochures... Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, could you please ask about the audience's thoughts on my new song? I would greatly appreciate it!

E: Outworlder, you now have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to better assimilate in this grand and bustling metropolis. Will you seize it?

E: ...You're here, after all. Didn't I tell you... Eh? How come you're alone!?

C: 看啊，人们时而交谈、时而欢笑，都在为一个共同的目标努力着；就算偶尔争吵，也不会有谁带着恶意攻击他人。

C: 阿图罗先生读得如此投入，情不自禁地问出了声。而「猫头鹰老师」仿佛对他的疑问早有预料，在信的下一段给出了回答：
E: Mr. Arturo is so absorbed in reading that he can't help but voice his confusion out loud. As if predicting his query, "Professor Owl" provides an answer in the next passage of his letter:

C: 也许在他看来…

E: Unfortunately, there isn't much emphasis placed on ethics in Fortune Academy's courses. As a result, many notorious galaxy-class financial criminals are alumni of the academy. This has led to it being jokingly referred to as the "most Penaconian" academy, as some of the students have actually become prisoners.

C: 好，那你多保重…诶哟，我这老腰。
