C: 你也太警惕了，十王司是不是给你讲了些什么……
E: You're too on edge. Did the Ten Lords tell you something...?

C: 让我再考虑考虑……
E: Let me give it some thought...

C: 你附身吧，我带你过去。
E: Come on then, and I'll carry you over.

C: 拿着吧，它将见证我新生活的开始。
E: Take this. It's a symbol of the beginning of my new life.

C: 你耍赖！怎么可能有人识破我的伪装？
E: Cheater! How could you see through my disguise like that?

C: 在你的摧残中，鼓投降般变回了皮皮西的模样。
E: Under your savage beatings, the drum surrenders and transforms back into its Pepeshi form.

C: …梦里就不该开车！
E: ...You shouldn't dream and drive!

C: …小佩……
E: ...Pennie...

C: 呃…不好意思，我本职工作是投资经理，对艺术一窍不通。
E: Ahh... I'm so sorry. I work in investment management, and I know nothing about the world of art.

C: …这是…磁带？
E: ...This is... a tape?

C: 前边那位灰色的朋友，对，就是你——有空的话，能否帮我一个忙？
E: You, my gray friend over there, yeah you... If you have a moment, can you help me a sec?

C: 走了！你自己保重。
E: I'm off! Take care of yourself!

C: 你从「赌神」手中接过泛着金属光泽的碎片，看起来很普通，没有任何值得说明的地方。出于乐善好施的崇高精神，你还是将机械零件塞进了口袋里。
E: You received a fragment from the "Ace Gambler" that shines with a metallic luster. It seems completely unremarkable, there is not much to be said about it. As you are a charitable and altruistic soul, you place the fragment into your pocket.

C: 有段时间没听到奥洛的消息了。那天的赌局结束后，他就从梦境里消失了。没人知道他去了哪里，也没人知道他是不是还活着。
E: I have not heard any news of Oro for a while. After the gamble ended on that day, he disappeared from the dreamscape completely. No one knows where he went, no one knows if he is even still alive.

C: 请问你认识那位赌神吗？
E: Excuse me, do you know the Ace Gambler?

C: 缘何起…
E: Where does destiny begin...

C: 你为什么要追求水晶杯？
E: Why are you pursuing the crystal chalice?

C: …这瓶「黄金香槟」只供展示，请宾客在欣赏瓶身时保持距离，切勿用手触碰。
E: ...This bottle of golden champagne is for display only. Please kindly maintain a distance and refrain from touching the bottle.

C: 它们三瓶到底谁是最香醇的？今儿个你就是要让它们三瓶比划比划，分出个一二三来。
E: Which one of them actually is the finest wine? You have decided that today, you will have them compare and rank themselves as a clear first, second, and third.

C: 在另外两个酒瓶的叫骂里，阿绿骄傲地走进你的背包。它现在已经是最香醇的美酒，所有的同类都入不了它的法眼。
E: As the other two bottles hurl out slurs and curses, Green arrogantly struts into your Inventory. Now, knowing that it is the finest of wines, no other is fit to be bathed in its warm gaze.

C: 还好我们早就知道它心里根本没有我俩，这么想走，我们还求之不得呢。
E: At least we know now they never cared about us two! If they wanted to leave us that badly, they should have just said so!

C: 据说，还因为录到了老板的什么把柄，私下从他嘴里翘出来不少钱。
E: Word on the streets is that he even secretly got a big payout from the boss 'cos he caught him sayin' somethin' on tape.

C: 好啦好啦，回家，别让大伙看笑话。
E: Alright, alright, let's go home. Don't let people see you causing a scene.

C: 由众人意识产生的铁桶「神」，祂会成长到何种规模？过段时间再回来看看吧。
E: Arising from the consciousness of the people, just how big will this "God" of Iron Cans become? Perhaps you should check back in a while.

C: 打劫——一口价，<unbreak>10000</unbreak>苜蓿币，不接受砍价。
E: This is a robbery... Fixed price, <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> Alfalfa credits, no barterin'.

C: 你说得对…如果我们能集合所有在城区流浪的居民，或许就能改变这里的现状。
E: You're right... If we can gather all the residents roamin' the city, maybe we can change things 'round here.

C: 老大，我们已经商量过了未来的计划，很快就能付诸实践了。
E: Boss, we've been discussin' our future plans, n' we're almost ready to put'em into practice.

C: 等有空了，你也来尝尝我的手艺。
E: You gotta come try my cookin' when ya get a minute!

C: 这不太好吧…
E: That doesn't sound like a good idea...

C: 真是天意弄人啊。
E: Heaven's will certainly is cruel.

C: 无论结果如何，愿你不留遗憾。
E: No matter what, I hope you have no regrets.

C: 你们在聊什么呢？
E: What are you folks chatting about?

C: 你也是知更鸟小姐的粉丝？想买的话，当然能找到渠道，只是……
E: Are you a fan of Miss Robin too? If you want it, you can always find a way. It's just...

C: 不过既然是老板你推荐的，那必定有什么过人之处。快快快，赶紧去把人请过来吧！
E: But since you recommend her, there must be something amazing about her. Let's hurry up and invite her!

C: …船长的快递到了。
E: The captain's delivery is here.

C: 你拨打了流萤的号码，但冰冷的电子音回答你：「对方不在服务区」 。
E: You dial Firefly's number, only to hear a cold robotic voice: This person is currently outside of the service area.

C: …这是…流萤小姐…那次意外？
E: ...Is that... Miss Firefly? When she...

C: 你想起了在剧院直面星期日的事…在诗班奏响未来的序曲前，空气凝固，时间似乎都静止了下来。
E: You remember when you faced Sunday at the theater. The choir was about to sing the prelude to the future, the air froze, and time seemed to stop.

C: 有点可惜，刚刚看得太投入，忘记拍照留念了！这算是{NICKNAME}主演的大电影吧，这种场合不跟主角合照也太可惜了！
E: What a pity! I was too engrossed just now and forgot to take a picture to commemorate the moment! This is a big movie with {NICKNAME} in the leading role, right? In that case, it'd be too bad if we don't take a photo with the star of the movie!

C: 您刚刚不就在那里吗？我才从勘录舍出来……
E: Weren't you there just now? I just came from the Domain of Collations...

C: 我不服，谛听还没有说话呢，我要听听谛听怎么说！
E: I am not convinced! Why hasn't the Diting spoken? I want to hear what the Diting has to say!

C: 谢谢大人理解。
E: Thank you for your understanding.

C: 不感兴趣。
E: Not interested.

C: 就是这本书被抓起来了。
E: This book must have been arrested.

C: 这名囚犯并不简单，经过我们一番调查确认，与她一同逃出的犯人有一名死在半路上，看她的精神状态，想必还没能接受吧……
E: This convict was a handful. Our investigations have confirmed that one of the convicts that she escaped with died along the way. From her mental state, I reckon she hasn't quite accepted the outcome...

C: 哎呀，还以为在这里不会被发现呢。
E: Oof, I was hoping I wouldn't be found here.

C: 呵呵，被卷入了麻烦事之中，自己的真心如何并不重要，重要的是如何找到适合自己扮演的角色…哎，可惜我扮演错了角色。
E: Heh-heh, when in a difficult situation, it's not so important to maintain who you truly are, but to find the suitable role to play... Alas, I played the wrong character.

C: 我们俩之前也是去过不少世界的海边了，鳞渊境总带给我一种特别的感觉。就像是在这里隐藏着某种巨大的力量。
E: Even though both of us have visited the seas of numerous worlds, the Scalegorge Waterscape still feels special to me. It feels as if there's a great and mysterious power hidden within this area.

C: 犯罪行为？我现在就去找狱卒！
E: Are you breaking the law? I'll go get a prison guard right now!

C: 集装箱探索真是危险呐。
E: These freight containers are just too dangerous.

C: 安检机中存在射线，说得直白一些，安检机器中是有辐射的。很多人害怕机器内有辐射存在，似乎在旁边多待一秒就会致癌。实际上，辐射确实是存在的，但没有这么危险。
E: This security scanner uses X-rays. Put simply, the scanner emits radiation. Many are afraid of the radiation and fear that staying next to the machine for even a second longer will cause them to develop cancer. The truth is that while it does emit radiation, it doesn't pose a health risk.

C: *沉默*
E: *keep quiet*

C: …绿。按剧本来就好是吧？我会完成我的工作，就这些。
E: ...Greenie. Just follow the script, yeah? I'll get my work done. That's all from me.

C: 我…在这里睡着了？
E: I... fell asleep here?

C: 哼哼，欧洛尼斯的圣烛和别的圣烛不一样，一旦熄灭，「永夜」就准备拉开帷幕了。
E: Fufu. The holy candle of Oronyx is different from other holy candles. When it's extinguished, the "eternal night" will soon rise.

C: …故事说，刻法勒的仁慈令这个城邦的幼儿们迅速成年，瞬间拥有了对抗敌人的力气。
E: ...Legend has it that Kephale's benevolence allowed the children of this city-state to rapidly mature, granting them the strength to immediately resist their enemies.

C: 我、我变成爸爸了！
E: I... I'm going to be a father!

C: 还是别乱碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: 这是颜色的问题吗！
E: Is it a matter of color!?

C: 嗯？不应该啊。
E: Hmm? This shouldn't be the case.

C: 好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…你赶紧检查了一下——幸好你的手臂还在。
E: Ouch! This lion bit you! You check your wound in a panic — good thing your arm is still there.

C: 好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…可是，到底哪里出了问题啊？
E: Owwch! Didn't expect it to bite... But, what exactly did you get wrong?

C: （无视它）
E: (Ignore it)

C: 再想想吧。
E: Let's think about it.

C: 来吧！让你考考我。
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 你仍旧没想明白阿格莱雅能如此肯定的缘由，姑且先当做参考吧。
E: You still can't figure out how Aglaea was so sure of the answer. Let's use her answer as reference for now.

C: 吼吼，本狮已经习惯了赞誉，但怎么都听不腻吼！谢谢你吼！
E: Ho-ho, I may be used to praise, but I never tire of it! Thank you!

C: 删些文档文件。
E: Delete some document files.

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 这个真能播在地里吗？呼呼，你怕不是连吃的果实和种子都分不清楚吧？！
E: Can this really be planted? *crackle* Can you even tell if you're eating a fruit or a seed!?

C: 怎么可能？学过数学的人都知道，1加1当然等于2啊！
E: What are you even talking about? Everyone knows that 1 plus 1 equals 2!

C: 与美丽的玻璃瓶开展浪漫关系。
E: He would start a romantic relationship with the beautiful glass bottle.

C: 什么？哈努兄弟才不会做这种多余的事情。你、你竟敢玷污他！
E: What? Hanu would never do something so unnecessary. H—How dare you smear his reputation!

C: 我要变得像他一样强！
E: I want to become as strong as him!

C: 太不礼貌了！正确的做法是四指并拢、掌心向上…你，不合格！
E: That's rude! The correct way is to bring your four fingers together with your palm facing upward... That's a fail!

C: 不会是鬼吧…
E: It's not a ghost, is it...

C: 可你的外形明明变了…
E: But your appearance has clearly changed...

C: 在原地大哭一场。
E: Bawl on the spot.

C: 这种事可不能代劳。不如向刻法勒祷告，说不准白厄还能听到。
E: This isn't something you can do for someone else. Maybe pray to Kephale. Who knows, Phainon might even hear you.

C: 回忆第一封来信。
E: Recall the first letter received.

C: 嗷呜嗷！
E: Rrrrr!

C: 你想起祝祭庭院有不少花盆，也许可以把它们种进去？
E: You recall the flowerpots in the Sacrament Courtyard — maybe you could plant them there?

C: 于茫茫边星寻觅无机生命的起源时，我曾见过一台漏网之鱼。
E: While exploring the origins of inorganic life across distant border stars, I found one that had escaped detection.

C: 你环顾四周，祝祭庭院、打谷场、海边…都没有昔涟的身影。安静的村落中，只有轻风作响。
E: You glance around — the Sacrament Courtyard, the threshing grounds, the beach... but there's no sign of Cyrene. Just the soft rustle of wind through the quiet village.

C: 哎呀…第一次进入迷境时，「昔涟」似乎也遇见过同样的事呢。
E: Oh my... "Cyrene" also encountered something similar when she first entered the maze.

C: 呀，好坦诚……
E: Whoa, that's frank...

C: 一起看过麦浪。
E: We watched the ripples of wheat together.

C: 别冲动，我可以帮你带路！
E: Please stay calm. I can be your guide!

C: 他是…头发和胡子都全黑的男性，中等年纪，穿红色的衣服……
E: He... He is a man with black hair and a black beard. He's middle-aged, and he wears a red outfit...

C: 你当真认为我该就此离开？
E: Do you really think that I should just leave like this?

C: 雅努斯在上，您竟然真的回应了！赞美您的仁慈与怜悯！
E: Janus above! You have responded to me! Praise your kindness and mercy!

C: 仔细想想，这还是你第一次被当作神明对待。降下的首个神谕，竟然是这种颇为无厘头的问题？你不禁怒从心生，所以打算——
E: Thinking about it, this is the first time that you have been approached as a god. This is your first ever divine prophecy, and it is for such an inane question? You cannot help but feel rage growing inside you, so you...

C: （狂敲右边的木壁）
E: (Slam wildly on the right side wall)

C: 你使劲捶打着木马腹部，试图掰出能让你伸手进去的门缝，只可惜…木板纹丝未动。
E: You hit the horse's belly forcefully, attempting to create an opening for your hand to pry it open, but unfortunately... the wood remains unyielding.

C: 第二问：泰坦创造了天地万物，那么泰坦自身又是如何被创造的？
E: Question Two: If Titans made all things in the world, what force brought the Titans themselves into being?

C: 第四问：塞纳托斯将死亡平等地赐予所有人，你认为这是——
E: Question Four: Thanatos bestows death equally upon all — what are your thoughts on this?

C: 这个故事，怎么没完没了的呀……
E: Why does this story feel like it never ends...

C: 愿她在刻法勒的注视下，从容地渡过那条幽深的长河……
E: May she, under the watchful gaze of Kephale, cross the deep and endless river in peace...

C: （创世涡心…也变成了这样。）
E: (The Vortex of Genesis... has turned out like this too.)

C: 奇怪……明明刚才还在这里的……难道是我看错了么？不应该啊。
E: How strange... it was right here a minute ago... did my eyes make a mistake? It can't be.

C: 接下来你打算怎么做？
E: What are you going to do?

C: 富贵险中求，当然是挖地三尺把那些家伙彻底揪出来。
E: High risk, high reward. I am going to dig deep and find those crooks.

C: 问到了点子上，我的朋友。
E: You hit the nail on the head, my friend.

C: 这…这不是明摆着的嘛！她就是我认定的那个女孩了……
E: Isn't it... Obvious? She is the one!

C: …特效药？
E: ...Wonder medicine?

C: …注射剂？
E: ...An injection?

C: 你看上去很困。
E: You look sleepy.

C: 这个话题我有发言权。
E: I am the best qualified to talk about this.

C: 喏，瞧见没，这个小玩具。可别觉得是给小孩儿玩的！这辆装甲车跑过的路，比我喝的酒都多！这个小模型，里头完美复刻了原型的机动轨道呢。
E: Here, check this out. Don't think this is some child's plaything! The armored car this miniature model is based on has traveled on more roads than I could count! This model even has a perfect replica of the real thing's mechanized track.

C: 好的，那我就继续工作了。要是你对防卫科事务有什么投诉意见，可以随时来找我。
E: Thanks. Oh, and come find me anytime you have feedback for the Security Department.

C: 会的话，你很有趣；不会的话，你很聪明。
E: If you would, it means you're funny. If you wouldn't, it means you're smart.

C: 你要是有什么事找她，但她又一直不理你…千万别多想，她只是下线了而已。
E: Don't be offended if she ignores you when you talk to her. Chances are she's just logged off.

C: 是啊，这里来了个呜呜伯，我和它聊过了，它是从空间站的什么夹层里偷偷溜下来的，还给我讲了很多空间站的故事。
E: Yes, there's a Wubbaboo here. I had a chat with it, and it said it sneaked out from some sort of compartment in the space station, even told me a lot of stories about the space station.

C: 哎…阮•梅……
E: *sigh* Ruan Mei...

C: 真的吗？你这么说…意思是不是…因为阮•梅、阮•梅放弃我了？所以你可怜我？
E: Really? Is it... because Ruan Mei has given up on me? Are you doing this out of sympathy?

C: 也许她正在想你。
E: Perhaps, she's thinking about you now.

C: 我没什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 如果你也有这么多事情要处理，你也会变得急躁！
E: You would be impatient too if you had so many things on your plate!

C: 你该不会不知道外面有多危险吧？到处都是那种怪物，到处乱飞，大家出门前都得找我帮忙看看外面情况。
E: Do you know how dangerous it is out there? Flying monsters are everywhere, so everyone seeks my help to make sure the area outside is clear before heading out.

C: 到时候，说不定她会想，居然有这么一个天纵奇才在此蹉跎，然后就跑回来带我一起走，再精心教导我……
E: When the time comes, she'll probably wonder why such an extraordinary talent like me is wasting my time here. Then, she'll take me with her and give me her guidance...

C: …好、好了……
E: ...I—I think I've heard enough.

C: 你和豆沙灰灰是敌是友？
E: Are you a friend or a foe of Gray Bean Paste?

C: 请勿打扰…请勿…请勿……
E: Please do not disturb... Please do not... Please do not...

C: 你的名字是什么意思？
E: What's the meaning of your name?

C: 怎么两个都碎了？莫非都是假货？
E: Both have been broken? Could these be counterfeit?

C: 谁去把卫兵叫来，赶紧把这两个骗子逮起来！
E: Someone, call the guards! Have these two charlatans arrested!

C: 比对着卷轴上的文本，你确信那个神秘仪式的举行地点就是这里。底下的土壤有些奇怪，或许是举行过无数次仪式的缘故，竟有些板结。
E: Comparing the location with the scroll's script, you are certain that this is the location for the mysterious ceremony. There is something strange about the dirt beneath you. Perhaps the countless ceremonies performed here before have hardened the earth.

C: 一阵诡异的能量波动传来，你感到有些头晕。
E: As you are hit by a bizarre fluctuation of energy, your head feels a little faint.

C: 仪式…难道成功了？望着眼前陡然出现的悬浮在半空中的物体，你感到有些不可思议。
E: Could it be... the ceremony is a success? You find it hard to believe as you look at the object that has suddenly appeared before you, suspended in midair.

C: 我就是路过的。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: 好…我的女儿波瑟芬妮，半年前跟随女婿哈德斯的探险队一起出城调查，至今未归。
E: Fine... My daughter Possephone left town about six months ago with her husband — Hadez — and an expedition team, and they have yet to return.

C: 暂时没有了。
E: Not for now.

C: 不仅如此，从去年开始的「劣质物资」事件，恐怕都和他脱不开关系。
E: That's not all. The cases of the "dodgy supplies" that have been going on since last year are probably connected to him.

C: 手绘陶罐，奇珍古玩，价格不贵，随便看随便瞧。
E: Hand-painted pots and ancient artifacts, all at reasonable prices. Feel free to take a look around.

C: 听。
E: Okay.

C: 长大以后，我要不要当个歌手呢？吟游诗人似乎也不错……
E: Should I become a singer when I grow up? Being a bard seems pretty cool, too...

C: 过得还好吗？
E: How are you managing?

C: 什——真、真的吗？如果可以的话…不行，还是算了吧，太危险了。
E: What— You mean it? I mean... No, that's asking too much. It's too risky.

C: …可恶，它离开了…少了阿塔卡玛姐姐，战线已经在逐渐崩溃了……
E: They've vanished... Without you, Artakama, our defenses crumble... We can't hold...

C: 你记得自己「阅读」过这段回忆：在汹涌黑潮与无尽的怪物来袭之际，老人只身守在友爱之馆，从容而悲壮，试图以书籍的力量对抗塞纳托斯的呼唤。
E: You recall "reading" this memory: When the raging black tide and its countless monsters came, the old man guarded the Library of Philia all alone, noble yet doomed as he attempted to use the might of books against Thanatos' beckoning.

C: 黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。
E: The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.

C: 嗯，是这样的。在治疗那位来自树庭的伤者时，我发现了一封信，似乎是某位学者给妻子的家书。
E: Well, you see. During my treatment of a wounded from the Grove, I found a letter that appeared to be from a scholar to his wife.

C: 你说这玩意，它的功效真的有广告上这么神奇？
E: Speaking of this thing — is it really as miraculous as they say in the ad?

C: 机组已经没办法修了，所以我找公司那边定损了，现在申请了一批新设备。您老先休息几天，等机组换新吧。
E: The part can no longer be repaired, so I went to the IPC and applied for a replacement batch. You should rest up a few days and wait for the replacement to come.

C: 体检的请到我这里登记。
E: Please come over here and register for your medical examination.

C: 听起来还蛮危险的。
E: Sounds pretty dangerous.

C: 尽管听不懂大地兽的语言，但你似乎感受到了它对你的不屑…希望这是你的错觉。
E: Although you don't understand the dromas's language, you seem to feel its disdain towards you... hopefully, that's just your imagination.

C: …嗡嗡！
E: ...Grumph!

C: 既然…我们都将科可波阁下视作殿下的化身，离开了大地兽的帮助，你也难以抵达悬锋城，不如…未来的路，就交由它来决定吧。
E: Since we all regard Kokopo as His Highness's embodiment, you won't reach Castrum Kremnos without its help. Perhaps... let it decide the path ahead.

C: 没人能告诉我为什么！我好恨！我好恨啊！
E: No one can tell me why! I hate it! I hate it so much!

C: 「我」那时应该神志不清，被仇恨蒙蔽了双眼，内心扭曲，一心想要反抗神明，对吗？
E: By that point, "I" should be deranged, blinded by hatred, twisted inside, and intent on defying them, correct?

C: 忒斯庇斯，你负全责。
E: Thespis, the full responsibility is yours.

C: 试着用诡计迷惑他。
E: Try confusing him with a trick.

C: 这种感觉还是不要体验了。
E: I'd rather not experience that feeling.

C: 至少还有两波黑潮即将来袭，去救下难民，赢得你们渴求的荣耀吧，千万小心。
E: At least two more waves of the black tide are approaching. Go rescue the refugees and claim the glory you seek, but be extremely careful.

C: 呃，这只是二楼啊！你这个样子，以后怎么站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点？
E: Uh, this is just the second floor! With you acting like this, how are you ever going to reach the top of the Okhema marketplace?

C: 交给柯库翁。
E: Leave it to Glykon.

C: 找个话题试探一下。
E: Find a topic to use as a probe for information.

C: 这回她终于要正面出击了吗…真叫人兴奋哪！
E: Is she finally going to make her move... This is so exciting!

C: 告白…？
E: A confession...?

C: 不愧是蜜酿的泰坦…
E: Yep, that's the Titan of Honey Brew alright...

C: 瓶身色彩斑斓，味道千变万化——啊，上等的果昔。
E: A riot of color on the bottle, and an ever-shifting taste inside— Ah, now that's a fine fruit smoothie.

C: …无论是手机，还是那孩子的相机，虽然都能够记录当下的景色，但那到底与我们人眼所见是大有不同的。
E: Phones and cameras capture great beauty, but it never compares to what we see with our own eyes.

C: 哼哼，鼹鼠党的全新路线——星穹列车，开启！
E: Hehe, Hook hereby declares the Astral Express The Moles' newest adventure route!

C: 帕、帕姆不能一起大冒险了，呜呜……
E: P—Pom-Pom can't come adventuring with us... *whimper*

C: 列车好漂亮呀！
E: The Express is so pretty!

C: 这是什么？
E: What is it?

C: 不过，如果我为了听音乐专程来一次星穹列车，你们会介意么？
E: ...would you mind if I made a trip to the Astral Express one time, just to listen to music?

C: 渴望冒险的热血男儿。
E: A child at heart who loves adventures.

C: 《疯狂列车》？
E: The Hype Train?

C: 谢谢你的建议！有了这个点子，得让我好好斟酌一下……
E: Anyway, thanks for the suggestions! They all have something about them. I'll have to think about it...

C: 没想到我在你眼里就是这种形象，早知道就不给你带礼物了……
E: Hmph! Didn't think you'd accuse me of goofing off... Never mind the GIFT I got for you then...

C: 刚才与姬子小姐及瓦尔特先生聊了会儿天，学到了许多有趣的事物。
E: I just had quite an interesting conversation with Himeko and Mr. Yang.

C: 是黑塔的奇物收藏地啊……
E: Herta's Curio collection...

C: 据说她是以利亚萨拉斯之后，第一个愿意和世人分享才华的俱乐部天才。
E: Prior to her, they say that the last member of the Genius Society who was willing to showcase their talents was Elias Salas.

C: 前者可以靠练习，后者就得看天赋。直觉告诉我，今天观景车厢的运势流向很不错，确认取消三次后转动扭蛋，就是命中目标的最佳时机。
E: The former can be acquired through practice, but the latter depends on talent. The flow of luck in the Parlor Car is very favorable today. The best strategy is to pull for the desired target after confirming and canceling three times in a row.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，收下这些吧。这是我代表天舶司赠与你的谢礼，希望你能够善加利用。
E: So... thank you, {NICKNAME}. Take these. On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I'd like to offer you this gift of thanks. I hope you can put them to good use.

C: 那可不行，你们再这样优哉游哉下去，肯定走不了了。
E: This won't do — you guys need to stop waltzing around and get us out of here!

C: 哎呀，别客气，拿着吧。
E: Ah! Don't be so polite, take them!

C: 至于你说的那家伙啊…如果说呜呜伯们是一个大家庭的话，它就是当之无愧的家长。
E: As for the one you mentioned... If Wubbaboos are one big family, then such an individual would definitely be the parent.

C: 虽然我知道，空间站近日人心惶惶，每个人对于这场入侵，都有不一样的看法。
E: I know that everyone on the space station is concerned these days and all hold different views regarding the invasion.

C: 啊呀，你来了呀？
E: Aha, it's you!

C: 而且，姬子小姐见我这么喜欢，还分了一大把咖啡豆给我——甚至还有一台咖啡机！真是弄得我怪不好意思的……
E: Himeko gave me a big handful of coffee beans when she saw how much I liked it — and then she gave me a coffee machine! It's a bit embarrassing, hehe.

C: 其实不是这样的。和哥哥姐姐聊天，要顾虑的反而才比较多。
E: Not really. It's not always easy to talk to my brother and sister.

C: 偷偷告诉你哦，我觉得拒绝很明智。
E: Just between you and me, I think declining the offers was a smart choice.

C: 但是「镰叶紫菀草」的叶片其实含有剧烈的神经毒素，假如有动物循着味道来到它的面前，然后咬上一口它的叶片……
E: The bad side is that Aster leaves actually contain an extremely strong neurotoxin. If an animal were to find one by following its scent and take a bite of it...

C: （委屈的声音）
E: (Dissatisfied noises)

C: …我还什么都没说……
E: I didn't even finish what I was saying...

C: 你能做到的，布洛妮娅…你一定可以……
E: You can do this, Bronya... You can do this...

C: 等到我们真的有时间停下来休息了，再坐下来一起思考和星星有关的事吧。
E: I guess once things settle down, I can spare a moment to contemplate the stars.

C: 星穹列车又气派又安静，只是在观景车厢待了一会，我就感觉到了安心感，这里真好啊。
E: The Astral Express is so peaceful and majestic. I've only been in the Parlor Car a few moments, and I already feel calmer. This place is the best!

C: 列车组…与天才俱乐部？
E: The Crew and... the Genius Society?

C: 蠢材之所以为蠢材，正是因为无法自知。希望你不要变成那样。
E: What defines a fool is the inability to recognize their own shortcomings. Don't let that be you.

C: 是一直在车厢内巡逻检查、耳朵很长的那位么…能够将庞大的星穹列车打理得井井有条，太令人佩服了！
E: Ah, the one with the long ears always walking around the cars? It's amazing they keep everything on the Express so well-organized!

C: 我的音乐品味挺好的吧？
E: How's my taste in music? Pretty good, right?

C: 咳咳，咳咳咳！！
E: *cough* *cough* *cough*

C: 如果眼泪值钱，我肯定能靠他们成为银河首富！
E: If tears were worth money, I could depend on them to become the richest person in the Cosmos!

C: …好吧，看你这个表情是不会相信我的…没事，我可以明天再来问你一遍！
E: ...All right, looks like you don't believe me... That's fine, I'll ask you again tomorrow!

C: 我看到窗外有一些游离的记忆碎片，打算把它们「打捞」上来。
E: I saw some memory fragments drifting outside the window, and I intend to salvage them.

C: 谢谢大家的理解。我打算即刻出发，下一次的礼物，我向各位保证：一定不会辜负「纯美」盛名，出现任何纰漏。
E: Thank you all for your understanding. Now, I must take my leave. For my next gift, I promise you this: I will not fail the good name of Beauty.

C: 那现在呢？
E: What about now?

C: *意义不明的欢快叫声*
E: *Unintelligible squeals of joy*

C: 啊？你是牛油菠萝包吗？我闻到你身上的味道了……
E: Huh? Are you Pineapple Bun? I can smell you from here...

C: 我们有三名…伤口倒是有六个……
E: There's three of us... But six wounds...

C: …我是在照镜子吗？你走两步我看看。
E: ...Am I looking in the mirror right now? Step back a bit and give me a proper look.

C: 「定制化的绿色生活。」广告机无声地展示着绿色食品广告，它的音响似乎还未修复。
E: "Customize your eco-friendly lifestyle!" An advertisement for an environmental-friendly food product is silently displayed on the advertising bot. Its audio system has yet to be fixed.

C: 所谓君子之交淡如水…
E: As the saying goes: A hedge between keeps friendship green...

C: 不行，不行，他太奇怪了！
E: No, no. I can't do it. He's so weird!

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 一定是你的错觉。
E: You must be mistaken.

C: 贝洛伯格有哪些动物？
E: What creatures are there in Belobog?

C: …咳，辛苦你了，这封信就交给我处理吧。
E: ...Ahem, thanks for doing this. I'll take care of this letter.

C: 的确废话很多。
E: Yes, a lot of unnecessary details.

C: 希望我的连篇累牍也能像今天的解释一样清楚……
E: I hope my long articles can be as clear as the explanation today...

C: 而且，大守护者的购房新政听说过没有，你去打听打听，绝不会有假的，白纸黑字清清楚楚。
E: Even if you don't trust me, surely you have at least heard about the Supreme Guardian's new housing bill? Go ask around and see it for yourself.

C: 啊，大宇宙…我毕生的研究，我伟大的创造！这个理论起源于前年，那时我正在吃饭，一道电光突然窜进我的脑海！我当时就知道，这是当代最重要的发现！
E: Ah yes, big universe... my life work, my child! It all started two years ago when I was struck by this wonderful idea while having a meal. I knew from the very beginning that this is going to be the biggest discovery of our time!

C: 哈哈，那我就会被永远钉在文学史的耻辱柱上…「亚诺是谁？他怎么好意思打着《雪国冒险奇谭》的名义写这种垃圾？」
E: Hah! I'll become a laughingstock in the history of literature if I do that. "Who's this Amo? How dare he write this rubbish and claim to be writing Tale of the Winterlands?"

C: 「和声之间有某种奇妙反应～我知道我还年轻～噢～但我确定他就是我的唯一～」
E: I can feel something deep in the harmony... I know I'm still young, but I'm sure he's the one... la la la...

C: 再见！以后也常来玩呀。
E: Goodbye! Don't be a stranger!

C: 你说得对，但我真的不敢想象自己放弃这一切之后，事情还会变成什么样。难道我要看着这贝洛伯格就这么一天天地烂下去吗？
E: You're right, but I don't dare to imagine how things would change if I give up everything. Am I really going to stand here and watch Belobog get worse by the day?

C: …桑博？你上当了！那不过是他的化名。这说明…你已经是「深蓝骗局」的受害者了！
E: ... Sampo? You've been scammed! That's just an alias. That means... you're a victim of the Dark-Blue Scam!

C: 你是在夸我吗？我就当是吧。
E: Are you praising me? I'll assume you are.

C: 总之，我们一定要找到那个蓝毛骗子，刻不容缓！
E: The point is, we simply must find that blue-haired swindler. We cannot tolerate such criminal activity!

C: 不过有些书的内容真的称得上是粗制滥造…我怀疑是出版社内部有编辑在偷懒。要我说，我这可是在帮读者一个大忙！
E: There's some content out there that tells me a publisher is churning out books without any regard to quality... I suspect that the publisher has a lazy editor. From my perspective, I'm doing the reader a solid!

C: 没什么事，那我就不打扰你了。
E: That's about it. I will leave you to your work.

C: 好不容易回到地面上，我可不希望一切都泡了汤。
E: We worked hard to make it back up to the surface, I don't want it to all be for nothing.

C: 只要客源不断，收入自然有保障。哈，你不会真以为我只是个卖门票的吧？光靠卖票赚的那点钱够干什么？
E: As long as we have a constant flow of customers, income is guaranteed. Hah, do you really think that all I do is sell tickets? What could I do with the tiny bit of money I make from tickets?

C: 要我说，人就该丢掉那些不切实际的欲望，回归自然，回归地底……
E: If you ask me, humans should just abandon those unrealistic desires and return to nature... return to the underground...

C: 桑博都和你聊什么商业机密了？
E: What business secrets did Sampo say to you?

C: 你就这么把机密交代了？
E: You're revealing your secret like that?

C: …啊！说漏嘴了！
E: Oops! I revealed myself.

C: 我明白了。
E: I understand.

C: 交到我手里之后呢，就轮到我进行鉴定了。鉴定过后，我会给出相关功能说明和价格参考。
E: After it is handed over to me, I will start to evaluate it. After the appraisal, I will tell them the relevant functions and a price reference.

C: 这个说起来可有点复杂。大部分尺寸比较小的物件结构也相对简单，只要简单参考些资料，那就能对它的功能构造略知一二了。
E: It's a bit complicated. Most smaller items have relatively simple structures. You can find out its function structure by referring to respective documents.

C: 拆解？
E: Disassemble?

C: 说到这个——你们要是有机会去歌德大饭店的话，可一定要尝尝他们家的铁罐焖螈肉。
E: Speaking of which, make sure you try the Iron Pot Braised Olm at the Goethe Grand Hotel.

C: 希儿不在吗？
E: Is Seele here?

C: 下层区的状况如何？
E: How are things down in the Underworld?

C: 老实说，你们带来胜利的消息以后，我的第一反应就是…「地火」这些年来的任务终于结束了。
E: To be honest, after you brought news of the victory, my first reaction was... Wildfire's mission after all these years is finally over.

C: 下次见，娜塔莎。
E: So long, Natasha.

C: 啊，难不成你下定决心要做我的助手了？欢迎欢迎～
E: Ah, so you've made up your mind about becoming my assistant, then? Welcome!

C: 当然咯～这贝洛伯格可没有我修不好的东西。
E: Of course! There's nothing in Belobog that I can't fix.

C: 挺好的，那祝你早日回家。
E: That's good then. I wish you a speedy return to your homelands.

C: 好啊，你想聊点什么？
E: Alright, what would you like to chat about?

C: 你们乐队就三个人？
E: There were only three of you in the band?

C: …也许是这样吧。只要能看到她能恢复平日里坦率洒脱的模样，我也就放心了。
E: ...Perhaps so. It heartens me to see her go back to her usual carefree self.

C: 暂时假定结果为——来自不同位面的干涉。
E: Tentative hypothetical result — Disruption from another plane.

C: 我向你表示感谢，{NICKNAME}。
E: You have my appreciation, {NICKNAME}.

C: 随着贝洛伯格逐渐对外开放，我的算力会显得愈发局限。在「变量」不断增多的情况下，这里的人类将面临更加复杂的挑战。
E: With Belobog gradually opening up to the world, my computational power will seem ever more limited. With the increasing number of variables, the humans here will face more and more complicated challenges.

C: 她自顾自忧愁，想着现状有多糟糕
E: Fixating, hating, these problems never really abating

C: 哟。
E: Yo.

C: 痛断肠，因为自由是{F#她}{M#他}的向往
E: A broken heart, 'cos freedom keeps {F#her}{M#him} going

C: 有新歌吗？
E: Any new tracks?

C: 我觉得这算不上什么，跟你们为贝洛伯格做的事比起来，实在不值一提！
E: Ah, don't mention it! It's nothing compared to what you've done for Belobog!

C: 那些是竞技场的公共设施，一开始就在这里。放心坐吧，它不收费。
E: They're part of the public facilities in the arena and had been since its installation. Feel free to take a break there for free.

C: 小熊发出有些殷切的叫声，挥动起又短又圆的前肢，似乎希望你能帮它做些什么。
E: The little bear cub calls out to you eagerly, flapping its short and round limbs. It seems as if it's asking you for help.

C: 该如何跟一位年迈的雪人打招呼？
E: How should you greet an old snowman?

C: 你从兜里掏出一大颗榛子，看上去就很脆爽多汁……
E: You pull a large hazelnut from your pocket, it looks delicious...

C: 有一说一，确实…大家都藏着掖着，肯定有问题……
E: For real, though, everyone is covering things up. There's definitely something fishy going on...

C: 他和我说，克里珀堡最近计划精简驾考流程，如果没考驾照的话可以先等等。
E: He told me that Qlipoth Fort planned on streamlining their driver's licensing program. So if you don't have a license right now, you should wait.

C: 我不记得了……
E: I don't remember...

C: 是啊是啊！
E: Yeah. Yeah!

C: 克拉拉小姐又送来了物资。
E: Miss Clara had sent over some more supplies.

C: 精选蚯蚓干脆片！
E: Curated dried earthworm chips!

C: 二百七，不能再低了。
E: Two hundred and seventy, and nothing less.

C: 你好，{NICKNAME}。欢迎来到友好的机械聚落。在聚落内，无论对人或机器都请保持文明友善的态度，拒绝打架斗殴等行为。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. Welcome to the friendly Robot Settlement. All humans and machines must remain civil and friendly in the settlement. Fighting is strictly prohibited.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。能在诊所之外碰到你，还怪让人不习惯的呢。
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Meeting you outside of the context of my clinic is a bit hard to get used to.

C: 哔嘟…我是「家用寻物仪『理查德』•版本<unbreak>0.63</unbreak>•专家型•年度豪华版」，昵称「查宝」！
E: Beep, beep, beep... I am Richard, the Home-Use Object Finder. Model information: Version <unbreak>0.63</unbreak>, Professional model, Annual Deluxe package. Nickname: "Findie"!

C: 老板您下次再来，要是运势不好，小店是可以帮您转运的。
E: Come back again, esteemed customer. If you're down on your luck, I'll be here to help you turn it around.

C: 咱们持明一族历来讲究一个道法自然。万物相生相克、生长不息。所以基于这种原理，如果一个动物无法与咱公平对决，咱也不会以它为食！这就是咱的武道！
E: We Vidyadhara have always observed the law of natural flow. All creatures are connected to one another, and life is everlasting in its cycle. Based on this principle, if an animal can't defeat me on even ground, I'd never use it as food! That is my martial way!

C: 我遇到的每个伊须磨洲人谈起那片伟大的遗迹时，都两眼冒光，说那是他们文明的图腾，记录着一个伟大民族的伟大历程……
E: Every Insumousu local I met lit up in excitement whenever they mentioned that great ruin. They tell me how it's a totem for their civilization, one that records the noble histories of their great people...

C: 根本没有人会在乎一朵蘑菇的感受。
E: Nobody cares about how a mushroom feels.

C: 噢。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, I'm so sad.

C: 我说，你有没有想过银河中已经存在类似的东西了。比如说，某个叫朋克洛德的星球？
E: I'm telling you, have you ever considered that something like this already exists out there in the cosmos? Like, on a planet called Punklorde?

C: 我还有事，下次再来。
E: I still have something to do, so I'll come back another time.

C: 只可惜，最近已有些日子没再见到他了。他究竟去了哪里？莫不是找到了比我更好的对手？我可太愁了……
E: But it's a real pity... I haven't seen him the past few days. Where could he have gotten to? Don't tell me he found a better rival than me? I'm so sad...

C: 看你这打扮，破破烂烂的，不像是仙舟人啊。
E: Looking at the rags you're wearing, I can tell you're not a Xianzhou native.

C: 哎…算了，你说吧。
E: *sigh* ...Fine, go on.

C: 那勤务是做什么的？
E: What do orderlies do, then?

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 呃，什么乱七八糟的……
E: Huh, what kind of...

C: 你知道建木不再生发的事了吗？
E: Do you know that the Ambrosial Arbor no longer sprouts?

C: 可怜的彦卿，从此就特别害怕老鼠。为了保护自己的颜面，他从此就谎称自己是一个年幼的仙舟人，绝口不提自己持明的身份。
E: Poor Yanqing, he's been afraid of rats since then. To protect his own image, he kept his true lineage a secret, claiming to be a young Xianzhou native.

C: 你和我教的那群年轻人不一样的，你有活力，你会去尽可能完成那些你该完成的东西，因为你知道老之将至……
E: You're different from the kids I teach. You have energy, and you put all your effort into completing your goals because you understand that age has a way of creeping up on you...

C: 这种认知的差异，对老夫来说是千年来的常识，太过理所当然以至于很难跟你解释…但老夫觉得，这是因为我们活得太长了。
E: This cognitive difference is only natural from our long-life species' perspective, and of course it's simply impossible for me to explain all this to you... But I think it's actually because we have been living for far too long now.

C: 说是「客观因素」，其实归根结底就是…百万书吏衣食所系。嘿嘿，您懂的。
E: Well, we say "objective factors," but the ultimate factor is.... well, these countless files also feed lots of hungry mouths, if you know what I mean, hehe.

C: 不过现在还是上班时间，请不要耽误其他人正常咨询。
E: But I'm afraid it's currently during business hours, so please do not interrupt our everyday consultations.

C: 我当然也会干活嘛，有些居民的猫猫狗狗、金人偃偶、或者是家用机巧走丢了的话，就轮到我上场了。我会申请外勤，然后到茶馆里去询问调查。
E: Of course I get some work done. Residents with lost cats, dogs, aurumaton puppets, or missing household ingenia — that's my wheelhouse. I would apply for field work, and then check out the teahouse to investigate.

C: 我的国家啊…克里姆特立宪国，一个很好的国家…咳咳…我们有广袤的疆域、高效的行政系统、清廉的官员、正直的人民……
E: My homeland... The Klimt Republic is a great nation... *cough*... We have a vast territory, an efficient government, honest officials, and upstanding people...

C: 其实吧，要我说，我从来没有把他当成一回事。
E: Honestly, if you ask me, I've never taken him seriously.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 一个时辰后
E: One dual-hour later.

C: 女孩左右顾盼，见四下无人，把脸转向你，满眼兴奋。
E: The girl looked around. After making sure the coast was clear, she turned to you, her eyes filled with excitement.

C: 跟我聊聊？行啊，你有什么想知道的尽管问便是了。但我丑话说在前头，太卜司的事我了解的不多，你若是想打探什么消息，那还是请回吧。
E: A chat? With me? Alright, let me know if there's anything in particular you'd like to ask. But let me state up front. I don't know much about the Divination Commission, so if you're after intel, I'll stop you right there.

C: 家家都有本难念的经。
E: Every family has their own difficulties.

C: 大人请慢走。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 欢迎光临，我们这里没有什么祖传秘方，只有常用的药和好用的药。
E: Welcome, welcome. We don't have any secret home recipes here. Just your everyday medicines and easy-to-use remedies.

C: 兼职这种事，应该很常见吧？
E: Never seen someone work part-time jobs before?

C: 让我看看你这有什么？
E: Let me see what you have.

C: 我怎么了…唉，这可就说来话长了……
E: What's wrong? Well... It's a long story.

C: 结果过了二百多年，我都做了医士了，这丹鼎司还是涛声依旧，看上去没什么衰败的苗头。
E: Two hundred years later, I became a healer, and the Alchemy Commission was still busy as ever, showing no signs of going downhill.

C: 一回来连个认识的人都没见到，就莫名其妙地升职成丹士长了，哎……
E: I didn't even get to meet anyone I knew when I got back, and I just got promoted to chief alchemist all of a sudden. *Sigh*...

C: 我已经搞清楚问题出在哪了，只要稍微改良下方法。先这样，然后再那样…下次一定可以成功！
E: I have already ascertained where the problem was. I just need to slightly amend my approach... First I do this, then this, then this... I know I'll make it next time!

C: 不过我还得适当地批评一下他们，他们那些匠人老在外面传「太卜司工作清闲、喝喝茶水一天就过了」……
E: Still, I must criticize them for telling everyone that working in the Divination Commission is a breeze, and we spend most of the time enjoying snacks...

C: 虽然这一次的结果没能达成「完全自主经营」的目的，但这个结果也算是被上层意料到了。得失不在一城一池，真正的战斗还在未来。
E: While we failed to achieve absolute commercial autonomy here this time, the result was not necessarily a surprise for the higher-ups. Having a lost a battle doesn't mean we've lost the war. The real contest lies in the future.

C: {F#小老~妹}{M#小老~弟}挺会说话，跟我第一次见面就说我好看，我只能说你太过虚——伪了呀，无意冒犯，我也是一个虚伪的人。
E: A honey-tongued {F#lass}{M#lad}, aren't you? This is the first time we've met and you're already saying I look good. What a HYPOCRITE. No offense though. I'm a hypocrite, too.

C: 你知道的，我只能描述我目所能及的感受。
E: As you know, I can only describe what I can experience as far as my eyes can see.

C: 小秘书不会一直待在这吧？
E: You're not standing here all the time, are you?

C: 还有你帮我找来的评书相声，也颇受欢迎。有些客人原本不是来吃小吃的，就是被店里的相声勾住了，只好坐下也买些小吃，生意更好做了。
E: The storytelling and crosstalk comedy sessions you arranged for me are well-received too. Some people sit down and order something to eat just because they are drawn to the performances. That makes our business even better.

C: 我不是来修东西的。
E: I didn't come to fix anything.

C: 客官好！我这「清玩斋」小本经营，童叟无欺！店里都是我精心准备的文玩物什，
E: Welcome to my Elegance Pagoda, dear customer! All the fandangles here are carefully prepared by myself.

C: 这文玩有什么特别之处吗？
E: What's so special about these fandangles?

C: 说来惭愧，这幽囚狱一直都是整个罗浮最安全的地方…在下平日里的工作非但谈不上危险，甚至可以说是无趣。
E: This is embarrassing to admit, but you could say that The Shackling Prison was the safest place in the Luofu all this time... Not only is my job in no way dangerous usually, but I even find the work somewhat dull and lifeless.

C: 哟，你没看过杂技吗？那可得来悠姐这里看看了。
E: Oh, you've never enjoyed an acrobatic show before? Then you should definitely watch one right here!

C: 我哪有那个荣幸被你抓啊？幽囚狱本质上是个熟人社会嘛，消息传播很快的。
E: I wish! Now that'd have been something to boast about. Everyone knows everyone in The Shackling Prison, so word travels fast around here.

C: 主要是因为在丹鼎司，正常研究实在太束手束脚了嘛！想要复现一些典籍中记录的生物技术和古代药方，得走层层审批～流程繁琐的要命～
E: Mainly because there were too many restrictions around conducting research at the Alchemy Commission. I had to navigate layers and layers of red tape just to replicate some biotech processes and ancient prescriptions recorded in tomes. It's so bureaucratic!

C: 但是我现在已经反省了！真的！我现在只想本本分分做生意，跟我兄弟阿合马和白鸟一起，把铁窗集团做大做强！
E: I've turned over a new leaf since, though... No, really! My only goal now is to be an honest businessman alongside Arma and Shiratori. We'll grow the Correctional Group into as large and powerful a business as we possibly can!

C: 不过说到底，人家的奇迹是人家自己争取来的，咱俩充其量算个推动力。可不能骄傲自满哦，嘿嘿～
E: Ultimately, the people brought about the miracle with their own efforts, and we two were at best the driving force behind it. Let's not be arrogant or complacent!

C: 没错，我整理起来可不容易哩！
E: That's right! It took me a lot of effort to do it!

C: 又见到你了呀，我忙得肚子都饿了，嘴巴馋，想来集市上买些吃的。
E: It's you again. I'm so busy that my stomach is rumbling, so here I am at the market to grab something to eat.

C: 可憎的有机体，记住：「我们」的战斗至死方休。
E: Never forget this, loathsome life form: Our fight is to the death.

C: 不过「万方有疾，患同己身」，医士的责任，不能担也得担啊。
E: Still, as the saying goes, "When the world suffers, one feels the pain within oneself." As a healer, I must fulfill my obligation.

C: （放声大笑）
E: *laughs out loud*

C: 我老家啊？说实话，印象不深了。很小的时候就逃出去了。现在那个星球，好像已经是个死寂世界了吧。
E: Originally? Honestly, I don't really remember, I ran away when I was little. I don't think there is life left on that planet anymore.

C: 不过，{NICKNAME}这样的身手真的需要我保护吗？
E: Although, do you really need my protection with your skills, {NICKNAME}?

C: 想打听一下十王司总部在哪？
E: I wanted to ask where the Ten-Lords Commission HQ is?

C: 「这刀剑无眼，当着云骑军众将士的面，我若是击杀打擂人，不合礼数，必然偿命。」大汉指着擂台上一尊陨铁靶人说道，「我就比谁的一剑更厉害！」
E: "The blade is blind. If I were to slay any challengers before the Cloud Knights, it does not fit decorum and I would be forfeiting my life." The man pointed to the meteoric alloy dummy in the ring and proclaimed, "Therefore, I want to see whose sword skill is the better!"

C: 我这人自怜自爱，因此必须跟他们划清界限，希望你理解。
E: I both pity and love my passion, which is why I must draw the line with these amateurs. I hope you understand.

C: 好些年没有回仙舟了，原来偷听的人都这么理直气壮吗？
E: I haven't returned to Xianzhou for some years. Do eavesdroppers now have no shame?

C: 你看他警告咱们了，别的故事有机会再讲给你听吧。
E: They're warning us already. I'll tell you about other stories when we get the chance.

C: 当这股筋肉场达到临界点，我便将开辟全新的筋肉命途，我将成为「筋肉祸祖」！
E: When this muscle gravitational field reaches its peak, I shall forge the Path of Brawn and become the Brawn Author!

C: 别客气，那我们聊点儿什么呢？
E: Don't be a stranger. What is it you want to talk about?

C: 好啊。很久很久以前，据说比神仙姐姐来之前还要久的时候，咱们村紧挨的赤泉山里据说住着一头叫「山君」的妖孽。
E: Sure. A long long long time ago, even before the celestial lady got here, the Redspring Peak next to my village had a demon called the Mountain Lord.

C: 乡亲们都在那家伙的压迫下，过了很久的苦日子。后来嘛……
E: The villagers suffered for a long time under that demon. And then...

C: 不仅如此，据说周大善人母鸡和大黄狗偷吃了那丹药，都变成了会说话的灵兽，也活了好多好多年！
E: Not just that, people say that Kind Zhou's chickens and dog stole the pellet, and became divine beasts that could talk. They even lived for many many years!

C: 您路上小心。请记住我们的口号，「鹤运速递，啥都能寄」。
E: Be careful out there, and remember — our slogan is "Heron Express — We Mail Anything."

C: 我最近在想，要不然开个讲座，专门给大家普及交通安全知识怎么样？
E: I've been thinking — how about I give a professional lecture about traffic safety for the public?

C: 接下来？就和现在一样吧，做一些鸡零狗碎的工作，然后就是等待吧，我感觉这长生之谜就是纸团里的火，是包不住的……
E: Next? No different from now, I guess. Doing menial jobs, and just waiting. I feel that this puzzle to immortality is like trying to contain fire with paper — it can't be kept under wraps forever...

C: 现在还不行。
E: Not right now.

C: 知道自己做得不对就赶紧放下吧。哎，现在的孩子真是没规没矩的。
E: You'd better put that down now if you know it's wrong. *sigh* Kids these days... unruly.

C: 简单来说，我主要负责向商会通知天舶司的命令、向天舶司请示商会的要求。
E: Simply put, I'm in charge of relaying orders from the Sky-Faring Commission to the guilds, and passing guild requests back.

C: 关于停云…
E: About Tingyun...

C: 为了「存护」的事业，仙舟人理应无偿提供这里的一切技术。我已经说得足够委婉了，他们竟然嘲笑我！
E: Xianzhou should be contributing every technology they have to the cause of Preservation. I was already being subtle, and yet they mock me!

C: 我不会是进入什么黑名单了吧。不应该吧，怎么软件上只有男性飞行士可选了呢？
E: I can't be banned, can I? But how do you explain that they only let me pick from the male pilots when I try to book a flight?

C: 那也请放心，我的服务价格透明，不满意可全额退款。
E: But you can still rest assured that my prices are completely transparent and fully refundable if you are dissatisfied with my service.

C: 不花钱看比赛才叫逃票，可我是收费的啊。既然你都花钱了，那就不能叫逃票。
E: Fare dodging is only if you watch the competition without paying. Since I charge a fee, and you've made payment, how can that be considered fare dodging?

C: 慢走，有需要随时找我。
E: See you. You can look for me any time you need something.

C: 你下不了手你这人还怪好嘞。
E: You can't do it? What a nice person.

C: 你把被拖的写进去了！
E: You wrote down what needs towing away!

C: 你看见悠闲的天舶司职员暗中记下了对方的名字。
E: You see the leisurely Sky-Faring Commission staff jotting down the others' names in secret.

C: 新出厂的这艘货运星槎该起什么名字呢…你在学宫是学文学的吧？你出个主意？
E: What name should be given to this new freight starskiff... Didn't you take literature lessons back at school? Got any ideas?

C: 就值<unbreak>27</unbreak>镝。
E: They were worth just <unbreak>27</unbreak> strales.

C: 好的，祝您在竞锋舰一切顺遂！那句话怎么说的，啊，「祝你宝剑常锋」！
E: Okay, please have a smooth voyage aboard the Skysplitter! How does that line go... Ah, may your sword be ever-sharp!

C: 一天工作四十二小时！
E: He works <unbreak>42</unbreak> hours a day!

C: 说了等于没说啊。
E: That's not helping.

C: 对不起，我不接受任何性质的比武。我的无限制格斗门只会用于暴徒、歹徒，绝对不会对武林中人出手。
E: Sorry, I don't engage in any form of competitive combat. My Lawless Brawler arts are only for thugs and villains, never for martial artists.

C: 我曾经有个弟子被<unbreak>12</unbreak>名星际海盗围攻，用了我的「无限制格斗」的技法，不仅毫发无损，还当场击毙一名海盗，最后被定性为正当防卫。
E: One of my disciples was once surrounded by twelve interstellar pirates. By using my "Lawless Brawler Style" technique, not only did he emerge unscathed, but he also fatally wounded a pirate on the spot. Eventually, it was ruled as justifiable self-defense.

C: 他们那群人啊，恨我恨得是牙痒痒。还说什么，「无限制格斗不讲武德，一点都不雅观，是在丢咱们仙舟武学的脸！」
E: Those folks really hate me to the core. They even say, "Lawless Brawl" has no honor, it's undignified and embarrassing our Xianzhou martial arts!

C: 暂时还不感兴趣。
E: Currently uninterested.

C: 想来，这是我的特权吧，哈哈哈哈。
E: Come to think of it, this is a real privilege of mine. Haha!

C: 不允许你质疑我的资格，我的宿敌。
E: I won't permit you to cast aspersions on my credentials, my nemesis.

C: 喂，你，人类，你还记得我不？
E: Hello there, you, human. Do you still remember me?

C: 嗯。
E: Yup.

C: 不得不承认，岁阳固然能随心幻化，但相比人类的金钱置换物质的奇妙力量，还是稍逊一筹。
E: I have to admit that, despite heliobi being able to create illusions at will, such powers are still slightly inferior to the miraculous human ability to exchange currency for possessions.

C: 我曾经帮助一名身患绝症的销售成功卖出了他们世界的太阳，治好了他所在世界的科技绝不可能治好的顽疾。
E: I once helped a terminally-ill salesman sell off his planet's sun to cure his disease, which was absolutely incurable within the technological limitations of his own world.

C: 我收到了三月七给我的照片。
E: I received the photo from March 7th.

C: 你好坏啊，你这种不听话又霸道的{F#女人}{M#男人}最对我的胃口了。
E: You're so bad! A {F#woman}{M#man} as sassy and incorrigible like you has me absolutely smitten.

C: 我太骄傲了。
E: I'm overly smug.

C: 你的武功是从哪学来的？
E: Where did you learn your martial arts?

C: 这就是联盟委派妾身做罗浮司鼎的原因。有人负责治疗病人，有人负责治疗丹鼎司，所以你明白了吗？妾身的主治范围，稍微有些不同呢。
E: That was why the Alliance made me the Luofu's Cauldron Master. Some have a duty to treat the illnesses of people, and some have a duty to cure the illnesses within the Alchemy Commission. So, do you see? The area of my healing expertise is slightly different.

C: 今日运势无咎，放心去做想做的事吧。
E: You have nothing to watch out for today. Be free to do whatever you desire.

C: 没错！我有话要对你说。
E: That's right! I have something to tell you.

C: 啊！我是多么地忧伤。
E: O, and how melancholic I am.

C: 好大——
E: Massive...

C: 有道理。
E: Fair enough.

C: 健身武术了解一下？
E: Interested in martial arts and fitness?

C: 不知道啊。
E: I have no idea.

C: 最精妙的设计是，只要轻轻一捏，它就能用小伊卡的声音唱歌哦！你听——嘟嘟嘟嘟，嘟~嘟~嘟嘟——
E: The most ingenious part of the design is that with just a gentle squeeze, it can sing in Little Ica's voice! Listen—Doot-doot-doot-doot, doot~doot~doot-doot—

C: 现在，请你就适当代入下我，我姐姐可以叫我宝宝，别人不可以。
E: Now, try to put yourself in my shoes. My sister can call me "baby," but no one else can.

C: 如今这个世界不缺本应灭绝的生物，食材丰富了许多。对任何热衷烹饪的人来说，都称得上是足够有趣。
E: These days, the world is full of creatures that should have gone extinct, which has greatly enriched our ingredients. It's quite fascinating for anyone passionate about cooking.

C: 脸颊…有点痒痒的……
E: My cheeks... itch a little...

C: 现在，这个夙愿算是实现了大半吧。新生的翁法罗斯，定将迎来更有温度的律法。
E: Now, this long-cherished wish has largely come true. The reborn Amphoreus will surely embrace laws with more warmth and humanity.

C: 关于我的爵位…
E: About my peerage title...

C: 说来有些可笑，恍惚间，我还是会怀疑这是不是一场梦…在麦田里醒来后，是不是又得面对一场漫无尽头的旅程？
E: It's almost laughable... Sometimes in a daze, I still wonder if this is all just a dream... After waking up in that wheat field, will I have to face another endless journey?

C: 现在，我没有继续愁眉苦脸的理由了。是时候翻开新的一页了！
E: Now, I have no reason to keep moping around. It's time to get a fresh start!

C: 你就好好锻炼筋肉，努力长大，等长大后才能成为山之民的好帮手。
E: Just keep working on those muscles and grow up strong. Once you're all grown up, you can become a reliable helper to the Mountain Dwellers.

C: 现在，我只想做一个尽职尽责的大地兽饲养员。把你照顾好，还要把这些小家伙洗刷喂养大。
E: Right now, I just want to be a dedicated dromas caretaker to take good care of you and raise these little ones by washing and feeding them.

C: 好，看来我也不得不慎重对待，拿出些真本事了。
E: Very well. Seems I'll have to get serious and show you what I'm capable of.

C: 为了赢，你愿意牺牲多少？这是在落子前，必须问自己的问题。
E: How much are you willing to sacrifice to win? That's the question you must ask yourself before making a move.

C: 休憩之时，不妨翻阅些棋谱典册，做好充分准备后再来吧。
E: Why not study some chess manuals during your break? Come back when you're well-prepared.

C: 是同登「仙道」还是「极乐」？
E: Is it attaining "immortality" or is it "Paramount Bliss"?

C: 这竞锋舰，感觉没有「晖长石号」好看。
E: This Skysplitter doesn't look nearly as good as the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 别说了，确实是他把我们弄进来的，结果还是得补票。
E: Tell me about it. He got us in, but we have to pay and make up for the ticket again.

C: 这得是有多大的暖炉啊！
E: You must have a huuuuge heater!

C: 咱俩打了两百多回。
E: We exchanged <unbreak>200</unbreak> blows.

C: 这罗浮菜也太辣了！
E: Luofu dishes are too spicy!

C: 请讲讲你的武术哲学！
E: Please tell me about your martial philosophy!

C: 镇守牢狱的青铜兽面怒目圆睁，俯视押送至此的罪囚。时常会有罪犯在这里吓破了胆，只能被冥差抬进幽囚狱。
E: The bronze beast that guards the Shackling Prison looks down in rage at the prisoners that have been escorted here. Occasionally, prisoners will be scared witless here and have to be carried into the Shackling Prison by the spiritfarers.

C: 我是～失控的木人桩！
E: I am~ An out-of-control wooden dummy!

C: 在一次次的最优解中，电子脑成功杀死了意识，从计算的傀儡成为了这具身体的主人。
E: After continuous optimization, the electronic brain successfully killed off the original consciousness and changed from being a puppet governed by calculations to the master of its own body.

C: 我是～毛发旺盛的囚犯！
E: I am~ A convict with extreme hair growth!

C: 按照常识来说，正在万丈高空上航行的舰船是不能容许有任何差错的。不过，任谁都会遐想「要是这艘船突然失去动力，云骑军究竟该如何空中大救援？」
E: Typically speaking, a ship flying at high altitude can't afford to make any mistakes. But, one can't help but think: "If this ship suddenly malfunctions, how exactly would the Cloud Knights mount a rescue?"

C: 「报告指挥中心！我们侧翼遭遇了敌军的偷袭！接下来该怎么做？船长？」
E: Report to command center! Enemy forces have attacked our flank! What are your next instructions? Captain?

C: 你上前一步，正要摸上纸盒的封条时，它突然爆发出一阵更剧烈的晃动，再也没有任何反应。
E: You take a step forward. Just as your hand is about to touch the tape on the package, the package starts shaking vigorously before it stops moving.

C: 那我铁布衫白练了。
E: I practiced my Ironhide skill for naught then.

C: 粉丝还真是多啊。
E: There are quite a number of fans!

C: 「禁止嬉水、游泳、沐浴、冥想（在瀑布下）、钓鱼（包括但不限于垂钓、捕捞、电鱼）——天舶司司辰宫司舵驭空。」
E: "Frolicking, swimming, bathing, meditating (at the waterfall), and fishing (including but not limited to using a fishing rod, a net, and an electrofishing machine) are strictly prohibited. — From Yukong, Palace of Astrum Helm Master of Sky-Faring Commission."

C: 它看起来是一盏灯，但其实是一朵花。使它发光的并非电力、湮灭效应、或者其他高深莫测的仙舟科技，而是水、阳光和一点点爱。
E: It might have an appearance of a lamp, but it is actually a flower. Its glow has nothing to do with electricity, the effects of annihilation, or other complicated Xianzhou technologies. Instead, it is the combination of water, sunlight, and a splash of love that does the magic.

C: 宣传画中语气十分客气，应该不会有正常人抗拒检查吧。
E: The sentence on the poster is written in a courteous tone. In normal circumstances, there shouldn't be anyone resisting the inspection.

C: 通常用于运输各种货物，但有时也会载着奇妙的人和事出现。
E: It is usually used to deliver goods, but it will sometimes carry special people and appear along with special events.

C: 存放展阅的立柜，空间利用率属实不高。
E: A cabinet used for storing flexible displays with a poor space utilization rate.

C: 「通过与博识学会的互助协议，仙舟联盟始终紧追科技发展的脚步，帮助受丰饶侵蚀的世界修复生态，重返昔日生机。」
E: "Through the mutual aid contract with the Intelligentsia Guild, the Xianzhou Alliance keeps abreast of the latest technological developments to help the worlds eroded by Abundance with their recovery and restoration."

C: 「朔雪在此长眠。忠骨带铜声。」
E: "This is the resting place of Snowmoon, whose loyalty will never be forgotten."

C: 谁在苏乐达里掺豆汁啊！
E: Who mixed mung bean juice into SoulGlad?

C: 我要提前毕业了！
E: I'm gonna graduate early!

C: 确实可疑，调查看看吧。
E: It really is suspicious. Check it out.

C: 一只被打开的快递盒，数字单据备注着「用于救助建木灾害中需要帮助的朋友」，然而旁边却又有手写大字「过期变质，已经处理」。
E: The digital bill on the opened courier package writes, "Donation for the victims of the disaster in Ambrosial Arbor." There is another handwritten phrase next to it that reads, "Expired and spoiled, disposed."

C: 你不禁有些担心…你走之后，接替你的新人能否胜任这项工作？她或者他能否像你一样在那个用编号与地址构成的迷宫中游刃有余地维系长乐天的运转？
E: You can't help worrying whether your successor can handle the job well after you leave. Can the newcomer find their way through the maze of serial numbers and addresses, and keep the Exalting Sanctum running like a well-oiled machine?

C: 我非得尝尝！
E: I have to taste it!

C: 「翻炒煸炸饕餮宴，功夫尽在尚滋味。」
E: "Stir-fried, fire-grilled, a veritable feast. Martial arts, culinary skills, all at Spices Supreme."

C: 眼前的快递箱上印着一个无情的红色邮戳，上书几个大字：「查无此地址，退件处理。」
E: The package before you is mercilessly stamped with a red print stating: "No such address found. Return to sender."

C: 「自打分手后，每当饭团冲着我叫，我都会想起你冲我大喊大叫的样子，它在我的心里留下了深深的伤害。」
E: "Every time Riceball barked at me after you and I broke up, it just reminds me of how you used to yell at me as well. These memories have left me in deep pain."

C: 原来你就是内鬼啊？
E: So you're the mole, huh?

C: 「做题」？
E: Homework?

C: 只工作不玩耍，聪明的孩子也变傻~
E: All work and no play make the smart child stupid...

C: 这块巨型钟表是盛会之星的地标之一。据说最早由钟表匠制造，后被家族改进为如今的模样。
E: This giant clock was a landmark of the Planet of Festivities. It is said that it was originally created by the Watchmaker and later enhanced into its current form by The Family.

C: 随机赠送饮品——如果店长心情好的话。
E: Receive a random drink — if the hotel manager is in a good mood.

C: 这辆推车上摆放着成捆的报纸，任游客们自行拿取——当心别挑中那些过期的。
E: This cart is filled with newspapers, free for grabs for tourists. Be careful not to pick the outdated ones.

C: 「在我之先，无物实存，唯不朽者不朽」
E: "Before me, there was nothing, apart from the immortal"

C: 一声枪响，随后是重物落地的声音。似乎是怕那囚犯还有口气，狱警又接着补了几枪。
E: A gunshot rings out, followed by a heavy thud. Probably afraid that the prisoner is still breathing, the warden adds a few more shots to finish the job.

C: 你想要尖叫、想要哀嚎，声音却随着血液与以太一同冻结，等待你的唯有静谧的死亡与深不见底的绝望……
E: You want to scream, to howl, but your voice is frozen with blood and ether, awaiting your serene death and unfathomable despair...

C: 被污染的梦境入口，如同一只从深渊中睁开的眼睛。
E: The tainted Dreamscape entrance, akin to an open eye in the abyss.

C: 「不要靠近那圈光环，否则你将失去自我。」一个声音在你耳边低语道。
E: "Don't get close to that light circle, or you'll lose yourself." A low voice rumbles beside your ear.

C: 你继续出杆——反正没人对局，想怎么打是你的自由。但这次力道似乎大了些，蓝球撞到了天花板上。你很疑惑，先前从未发现自己的臂力是如此地惊人。
E: You continue to bat, since no one's playing, and you're free to hit however you want. But this time you use too much force, causing the blue ball to hit the ceiling. You're puzzled — you never noticed you had such a strong arm before.

C: 它注视着你，笔直的身躯渐渐溶解于粘稠的忆质，眼底依旧迸射着怀疑一切的光。
E: It gazes at you, its solid form dissolving into the sticky memoria, and its eyes retaining a skeptical glow.

C: 你知道钟表匠吗？
E: Do you know the Watchmaker?

C: 智慧生命拥有的情绪细腻、珍贵，但多数人没有意识到它危险的一面。世间所有罪行都源自情绪酝酿而成的冲动。
E: The emotions that sentient beings possess are delicate and precious, but most of us do not realize their dangerous side. All crimes in the world are driven by impulses that stem from emotions.

C: …这句是个玩笑，你别紧张啊。不过说真的，你有空能多来和我聊聊天吗？
E: ...Don't take it so seriously. I'm just kidding. In all seriousness, would you mind coming by often to chat with me when you're free?

C: 哼，上次吹牛的时候，年利率还有百分之四十八呢…怎么，现在怕了？
E: Hmph, you said the interest rate was <unbreak>48%</unbreak> per annum the last time you bragged... What's it? Have you chickened out?

C: 别管他了，我们继续聊……
E: Ignore him. Let's keep chatting...

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 苜蓿钞、艾迪恩代币、信用点，甚至外星球的货币都能使用。
E: Alfalfa Coins, Aideen Tokens, credits, we even use currencies of foreign worlds.

C: 要是这样…能够帮助您坚定对我行理财产品信心的话，我…很乐意。
E: If... it can instill greater confidence in our financial products, I... am more than happy.

C: 请手脚快点，街上人多，有点…不好意思。
E: Please make it quick. There are many people around, and I'm... a little embarrassed.

C: 然而，就在昨天，那个客户指名了我，对，就是我！做他的专属代理人！你说，这是不是天上掉下来的馅饼！哪有这种好事！
E: Still, just yesterday, that client specially asked for me! Yes, me! To be his exclusive manager! Have I truly lucked out or what! How could this be happening to me!?

C: 呼呼…要发财了！许多人梦寐以求的机会，终于落到了我的头上！
E: Hahaha, I'm gonna be rich! The opportunity that many can only dream of... is finally upon me!

C: （咦，这个是……）
E: (Huh? That's...)

C: 啊。可那些真正有企图的人，都不会直接说出来。
E: Ah. But those who really have a motive won't admit it upfront.

C: 我知道了。你是在开玩笑，想让我心情变好。呜呜，谢谢你。
E: I've got it. You're just joking, trying to get me to laugh.

C: 钟表小子是真实存在的！
E: Clockie really exists!

C: 相信我，您很快也会爱上这里的。
E: Believe me, you'll fall in love with this place in no time.

C: 呀！好突然。我可以把这句话，当作是友好的邀约吗？
E: Ooh! How bold. Dare I take this request as a friendly invite?

C: …你吃过泡面？
E: ...You've eaten instant noodles before?

C: 这位尽职尽责的门卫将脸深深埋进掌心，像是要落下泪来。
E: The diligent guard buries her face deeply into her palms as if she were about to weep.

C: …强烈抗议！皮皮西人是匹诺康尼的基石，你们这是在自毁根基！
E: ...It's an outrage! The Pepeshi people form the cornerstone of Penacony, and this is destroying your own bedrock!

C: 歌颂梦想的年代已经结束了。现在那些所谓的歌手，任他们如何模仿和假装，也复制不出那个伟大时代的灵魂。
E: The age of singing about dreams is over. The so-called singers nowadays can't match the soul of that golden era, no matter how much they try and copy.

C: 真是虚伪……
E: What a hypocrite...

C: 总之，你是对物件心生怜悯也好，单纯好奇心作祟也罢，都可以随时来我这里观看节目——保准让你笑掉袜子！
E: All in all, whether you took pity on these items or were just simply curious about them, feel free to come here for the performances — guaranteed to make you laugh your socks off!

C: 嘿，钱也赚了，活也干了，这主意还真不错。果然我一冷静下来，金点子就接二连三地往外涌啊~
E: Hey, that way, I can get both my money and my work done. What a great idea. I just need to stay calm and great money-making ideas just keep flowing~

C: 哈？我怎么可能是猎犬呢！那些家族护卫是多么可靠，多么威武…我大概这辈子都成不了那样的人吧。
E: Huh? How can I be a Bloodhound!? The Family's guards are so dependable and mighty... I doubt I can ever be like them.

C: 只是个普通的商店而已，我家开的，主意来自我父母。
E: Just an ordinary store. It's a family business. Opening this store was my parents' idea.

C: 请别告诉别人我在这里，好吗？
E: Please don't tell anyone I'm here, all right?

C: 见到韦和小佩的时候…我很难用语言形容自己当时的心理活动。我不想伤害他们，但我也理解不了他们眼中那种病态的爱。
E: When I saw Wes and Pennie... I found it difficult to describe my feelings at that time. I didn't want to hurt them, but I couldn't understand their toxic love too.

C: 绘画的过程总能令我沉醉，不管我在画什么。
E: The painting process always mesmerizes me, no matter what I'm painting.

C: 这让我感到些许疑惑——如此伟大的「工匠」，在匹诺康尼里却见不到他的作品？
E: I just find this kind of confusing... Why are the works of such a great "craftsman" nowhere to be seen in Penacony?

C: 听起来似乎和钟表还有些联系。谢谢您，我会去看看的。
E: That sounds related to clocks and watches. Thank you. I'll go and check it out.

C: 关于你最满意的作品。
E: Tell me about the work you're most proud of.

C: 都怪我这张没遮没拦的嘴！！
E: It's all because of my big mouth!

C: 家族是什么？
E: What is The Family?

C: 祝您身体健康…
E: I wish you good health...

C: 来，这些你拿去…这地方到处是年轻人玩的游戏，我玩不明白，不如你拿着吧。
E: Here, take these... The games around here are all for young people. I simply don't get it, so you might as well take them.

C: 财富对我这种生于商贾之家的人而言，比起享乐的源泉，更像是一种责任。
E: To one born into a merchant family like me, wealth resembles more of a responsibility than a source of pleasure.

C: 你在生什么气？
E: Why are you angry?

C: 呵呵…呵呵呵，如此空洞的演奏，没有一丝情感的流露，没有一丁点独创的节奏。
E: Heheh... Heheheh, such a hollow performance, devoid of any emotion, not a trace of personal interpretation of rhythm...

C: 朋友，你说那些小东西真的能明白人类创造音乐的含义吗？
E: My friend, you're saying those little things can really understand the essence of music created by humans?

C: 前几天，就在主干道上发生的那起车祸…明明以前花点钱就能摆平的，这次非得说，因为开车的是位皮皮西富商，要多送点礼物才能让他消气。
E: A few days ago, an accident happened on one of the main roads... It could've been resolved with some compensation, but he insisted that more gifts were required since it was a rich Pepeshi businessman driving the car.

C: 哎，最开始就不该相信他们的……
E: *sigh* Shouldn't have trusted them in the first place...

C: …能怎么办？继续活着吧。
E: ...What can we do? We can only keep on living.

C: 哈，我可比看上去不正经多了！
E: Hah, I'm a lot less serious than I look!

C: 你？动漫高手？不是我看不起你啊，要论「动漫高手」，在这匹诺康尼还没人比我配得上这称呼…可现在连我，都搞不懂什么是二次元了……
E: You? An anime expert? It's not that I am underestimating your knowledge. It's just that no one in Penacony is more fitting for the title of anime expert than I... It's just that now, even I cannot understand what anime is anymore...

C: 呃…我那是…一颗卫星，对，是环绕雅利洛六号的卫星！
E: Um... I mean... it's actually a moon! Yeah, a moon orbiting Jarilo-VI!

C: 你这家伙…一看就是新来的吧？有空多去星辰的时刻转转吧……
E: You must be new here, right?... You really should check it out at the Moment of Stars...

C: 你能提供什么帮助？
E: How can you help me?

C: 继续摸摸。
E: Keep petting it.

C: 开个玩笑，您别当真。光是看看也知道，我可是这家梦境贩售店的化身，怎么可能会有血脉亲人？哈哈……
E: Well, just kidding. I'm the embodiment of this Dreamscape Sales Store, and it's impossible for me to have any blood relatives. Haha...

C: 洞天港口前，师妹的纤纤玉指抵住你挂在腰间的剑鞘，另一只手撩拨着你耳后的发丝，眼角已然兜不住的那两颗珍珠泪眼看就要掉落下来。
E: As you both stand at the starport, she tenderly touches the scabbard hanging from your waist. Her other hand gently tucks a strand of hair behind your ear, while tears shimmer in the corners of her eyes.

C: 咩咩——咩、咩、咩！咩咩？！咩咩，咩咩咩咩，咩！！
E: Baaaa... Baa, Baa, Baa! Baaaa!? Baa, baaaaaaa, baa!

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: …啊，非常抱歉！我刚才唱歌唱得有些入神了…您有什么需要吗？
E: ...Oops, I'm so sorry! I got a little carried away with my singing just now... What can I do for you?

C: 我会传送。
E: I can teleport around.

C: 「只要一块切片蛋糕，所有烦恼烟散云消。」
E: "A slice of cake is all you need to forget about your troubles."

C: 还要等多久，才能遇到真正懂我的人呢？
E: When will I meet someone who truly understands me?

C: 逛腻了，想回去了？行啊，那就走吧。
E: Bored with shopping and wish to return already? Fine, as you wish.

C: 您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
E: Your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try starting the engine again.

C: 当第三个脆筒吃到一半时，你感觉到了一丝发腻——或许这就是为什么厂商把一组脆筒的数量控制在三个。
E: When you are halfway through the third cone, you start to get sick of the taste. That's probably why the manufacturer keeps only three cones in a set.

C: 的确拿到了一些。
E: I do.

C: 能不能来点实际的？
E: Can I have something more practical?

C: 没什么了。
E: Um... Nothing.

C: 我想起了一位告解者，他向我寻求良心的慰藉，可他所做的分明是丧尽良心之事。
E: I'm reminded of a penitent who sought my comfort of his conscience, but what he did was clearly unconscionable.

C: 被捕之后，他对自己的所作所为全无悔意，反倒咒骂我是背信弃义之人。
E: After his capture, he was remorseless about his vile act, and even cursed me for being someone who had forsaken my professional oath.

C: 没什么想告解了。
E: I've got nothing to confess anymore.

C: 嘿嘿，这么一想，我还是个挺不可或缺的人物呢……
E: Hee-hee, when I think about it, I'm still a pretty important staff member around here...

C: 哈，话虽这么说，其实我的工作性质和「筑梦师」更类似——作为对自身理论的实践，我帮家族设计制作了一些小玩意…比如大街上那些窥梦电话。
E: Having said that, the nature of my work is actually similar to the one of a Dreamweaver. As practical applications of my theories, I've designed some gadgets for The Family... like the Dreampeek Call on the streets.

C: 相信我，只要多转转，你总会爱上这里的，滴答！
E: Believe me, just take a little stroll around and you will fall in love, tick-tock!

C: 当然没问题。
E: Of course!

C: 是啊。我对这里熟悉得不能再熟悉了，就连衣服都浸透了苏乐达的香味，就连影城展示的所有角色，我都能细致说出它们每个人的来历和故事。
E: I am. I could not be any more familiar with Penacony. Even my clothes are saturated with the smell of SoulGlad. Show me any character on the theme park display and I can tell you all of their backgrounds and stories in detail.

C: 就这样，我加入了鸢尾花家系，往后的经历就是另一个故事了。
E: Just like that, I became a part of the Iris Family, what happened after that is a whole other story.

C: 但麦克斯先生已经有了值得信任的伙伴，我们约好了，要在梦境里演奏一辈子音乐。
E: However, Maestro Max already has trusted companions, as we have promised to create music within the Dreamscape for the remainder of our existence.

C: 如果您接近麦克斯先生，只是出于同情或是好奇的话，我希望您最好收起这份情感，这对一位纯粹的音乐家而言无异于冒犯。
E: If you approach Maestro Max out of mere sympathy or curiosity, I implore you to set aside such sentiments, as they would be perceived as offensive to a pure musician.

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: …究竟是什么样的力量在保护着怪物们，不被噩梦彻底侵蚀呢？
E: ...I wonder, what powers have been protecting the monsters from being completely corrupted by the Nightmare?

C: 需要签名吗？今天不行…
E: Are you looking for an autograph? Not today...

C: 「秩序」——或者说橡木家系——相信你们已经照过面了。这群人背叛了神主，必然要受到相应的惩罚。但他们仍在美梦中流窜，而我们正在…有序收网。
E: I trust you have already encountered Order — or should I say the Oak Family. They betrayed the Great One and must be punished accordingly. However, they are still scuttling somewhere in the dreamscape, while we are in the process of... tightening the surrounding net one step at a time.

C: 说老实话，我们乐团里的大部分人都有点泄气了…可出路又在哪里？我们也说不清。
E: To be honest, most of us in the orchestra have started to lose faith... But how can we pivot? We aren't sure.

C: 红哨小姐发出一声沉闷、烦躁的哨音。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a depressed, cranky whistle.

C: 发号施令的快乐，一般人根本想象不到！哈！
E: It's unimaginable for most people! This joy of dishing out orders! Hah!

C: 并且我就是看不惯家族，说得冠冕堂皇，什么同谐，什么以强援弱。结果呢，还不是自己住在亮闪的房子里，留其他人自生自灭。
E: Plus, I still can't stand The Family and their pretentious proselytizing of Harmony and how they are the strong defending the weak... How can they say that when they live in their glittering houses and leave everyone else to fend for themselves?

C: 他的眼中满是恐惧。
E: His eyes are filled with fear.

C: 在黄金的时刻呆久了，看流梦礁的垃圾桶都觉得眉清目秀…真的，我没开玩笑。
E: After spending all that time in the Golden Hour, even the trashcans of the Dreamflux Reef start to look beautiful... No, I'm being serious.

C: 既然如此，我来分享一下自己的看法吧。
E: In that case, allow me to share my views.

C: 流梦礁不同于十二时刻，它的立身之本是「自由」。这里每个人都有故事，其中不乏与我相似的家伙。
E: What makes the Dreamflux Reef different from the Twelve Hours is that it was built upon the foundation of "freedom." Everyone here has a story, even someone like me.

C: 果然！象征「开拓」的无名客心胸也很「开阔」…感激不尽。
E: I knew it! Thanks for being the bigger person here, Nameless. I could not be more grateful to you.

C: 那再见，我做点别的事情打发时间。
E: Farewell. I shall find something else to kill the time.

C: …说起来，曾经有个皮皮西人也对种田表示过好奇，还兴高采烈地让我带他去参观。
E: ...That reminds me, there was a Pepeshi person who was very curious about farming before, too. He even excitedly asked me to show him around the field.

C: 这样一来，流梦礁能够缓慢地修复自身，也许有一天，它会变回从前那个繁华的样子。
E: In that case, the Dreamflux Reef can gradually recover itself. Perhaps one day, it will return to prosperity.

C: 我好像做了一个很长的梦…梦中我见到了拉扎莉娜女士……
E: I felt I had a very long dream... In my dream, I saw Madam Razalina...

C: 那可真是幸运。
E: Then you're lucky.

C: 感谢你的好意，话说回来，其实没人记得也不会怎么样…世上又有几个人的努力能被记住呢？
E: Thank you for your kindness. Speaking of which, it doesn't matter if no one remembers... How many people in the world are remembered for their efforts anyway?

C: 我还没来匹诺康尼的时候，参加过一个古代遗迹的挖掘。遗憾的是，那个文明因为资源缺乏，最终也没能走出自己的星球。
E: Before arriving in Penacony, I participated in an excavation of ancient ruins. Regrettably, the local civilization failed to depart the bounds of its planet due to a lack of resources.

C: 事情是这样的：最近乐坊来了位新成员，小号先生。那孩子有点内向，性格乖巧、很讨人喜欢…但问题就出在它太过「讨人喜欢」了。
E: Here's the thing: We've added a new member to the band recently, Mr. Trumpet, who's a little introverted, kind of cute, and very likable... But the problem is, he's too "likable."

E: Back when the Dreamflux Reef was facing dire times, nobody had enough food to eat and spirits were very low.

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 啾！多亏有客官您在，总算把这些小捣蛋鬼给找回来了啾。

C: 说人话。
E: Speak human please.

C: 没有一刻不想。
E: There's never been a moment where I haven't.

C: 是莫大的遗憾。
E: A great regret.

C: 祝你在梦中平安，{NICKNAME}。
E: May you be safe in your dreams, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我问了很多人，有人说他是滥杀无辜的狂徒，有人说他是残暴不仁的昏君，有人说他是功过参半的庸人。
E: I asked many people, with some saying that he was a madman who massacred innocents and others who said he was a vehemently tyrannical ruler. Some even said he was a hopelessly average man who did as much harm as he did good.

C: 但即便如此，他们也没法拯救所有的过去，与跟随过去一同消损的英雄。
E: But even so, they cannot salvage all of the past, nor save the heroes who perished together with bygone times.

C: 那目光平静、专注、不含恶意，却仍令你芒刺在背。
E: Their gaze is calm, focused, and devoid of ill intentions. Nevertheless, it makes you feel nervous and uneasy.

C: 每个人都有过类似的瞬间，想要把自己的一切和盘托出的瞬间。
E: Everyone has experienced such moments before, moments when they wish to reveal their true self and hold nothing back.

C: 这也就是为什么和他起冲突的会是皮皮西人了，他非得说服对方接受自己的礼物不可。
E: This was how his conflict with the Pepeshi arose. He was adamant that the Pepeshi accept his gift and wouldn't take no for an answer.

C: 接下来，请您敲定要用哪种食材来进行最终的混音吧。
E: Next, decide which ingredient you'd like to use for the final mixing.

E: I don't offer suggestions. I merely talk about lessons I've learned.

E: Wait, I'm getting sidetracked.

E: "This is the fifth day you've been lost in the forest. What started as a quest for ingredients has turned into a tragedy."

C: 虽然旅程才刚刚过半，但工作的事还是很让人担心啊……
E: Even though I'm only halfway through my trip, I'm already deeply concerned about my work...

E: By the way, since we've gotten along so well, let me offer you a piece of free investment advice:

E: Alright, talk to you later. I do have work to get to anyway.

E: Hey! Hey, hey! Say something!

E: Who can claim themselves more talented than others? Who can justify that their own suggestions bring about the greatest efficiency? Ambiguous standards only fuel dispute, resulting in mistaken trajectories and bias.

C: 如果学校能让大家少一些负担…不，如果匹诺康尼能让每个人都少一些负担，那一定就会有更多的梦想得到实现……
E: If the school eases up on everyone... No, if Penacony relieves some stress on everyone, even more dreams will be realized...

C: 原来，它炽热的正义感，甚至熔断了系统锁！它行云流水地挥舞铁锅，孤身一机击退了所有吃霸王餐的星际海盗，从此走上了惩恶除善的冒险旅程！
E: It turned out that its burning righteousness melted the system lock! It deftly brandished its pots, single-handedly beating back all the interstellar pirates who dined and dashed. From then on, it embarked on an adventure to punish evil and eliminate good!

C: 说来奇怪，他一直自言自语「有一个和自己相像的机器人果然是种有趣的体验」。或许有朝一日，我也会用自己的数据训练一个机器人？
E: It was strange that he always muttered to himself: "Having a robot that resembles yourself is truly an interesting experience." Perhaps, one day, I might also use my own data to train a robot?

E: This perfectly explains the timeless truth of "Bigger is better, and more is marvelous."

E: A soda that carries the memories of countless generations. Only a few people remember its original flavor.

E: The teachers here are very responsible. The course quality is excellent and the learning atmosphere is strong. If you want to better yourself, Fortune Academy is for you!

E: The expensive gifts on promotion, stylish but ultimately useless. The Fortune Academy students spend their days figuring out how to sell a few more of them.

E: (Check your mailbox)

C: 这是一款多人合作第一人称射击游戏，以高速射击和热血战斗为主要卖点。你将扮演被围困的巡海游侠，在热血偾张的战局中和队友不懈合作，突出重围！
E: This is a multiplayer cooperative first-person shooter, featuring high-speed shooting and intense battles as its main attractions. You will play as a beleaguered Galaxy Ranger, collaborating tirelessly with your teammates to break through the siege in this exhilarating conflict!

E: The Hex Club presents this special souvenir to "potential high-value users" to encourage them to explore the Hexanexus anytime, anywhere.

E: Miracle Orbs have altered the flow of time in this area. Fragments of Recollection cannot be activated at the moment.

E: After the frenzy over these Chrysos Heir Dolia, I opened this shop and gained some recognition. Tomorrow, I'm off to the Marmoreal Palace to paint a portrait for a distinguished elder's grand birthday bash!

E: "If individuals tend to presume a lack of mental acuity on the part of the author when faced with intricate explanations, I strongly suggest delving into Apollonia's work — On Aquila Curves."

C: 你好！
