C:
肃穆的议院，仍弥漫着喧闹。
未来的命运，在争论中飘摇。
守城自保，或追逐翩跹的火苗？
正确的抉择，无人知晓。
E:
The solemn council is still filled with clamor.
Future's destiny still whirls in discussions of candor.
To discard the city and save oneself, or to chase the flames that waver?
None knows the choice that would lead them to a place better.

C: 可当她望向<color=#9e5738>圣城的黎明</color>，\n却在心中将使命笃定。
E: But as she gazed towards the <color=#9e5738>holy city's dawn</color>,\nHer duty became fixed in her heart, stalwart in might.

C: 「我…是谁？」
E: "Who... am I?"

C: 逐火的人杰们曾蔑视巨龙，\n只因它拒绝踏碎任何敌寇。
E: The Flame-Chasing heroes once scorned the Giant Dragon,\nFor they refused to crush any foe beneath their feet.

C: 来翁法罗斯前的最后一站，\n是丹恒的故乡，一个名叫仙舟的地方。
E: Before arriving at Amphoreus,\nOur last stop was Dan Heng's homeland, a place called Xianzhou.

C: 「吾师，这是留给我的最后一局吗？」 残局的走向， 王女无数次推演。 直到登临君位， 梦中仍常常黑白交错，倾轧吞吃。
E: "Is this your final game for me, my teacher?" The princess imagined the endgame Over and over. Even when she took the imperial crown, She still dreamt of the black-and-white board.

C: 战后的宴上，\n织者为她编制盛装，\n统帅为她斟满蜜酿。
E: During the banquet after the battle,\nThe weaver tailored for her a splendid dress,\nAnd the commander poured her honey brew.

C: 掣曳大地者将没于群山，\n缝补晨昏者将永留天际。
E: Those who tug at the earth shall end amongst the mountains,\nThose who sew dawn and dusk shall remain eternal in the sky.

C: 自初识以后，\n华衣的少女便常来叨扰。
E: After that first meeting,\nThe richly dressed girl often came in greeting.

C: 但女孩最常望向的，\n却是那仄暗的天空。
E: But where the girl's eyes often gazed,\nWas the wine-dark sky, gloomy and bleak.

C: 「做着沉重又可悲的梦……」\n「却总露出笑容的痴人。」\n智种学派贤人的评价。
E: "A fool who was always wreathed in smiles..."\n"While drowning in a weighty and pitiful dream."\nWas the assessment from the Nousporist Sage.

C: 「若阳光因命运而昏淡……」\n「就由我代替，疗愈世间的晨曦。」
E: "Should the sun be dimmed by destiny's decree..."\n"Then the dawn that heals the world... I shall replace."

C: 栖居于人子的思绪与五感， 泰坦不忍作壁上观。 「向吾求索如何？人子。 吾绝不吝智慧，知无不言。」
E: Dwelling in the child of humankind's thoughts and senses, The Titan cannot bear to remain a mere spectator. "Why not ask me your questions, child of humanity? I am rich in wisdom and shall speak with no ambiguity."

C: 金线替织者作出了回答。
E: For the Weaver, the answer lies in her golden threads.

C: 「这不难，这些都不难…」\n韵脚如针脚般落下，\n像一声叹息。
E: "Hardly a challenge. None of these pose a challenge..."\nThe same word rolls off her tongue twice,\nthe latter as soft as a sigh.

C:
传递神谕的孩童明白，
将此担压覆在一人身上，

堪比负世之泰坦承担的黎明。
E:
The child who passes along the prophecy understands,
That to lay such a heavy weight on one person,

Is comparable to the dawn the Worldbearing Titan shoulders.

C: 悬锋大军最终兵临城下，「曳石学派」贤人迈德漠斯率众学者御敌，终于亲眼看到了领兵的新任「王翼冠军」——绿发眼罩的男人，虽然穿着悬锋战士的衣服，但迈德漠斯一眼认出，那是他的昔日同堂：阿那克萨戈拉斯！
E: When the Kremnos army finally arrived at the gates, Mydeimos, the Helkolithist Sage, led his fellow scholars to defend against the enemy. At last, he saw with his own eyes the new "King's Aegis" leading the army — a man with green hair and an eye patch. Though dressed as a Kremnos warrior, Mydeimos recognized him instantly: his former classmate, Anaxagoras!

C: 少女没有说话，她的执拗填满了沉默。
E: The girl remained quiet, her stubbornness filling the silence.

C: 「白厄，白厄…醒醒！」
E: "Phainon, Phainon... Wake up!"

C: 只是，在这里盛开的，已不止莹蓝色的安提灵。在月之茧温和的柔光之下，五光十色的花海如同巨大而又温暖的怀抱，轻轻搂住了缓缓落下的死龙。
E: Yet it was not only the azure Antila that bloomed here. Beneath the gentle radiance of the Moon Cocoon, the sea of multi-colored iridescent flowers spread like a vast, warm embrace, tenderly cradling the slowly descending Netherwing.

C: 死龙伏在少女的身侧，静静看着她的欣喜与热泪，就像那模糊记忆中遥远的过去一般。
E: Netherwing laid down at the girl's side, silently watching her joys and tears, just like it had done in a distant past, blurred and half-forgotten in memory.

C:
星穹列车的无名客，「不朽」的龙裔。误入死循环的外部变量。

【指令：对其坐标进行定位，坐标定位失败。】
【结论：目标已离开翁法罗斯。】
【否认：检测到对象，信源未知，结论错误。】
E:
A Nameless from the Astral Express. A Scion of Permanence. An external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop.

[Directive: Pinpoint his location. Failed to locate his coordinates.]
[Conclusion: Subject has exited Amphoreus.]
[Negative: Target detected. Signal source unknown. Conclusion error.]

C:
路径：负世。原动力：憎恨。
注释：自我认知为空，仅对破坏性刺激产生应答。
其恨意引来了纳努克对这一个体的瞥视，证明他已成为最完美的毁灭因子。
但他拒绝完成再创世，通过重置实验，并将记忆和火种传递给新的自我，制造永劫回归，以保证铁墓无法从翁法罗斯中破壳。
在第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环末尾，意图通过「毁灭」破坏自身，令「负世」路径出现逻辑漏洞。
现已被铁墓合并。因权杖内核层受到冲击，模拟世界的黑潮现象大幅衰退。
在第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环中，响应外部刺激，通过「毁灭」力量摧毁「坐标：神悟树庭」，并促使「无名泰坦大墓」显现。
E:
Track: Worldbearer. Primum Mobile: Hatred.
Note: Intra-Cognition is null. Responds only to destructive stimuli.
Its hatred drew the gaze of Nanook upon its individual being, proving it as having already become the most perfect factor of Destruction.
However, it refused to complete the Era Nova. Through resetting the experiment, it transferred its memories and Coreflames to its next self, thus creating the eternal recurrence to ensure Irontomb would never hatch from Amphoreus.
At the end of the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th recursive loop, it attempted to destroy itself through "Destruction" to create a logical vulnerability in the "Worldbearing" track.
It has now been merged by Irontomb. Due to an impact on the Scepter's core layer, the black tide phenomenon in the simulated world has greatly receded.
In the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive cycle, in response to external stimuli, it used the power of Destruction to destroy "Coordinate: Grove of Epiphany" and cause the "Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan" to manifest.

C: 向家人坦白之，举家还债，共谋出路。潜逃避债虽能得一夜安寝，然终究人心惶惶，朝不保夕，更将落得身陷囹圄，此无异于饮鸩止渴！
E: {SPACE}come clean with your family about everything. Seek help from them, plan ahead with them, and together work your way out of the debts. Debt evasion may bring you a brief moment of relief, but it won't grant you lasting peace. Escaping from your liabilities will only cost you dearly once they catch up with you, and believe me, they will. You can't be on the run forever, and you will have to pay the price one way or another.

E: The pleasures the "Golden Hour" can provide are myriad and bountiful... ignoring whether such topics should be discussed on stage at all.\nBut no pleasure can match the feeling of reuniting with old friends. Pulled by the color of undeniable blue, the implications he poses for you are...

C: 「{NICKNAME}，你听说了没？遗迹里有个跟史瓦罗长得一模一样的家伙在搞破坏。唉，之前好不容易才解决掉史瓦罗，结果又冒出来一个——算了，{NICKNAME}，来把它揍趴下吧！」
E: "Hey, {NICKNAME}, did you hear about that thing that looked like Svarog and making a mess in the ruins? Svarog was difficult enough to defeat, and now there's another one... Oh well, let's give it a solid beating, {NICKNAME}!"

C: 战斗结束时，每拥有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>10</unbreak>金币</color>，都会获得<color=#f29e38ff>1金币利息</color>（最多5金币）。\n<color=#f29e38ff>适度积累金币</color>也是获得更多经济的有效手段。
E: At the end of combat, for every <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>10</unbreak> Gold Coins</color> you own, you'll earn <color=#f29e38ff>1 Gold Coin</color> as interest (up to 5 Gold Coins).\n<color=#f29e38ff>Moderately saving up Gold Coins</color> is an effective way to gain more economic advantage.

C: 拖动到角色身上，可重新随机该角色的所有装备。
E: Drag onto the character to randomly reroll all pieces of equipment on that character.

E: Before using abilities, the expected <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness</color> reduction will be displayed above the target's HP bar.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>虚数属性</color>造成弱点击破时，会立即造成<color=#f29e38ff>虚数属性击破伤害</color>，并施加<color=#f29e38ff>禁锢</color>状态。<color=#f29e38ff>禁锢</color>会使敌方目标速度降低，并使其行动延后。
E: Using <color=#f29e38ff>Imaginary</color> attacks to trigger Weakness Break will immediately deal <color=#f29e38ff>Imaginary Break DMG</color> and apply the <color=#f29e38ff>Imprisonment</color> effect. <color=#f29e38ff>Imprisonment</color> will cause enemies to have SPD Reduction and have their action delayed.

E: After obtaining Phone Wallpapers, they can be changed in the <color=#f29e38ff>Phone function</color>.

C: 通过贴纸装点手账页以提升对应页面的完成度
E: Use your stickers collection to decorate your scrapbook and boost its completion progress.

C: 「火种匣」是用于存放重要物品的容器，将其激发时，「火种匣」外侧会呈现出<color=#f29e38ff>锁孔</color>，并对应激活数个<color=#f29e38ff>钥匙残片</color>。
E: The Coreflame Casket is used to contain important items. When activated, <color=#f29e38ff>keyholes</color> will appear on the exterior of the Coreflame Casket and activate the corresponding number of <color=#f29e38ff>key fragments</color>.

C: 在角色培养页面，可以使用快速刷取来补足缺失的<color=#f29e38ff>拟造花萼/凝滞虚影</color>材料。
E: On the Character Build Screen, you can use Quick Farm to obtain missing <color=#f29e38ff>Calyx / Stagnant Shadow</color> materials.

C: 克劳克影业在匹诺康尼的梦境中设计了一种街头游戏，能够让宾客通过变身装置扮演卡通中的「哈努兄弟」，在梦境的角落经历一段奇妙的冒险。
E: Clock Studios has designed an arcade game in Penacony's Dreamscape, able to let the guests play the cartoon character Hanu through the transformation device, and experience a miraculous adventure in a corner of the Dreamscape.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>钟表把戏</color>还能带来许多意想不到的<color=#f29e38ff>惊喜</color>，多多探索吧，滴答！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Clockwork</color> can also bring lots of unexpected <color=#f29e38ff>surprises</color>. Go and explore, tick tock!

C: 你的<color=#f29e38ff>谈判选择会产生不同的结果</color>，该结果可能提升或降低气势值。随着玩家的选择，谈判会不断推进，直至谈判回合减少至0，届时谈判结束。
E: Your <color=#f29e38ff>negotiation choices will lead to different outcomes</color>, which can either increase or decrease your morale. As you make choices, the negotiation progresses until the number of negotiation rounds drops to 0, at which point the negotiation ends.

C: 当心运动中的物体，它们可能会撞到开拓者。不小心可是会受伤的。

E: The Mistletoe is equipped with an Auto-Cruise program. {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} the <color=#f29e38ff>Auto-Cruise</color> button, and the Mistletoe will automatically fly to the navigation point. {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} again during auto-cruise to switch to <color=#f29e38ff>Manual Control</color>.

E: Stage finalization and score data are affected by 2 factors: The boss' <color=#f29e38ff>remaining HP percentage</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>remaining action value</color> after defeating the boss. If the boss is undefeated, only its <color=#f29e38ff>remaining HP percentage</color> is calculated.

Ice-Quantum Type: Spear of Eternal Ice, Waning Selenic Chakram, and New Moon's Oath

我谨代表金人巷商会向您表达最诚挚的感激之情。
由于您的苦心经营，我们成功在还款日前赚取<color=#f29e38ff>#1</color>商会储值金，完成了营收目标。
金人巷商会承诺营收将用于偿还债务，完善金人巷建设。
我们会确保来之不易的成果发挥最大的效益。
E:
On behalf of the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I want to once again express our deepest gratitude to you.
Thanks to your diligent efforts, we have successfully earned a total of <color=#f29e38ff>#1</color> in Guild Funds before the repayment deadline, reaching the revenue target.
The Merchant Guild pledges to use the funding to repay what is owed and also to improve Aurum Alley's infrastructure.
We promise to use these hard-earned gains to achieve the maximum effect.

C:
◆ 终末视界 ◆
● 通过「终末视界」功能，开拓者可以提前体验尚未满足前置条件的活动。
● 由于提前接取活动任务，该功能会在一定程度上影响剧情及探索体验，请开拓者酌情使用。

◆ 使用条件 ◆
● 当开拓等级达到<unbreak>21</unbreak>级及以上时，若活动支持「终末视界」，则可在「旅情事记」界面中开启该功能。
● 若在活动限时内已开启「终末视界」功能，可在活动收录至「常时传略」后继续提前体验。
● 开拓者可以同时开启多个活动的「终末视界」，但同一时间，只能激活其中之一以体验活动内容。

◆ 活动任务 ◆
● 开启「终末视界」后，将忽略所有活动的前置条件，立即接取对应活动任务。
● 切换追踪另一个通过「终末视界」接取的任务时，将自动切换为该任务的「终末视界」状态。

◆ 活动地图 ◆
● 开启「终末视界」后，会以临时开放的形式解锁活动涉及的地图，包括尚未在正式剧情流程中解锁的地图。
● 在「终末视界」的临时地图中，仅可体验当前活动必要的内容。
● 如果切换追踪至另一个通过「终末视界」接取的任务，当前「终末视界」中的临时地图将暂时关闭，无法进入，直到该任务的「终末视界」状态被重新激活。

◆ 关闭条件 ◆
● 当开拓者完成所有前置条件后，活动将正式解锁。对应任务的「终末视界」状态会随之消失，临时地图也将无法进入。
● 如果活动内容尚未完成，对应进度继承至正式解锁的活动中。
E:
◆ Finality's Vision ◆
● Through the Finality's Vision feature, Trailblazers can participate in events before meeting their prerequisite conditions in advance.
● Since you would be experiencing the events in advance, this feature may impact your story and gameplay experience to some extent. Please use this feature at your discretion.

◆ Requirements ◆
● When your Trailblaze Level is at <unbreak>21</unbreak> or above, should the event support Finality's Vision, you can access said event through the Travel Log function.
● If you have already activated the Finality's Vision feature within the event's active period, you can continue to experience it in advance even after it is included in Conventional Memoir.
● Trailblazers can start multiple events via Finality's Vision at the same time, but only one can be activated to experience its content at any given time.

◆ Event Missions ◆
● After activating Finality's Vision, all event prerequisites will be waived, and you will be allowed to directly take on the corresponding event mission.
● When you switch your navigation to another mission accepted via Finality's Vision, you will automatically be switched to the Finality's Vision state for that mission.

◆ Event Map ◆
● After activating Finality's Vision, you will temporarily be able to explore the maps related to the unlocked game mode, including maps yet to be unlocked through the main story's progression.
● In temporarily accessed maps via Finality's Vision, you can only experience the content essential to the current event.
● If you switch your navigation to another mission accepted via Finality's Vision, the temporary map for the current Finality's Vision will close and become inaccessible until the respective mission relating to said map is reactivated.

◆ Closing Conditions ◆
● The event will officially unlock once Trailblazers have completed all prerequisite conditions. The Finality's Vision status for the corresponding mission will be removed, and access to the temporary map will also be disabled.
● If the event content has not been fully completed, you can inherit your progress when you officially unlock the event.

C:
那高高在上的，又是何者授予它们神格？
学士漫步神悟树庭，执此一问，驳斥眼之所见的一切智者。
恰如他所精擅的魔术，辩才无双的反对者们，开口时便已坠入陷阱——
神格亦是由他者「授予」。倾尽残生，这渎神者从未探究……
他仅作证明。
E:
What nameless being bestowed divinity on those higher existences?
The scholar walks through Grove of Epiphany and refutes all the wise ones he meets with this question alone.
For akin to the magic tricks he is so skilled at, his sophistry opponents fall into his trap as soon as they open their mouths —
By admitting that divinity is indeed "bestowed" by other beings. See, throughout this blasphemer's life, he had never sought via questions...
Instead, only ever offered proof.

C: 我整理完今天的照片就休息啦，你也别熬夜打游戏哦！
E: I'm gonna get some rest after I've sorted these photos. Don't stay up all night playing video games again!

C: 名字是我自己取的，大家也叫我三月、小三月…你呢？你想叫我什么？
E: I came up with my name myself, but some people just call me March... Which do you prefer?

C: 哦~我全都懂了！
E: Ahh, I get it now!

C: 前方还有数不尽的奇观盛景，我又怎能就此停歇。
E: With countless marvelous sights to be seen, I couldn't possibly consider stopping here.

C: 终点…从未真正抵达。
E: Our final stop can never truly be reached.

C: 想我了么？
E: Did you miss me?

C: 这是意外之喜。
E: What a pleasant surprise.

C: 嗯？没睡醒吗，别勉强自己，再睡一会儿吧。
E: Hm? Still half asleep? Don't force yourself. You should get some more rest.

C: 想给这个宇宙多加些玩法，每天都跑图，不无聊么？
E: *sigh* I wish this universe had a few more things to do. Don't you get bored running across the map every day?

C: 任何人如果觉得自己可以像黑塔女士那样任性妄为，建议他先思考一下自己是否具备黑塔女士那样的智慧~
E: If there's anyone who thinks they can be as headstrong as Madam Herta, I'd recommend they consider whether or not they possess her intelligence first.

C: 哎呀呀，这就是「追星之旅」吗？
E: Another step closer to distant worlds.

C: 重新…启动……
E: Rebooting...

C: 不足为虑。
E: This is nothing.

C: 干将，莫邪！
E: Kanshou! Bakuya!

C: 嗯，还不赖。
E: Mm-hmm, not bad.

C: 收工收工，写曲子咯~
E: Signing off now! Time to get some songwriting going~

C: 这首歌，送给你的~
E: This song's just for you~

C: 演出…还没……
E: The show... must go on...

C: 布洛妮娅大人已数次深入最危险的前线，与我们并肩作战。
E: Lady Bronya has ventured deep into the most dangerous regions of the front line with us — many times for that matter.

C: 我时不时还会像以前那样，用小熊玩偶练习缝合伤口呢。
E: I still occasionally practice suturing on my old teddy bear, just like in the old days.

C: 谁？听名字像是外来者…我们这边外来者可多了，在鉴爻轩也经常碰到，多半是来求自己「求长生」成功…嗯，你没听错，我说了两个「求」。
E: Who? That sounds like an outsider... We've got a lot of outsiders. You'll come across them a lot in The Looking Bronze. He's probably here to seek success in "Seeking Immortality" for himself... Yes, I did say "seek" twice.

C: 煌煌威灵，遵吾敕命。斩无赦！
E: Radiant spirit, heed my word. Show no mercy!

C: 木叔叔啊…哦，是这样，我小时候不想练剑，就偷偷跑到他家里去，刚开始他教我认字，写他名字，让我叫他椒叔，我哪认得呀，就叫他木叔叔…后来他也不教我了，就给我做各种好吃的——直到我娘揪着我的耳朵把我抓回去。
E: Uncle J... Oh, it's like this — I didn't like sword fighting class when I was a kid, so I would sneak away and visit him. He taught me how to read and how to write his name, but his name was too hard for me, so he just let me call him Uncle J... Eventually he stopped teaching me how to write and just made me all kinds of delicious food, until my mother dragged me by the ear back to sword lessons.

C: 吓到了吧？这便是云骑军的实力！
E: Get it now? That's the power of the Cloud Knights!

C: 事已前定…么……
E: Was this... predestined...?

C: 去会一会它吧！
E: Let's go say hi!

C: 在仙舟的尺度之下，咱们短生种可真像是白驹过隙一样——不过也正因如此，咱们才更应该把握当下呀！
E: On the Xianzhou, short-life species like us have a fleeting existence, here one moment and gone the next. That's all the more reason to seize the moment while you still have it!

C: 哎呀呀，怎么感觉好久没见到你了？什么？昨天才见过我？嗐——一日不见，如隔三秋！
E: Geez, why do I feel like I haven't seen you in a long time? What? You saw me yesterday? Ah — a day without seeing you feels like three years!

C: 别闲着呀，闲着谁给咱赏钱啊！
E: No one's gonna pay you to stand still!

C: 走你！
E: Here we go!

C: 将军偶尔会把我当成旧日的朋友。可惜，我并不能回应这份期待。
E: Sometimes the general treats me as a friend from the old days. Unfortunately, I am unable to return the sentiment.

C: 伤到又如何？
E: So what if it hurt?

C: 藿藿：谢谢您谢谢您！
E: Huohuo: Thank you, thank you!

C: 多谢，让您破费了。
E: Thank you for your generosity.

C: 多谢相助。
E: Thank you for your help.

C: 即使在朱明，也难有战士能与岁阳共生得如此融洽，几近于一心同体。这个一身软糯香气的小姑娘，可真是不简单啊～
E: Even on the Zhuming, it's rare to see a soldier and a heliobus have such a symbiotic relationship, as if they are of one heart and mind. This soft-scented girl is really something~

C: 将军大人四两拨千斤的手段还历历在目…希望有朝一日，小女子还能再次目睹。
E: The general's skill in maximizing returns with minimal effort is still vivid in my mind... I hope that one day, I can witness it again.

C: 驭空大人同我说，她也曾在某天「死去」，而后漫长的日子里，一直在寻找「活着」的感受。
E: Madam Yukong told me, there was a day when she too once "died," and in the long days that have followed, she's been searching for that feeling of being "alive" again.

C: 来到匹诺康尼的外人不少，从匹诺康尼离开的本地人却不多…她会做出这样的选择，想必另有隐情吧。
E: We've seen many outsiders come to Penacony, but locals leaving? That's rare... She must have had her reasons.

C: 刺绣的手感与培育切片类似：控制手腕的方式，刚好的角度，全神投入的状态。
E: The feel of embroidery is similar to that of growing a culture in the laboratory — fine control of the wrist, just the right angle, and total commitment.

C: 试试手气。
E: Feeling lucky?

C: 记忆是常变的泡沫。
E: Memories are ever-changing.

C: 又是一份珍贵的回忆。
E: Another precious memory to hold onto.

C: 也许，正确的回答不止一种。
E: Perhaps there's more than one right answer.

C: 如果身配一柄刀，总要用它斩下些什么。我拔刀的理由…从前、如今、往后，只有一个。
E: If one carries a blade, it's bound to be used to cut something down. My reason for drawing my sword — past, present, or future — remains singular.

C: 下次再见吧，希望我的歌声能为你带来一夜好梦。
E: Until our next meeting. May my songs gift you with pleasant dreams.

C: 我能看见…她也曾在雨中行走，也曾在战斗中燃烧，也曾用双手捧起死灰——以一种和我完全不同的方式。
E: I can see... she once walked in the rain, once burned in battle, and once held the cold ashes in her hands — in a way completely different from mine.

C: 星期日先生年纪轻轻，却已经是匹诺康尼的大人物…光是在一旁看着他，就会让人感到压力倍增……
E: Well, despite his young age, Mr. Sunday is already a big deal in Penacony. Just watching him from afar can make you feel overwhelmed...

C: 我也能变得那么厉害？不会是在做梦吧…
E: Wait, am I really that impressive? This has to be a dream!

C: 工作全部完成，好好休息一下吧。
E: Time for a well-deserved break.

C: 你别看乱破每天胡言乱语，就真当她是个二傻子。她那混乱的小脑瓜可聪明得很！而且在大是大非的问题上，乱破向来严格遵循自己的「忍道」，绝他宝了个贝的不含糊。
E: Don't be fooled by Rappa just because she's always jabberin' nonsense all day. Her chaotic little mind is sharper than a cactus needle! And, when it comes to right or wrong, Rappa strictly follows her own "way of the ninja" and is absolutely forkin' resolute about it.

C: 星空之下，遍布恶煞，无助的人呐在暗处挣扎。无字的忍法用血泪写下，无私的忍侠由夜幕接纳。言语道断、忍法缭乱，无道恶逆only way烟消云散。乱潮间将恶党全部抹杀，破晓前来点亮炫目火花。
E: Under starry skies, evil low 'n' high, helpless folk in the dark fightin' for their lives. Silent ninja arts written down in red tears, noble ninja hearts in the night joined here. Words broken down, ninjutsu shines loud, brutal villains' only way, take 'em all out. Stormy tides crashin' forth, all evil slain, come the dawn, shining sparks lightin' up again.

C: 稍微有些喧闹呢。
E: A bit too much commotion for my taste.

C: 谁要是以为小敌只会埋头打架，那就要吃大亏啦！论力量，他是第一，论军事和历史，他也是第一！我可是很擅长教人的！
E: Anyone who thinks De only knows how to fight is greatly mistaken! In terms of strength, he's number one. In terms of military strategy and history, he's also number one! I'm really good at teaching people!

C: 大大坏蛋！
E: Super big meanie!

C: 给你一个大拇指~
E: Here's a thumbs-up for you~

C: 怒吼吧，吾即纷争。
E: Hear my roar. I am Strife!

C: 感谢。我也会给你所需之物。
E: Thank you, and I'll give you what you need.

C: 如今我知晓了，妹妹曾经不忍心见到花瓣凋零，便时时刻刻守望着花海，直到它们走向生命的终点——如今，我也会同她一同陪伴迷途的魂灵。
E: Now I know everything. My sister was unwilling to see the flowers wither, so she kept vigil over them, staying by them until they reached the end of their life. Now, I, too, will join her in accompanying the lost souls.

C: 很少见到像丹宝情绪那么稳定的人，好像无论发生什么事都不会多眨一下眼睛，他应该也很适合当医师吧？
E: It's rare to see someone as emotionally stable as Dannie. It's as if he doesn't react even when faced with the darkest of calamities. He'd make a good healer.

C: 海列屈拉？那个名字早已随往日沉入了深海…原来是你，灰色的小鱼苗…还是叫我海瑟音吧。作为圣城的骑士统领，我会驻守于此，绝不允许命运的乱流扰乱你的视线。
E: Helektra? That name has long since sunk into the depths of the past... Ah, it's you, little gray fry. Call me Hysilens. I am the Knight Commander of the holy city, and I will remain on watch. I will not let the storms of fate cloud your eyes.

C: 请继续吧。以金丝拨动的旋律，格外动人心弦。
E: Please, keep going. Melodies played on your golden threads are particularly moving.

C: 多亏了岁月爵的努力，我为翁法罗斯设下的最后一道律法才没有得以触发。有时不得不承认，血与火的战争固然能成就伟业，但友爱与包容才能深入人心。
E: It was all thanks to Dux Temporum's efforts that the final law I set up for Amphoreus was not triggered. Sometimes I have to admit that, while great deeds can be accomplished through wars soaked in blood and fire, it's love and tolerance that bring together hearts and minds.

C: 三千万篇相似而不相同的故事，听起来是不是很多呢？可我从来没有厌倦过，和{NICKNAME}旅行的时候，又感动地重温了一遍呢！但故事的每一页，似乎都有些遗憾，想在这里加一段欢笑，想在那里填补上空白…多亏有{NICKNAME}在，终于能为它们续写浪漫的结局了呀♪
E: Thirty million similar yet different stories... Doesn't it sound like a lot? But I never grew tired of it. I even relived it when I travelled with {NICKNAME}, and it was still so moving! However, there were always regrets left on every single page. I wanted to add some smiles here and fill up some blanks there... It was all thanks to {NICKNAME} that we could finally compose a romantic ending for them ♪

E: The fierce battle concluded with Sam and Acheron standing face to face, lowering their weapons. "Hold it. Your time hasn't come yet."

C: 大丽花和流萤找到一处封存记忆的画框，需要用承载特殊记忆的光锥打开。大丽花决定碰碰运气，在附近搜寻开启方法。
E: The Dahlia and Firefly found a frame containing sealed memories that required a Light Cone which bore special memories to unlock. The Dahlia decided to try her luck and search the surroundings for a way to unlock it.

E: Firefly sensed Something Unto Death approaching, just as you, Acheron, and Black Swan arrived at the hall. Firefly steeled herself for what was to come, ready to face death within the dream.

C: 砂金必须去寻回「翡翠」基石，正巧得到路过此地的银枝帮助。大丽花和黑天鹅动身寻找黄泉，要挫败阴谋，非得有一位令使出手不可。
E: Aventurine must recover the Jade Cornerstone, and fortunately, received help from Argenti, who happened to be passing by. The Dahlia and Black Swan set out to find Acheron, since they would need an Emanator to step in to thwart this conspiracy.

E: When ally targets have a certain number of "<u>Obsession</u>" stacks, their Follow-Up ATK and Additional DMG increase. After entering combat, when the number of ally targets on the field changes, gains "<u>Obsession</u>".

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片。战斗胜利后每有1名满血角色，获得<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments. After winning a battle, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments for each character at full health.

C:
「那些不应记起之物，就叫它们毁灭。」
怀揣这样的信念，我从琥珀色的池中升起。
千万人的呓语在我脑海中嗡鸣，
我将这个世界的出生与死亡尽收眼底。
我的翅膀取自角鹰，我的尖牙取自蟒蛇，
我带着人们对天敌的全部记忆，投身裁定记忆的旅行。
「去吧，吃得干净一些。」
少女撑开伞，只留给我一个背影。
于是我欢快地咬开下一个受害者的脖颈。
E:
"Let those things that should not be remembered be destroyed."
With this belief, I rise from the amber-colored pool.
With murmurs of countless souls buzzing in my mind,
I witness every birth and death in this world.
My wings are taken from the harpy eagle, my fangs from the python.
Carrying all memories of humanity's nemeses, I embark on a journey to judge memories.
"Go on, leave nothing behind."
The girl opens her umbrella, showing me only her back.
So I gleefully tear open the neck of my next victim.

C:
我们是离群索居的人，奔走在断壁残垣之间。
废墟是我们嬉戏的舞台，凝固的记忆划过我们指尖：
是砖石、是土壤、是剑锋、是皮毛……
感官的刺激化作故事，诉说着每座城邦的终焉。
而我们拾起这些故事，彼此传递、记录，随后将它送去远方。
有时是在奥赫玛的市集上，有时是在幸存者的手中。
有人说我们是投机者，有人说我们是盗墓贼。
面对这些指控，我们只是付之一笑：
只要故事还被人铭记，文明就不会消亡。
E:
We are solitary wanderers, roaming through broken walls and fallen places.
The ruins are the stage where we play for fun, where frozen memories slip through our fingertips:
Bricks and soil, sword edges and pelts...
Sensory stimuli transform into stories, telling the end of every city-state.
We gather these stories, transmit and record them, then send them far away.
Sometimes at the Okhema market, sometimes in the hands of survivors.
Some call us opportunists, others call us grave robbers.
Facing these accusations, we simply laugh them off:
As long as those stories remain engraved in people's memory, civilization will never perish.

C:
斯缇科西亚的母亲们都说，勿要学那逐浪的鱼。
头脑空空，随波逐流，全然不知该往何处去。
渔民们却说，还是那逐浪的鱼讨喜。
它的动作总是迟缓，哪怕被海兽啃食了一半身体。
曾有海妖用歌声为它引路，
却无法填补它双眼的空洞。
幸而它们的数量多如繁星，海洋才不至于空空荡荡。
每当类似的故事讲起，学者总会摇头叹息：
若非天性使然，它们本可以长得很大，
大到整片海洋都无法容下。
E:
The mothers of Styxia all say, don't be like the wave-chasing fish.
Empty-headed, drifting with the current, having no idea where to go.
But the fishermen say they prefer these wave-chasing fish.
They always move sluggishly, even with half their bodies eaten by sea beasts.
Once a sea siren tried to guide them with her song,
yet couldn't fill the void in their eyes.
Fortunately, they are as numerous as the stars, so the ocean isn't left empty.
Whenever such stories are told, scholars always shake their heads and sigh:
If not for their nature, they could have grown enormous,
so large that the entire ocean couldn't contain them.

C: 这里仍由五大家系管理，一路上，你也能看到有多少成员驻守。
E: This place is still governed by the Five Lineages, and along the way, you've seen how many of their members are stationed here.

C: 如果我有和它一样的羽毛和翅膀，一定会想飞翔，哪怕只是试一试。
E: If I had feathers and wings like it does, I'd definitely want to fly, even if just to try it once.

C: 如此说来，您身上的异常，现在怎么样了？
E: Speaking of which, how's that anomaly of yours doing now?

C: 她么…只是一个趁机摆弄记忆，假装成星核猎手同伴的焚化工。你们都被她骗过了。
E: She's... just a Cremator who manipulated memories and pretended to be a Stellaron Hunter's companion. She fooled all of you.

C: 「谐乐鸽」。
E: "Charmony Dove."

C: 假面愚者，你不该来这的。
E: Masked Fool, you shouldn't be here.

C: 重现寰宇蝗灾…对「梦主」而言，这有什么好处？
E: What does the Dreammaster gain from recreating the Swarm Disaster?

C: 不久之后，热砂的时刻，布道告终之时
E: Not long after, in the Moment of Scorchsand, at the end of the sermon...

C: 不会有错，就是这里。
E: No doubt about it, this is the place.

C: …律令？
E: ...Divine law?

C: 这不过是「自我欺骗」——就连过程，你也从未改变过。
E: That's just self-deception. You've never been able to change the course of events.

C: 辩言到此为止，退去吧，猎手，你无法阻挡那一击。
E: That's enough talk. Stand down, Hunter. You can't stop that strike.

C: 犯不着惊动仙舟联盟，一辈子只能用一次的宝贝你好好留着吧。成千上万的自由意志？小意思——
E: Keep your once-in-a-lifetime treasure. We don't need to bother the Xianzhou Alliance for such a tiny request. You want thousands of people with unwavering free will? Hah, that's easy...

C: 但时机稍纵即逝，我们必须自救。
E: But time is of the essence. We must take our fate into our own hands.

C: 我会去击败他！
E: I'll defeat him!

C: …那么，你又为何能出现在这里？
E: ...Then, how were you able to reach this place?

C: 而如果，我是注定坠亡的鸟儿，无法再次歌唱——<color=#dbc291ff>我摔落于地面的声音，或许会是我最后的「同谐」乐章，但却绝不会成为这个世界的绝响！</color>
E: And if I am a bird destined to fall, doomed to never again sing... <color=#dbc291ff>Then, while the sound of me hitting the ground may be my last note for the Harmony, it will never be this world's swansong!</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>任何一个平凡的少女，面对我所面对的这一切，也会做出一样的选择。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Any ordinary girl would make the same choice I did... When faced with everything I have faced.</color>

C: 可钟表匠的意志，永远不会消磨殆尽。
E: But the will of the Watchmaker will never be worn away.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「现在我成为了{RUBY_B#时间}终末{RUBY_E#}，高举时轮，毁灭世界。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Now I am become {RUBY_B#time}Finality{RUBY_E#}, lifting the wheel of time, the destroyer of worlds."</color>

C: …我很抱歉。
E: ...I'm very sorry.

C: 塔塔洛夫曾说过，凶手总是会回到案发现场。你一定就是窃走星核的元凶，看来我不得不制裁你了！
E: As Tatalov once said, criminals always return to the scene of the crime. You must be the culprit who stole the Stellaron, and now I have no choice but to bring you to justice!

C: 哼哼，缇宝老师教得也很棒！不过，刚才只是教学局，真正的比赛现在才要开始。
E: Hehe, Lady Tribbie did a great job too! But that was just the tutorial. The real match is about to begin.

C: 谢谢你的安慰，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。但乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」并非双目，而是这由飞鸟所衔的卷轴。
E: Thank you for your comfort, kind {F#lady}{M#sir}. But Urania's "eyes" are not eyes at all, just scrolls carried by birds.

C: 彩虹色的屏障庇护着在此避难的大家，公民组建起守卫队伍，英雄们奔赴抗争前线。
E: The rainbow-colored barrier shelters all who seek refuge here. Citizens have formed defense squads, and heroes have rushed to the front line of resistance.

C: 砂金＆大丽花
E: Aventurine & The Dahlia

C: 召唤队列
E: Summon Queue

C: 当时，我和小凯撒在最终决赛相遇。
E: Back then, I faced off against little Imperator in the grand finals.

C: 可概率获得以下奖励
E: A chance to obtain the following rewards

C: 回合开始•二
E: Turn Begins 2

C: 康士坦丝女士，愿我们合作愉快。
E: May our collaboration be a fruitful one, Miss Constance.

C: 曲终人亡的时刻…美不胜收。
E: The moment when it all dies... is so beautiful.
